C:
◆ 活动规则 ◆
活动期间，挑战「模拟宇宙」或「差分宇宙」时，可获得双倍奖励。
消耗活动双倍奖励次数与沉浸器（或开拓力）后，将在原有奖励之外额外获得一次奖励。
活动期间，双倍奖励的次数有限，可用的剩余次数和次数上限以「位面分裂」活动界面中的显示为准。
双倍奖励次数在活动期间不会重置，请开拓者合理安排时间挑战。

◆ 活动奖励 ◆
挑战「模拟宇宙」或「差分宇宙」获得位面饰品奖励时，将会自动消耗活动次数获得双倍奖励。
E:
◆ Event Rules ◆
During the event, Trailblazers can receive double rewards by challenging Simulated Universe and Divergent Universe.
You will get an additional reward on top of default drops after consuming an event double reward opportunity and Trailblaze Power (or Immersifier).
During the event, the number of double reward opportunities is limited and can be viewed on the Planar Fissure event page.
The double reward count will not reset during the event. Be sure to schedule your time for this challenge accordingly, Trailblazers.

◆ Event Rewards ◆
By challenging Simulated Universe and Divergent Universe, Trailblazers will automatically consume one remaining chance to receive the double rewards when they obtain Planar Ornaments.

C:
◆ 活动规则 ◆
角色试用活动「锋芒崭露」开启期间，开拓者可使用包含所选试用角色的固定队伍，无限次体验指定关卡。
体验活动关卡时，将无法调整编队中角色、角色等级及角色装备的光锥、遗器。

◆ 活动奖励 ◆
达成关卡挑战后，将可以在活动界面领取试用关卡奖励。各试用关卡奖励在活动期间仅可领取一次。
E:
◆ Event Rules ◆
During the character trial event "Aptitude Showcase," Trailblazers can use set teams that include trial characters to repeatedly experience specific stages.
Team Lineup, character levels, and the equipped Light Cones and Relics cannot be changed while experiencing the event stage.

◆ Event Rewards ◆
Rewards for the trial stage can be obtained from the event screen after completing the stage. Each trial stage reward may only be claimed once during the event.

C:
◆ 活动参与规则 ◆
● 活动共分7期，自活动开启第1天起，每天更新1期抽奖。
● 开拓者可以在每一期的截止时间前（具体时间以活动界面中的显示为准），选择参与抽奖或直接领取<unbreak>100</unbreak>星琼的固定奖励，仅能选择其中一个选项。每期可选择不同的选项。
● 若在抽奖开启期间开拓者没有进行操作，则默认获得固定奖励的星琼、不参与抽奖。活动开启后，除抽奖或固定奖励外，还可直接领取<unbreak>100</unbreak>星琼的幸运祝福奖励。若开拓者在抽奖开启期间并未登录游戏，在活动结束前登录游戏即可一次性领取<unbreak>800</unbreak>星琼的奖励。
● 每一期抽奖将在次日进行开奖，具体开奖时间以活动界面中的显示为准。
● 开拓者需要在活动期间于本活动的活动页面内进行领奖。
● 若您在活动期间获得了奖励，但并未在活动期间领取，活动结束将无法领取或为您补发。
● 「星穹列车」服与「无名客」服共享1个奖池，活动7期中共有<unbreak>20</unbreak>名开拓者可成为幸运巨星。
 
◆ 抽奖奖励 ◆
● 幸运巨星<unbreak>-50</unbreak>万星琼
● 一等奖<unbreak>-600</unbreak>星琼
● 二等奖<unbreak>-50</unbreak>星琼
 
◆ 开奖规则 ◆
● 在第1、2、3期中，每期分别将有2位开拓者有几率成为幸运巨星。第4、5、6期中，每期分别将有3名开拓者有几率成为幸运巨星。第7期将有5名开拓者有几率成为幸运巨星。
● 在每一期抽奖中，若开拓者选择了抽奖但未成为幸运巨星，将有<unbreak>10%</unbreak>的概率获得一等奖、<unbreak>90%</unbreak>的概率获得二等奖。
● 每一期中，幸运巨星、一等奖、二等奖，开拓者仅能获得其中一个，不能同时获得。
● 活动7期中，开拓者仅能成为1次幸运巨星，同1位开拓者不会重复成为幸运巨星。
 
◆ 幸运巨星规则提醒 ◆
● 如您在使用米哈游提供的服务过程中，发生过违反米哈游用户协议的行为，则默认丧失幸运巨星的获奖资格。
● 参加本次活动需要遵守相关法律。
● 如您系未成年玩家，则您需要在获得您的监护人同意后参与本次抽奖活动。
● 如您抽中幸运巨星，米哈游可能会向您收集您的个人身份信息。
● 本次活动未尽事宜以及玩家后续行为仍适用您已确认的《崩坏：星穹铁道》游戏用户协议。
E:
◆ Event Participation Rules ◆
● The event is divided into 7 phases, with a new phase of the prize draw being released each day starting from the 1st day of the event.
● Trailblazers can choose to participate in the prize draw or directly claim a fixed reward of <unbreak>100</unbreak> Stellar Jades before the deadline of each phase (specific times are shown on the event interface). Only one option can be selected. Different options can be picked for each phase.
● If no action is taken during the prize draw period, the default reward of fixed Stellar Jades will be granted, and the prize draw will not be participated in. After the event begins, aside from the prize draw or fixed rewards, you can also directly claim a reward of <unbreak>100</unbreak> Stellar Jades as a Lucky Blessing. If Trailblazers do not log in during the prize draw period, they can still log in before the event ends to claim a one-time reward of <unbreak>800</unbreak> Stellar Jades.
● Each phase's prize draw results will be announced the following day, with specific times displayed on the event interface.
● Trailblazers need to claim their rewards on the event page during the event.
● If you earn a reward but do not claim it during the event, you will not be able to receive it after the event ends, and it will not be reissued.
The "Astral Express" and the "Nameless" servers share one prize pool. Across the seven phases of the event, <unbreak>20</unbreak> Trailblazers can become Lucky Superstars.

◆ Prize Draw Reward ◆
● Lucky Superstar: <unbreak>500</unbreak>,<unbreak>000</unbreak> Stellar Jades
● First Prize: <unbreak>600</unbreak> Stellar Jades
● Second Prize: <unbreak>50</unbreak> Stellar Jades

◆ Winning Rules ◆
● In phases 1, 2, and 3, there will be 2 Trailblazers per phase who have a chance to become the Lucky Superstar. In phases 4, 5, and 6, there will be 3 Trailblazers per phase who have a chance to become the Lucky Superstar. In phase 7, 5 Trailblazers will have a chance to become the Lucky Superstar.
● In each phase's prize draw, if a Trailblazer participates but does not become the Lucky Superstar, there will be a <unbreak>10%</unbreak> chance to win the First Prize and a <unbreak>90%</unbreak> chance to win the Second Prize.
● In each phase, Trailblazers can only win one of the following: Lucky Superstar, First Prize, or Second Prize. The rewards cannot overlap.
● Across all 7 phases, a Trailblazer can only become the Lucky Superstar once. The same Trailblazer cannot be selected as the Lucky Superstar multiple times.

◆ Lucky Superstar Rules Reminder ◆
● If you have violated the HoYoverse Terms of Service while using HoYoverse's services, you will automatically forfeit your eligibility to win the Lucky Superstar prize.
● Participation in this event must comply with relevant laws.
If you are a minor, you need to obtain your guardian's consent before participating in this prize draw event.
● If you win the Lucky Superstar prize, HoYoverse may collect your personal identification information.
● Matters not covered in this event, as well as subsequent player actions, will remain subject to the Honkai: Star Rail Game Terms of Service you have confirmed.

C:
◆ 简介 ◆
贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆已经修葺完毕，开拓者将作为代理馆长主导经营和发展，只为让展馆的人气重回鼎盛。

◆ 博物馆经营 ◆
● 玩法解锁时，将开启「漫藏诲盗」系列冒险任务，完成「漫藏诲盗•其一」即可开始博物馆经营。
● 博物馆经营共有5个阶段，可通过经营获取「振兴值」，完成每个阶段的累计目标后即可提升阶段，并解锁新的展区。
● 经营日开启时，可通过花费发展资金升级展区，或雇佣助理的形式来提升「振兴值」的获取。

◆ 展品与助理收集 ◆
● 在博物馆经营的过程中，开拓者将获得额外经营目标，或遇到偶发事件。经营目标及事件均提供失落展品的线索，完成后可将展品储存至博物馆珍藏。
● 特邀助理可通过完成「漫藏诲盗」系列冒险任务、或偶发事件中的导览员募集系列任务获取。

◆ 玩法奖励 ◆
● 完成各个经营阶段时，将获取经营阶段奖励。
● 收集到新展品、或是特邀助理入职后，可在「珍奇簿」中领取收集奖励。
E:
◆ Summary ◆
The Belobog History and Culture Museum has been fully renovated, and the Trailblazer will serve as the acting curator to lead the management and development of the museum, aiming to restore its popularity.

◆ Museum Management ◆
● Once this gameplay is unlocked, the "Opportunity Makes the Thief" Adventure Mission series will become available. Completing "Opportunity Makes the Thief Part 1" will allow Trailblazers to start managing the museum.
● There are five phases of museum management, and RevitaScore can be obtained through management. After achieving the cumulative objectives of each phase, Trailblazers can upgrade to the next phase and unlock new exhibition areas.
● During the day of operation, RevitaScore can be obtained by spending development fund to upgrade exhibition areas or by hiring assistants.

◆ Collection of Exhibits and Assistants ◆
● During museum management, Trailblazers will receive additional operational objectives or encounter random events. These objectives and events will provide clues to lost exhibits, which can be stored in the museum's collection.
● Guest assistants can be recruited by completing the "Opportunity Makes the Thief" Adventure Mission series or the guide recruitment mission series in random events.

◆ Gameplay Rewards ◆
● Completion of each management phase will result in a management phase reward.
● Players can receive collection rewards in the Ledger of Curiosities after collecting new exhibits or after guest assistants are recruited.

C: 「惊梦酒吧」的管理者有事外出，委托你接替调饮师的工作。但没想到，光顾酒吧的并非普通客人……
E: The manager of the Dreamjolt Hostelry is away and has entrusted you to take over the role of the drinksmith. However, the patrons of the lounge are not ordinary customers...

C: 无名客的日常，不只是波澜壮阔的开拓，还有柴米油盐的日常。不过，建设自己的房间、开拓自己的生活，又怎么不算一种「开拓」呢？
E: The daily life of the Nameless is not just about majestic trailblazing. It also involves the humdrum of ordinary chores. That being said, how is constructing your own room and developing your own life not a kind of "Trailblazing"?

C: 人山人海的桶
E: A Sea of Trashcan

C: 一位蓬头垢面、衣衫褴褛的老者拦住三月七，见她骨骼清奇，非要向她兜售武林秘籍。
E: A disheveled, unkempt old man accosts March 7th. He observes her extraordinary physique, and is persistent in his hawking of martial arts secret manuals.

C: 三月七每日习剑受到了「罗浮民间剑术协会」（自称）的关注，他们会派出得意门生向武林新秀三月七发起挑战。
E: March 7th's daily sword training has garnered the attention of the Luofu Folk Swordsmanship Association (self-named). They will dispatch their prized student to challenge the rising martial star, March 7th.

C: 照、照片上，怎么什么都没有呢……
E: Wh—Why is nothing showing up in the photo...

C: 你也是？！救、救命啊——
E: You too!? H—Help!!!

C: 「椒丘先生，您这世代相传的配方被病人捡到了。」白露略微有些疑惑，「这么重要的东西你可千万别忘了。」
E: "Mr. Jiaoqiu, this heirloom recipe of yours was picked up by a patient." Bailu is slightly confused, "You shouldn't lose such an important thing."

C: 合上地图，那不是属于我的冒险。
E: Close the map, that's not my adventure.

C: 「这是一种赛博玄学」青雀看了简介，「你想要什么牌，你就要听增强潜意识的音频。」
E: "This is a type of cyber-esoterica," Qingque reads the introduction, "If you want a specific tile, you'll have to listen to audio that enhances your subconscious."

C: 在「异星水魈」逃脱后，你与科员拉明娜继续追查它的下落。在你成功挫败「异星水魈」顶替成为「另一个我」的阴谋后，拉明娜吐露了与「水魈」合谋的苦衷。
E: After the Xenohydro escapes, you and Lamina continue the pursuit. After thwarting the Xenohydro's plan to replace you, Lamina tells you why she conspired with it.

C: 在尚未踏入下一站旅程前，列车接到了来自罗浮仙舟的通讯，景元向暂无去向的众人发出邀请，参加演武仪典。
E: Before embarking on the next stop of their journey, the Express received a comms from the Xianzhou Luofu — Jing Yuan extended an invite to all wanderers to join the Wardance.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n你成功取得了用于打造复制品的「自动机兵•蜘蛛」机体数据，进一步丰富了博物馆的库存。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nYou have obtained the data for crafting a replica of the Automaton Spider, adding another valuable piece to the museum's collection.

C: 为了获得挑战冠军的资格，你们必须先完成所有「决胜乐园」的试炼。\n你们通关了流云渡的决胜乐园，取得了公输先生的资格徽章。
E: To qualify for the championship, you must complete all the Victory Zone trials.\nYou have cleared the Victory Zone in Cloudford and obtained the Mastery Mark from Master Gongshu.

C: 藿藿找回了尾巴，浮烟完成了期待已久的对决，十王司封印了浮烟。\n希望藿藿能明白，即便没有尾巴，她也早已经是合格的判官，这与实力无关，只与决心有关。
E: After Huohuo retrieves Tail, Cirrus's long-awaited confrontation takes place, and the Ten-Lords Commission ultimately seals Cirrus.\nYou hope that Huohuo will realize her qualification as a Judge, independent of her power but solely determined by her resolve.

C: 下个主题经营活动——「主厨角斗」！白厄与万敌两位主厨将在餐馆展开激烈的争锋，究竟谁的菜品才能征服评审员的味蕾，获得胜利呢？
E: Next up in our themed business event — "Chef Showdown"! Chefs Phainon and Mydei will face off in an intense culinary battle at the restaurant. Whose dishes will conquer the judges' taste buds and claim victory?

C: 罗盘号的船员帮猫头鹰重建了鸟巢。作为回报，猫头鹰答应钟表小子：今后一定会为他们建一栋大房子。
E: The crew of The Compass helps the owl to rebuild the nest. As thanks, the owl promises Clockie to build them all a huge mansion in the future.

C: 因为过去的负债，罗盘号只能接下这份委托。钟表小子开始帮镜子公主匆忙收集资料，得知了这里是一座监牢……
E: Because of previous debts, The Compass has to take on this assignment. As Clockie starts helping Mirror Princess gather information in a rush, he discovers that it is actually a prison here...

C: 钟表小子讲述了自己的身世——\n「呜呜，不够伤心。但没关系，我相信你以后会更伤心！」
E: Clockie tells the story of his own life...\n"*sob* That's not sad enough. But don't worry, I'm sure you'll be much sadder soon enough!"

C: 钟表小子在森林中发现了许多素未谋面的镇民，他们跟钟表小子很快成为了好朋友。\n「滴答，这就是本钟的个表魅力。」
E: Clockie encounters villagers in the woods, many of whom he's never seen before, and they quickly become good friends with Clockie.\n"Tick-tock, this is just my clock-ish charm."

C: 这不是钟表小子想要的美梦小镇，他开始后悔自己撒下的谎言……\n「滴答，如果我说美梦小镇遍布的不是财富，而是爱，那该多好。」
E: This isn't the Dreamville Clockie wants. He begins to regret the lies he told...\n"Tick-tock, if I only said Dreamvillie is filled with love and not wealth, that would be great."

C: 木头老爷认真考虑了这个提议，但他没有同意。\n「咳咳，荒漠上的土地才是小镇最重要的宝物！」
E: Old Man Wood seriously considers this proposal, but he disagrees.\n"*cough* The land in the desert is the most important treasure in the town!"

C: 钟表小子让折纸小鸟叼来各种石头，压灭了火焰，也压塌了房屋。\n「啾，钟表小子，叶子店长说这种情况是不赔付保险金的！」
E: Clockie had the Origami Birds fetch stones in various shapes to put out the fire, but the stones damaged the houses too.\n"Tweet, Shopkeeper Leaf said this wasn't covered by insurance, Clockie!"

C: 为了保护清醒村，钟表小子阻断了进入村子的道路……\n「滴答，得想个别的办法让大家来玩！」
E: To safeguard Rouseville, Clockie blocked the path into the village...\n"Tick-tock, I must find another way for those who want to come here and have fun!"

C: 木头老爷拿走他的坏念头，美梦小镇里不能有坏人。\n「滴答，木头老爷把他的坏心思都拿走了，放心吧！」
E: Old Man Wood took away the criminal's evil thoughts. No baddies should be in Dreamville.\n"Tick-tock, Old Man Wood took away his evil thoughts. Don't worry!"

C: 木头老爷将木头雕刻成离去的人，美梦小镇不存在离别。\n「滴答，哈努兄弟、镜子公主和左轮队长也回来了！」
E: Old Man Wood made wood sculptures of the departed. There was no separation in Dreamville.\n"Tick-tock, Brother Hanu, Mirror Princess, and Captain Revolver are also back!"

C: 不，美梦小镇不需要思考。\n「因为他知道一切。」
E: No. No thinking was needed in Dreamville.\n"Because he knows everything."

C: 哈努兄弟带船员们来到了镇民们所在的据点，在哈努兄弟的担保下，大家得到了妥善的安置。
E: Brother Hanu brings the crew to his stronghold where the townsfolk are, and with his guarantee, everyone finds their appropriate place.

C: 石头老板耗尽了哈努兄弟的力气，取得了最后的胜利。哈努兄弟被投入了大牢。噩梦小镇的镇民们重新成为了他的员工。当然，是合法的。
E: Boss Stone exhausts Brother Hanu's strength, and eventually wins the war. Brother Hanu is imprisoned. The townsfolk of Nightmareville once again become its staff. Of course, it is all legal.

C: 罗盘号再次回到美梦小镇，却发现小镇已经被石头老板占据，哈努兄弟也被石头老板抓走了……
E: The Compass returns to Dreamville, but the town has already been taken over by Boss Stone. Brother Hanu has also been rounded up by Boss Stone...

C: 石头老板修建的高墙终于竣工，石头老板邀请了小镇的所有居民来参加自己举办的庆典，甚至包括了钟表小子……
E: Boss Stone's tall wall is finally complete, and Boss Stone invites all the townsfolk to attend his ceremony, even including Clockie...

C: 木头老爷开始让牛仔们从内部瓦解，他的和蔼与包容让许多牛仔不再团结，他们也期待起了木头老爷口中的乐园……
E: Old Man Wood begins to disintegrate the cowboys from within. His acts of kindness and forgiveness sow discord among the cowboys, for they also yearn for the paradise Old Man Wood has promised...

C: 虽然钟表小子努力调和，但双方的谈判还是失败了。木头老爷的卫兵再度对牛仔们举起了武器……
E: Despite Clockie trying his best to alleviate the tension, the negotiations between the two still fail. Old Man Wood's guards once again raise their weapons at the cowboys...

C: 在木头老爷的生日庆典快到了，音符小姐准备了盛大的节目。但当庆典开始之时，美梦小镇的上空下起了金币雨……
E: As Old Man Wood's birthday celebration draws close, Miss Note prepares an exquisite show. However, it starts raining gold coins in Dreamville when the celebration initiates...

C: 美梦小镇的镇民们逐渐走向团结一心，木头老爷被滋养成了一棵参天大树，树荫庇护着所有的镇民。
E: Over time, the townsfolk of Dreamville gradually became united as one. Old Man Wood was nurtured into a towering tree that shelters all the townsfolk with its shade.

C: 让我来跟你讲讲我们的冒险经历吧！进了水的钟表城、一直转的螺丝国、极光下的金沙镇…你想先听哪个？
E: Let me tell you about our adventures! The flooded Watch City, the ever-spinning Screw Kingdom, the Goldsand Town beneath the aurora... Which would you like to listen to first?

C: 这里的镇民卖力地为石头老板挖矿，闲暇之余不忘咒骂哈努兄弟的残暴与石头老板的慈悲。
E: The townsfolk here pour sweat into working the mine for Boss Stone, not forgetting to berate Brother Hanu for his cruelty and lauding Boss Stone's benevolence in their downtime.

C: 钟表小子与伙伴们艰难地战胜了敌人，但他最重要的伙伴，哈努兄弟却没有回到小镇……
E: Clockie and his companions defeat the enemy after much ardor, but his most important companion, Brother Hanu, does not return to town...

C:
敌方目标在进入战斗时或每受到1次持续伤害时，有<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>的<u>基础概率</u>陷入<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#10[i]</unbreak><gridfightmod type=backrank index=10 format=i></color>层【<u>奥迹</u>】。<color=#f29e38ff>我方小队发动攻击后</color>，有<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#9[i]%</unbreak></color>的<u>基础概率</u>为目标叠加<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#10[i]</unbreak><gridfightmod type=backrank index=10 format=i></color>层【<u>奥迹</u>】。
【<u>奥迹</u>】状态下，敌方目标每回合开始时受到等同于黑天鹅<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>攻击力的风属性持续伤害，每层【<u>奥迹</u>】使此伤害倍率提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak></color>，随后重置为1层。【<u>奥迹</u>】最多叠加<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#8[i]</unbreak></color>层。
仅在敌方目标回合开始【<u>奥迹</u>】造成伤害时，黑天鹅根据目标陷入的【<u>奥迹</u>】的层数触发额外效果：
大于等于<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color>层：对相邻目标造成等同于黑天鹅<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color>攻击力的风属性持续伤害，并且有<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color>的<u>基础概率</u>使相邻目标陷入1层【<u>奥迹</u>】。
大于等于<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak></color>层：使本次造成的持续伤害无视该目标及其相邻目标<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#7[i]%</unbreak></color>的防御力。
黑天鹅造成的伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#11[i]%</unbreak></color>。
E:
When enemy targets enter combat or receive 1 instance of DoT, they have a <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> <u>base chance</u> to be inflicted with <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#10[i]</unbreak><gridfightmod type=backrank index=10 format=i></color> stacks of "<u>Arcana</u>." <color=#f29e38ff>After the ally squad launches an attack</color>, there is a <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#9[i]%</unbreak></color> <u>base chance</u> to apply <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#10[i]</unbreak><gridfightmod type=backrank index=10 format=i></color> stacks of "<u>Arcana</u>" to the target.
While afflicted with "<u>Arcana</u>," enemy targets receive Wind DoT equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Black Swan's ATK at the start of each turn. Each stack of "<u>Arcana</u>" increases this DMG's multiplier by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak></color>, then resets to 1 stack. "<u>Arcana</u>" can stack up to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#8[i]</unbreak></color> times.
When "<u>Arcana</u>" deals DMG at the start of an enemy target's turn, Black Swan triggers additional effects based on the number of "<u>Arcana</u>" stacks inflicted on the target:
When there are <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak></color> or more stacks, deals Wind DoT equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color> of Black Swan's ATK to adjacent targets, with a <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> <u>base chance</u> of inflicting 1 stack of "<u>Arcana</u>" on adjacent targets.
When there are <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak></color> or more stacks, allows the current instance of DoT dealt to ignore <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#7[i]%</unbreak></color> of the target's and adjacent targets' DEF.
Increases DMG dealt by Black Swan by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#11[i]%</unbreak></color>.

C: <color=#42a8b9>#捉鬼小队##我哭了，你呢#</color>小桂子接到<color=#42a8b9>@不爱睡觉</color> 的投稿第一时间找到了当事人。真相是若昔是本人，也不是本人。引用博识学会的说法：这个世界拥有无数的与我们相似却不同的世界泡。在平行世界里，仙舟遭遇重创。殉职的是文远。此后那个世界的若昔一直试图复活文远，在一位金发科学家的帮助下，他们开启了世界的壁垒与缝隙，在分割的世界相遇，让我们祝福他们有个美好的开始。
E: Upon receiving the submission from <color=#42a8b9>@Insomnophile</color>, Little Gui quickly located the individuals involved. The truth is, Ruoxi is both herself and not herself. Quoting from the Intelligentsia Guild: "This world is filled with countless similar yet different bubble universes. In a parallel universe, the Xianzhou suffered a great calamity, and it was Wenyuan who lost his life. In that world, Ruoxi had been trying to resurrect Wenyuan. With the help of a blond scientist, they opened the barrier and connected the fissure between worlds, allowing the couple to meet despite their divergent worlds. Let us wish them a wonderful new beginning." <color=#42a8b9>#GhostHuntingSquad #TearJerker</color>

C:
◆ 培养资源计算 ◆
● 培养资源将计算提升角色等级、角色晋阶和行迹时所需的材料。不会计算养成光锥和遗器的养成材料。
● 其中角色等级上限将根据当前均衡等级能达到的角色等级上限计算，行迹等级上限将根据角色等级上限计算。
● 将角色设为培养目标后，后续挑战对应关卡获取材料时，可以查看距离角色培养完成还需获取的材料数量。
● 角色处于「前瞻」状态时，「仅计算推荐升级的行迹」功能暂不生效。

◆ 合并折算 ◆
● 在计算材料的所需数量时，将会根据可合成的材料总量计算，低级材料在满足自身需求数量后会被折算计入高级材料的数量中。
E:
◆ Build Resource Calculation ◆
● Build resources will calculate the material required to increase Character Level, Character Ascension, and activate Traces. Materials required for building Light Cones and Relics will not be shown.
● The character Level Cap will be calculated based on the character Level Cap allowed for the current Equilibrium Level, and Trace Level Cap will be calculated based on the character Level Cap.
● After setting a character as the build target, you can view how much material is still needed to fully build the character when challenging stages that drop the relevant materials.
● When the Build Target is in the "Preview" state, the "Only calculate Traces that are recommended to level up" will not be active.

◆ Combined Conversion ◆
● When calculating how much material is needed, it will be based on the total number of materials that can be synthesized. Once sufficient lower-rarity materials have been obtained to satisfy leveling needs, the excess ones will be converted into advanced materials.

C:
◆ 玩法规则 ◆
● 「三连出奇迹」是「好运滚滚自助机」的一种玩法模式。
● 开拓者可通过「好运滚滚自助机」随机抽取3个图案，并获得3个图案对应数值总和的「开拓券」奖励。
● 如果抽取的3个图案均相同，则会在当前奖励总和的基础上，获得指定倍数的「开拓券」奖励。
● 随着游玩进程的推进，将会解锁「加注」功能。开拓者可通过消耗额外的「开拓券」，激活指定倍数，使游戏结算时的奖励倍数增加。
E:
◆ Gameplay Rules ◆
● "Golden Trio" is one of the gameplay modes for Windfall Slot Machine.
● Trailblazers can randomly obtain 3 images from the Windfall Slot Machine and receive an amount of Trailblazer Funds, equal to the sum of the numerical values associated with the 3 images.
● If the 3 images are identical, then you will receive a specific multiple of the existing sum of Trailblaze Funds.
● As the game progresses, the "Add Stake" function will be unlocked. Trailblazers can pay extra Trailblaze Funds to activate specific multipliers and obtain more rewards when the game ends.

C:
◆ 简介 ◆
●活动期间，开拓者可以参与以下活动，获取奖励。

◆ 「旅程热点」 ◆
● 旅程热点会显示当前版本新更新的热点活动，并展示星琼、专票等重要活动奖励与获取情况。
● 当活动结束时，活动对应的奖励将不会统计在奖励总览里。

◆ 「三日签到」 ◆
●每日登录即可领取奖励，奖励将于每日<unbreak>04</unbreak>:<unbreak>00</unbreak>（服务器时间）更新。每日登录奖励仅可领取1次，最多可以领取3天奖励。

◆ 「归程福利」 ◆
●可领取「归程谢礼」奖励，包含角色养成材料，以及根据离线天数发放一定数量的「助燃券」。利用助燃券，可以快速获取拟造花萼/凝滞虚影产出的材料。
●活动期间，开拓者通过完成无名勋礼的任务，获得的无名客的经验提升<unbreak>50%</unbreak>。该加成会在活动结束后的周一<unbreak>04</unbreak>:<unbreak>00</unbreak>失效。
●开拓者在回归期间会获得拟造花萼，侵蚀隧洞，位面饰品双倍奖励的机会。消耗双倍奖励次数与开拓力后，将在原有奖励之外额外获得一次奖励。
※若「循星归程」活动期间，存在「花藏繁生」等双倍掉落活动同时开启，获取奖励时，将优先消耗「花藏繁生」等活动的双倍奖励次数。

◆ 「归路指引」 ◆
填写调查问卷可获得奖励，奖励将通过邮件进行发放。问卷仅可填写1次，若您已提交问卷，则不可重复填写或修改。
E:
◆ Introduction ◆
● During the event, Trailblazers can participate in the following events and obtain their rewards.

◆ Journey Highlights ◆
● Journey Highlights display the latest featured events in the current version, as well as displaying key event rewards such as Stellar Jade and Special Passes, and their acquisition status.
● When the event ends, the rewards corresponding to the events will not be calculated in the Rewards Overview.

◆ 3-Day Check-In ◆
● Log into the game every day to receive rewards. The rewards are renewed every day at <unbreak>04</unbreak>:<unbreak>00</unbreak> server time. Daily log-in rewards can only be received once per day. A maximum of 3 days of rewards are provided.

◆ Returners' Benefits ◆
● You can claim the Returners' Presents rewards, which include Character Building materials and a certain number of Fuel Vouchers based on your offline days. Fuel Vouchers can be used to quickly obtain materials from the Calyx/Stagnant Shadow.
● During the event, Trailblazers will gain <unbreak>50%</unbreak> more The Nameless EXP from completing Nameless Honor missions. This bonus will expire at <unbreak>04</unbreak>:<unbreak>00</unbreak> on the Monday after the event ends.
During the return period, Trailblazers will receive double drops for completing Calyx, Cavern of Corrosion, and Planar Ornament challenges. After the double drops challenges are expended, gain an additional reward atop the original rewards already earned.
※ Should other double-reward events like Garden of Plenty occur at the same time as Starlit Homecoming, the daily double drop for Garden of Plenty and other events will be consumed first when obtaining rewards.

◆ Returning Guide ◆
Complete the survey to earn rewards. The rewards will be sent via mail. The survey can only be filled in once. If you have already submitted the survey, you cannot fill in or modify it again.

C: ◆额外掉落说明◆\n●在「模拟宇宙：黄金与机械」的【首领】区域击败敌人可获得额外掉落。如果完成额外奖励目标，则会再获得一倍额外掉落。
E: ◆ Extra Drop Details ◆\n● Defeating enemies in the Boss domain of Simulated Universe: Gold and Gears can grant extra drops. If you complete the Bonus Reward Target, you can earn double the amount of extra drops.

C: 自时光中凝取的稀薄力量。正是所有微不足道的刹那，编织成了壮绝的命运。\n\n「人类行将灭绝。而图书馆会存在下去：青灯孤照，无限无动，藏有珍本，默默无闻，无用而不败坏。」
E: A drop of strength condensed from time itself. All the seemingly insignificant moments come together to form the magnificent choir of fate.\n\n"Human extinction is inevitable, but the library will live on: Lonely, immobile, and hidden from the public. Its vast collection is useless, yet pure from corruption."

C:
风暴在远方酝酿，触手从冥海中探出，似要捉弄那漂浮着的稚弱生命。
海兽的残肢锤击出冲天的浪花，碎作石头一般陨落海渊。

他们说，搏杀的怒吼持续了十个日夜，盖过雷霆的震响。
他们说，即便有一万条性命，也不够被冥海消磨。

直至英勇洗去稚嫩，冷傲洗去孱弱——

那单薄的身影踉跄踏上海岸，其时朝阳初升，海水如同往日的血。
E:
A storm broods in the distance. Tentacles extend from the Sea of Souls, as if intending to toy with that floating, fragile life.
The broken limbs of the sea beast hammer giant sprays skyward, and sink into the oceanic abyss after shattering like rubble.

They say that the roar of the fight lasted for ten days and nights, overwhelming even the thunder and lightning.
They say that even if a man had ten thousand lives, he would not be enough to resist the Sea of Souls's erosion.

Then, courage washes away the immaturity and cold pride tempered timidity —

And that thin figure stumbled onto the shore. The first ray of the morning sun shines down upon the sea's waters, dyeing it like past blood.

C: 「还有多久开始行动？」 「你居然会问我这个…是新人出什么事了？」 「没有。」 「虽然艾利欧招揽她是因为别的原因，但她至少得活得过新手任务。」 「她很轻松。」 「那我放心了。看来阿刃也已经是非常靠谱的前辈了。」 「……」
E: How much longer until the action starts? You have the nerve to ask a question like that... is something wrong with the new recruit? No. Elio didn't choose her because she was good at field work, but she has to at least survive this rookie assignment. She's cruising. Then I'm relieved. It seems that Bladie has proved to be a reliable operative as well. ...

E: \nThe passage of days evaporates the remaining time of a man, and life's boundless suffering spills forth like an unending tide.

C: \n色映戈矛，光摇剑戟，杀气横武舸。
E: \nColors reflect off spears, light sways on swords, and the war skiff chokes on the aura of murderous intent.

E: \nStroll with the waves, dance with the tides, and show no disrespect to this heavenly palace, for it is but a handful of ocean they have splashed upon you.

C: \n云崖失去黎明之时，夜幕将吞没虔诚的祷言。
E: \nWhen Dawncloud loses its dawn, the night's veil shall swallow all pious prayers whole.

C: 能在列车的留声机上播放的碟片，是偶然所得，亦是他人馈赠。音律飞旋时，那些笑容、擦肩、触碰，还有战斗时激荡的心绪，都一一涌上心头。或许这就是时代飞速发展向前，却依然有人在收集碟片的原因。\n当前碟片中刻录着《水龙吟》。
E: A record that can be played on the Express' phonograph. It might be a chance acquisition or a gift from someone else. All sorts of memories surge up when the music plays — the smiles, encounters, touches, and the excitement of battle. Maybe that is why people still collect records even as society rapidly advances.\nThe current record contains the track "Samudrartha."

C: 能在列车的留声机上播放的碟片，是偶然所得，亦是他人馈赠。音律飞旋时，那些笑容、擦肩、触碰，还有战斗时激荡的心绪，都一一涌上心头。或许这就是时代飞速发展向前，却依然有人在收集碟片的原因。\n当前碟片中刻录着《游叙草木》。

C: 能复现过往影像的结晶，是有形的记忆。于翁法罗斯之外只能作为摆饰存在。\n\n「那美好的仗我已经打完了。」
E: A crystal capable of replaying images from the past, memory made tangible. Though it is but a mere ornament outside Amphoreus.\n\n"I have fought the good fight."

C: 于开拓之旅中获得的饰品，可以用来装点你的房间。
E: Decorative items obtained during your trailblazing expedition. Can be used to spruce up your room.

C: 贤者之石
E: Philosopher's Stone

C: 在行成年礼时，父母们将它赠予狩猎了人生中第一头猎物的少年少女们，期许他们的生命如离弦之矢，终能中的。\n\n「愿腰间箭，匣中剑，不空蠹。」
E: A gift that parents give to their children who've successfully hunted their first prey at their coming of age ceremony. It is a blessing that their life would be as successful and true as an arrow heading towards its mark.\n\n"May the arrow on your waist and the sword in your sheath stay true and always find its target."

C: 天真烂漫、无固定形体的岁阳星火。 显形时「火焰」大小，可以辨别岁阳个体强弱。这缕小小岁阳思虑单纯，容易被更强大的岁阳吞并。 「无形无根，漫游天外…」
E: An innocent, formless heliobus. The size of a heliobus's flame when it materializes indicates its strength. This little heliobus is innocent and naive and may be easily consumed by more powerful heliobi. "Formless, rootless, and roaming boundless..."

C: 据说筑城者曾经的冶金技术能打造出切开磐岩的链锯。这样巧妙的工艺如今已无法复现。\n\n「史瓦罗大佬说那刃片薄得能切进分子间的空隙…分子是什么玩意儿？」
E: It is said that the smelting techniques of the Architects allowed them to make chainsaws sturdy enough to split giant boulders. Such techniques have been long lost to history.\n\n"Boss Svarog says its blade is so thin that it can cut into the gap between molecules... What are molecules?"

C: 裂界创造的以某种虚卒为原型的怪物所留，螺旋气流的中心，一截箭簇隐约可见。\n\n「于裂界销殒者，必将于裂界重生。」
E: Used to belong to a certain Fragmentum monster modeled after a certain kind of Voidrangers. An arrowhead can be barely seen buried in the center of the vortex.\n\n"Those who perish in the Fragmentum shall rise again where they met their demise."

C: 银鬃铁卫间偶尔会进行一场比斗——在规定时间内带回怪物残躯的一部分。这些碎刃想必就是某场比试的战利品。\n\n「我千真万确亲眼所见，杰帕德头儿一拳轰碎了那家伙滚烫的钢刀，然后徒手握着它搠进了那个冰胖子的肚腹里，给它暖了暖心。」
E: The Silvermane Guards would host contests where the winner must take a body part from a monster and bring it back within a set time limit. This broken blade must have been a trophy of one such contest.\n\n"I saw it with my own eyes. Captain Gepard smashed that thing's hot steel blade with one blow of his fist, then held it with his bare hands and plunged it into the belly of that cold fatty, warming its heart."

C: 效仿步离人的机甲中最重要的中枢部件，尽管培育它的躯体已没有一丝生命可言，但它保留了自远古承继而来，深埋于基因中的「杀戮算法」。\n\n「你们看到了杀之不尽的怪物，我看到的是取之不尽的零件。这就是眼界的差别。」
E: The most important central component of the mech that was built in imitation of the borisin. Though the body that nurtured it no longer has even a sliver of life left, this component still maintains the "Slaughter Algorithm" inherited from primordial days and buried deep within its genes.\n\n"While you see a monster that can never be killed, I see infinite parts to salvage. That's the difference in perspective."

C: 贝洛伯格通用制式元件，可以用于激活地髓传导通路。\n\n「兄弟，你得请教真正的聪明人。要谈怎么修好机器，没人比马雷夫更懂行。」
E: A universal component in Belobog used to activate Geomarrow conduits.\n\n"Bro, you need to ask the real smart people. No one knows how to fix a machine better than Marev."

C: 据说只要按一下，就能将整个匹诺康尼夷为平地。谁敢说自己不想按一下试试？
E: Apparently, one little press on this button will level all of Penacony. Who wouldn't want to try pressing it?

C: 装着帝垣琼玉牌的垃圾袋。帝垣琼玉牌有着不同的稀有度，可以从垃圾袋的颜色上看出来。\n\n「适度娱乐，理性消费。」
E: A trash bag filled with celestial jade tiles. Celestial jade tiles possess differing levels of rarity, and the sorting can be seen from the colors of the trash bags.\n\n"Enjoy responsibly, spend wisely."

C: 记载了预言的卷册。仔细观察才能发现，卷面是由金丝织就的。\n\n「此中包含着一则预言，它只向开卷者示现。」
E: A tome containing prophecies. Upon closer inspection, one will discover that the scroll is woven from golden threads.\n\n"There is a prophecy within that will only be revealed to the one who opens the scroll."

C: 一张破损的树庭工作证，上面依稀可辨的名字是「安德烈亚斯」。
E: A damaged Grove of Epiphany work permit with the name "Andreas."

C: 来自「天空的医师」——风堇的馈赠，象征着她平等爱着世人的温柔与奉献。
E: From the "Healer of the Sky": Hyacine's bestowal, symbolizing her gentle devotion and indiscriminate love for all of humanity.

C: 只属于你的特调，出自调饮师加拉赫之手。 「用这杯『向邪恶追索』向你致意，开拓者—— 「——敬悲哀的真相。」
E: A special concoction tailored exclusively for you by the drinksmith Gallagher. "Raise this glass of 'Even the Wicked' in your honor, Trailblazer —" "To the sad truth."

C: 工造司的工正，也是修缮孤云的负责人。在你提醒他注意孤云的安全后，他勘验了宝剑存放的情况。此时，孤云尚未被窃走。
E: An artisan from the Artisanship Commission and the craftsman responsible for repairing Guyun. He checked on how Guyun was stored after you reminded him to keep the sword safe. Guyun was yet to be stolen at that time.

C: 黑塔的手稿：《博识学会》
E: Herta's Manuscripts: Intelligentsia Guild

C: 黑塔情诗其二
E: Space Station Love Poems (II)

C: 旅行篇•初到仙舟
E: On Travel: Arriving at the Xianzhou

C: 药王秘传•证物集册 还尘驻形丹
E: Disciples of Sanctus Medicus: Collection of Exhibits — Semblance Reversion Essence

C: 《蝶影》杂志特刊：托蝶幻境千年十佳 第八名《凯蒙凯》
E: Butterfly Shadow's Special Issue: The Ten Best Butterfly Immersias of the Millennium — No. 8: Kaib Mongb Kib

C: 最方便的通勤方式就是喝得酩酊大醉，反正醒来你就到家了。
E: The easiest way to commute is to get roaring drunk. You'll be home by the time you're conscious again.

C: 镜子是这世界上最棒的发明——它居然能映出这世界上最完美无瑕的我！
E: A mirror is the greatest invention in the world, for it can reflect the image of me, the most flawless being in the world!

C: 回来吧，求求你…回来吧。
E: Please, come back... please...

C: 方脸盘的噩梦。
E: The nightmare of all square-faced people.

C: 是豪车，不是汽车——区别很大。
E: It's a limousine, not a car — They are totally different.

C: 《以太战线》中的游戏道具，以太灵配备后可以获得特殊的强化能力。
E: A game item in Aetherium Wars. Aether Spirits will gain a special enhanced ability after equipping it.

C: 帕姆迎来送往时穿戴的考究制服。深红绸缎搭配金属配饰，彰显了列车长的不凡气度。每天擦拭十遍的怀表是列车平稳行驶的关键。
E: An exquisite uniform that Pom-Pom wears while welcoming or bidding farewell to guests. It sports carmine velvet with metallic accessories, displaying the conductor's extraordinary bearing. The pocket watch that is cleaned ten times a day is the key to the Express' stable passage.

C: 高纯度的红土是一种相当奇特的材料：在被晾干的过程里，其中逐渐结晶的难溶盐分会让整块红土逐渐板结为一个紧密的整体，即使是风吹雨打也很难将它破坏。有意思的是，对大地兽而言，最美味的红土就处于湿和干的临界点上。 「那如果天气一直下雨…大地兽们会得厌食症吗？」 「理论上有可能，不过艾格勒肯定不会让那种事发生，放心好了。」
E: High-purity redsoil is a rather unusual material: During the drying process, the crystallizing insoluble salts cause the entire block of redsoil to harden into a compact whole that is difficult to erode, even by wind and rain. Interestingly, for dromases, the most delicious redsoil lies right at the threshold between wet and dry. "So if it keeps raining... would the dromases get eating disorders?" "In theory, it's possible, but Aquila would never let that happen, rest assured."

C: 纯粹的惊吓，只需要最朴素的加工方式。你知道我要吓你，我确实吓到了你，这就是技术。\n\n「阿哈！事实证明，跳脸永远是恐怖界的杀手锏。」
E: Pure terror requires only the most basic processing. When you already know I want to scare you but I still manage to scare you, then that's skill.\n\n"Aha! The fact remains, jump scares will always be the ace up the sleeve in the realm of horror."

C: 将山鬼薄荷、鹤发藤提取物和蓝翅鼯夜明砂磨成药粉，再用蜂蜜搓揉成丸制成的简易伤药。虽谈不上包治百病，但也称得上聊胜于无。\n\n「赶紧把这药吃了吧，再不吃伤口就自己愈合了。」
E: A simple remedy made by grinding mountain devil mint, white-hair ivy extract, and droppings from blue-winged squirrels into powder, then kneading them with honey to form pills. It can't cure all ailments, but it is considered to be better than nothing.\n\n"Quick, take this medicine, or your wound will have healed on its own."

C: 囚犯们省吃俭用，留下伙食中的五花肉，又动用聪明才智，从监狱伙房搞来碱和锅底灰，耗时数个月，才能制成这样一瓶沐浴露。 诚然品质远不如外面买来的，还偶有品控不严的情况发生，但每一滴皂液都浓聚着重刑犯们无法被囚禁的匠心。 「你们短生种不就吃这套？」
E: The prisoners scrimped and saved the fatty meat from their meals, then used their ingenuity to procure alkali and bottom ash from the prison kitchen, only to produce one such bottle of body wash after several months of effort. Admittedly, the quality is far from what you can buy outside, and occasional quality control issues do occur, but each drop of it is a condensed essence of the inmates' unfettered craftsmanship. "Isn't this exactly the kind of marketing you short-life species love?"

C: 仙舟匠人以星辰天瑛精心铸造的箭头。可中幅提升<color=#f29e38ff>巡猎</color>角色的命途行迹。
E: An arrowhead forged with Stellaris Essence by the craftsmen of Xianzhou. Used to level up Traces moderately for <color=#f29e38ff>Hunt</color> characters.

C: 催生生命成长的蜜液，自翁瓦克圣林的心树花汁中酿成。可中幅提升<color=#f29e38ff>丰饶</color>角色的命途行迹。
E: The nectar brewed from the juice of flowers growing on the heart tree in the sacred Vonwacq forest. A honey that can accelerate the growth of life. Used to level up Traces moderately for <color=#f29e38ff>Abundance</color> characters.

C: 星际和平公司「资深员工」的工作证明，物理属性角色的晋升素材。
E: An IPC "Senior Staff" work permit. Can be used for the Ascension of Physical characters.

C: 拼接而成的信件
E: A Letter Pieced Together

E: Xin<unbreak>-41</unbreak> Homeward Cloud Messaging

E: Evening Ember at the Goethe Hotel

C: 「存护」，克里珀
E: The Preservation — Qlipoth

C: 手机壁纸，获得后可在手机功能中进行更换
E: After obtaining Phone wallpapers, they can be changed in the Phone function

C: 可被用于装点游梦手册页面的数字贴纸，有许许多多种款式。
E: Digital stickers that can be used to decorate the pages of the Dreamtour Handbook. They come in many different styles.

C: 可被用于装点游梦手册页面的数字贴纸，有许许多多种款式。
E: Digital stickers that can be used to decorate the pages of the Dreamtour Handbook. They come in many different styles.

E: Digital stickers that can be used to decorate the pages of the Dreamtour Handbook. They come in many different styles.

E: Digital stickers that can be used to decorate the pages of the Dreamtour Handbook. They come in many different styles.

C: 光顾「惊梦酒吧」的怪物们给的小费，可用于营收统计中兑换奖励。
E: The tips given by the monsters who patronize the Dreamjolt Hostelry. Can be used to redeem rewards in the Revenue Statistics.

C: 球棒侠辛苦攒下来的私房钱，可以用来在银河商店中购买棒球。
E: The hard-earned personal savings of the Galactic Baseballer. Can be used to purchase baseballs in the Cosmic Store.

C:
黑塔为列车提供的援助，使用后可从以下材料中自选一件获取：
· 无生残刃
· 屠魔之矢
· 启迪之钥
· 寒铁的誓言
· 虚空黑曜
· 家族颂歌
· 生命之芽
E:
The assistance provided by Herta to the Astral Express. Upon use, you can select one item to obtain from the following materials:
· Lifeless Blade
· Arrow of the Demon Slayer
· Key of Knowledge
· Oath of Steel
· Obsidian of Desolation
· Ancestral Hymn
· Sprout of Life

C:
使用后可获取以下物品：
· 星轨通票 × 2
· 信用点 × <unbreak>150000</unbreak>
· 冒险记录 × <unbreak>80</unbreak>
· 稀薄以太 × <unbreak>50</unbreak>

E:
Use to obtain the following items:

· Credit ×<unbreak>150,000</unbreak>
· Adventure Log ×<unbreak>80</unbreak>
· Sparse Aether ×<unbreak>50</unbreak>
· Trick Snack ×<unbreak>10</unbreak>
· Diet Fried Rice ×<unbreak>10</unbreak>
· Bottled Soda ×<unbreak>10</unbreak>
· Life Transmitter ×<unbreak>10</unbreak>

C: 使用后立即为我方指定单体回复等同于自身生命上限<unbreak>40%</unbreak>的生命值，并额外回复<unbreak>320</unbreak>点生命值。
E: Upon use, immediately heals one ally by <unbreak>40%</unbreak> of their Max HP plus <unbreak>320</unbreak>.

C: 使用后我方全体在下次战斗中攻击力提高<unbreak>100</unbreak>点，暴击伤害提高<unbreak>30%</unbreak>。
E: Upon use, increase ATK of all allies by <unbreak>100</unbreak> and CRIT DMG by <unbreak>30%</unbreak> for the next battle.

C: 使用后立即为我方指定单体恢复等同于自身能量上限<unbreak>30%</unbreak>能量。
E: Upon use, immediately regenerate (only for Energy) Energy for a single ally equal to <unbreak>30%</unbreak> of their Max Energy.

C: 使用后我方全体在下次战斗中随机获得其中的一组效果：造成的冰属性伤害提高<unbreak>15%</unbreak>，火属性抗性提高<unbreak>15%</unbreak>；造成的火属性伤害提高<unbreak>15%</unbreak>，冰属性抗性提高<unbreak>15%</unbreak>。
E: Upon use, grants all allies a random effect from the following for the next battle: Deals <unbreak>15%</unbreak> more Ice DMG and increases Fire RES by <unbreak>15%</unbreak>, or deals <unbreak>15%</unbreak> more Fire DMG and increases Ice RES by <unbreak>15%</unbreak>.

C: 使用后我方全体在下次战斗中攻击力提高<unbreak>40%</unbreak>。进入战斗时，随机使1名角色有<unbreak>100%</unbreak>的基础概率陷入怒噪状态，持续2回合。
E: Upon use, increases all allies' ATK by <unbreak>40%</unbreak> for the next battle. When entering battle, a random character will have a <unbreak>100%</unbreak> base chance to become afflicted with Outrage, lasting for 2 turns.

C: 用于提升无名勋礼的等级。
E: Used to increase Nameless Honor levels.

E: Light Cone for the Path of <color=#f29e38ff>The Hunt</color>. The Light Cone ability is only effective for characters of this Path.

E: Light Cone for the Path of <color=#f29e38ff>Destruction</color>. The Light Cone ability is only effective for characters of this Path.

E: Light Cone for the Path of <color=#f29e38ff>Nihility</color>. The Light Cone ability is only effective for characters of this Path.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>巡猎</color>命途专属的光锥，光锥技能仅对该命途生效。
E: Light Cone for the Path of <color=#f29e38ff>The Hunt</color>. The Light Cone ability is only effective for characters of this Path.

C: 装备者的每个回合开始时，固定恢复等同于能量上限<unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>的能量。（唯一装备）
E: At the start of the wearer's turn, SPD Amplification increases by <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak>. (Unique)

C: 大幅度提高前台强度。\n\n「我四十公里长的大刀早已饥渴难耐」
E: Greatly increases On-Field Strength.\n\n"A blade this big has a thirst that only battle can quench."

C: 装备者回合开始时恢复1个战技点，消耗战技点后，获得1个战技点，每回合最多恢复<unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>点。
E: When the wearer's turn starts, recovers 1 Skill Point. After consuming Skill Point(s), the wearer gains 1 Skill Point. This effect can recover up to <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> Skill Points per turn.

C: 点击后开启简易武装箱，从四件简易装备中选择一件获得。\n该道具使用后消失。
E: {LAYOUT_MOBILE#Tap}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER#Press}{LAYOUT_KEYBOARD#Click} to open a Basic Weapon Box and select one of four basic weapons to obtain it.\nThis item will disappear after use.

E: Incessant Rain

E: Bloodthirsty

E: Lightning Boots: Privilege

C: 偷偷摸摸将宝箱纳为己有的贼灵。\n\n「桀桀桀！我快一步，我再快一步！你的宝箱是我的喽！」
E: A sneaky Spirithief that has claimed a chest for their own.\n\n"Tsk, tsk! I'm quicker, I'm better, and your treasure is mine!"

C: 瓦尔特•迎新
E: Welt — Welcome

C: 被仙舟称为「帝弓司命」的游弋星神，执掌「巡猎」命途。\n祂无止尽地游荡在诸界之间，铲除「丰饶」星神造就的孽物。
E: The Cruising Aeon known as the Reignbow Arbiter by the Xianzhou, presiding over the Path of The Hunt.\nTHEY roams endlessly between worlds to eradicate the abominations created by the Aeon of Abundance.

C: 获得希佩赐福的世界及其选民们。\n不倦地歌颂祂的慷慨，相信宇宙终将成为「同谐」的整体。
E: The residents of worlds that have received Xipe's blessing.\nThey sing endlessly about their Aeon's generosity, and believe that the universe will eventually become a single harmonious entity.

C: 使用火属性造成「弱点击破」时，会造成火属性伤害，并施加「灼烧」状态。\n「灼烧」能造成火属性持续伤害。
E: Using Fire attacks to trigger Weakness Break will deal Fire DMG and apply Burn effect.\nBurn deals Fire DoT.

E: Cocolia Rand

E: Ten-Lords Commission

E: Tingyun

C: 【3月20日 周一】 客观地说，我这种人是最纯粹的小说家，只想看到什么就写什么，把我所见所得通通写到小说里，而不是为了生计到处奔波。要不是看在亲戚一场，我真的不想来咖啡馆帮忙。 【3月21日 周二】 今天来的顾客基本都是小情侣，其中有一对有点奇怪，那个男的一直在跟女的大谈自己「白手起家创业史」，尬吹了老半天，那个女的居然也不嫌弃。我站在柜台前听了很久，腰疼死了，本来还想找什么写作灵感，笑死，根本找不到。 【3月24日 周五】 连续两次都是那个女顾客买单，看衣着打扮多半也是女富男穷。虽说爱情的本质并非嫌贫爱富，但这种家境差距的故事，用来当作小说素材是再好不过了。一个富裕但纯情的姑娘，一个贫穷但别有用心的情场浪子，爱情在谎言中生根发芽。 「她沉浸在这幻梦里，全然不顾轻易得之的美梦背后暗藏的虚假。这可能是她青春里第一次有人愿意这样耐心地与她说话，对爱情的幻想和渴望，与来自家庭的束缚挤压在一起。哪怕只在咖啡厅里见过两次，她已完全沉溺在这莫大的苍白的快乐里，不知所形。她甚至不会怀疑这是一场骗局，因为在她迄今为止的生命里，别人连欺骗她的兴趣都提不起来，更何况欺骗是要以时间为成本的。」 【3月26日 周日】 那对情侣第三次来咖啡厅，叫「比尔」的男的带了文件让女的参股投资。可怜的姑娘，没见过人心的险恶，不懂得拒绝，被不怀好意的浪子玩弄于股掌之间。 「这份投资书无时无刻不在戏谑着玩弄着她的羞耻心，警醒着她期待的恋爱永远不可以僭越某条界限。面对无由来的示好，早已形成深入骨髓的应激回应，除了红着脸点头，她什么也无法拒绝。即使生长在优渥的环境里，她也甚至从未期望过社会的宽容与善意。」 小说的大纲写完了，估计过一两个月我就能完稿。 【4月3日 周一】 铁卫的人过来说裂界会很快侵蚀到边缘通路这边，让我通知店主做好搬迁的准备。有点可惜，我最近才刚喜欢上咖啡厅的生活。我喜欢那种认真研磨咖啡豆、精心冲调却只能泡出一团苦涩浆糊的感觉，很讽刺却又无可奈何，就像大多数人的人生一样。 【4月4日 周二】 那对情侣差不多有一周没来了吧，也许是候车广场那边已经不通车的原因。「深情是一桩悲剧」这是众所周知的事，所以就用悲剧来给新书结尾好了。 【4月5日 周三】 那对情侣今天居然来了，没点咖啡，只要了一杯热水。那个女的哭了一场，说父亲知道了他们的事把她的经济来源给断了，现在自己连饭都吃不起。比尔拿了笔钱给她，让她去酒店住几天再给父亲认个错。这个比尔一看就是老手，不像新手，钓鱼总舍不得下鱼饵。 【4月7日 周五】 周围的商铺都已经搬得差不多了，咖啡馆里收拾完了还得去广场管理处那边办退租手续。没想到我在那里见到了比尔，那家伙在跟广场管理处的人哭诉，说什么自己被开发商家的大小姐骗钱了，但管理处的人说那个叫「拉雯妮」的女孩只是个房产中介，根本不是什么老板的女儿。哈？还有这种事？人生起起伏伏真是太有意思了，远比小说要精彩。 【4月9日 周日】 还有一箱糖，四箱户外家具没搬走。累晕了，舅舅真的抠门，怎么不请人搬，非要自己来。哎，我的手稿都还没装订好，但愿不会落下什么东西。
E: Monday, March 20th Objectively speaking, people like me are novelists in the purest sense. I don't write for money. I write whatever comes to mind. Everything I've seen and all my experiences from traveling are reflected in my novels. If it wasn't for family, I really wouldn't be helping out at the cafe. Tuesday, March 21st The customers today were basically all young couples. There was one curious pair. The man was yakking on to the woman about his history of "starting a business from scratch." It was so awkward, but the lady seemed to enjoy it. I stood in front of the counter and listened in for a long time until my back hurt. I was trying to look for some inspiration, but there was laughably none to be found. Friday, March 24th Two times in a row, it was the lady who paid the bill. And judging from their clothes, she was rich, and he wasn't. While the nature of love does not discriminate based on wealth, the "rich girl, poor guy" trope is excellent writing material. A rich but innocent girl meets a poor loaf with an ulterior motive. Love takes root from the seed of lies. "She was immersed in this fantasy, completely ignoring the falsehood it concealed. This may be the first time in her youth that someone is willing to talk to her so patiently. Her fantasy and thirst for love, and the shackles of her family that bind her have now come so closely together. Even though they have only met twice in the café, she is already at a loss, completely absorbed this great white bliss. So much so that she would not doubt that this was all an elaborate ruse. Because up till now, no one else has even had the thought of deceiving her. Not to mention, deception also costs precious time." Sunday, March 26th The couple came to the cafe for the third time, and the man named "Bill" brought the girl some papers — documents to invest her family's wealth in. The poor girl, who has never seen the dark side of the human heart, does not know how to refuse, and is played like a fiddle by the cunning loaf. "The investment document incessantly tugs at her shame, a constant reminder that the love she longs so dearly for can never overcome a certain line. Faced with such a sudden advancement, she is struck to the bone with nervousness. All she could muster were a few shy nods, unable to refuse anything. Even though she grew up in a generous environment, she never expected the tolerance and goodwill of society." The novel's outline is complete, and I estimate that I should be able to finish it in a month or two. Monday, April 3rd Some Silvermane Guards came and said that the Fragmentum's corrosion will soon spread to Backwater Pass, and that I should tell the cafe owner to prepare to move. It's a pity that I've only recently started to like the life at the cafe. I love the feeling of carefully grinding coffee beans and meticulously brewing, only to come up with a bitter lump of paste. Ironic and helpless, just like most people's lives. Tuesday, April 4th The couple hasn't been here for almost a week. Maybe it's because the transport hub has been closed to traffic. That "Love is tragedy" is something everyone knows. So, let's end the new book with a tragedy. Wednesday, April 5th The couple actually came today. They didn't order coffee, just a cup of hot water. The woman cried a lot. It seemed that her father had cut her off after knowing about them, and now she can't even afford to eat. Bill gave her some money to stay at a hotel for a few days before going back to make amends with her father. This Bill is no novice. He's playing the long game. Friday, April 7th The surrounding shops are almost all done moving. After cleaning up, I had to go to the Plaza's Management Office to go through the procedures of ending the rent. I didn't expect to see Bill there. The guy was crying to the people at the Management Office about how he was cheated by the young lady of the developer's house. But the people at the Management Office said that the girl named "Lavonne" was just a real estate agent. She wasn't the boss's daughter. Ha? Wouldn't you know? Truth really is stranger than fiction. Sunday, April 9th There is still a box of candy, and four boxes of outdoor furniture that have not been removed. Despite all his tiredness, my uncle can still be so stingy. Why didn't he ask for help? He just had to come by himself. Oops, I realized I haven't bound my manuscripts yet. Hopefully nothing gets left behind.

C: 书接上文：阿尔乔姆在安娜的带领下，第一次见识了寒冰之都的『雨水』、寒冰隧道网等科技奇观。在参观途中，安娜向阿尔乔姆正式地传达了来自女王的邀请：他将作为外宾接受召见。在这里，他将遇到来自熔岩之国的达米尔…… 受到传召，阿尔乔姆来到寒冰之都的水晶宫殿。其实无需指引，任何人都能在街道上看到这座建筑雄伟的穹顶。以此为路标，便不会迷失方向。 在负责接待的士兵的带领下，阿尔乔姆穿过大厅，进入到水晶宫最引以为傲的历史长廊之中。落日黯淡的微光在廊壁上勾勒出精致的线条。 随着阿尔乔姆前进的步伐，那些描摹古代英雄和诸王的浮雕动了起来。枪戟向前刺出，缓缓迎向狞恶的魔物；斗篷猎猎飘动，舞出劲风的流向。然而，一旦阿尔乔姆驻足，廊壁上的史诗又陷入停滞。 阿尔乔姆毕竟是博物馆出身，平日的工作总是从沉默的文物上探寻过往的历史。他熟悉这些过去的艺术家们惯用的技巧，习惯了忽略那些转喻象征的装饰，径直走向历史本身。他忍不住放缓脚步，开始欣赏其中的细节： 神明自破碎的天空中现身，其身躯流淌出金色的血液。祂以冰冷的眼神俯瞰凡间…… 与魔物大军交锋的冰之都的战士们穿着阿尔乔姆从未见过的甲胄，手执发出炽热死亡的武器…… 山一样巨大的战车，如雪鸥般飞翔的云船。这片潮水般的军势的顶端，一位头戴钻石冠冕的女性挥舞矛枪，枪锋直指天上无情的神明…… 阿尔乔姆几乎被这凝固的一瞬中蕴含的力量压垮。他长出一口气，发现前方引路的士兵正微笑地看着入迷的他。他向士兵致以歉意的目光，加快了步伐追了上去。 到达会客厅之后，接待的士兵告诉他需要在这里自由活动，并等候女王的传唤。 他坐下不久，一个衣衫褴褛的外宾凑了过来，在他旁边的位置上坐下。还没等阿尔乔姆开口，那个人便开始自我介绍了起来。 「你好，我叫达米尔，来自遥远的熔岩之国。请问……」 「我叫阿尔乔姆，来自贝洛伯格……另外，我也不算是外宾，只是一个遇难的冒险者。」 「贝洛伯格？我没听过，不过能遇到同行可真是太好了！」 「同行？真是意外之喜啊，看您的着装，想必一定经历过许多惊心动魄的冒险吧？」 「要说惊心动魄，那确实没差。我是坐着大炮来到这儿的。真是令人大开眼界——我还是第一次见到雪花呢……」 「你说什么？大炮？坐着大炮…来这儿？」 「是啊是啊，把人装进炮弹，放进炮筒。然后砰地一下飞出去，咻——！明白了吗？」名为达米尔的男子兴奋地比划了一个抛物线。 「没明白。被当成炮弹打出去，人还能活命吗？」 「来了来了，这是我最喜欢的时刻了。看着你们脸上不可思议的表情，让我慢条斯理地给你们讲讲我的故乡。哈哈，来这儿之后我都快习惯这套流程了。」达米尔双手叉腰自豪地笑了起来。 「我来自熔岩之国。那儿从来没见过雪花，气温和冰都也是天差地别。在我们那里，存在着许多能量巨大的活火山。火山，你明白吗？就是雪山的反面，烫得冒烟的山脉。火山口还会时不时朝天喷一阵火呢。」 阿尔乔姆完全无法想象一座热到喷火的山脉。他只能茫然地点点头，随后又接着点头。 「…就是那样，我们借助了火山的力量，制作了火山大炮。用大炮把我这样的冒险家发射出去，去往其他遥远的国家进行探索。不过我也是飞到了半空中才突然意识到——回去的路得靠两只脚了。原来那些前辈冒险家都是走回来的，哈哈哈哈！」 达米尔自来熟、健谈，话语中充满了火焰男儿的热情。这让阿尔乔姆油然升起一股亲近感。一来一往的谈话之间，他第一次知道了火山是什么、地壳运动是什么、火山大炮又是什么…… 熔岩之国的冒险者虽然分布在大地的四极，但是凭借着永远指向熔岩之国的罗盘，他们总是能够找到回去的道路。然而，返乡的旅途并不会比大炮飞行更加安全。能够成功返乡的冒险者屈指可数。而这其中的成功者，总是带着可靠的异邦人伙伴，给熔岩之国带去了他们自己无处获得的知识、技术以及各种见闻。 「阿尔乔姆，我需要你的帮助。请和我一起回到熔岩之国，赶在历史上最大的火山活动之前！」 「历史上最大的火山活动……？」 「没错，那时我们会准备好最大规模的火山大炮飞出这颗星球，前往旧世界的『天外之境』！」 （未完待续）
E: Continuation: Following Anna, Artem witnessed the technological miracles of the Frozen City, including the Rain Water, frozen tunnel network, and many others. During the tour, Anna delivered the queen's invitation to Artem. He was being summoned as a foreign guest. This is how he'll get to meet Dalmir of the Lava Kingdom... Responding to the summon, Artem arrived at the Frozen City's Crystal Palace. He had no issues finding the place, as the palace's grand dome could be seen from anywhere in the streets. Under the guidance of the soldier in charge of guest reception, Artem passed through the main hall and entered the most prized part of the Crystal Palace, the hall of history. The glimmering light of the dawning sun cast a delicate outline upon the corridor walls. Following Artem's footsteps, the sculptures of the ancient heroes and kings began to move. The spears in their hands extended forward, slowly reaching towards the evil monsters. Their cloaks swayed in the air, as if dancing alongside gusts of wind. However, all movement came to an end as Artem stoped. Artem had spent his fair share of time in museums. Trying to uncover stories hidden within the silent relics was part of his daily work. He was familiar with the techniques used by ancient artists and got used to ignoring symbolic adornments, so he could get right to the history itself. He couldn't help but slow down to gaze upon the magnificent works in the corridor: Emerging from the shattered sky, with golden blood running through THEIR veins, the God looks down upon the mortal word with cold and condescending eyes... The warriors of the Frozen City were fighting the monster army. They wielded weapons emitting flames of death and wore armors that Artem has never seen before... An armed vehicle the size of a mountain soared through the air like a snowgull. At the apex of this tidal wave of an army sat a woman with a diamond crown on her head. She was brandishing her spear, pointing it towards the merciless God in the sky... Artem almost collapsed under the power emitting from the sculpture. He exhaled and noticed that the soldier leading him was observing his fascination with a smile. Artem gave him an apologetic look and quickly caught up with the soldier. Artem was told by the soldier at the reception that he could move freely while waiting for the queen's summon. Not long after he sat down, a ragged outsider came in and sat next to him. Before Artem could speak, the man introduced himself. "Hello, I'm Dalmir of the Lava Kingdom. I'd like to know..." "I'm Artem of Belobog. I'm not a guest, just an adventurer that ran into trouble." "Belobog? I've never heard of it, but I'm glad to meet someone in the same line of work!" "Same line of work? What an unexpected joy! Judging from your clothes, you must have experienced many thrilling adventures." "I guess thrilling would be an accurate description. I came here as a cannonball. It was eye-opening! I've never seen snowflakes before..." "What did you say? You came here... as a cannonball?" "Yeah, yeah! You put a man inside a cannon, then BOOM! The man's flying through the air, get it?" Dalmir excitedly drew a parabola with his fingers. "I don't get it. How could a man survive that?" "Here we go! This is my favorite moment. That incredible look on your face. Now I get to slowly explain my hometown to you. Haha, I'm used to it by now." Dalmir smiled proudly with his hands on his hips. "There are no snowflakes in the Lava Kingdom where I'm from. The difference in temperature is night and day compared to the Frozen City. There are many volcanoes where I live. Do you know about volcanoes? It's the complete opposite of snow mountains. Volcanoes have smoke coming out the top, and sometimes, they even spew fire." Artem could not imagine a mountain so hot that it could breathe fire. All he could do was nod absently. "...And so, we used the power of the volcano to create a volcano cannon. We use it to launch adventurers, such as myself, to explore other countries. But it was only in the air that I realized the only way back was by walking. I guess that's how the previous adventurers returned home, hahaha!" Dalmir was naturally talkative. His words were full of passion that made Artem feel a sense of kinship. As they talked, Artem learned for the first time what a volcano was, what the movement of Earth's crust was, and what a volcano cannon was... The Lava Kingdom adventurers are dispatched to explore the ends of the earth, but they can always find their way back with a compass that always points home. However, the trip back may be more dangerous than being launched by the cannon, and only a handful of adventurers make it. The ones who do make it always bring home reliable companions from foreign lands. The outsiders bring knowledge and technology that the Lava Kingdom would not normally have access to. "Artem, I need your help! Please come back with me to the Lava Kingdom. We must get there before the biggest volcanic event in history!" "The biggest volcanic event in history...?" "That's right! We're preparing our biggest volcano cannon yet. We're going to fly to the Satelleden of the Old World!" (To Be Continued)
