C: 精灵古怪的少女，自认热衷于这个年纪的女孩子「应当热衷」的所有事，比如照相。\n从一块漂流的恒冰中苏醒，却发现自己对身世与过往都一无所知。短暂的消沉之后，她决定以重获新生的日期为自己命名。\n这一天，三月七「诞生」了。
E: A spirited and quirky young girl who is into all the things girls her age are interested in, such as taking photos.\nShe was awakened from a piece of drifting eternal ice, only to find that she knows nothing about herself or her past. Though initially feeling dejected, she decided to name herself after the date of her rebirth.\nAnd thus, on that day, March 7th was born.

C: 空间站「黑塔」真正的主人。\n身为湛蓝星智商最高的人类，只做自己感兴趣的事，一旦失去兴趣就立刻走人——空间站就是最好的例子。\n平时以远程操纵的人偶形态登场：「跟我小时候比，勉强七分相似吧。」——黑塔本人。
E:
Herta space station's true master.
As the human with the highest IQ on the Blue, she only does what she's interested in, dropping projects the moment she loses interest — the best example being the space station.
She typically appears in the form of a remote-controlled puppet.
"It's about seventy percent similar to how I looked as a child." — Herta

C: 黑塔女士的手稿是极为宝贵的资产。 其核心的难得之处并不在于黑塔女士极少愿意花费笔墨进行纸面写作，而是对于这样一位天才而言，天下万物都没什么值得记录的必要。 那些普通科员付诸十年、乃至一辈子才可以得出的科研成果，或许可以点亮一整片陌生的科研领域。但对她而言，都不过像是随手点了一盏节能灯那样平凡。谁又会没事浪费时间去将这种小事成文成体系地记录下来呢？ 不仅是黑塔女士，其实整个「天才俱乐部」成员的创作文献多是不可多得的珍宝。然而黑塔女士却更宽宏、更体恤理解我等普通人。她将手稿就那样随意地放置于空间站，如她将搜集来的奇物珍宝开放给每一位科员进行研究那般「慷慨」。 当然，我们都坚信并认可，这并非黑塔女士怠于完成那部著作，所以将随手编写的稿纸到处乱放，方便以后应付投资方的时候，可以说一句——「写完了，但是找不到了」。
E: Madam Herta's manuscripts are extremely valuable assets. Its core rarity is not in how Madam Herta rarely pens to paper, but because to a genius like her, nothing is ever worth recording. Scientific research that would take normal researchers ten years — or even a lifetime — to achieve may be able to shed light on an entirely new domain of research, but they are to Herta as ordinary as turning on a LED light. Who would waste time trying to systematically record such trivial matters? It's not just Madam Herta — any documentation written by a Genius Society member is a priceless treasure. However, Herta is more generous and more understanding toward normal people like us. She leaves her handwritten drafts behind in random places around the space station with as much generosity as she allows researchers to study the Curios she collected. Of course, we all firmly understand that Madam Herta isn't being lazy and just discarding incomplete drafts around the place. It's so she can claim to investors with plausible deniability that "I've finished writing that paper, but can't find it anywhere."

C: 「██年██月██日 ，地点：诊所，与虎克谈心，内容记录如下：」 「费斯曼老爹很早之前就是爸爸妈妈的好朋友。那时候，我们住在北方的一个小镇上。有一天，妈妈去了裂界里，再也没有回来。妈妈最喜欢吃岩烧洞螈了。爸爸很想她，所以每天都给我做岩烧洞螈吃。」 「后来有一天，当我回家时，我看到爸爸躺在床上，看起来很难受。我急哭了，赶紧去找住在隔壁的费斯曼老爹。他说爸爸是生病了，就带着爸爸和我去找镇上的医生。」 「我们陪着爸爸在医生那里住了好几天。最后，钱全都快花光了，但爸爸偷偷对我说，让我把钱存着，他觉得那里待着不舒服，想要回家。于是我就去找老爹，想要把爸爸送回家。结果，我和老爹回来的时候，他就不说话了。」 「老爹一直跪在地上哭，可我不明白怎么回事。老爹解释说，是爸爸太想妈妈，就在梦里去找妈妈了。我问老爹，他什么时候会醒。老爹就只是一直哭，没有回答我……」 「虎、虎克才没哭呢！不用…娜塔莎姐姐…不用给我纸巾……」 「…其实，我后来偷偷问了医生。我知道，爸爸其实是死了，永远不会回来了，妈妈也一样…我知道，老爹是不想让我伤心，所以才一直对我说谎……」 「我知道，老爹是世界上最好的人，我也最喜欢老爹了……」 「所以，我要和大家一起找到宝藏，然后给老爹盖一间大房子，还要帮老爹把病治好！」
E: "██/██/██, Address: The clinic. Had a heart-to-heart conversation with Hook. The contents are as follows:" "Daddy Fersman was once a very good friend of mom and dad's. Back then, we all lived in a small town in the north. One day, mom went into the Fragmentum, and never came out again. Mom loved eating stone-grilled olm. Dad missed her so much that he made me stone-grilled olm to eat every day." "Then one day when I came home, I saw dad lying on the bed looking very uncomfortable. I burst into tears, and went to find daddy Fersman next door. He said dad was sick, and he took dad and me to see the town doctor." "We stayed with dad at the doctor's place for several days. In the end, we almost used up all our money. Dad secretly told me to save the money. He also told me that he was uncomfortable staying there, and wanted to go home. So I went to daddy and told him I wanted to go home with my dad. But when daddy and I went to see him, he stopped talking." "Daddy was on his knees and crying, but I didn't understand what was going on. Daddy explained to me that dad missed mom so much that he went to see her inside his dreams. I asked daddy, when will my dad wake up? Daddy just kept crying though and didn't answer me..." "I didn't — didn't cry! No... Natasha, I don't need any tissues..." "...Actually later I secretly asked the doctor something. I know that my dad is dead and won't come back forever, and mom is the same... I know that daddy doesn't want to make me sad, so he keeps on lying to me..." "I know that daddy is the very best person in the whole world, and I like daddy the most..." "So that's why I want to find lots of treasure with everyone, so we can build daddy a nice big house and help fix daddy!"

C: 「匹诺康尼…『钻石』终于打算对它动手了？」 桌上的微缩模型不断旋转，晶莹剔透的忆泡不断泛出微小的泡沫。 「这是一笔超乎想象的历史坏账，所以背后的利益…高得惊人。」 面前的人背对着他，望着庇尔波因特黄昏时紫红的天空。 「但为什么是我？」 那人依旧背对着他，他无法用自己善于捕捉的眼睛去揣测这个决定背后的真实用意。 「本该是我。但『钻石』认为家族还有合作的价值，希望这事至少有和平解决的余地。」 「思来想去，我觉得你最合适。」 「这甚至只是我们第二次谈话，你这么信任我？」 「错了，我压根没有信过你——也许『翡翠』会，但我不会。」 「没准这一次，好运不会再站在你这边了，而你也将为自己一直以来的幸运付出代价。」 面前的人终于转了过来，远处的大楼反射出欧泊石般七彩的光芒，而一只八音盒兀自作响。 「但那不正是你所渴望的东西吗？」
E: "Penacony... Is Diamond finally ready to do something about it?" The miniature model on the table continues to rotate, the crystalline memory bubble emitting tiny spheres of foam. "This historic debt is utterly unimaginable. So, the profit involved is also... shockingly high." The person in front of him has their back turned to him, gazing instead at the purplish-red sky of Pier Point at sunset. "But why me?" The person continues to face away from him. Keen though his eyes are, he can not decipher the true intentions behind the decision. "It should have been me, but Diamond believes that The Family still had some value in cooperation and hopes this affair still has some room for a peaceful resolution." "So, after some thought, I've concluded that you're the best candidate." "This is only our second conversation ever. Do you trust me that much?" "No, I've never trusted you. Perhaps Jade does, but I don't." "Maybe luck won't be on your side this time, and the bill for all your past good fortune will come due." Finally, the person in front of him turns around. The distant skyscraper reflects a kaleidoscope of colors like an opal stone, while a music box plays on its own. "But isn't that what you've been longing for?"

C: 空间站的外部危机似乎得到了控制，但科员们仍然处于不安之中。\n不知道阿兰的情况怎么样，去看看他吧。
E: The space station's external crisis seems to be under control but the researchers remain uneasy.\nNot sure how Arlan is doing. Let's go check on him.

C:
在和同伴充分交换意见之后，你们很快得出结论：当下最要紧之事务应是回到旅店房间好好睡一觉，回头再去请教「地火」的想法。
这听起来确实是有点扯，但你如何能拒绝长途跋涉和艰苦战斗之后的柔软床垫呢？
之前的你还对眼前的铺位有所嫌弃，可它现在简直是全世界最舒适的地方，没有之一。
晚安，也愿你不再从噩梦中惊醒。
E:
Having had a thorough discussion, you quickly conclude that the priority is to return to the hotel and get a good night's sleep. You will ask what Wildfire makes of this later.
It may sound outlandish, but how can one say no to a soft mattress after a long journey and harsh battle?
You toss all the complaints about your bed behind, thinking it must be the nicest thing this world has to offer.
Nighty-night. May you no longer be troubled by nightmares.

C: 根据周围的陈设判断，你多半是来到了这旧时边堡城塞的核心区域。\n你大可以在此处稍作盘桓，对你认为有价值的垃圾堆进行充分调查，直到你对这里的历史不再感兴趣为止。\n而你的敌人则会坐镇在你的必经之路上，默许你在这里造成的一切破坏，最终再被你们打倒，草草结束这堪称惨淡的一生。
E: Based on the surrounding structures, it's likely that you've arrived in a core area of an ancient citadel that used to stand on the edge of civilization.\nYou can gather yourself here and investigate the trash piles you think may be of value until you lose interest in the history of this place.\nYour enemies will sit and wait on the path you must take and allow any degree of destruction you may cause here. Then they will be defeated by you and end their meaningless lives.

C: 翻看卡芙卡所留下的通讯影像，你意识到她的邀请中潜藏着致命的危险——她的同伴，名为「刃」的男子，与你之间曾有刻骨宿怨。\n你决心违犯禁令，再踏罗浮。然而当你登陆流云渡，却察觉着卡芙卡所言非虚，受星核作祟，罗浮已然陷入灾变。
E: As you review the video communication sent by Kafka, you realize there is a hidden and lethal danger in her invitation — Her companion, the man named Blade, has an ancient and indelible feud with you.\nYou decide to go against the ban and set foot on the Luofu once again. Yet, when you land on Cloudford, you feel that Kafka was not lying. The Luofu has fallen into a catastrophe due to the influences of the Stellaron.

C: 丹鼎司深处，古老的丹炉被重新启动，喷吐烟云。此处曾因这些丹炉而得名「云霞紫府」。但如今这些炉鼎释放的烟气已被药王秘传施加毒物，能令长生种更迅速地堕入魔阴身状态。\n既然只有你们能破解困局，当然没有推脱的理由。关闭丹炉后，你们随即前往迎战药王秘传。
E: Deep in the bowels of the Alchemy Commission, the ancient elixir crucibles have been reactivated and smoke wafts out from them. This area was once named Evemist Mansion due to the mist generated by the elixir crucibles. Now these mists have been poisoned by the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, and can quickly induce mara in long-life species.\nSince you are the only ones who can break through the stalemate, you don't have a reason to refuse. You immediately prepare to fight the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus after turning off the elixir crucibles.

C: 桑博一改先前轻松愉快的态度，转而以一种极其严肃的口吻向你提示了流萤的来路并不正常。撂下一连串难懂却让人心烦意乱的隐喻后，他转身离开，而你也发现此前一直如影随形的流萤不见了踪影。\n当务之急是找到流萤，确认她的安全，也要向她讨个说法。
E: Sampo's previously relaxed and joyous attitude suddenly drops to a serious and stern tone as he warns you that there is something abnormal about Firefly's origin. After spouting a series of confusing but upsetting metaphors, he turns on his heel and leaves. At this moment, you realize that Firefly, who had been following you like a shadow, is suddenly nowhere to be seen.\nFirst things first, you must find Firefly, ensure her safety, and get an explanation.

C: 返回现实果然没有你想象中的那么简单——你和流萤甫一抵达黄金的时刻，就遭到了桑博的袭击。在你失去意识之前，你看到桑博似乎幻化成一女人的身形…如果不是他惯于女装，那袭击你们的一定另有其人。\n你在神秘的空间里找到了流萤——看来陌生人也没有放过她。现在，你们可以一起寻找离开这里的出路。
E: As expected, returning to reality isn't as simple as you expected — Firefly and you are attacked by Sampo as soon as you arrive at the Golden Hour. Before you lose consciousness, you see Sampo shift into what appears to be the figure of a woman... Either he has always had a petite feminine build, or your assailant is actually someone else.\nYou find Firefly in the mysterious space — It seems the stranger didn't leave her alone, either. Now, you can look for the way out together.

C: 黑天鹅表示你们应当尽快撤离。而在撤离的途中，如果你们足够幸运，还可以找到流萤留下的痕迹，甚至揭开这场突如其来的死亡的真相。\n你们在撤离的途中找到了许多烧焦的残骸，值得仔细调查一番。
E: Black Swan tells you that you should evacuate as quickly as possible. But, as you are evacuating, you may be fortunate enough to find some traces left by Firefly that could help unravel the truth behind this sudden demise.\nYou discovered a large number of charred remains during your evacuation. They are worth a thorough investigation.

C: 你们在珍品室里找到了名为「格列佛拱门」的神奇道具。如果你看过那部以来自未来的蓝色猫咪担任主人公的有趣动画，一定能够联想到那个通过就能使人缩小的隧……\n呃，咳咳，出于版权方要求，后面的内容不予显示。好了，快把拱门放入沙盘中吧。
E: You two come across a wondrous item called Gulliver's Arch in the treasure room. If you've watched the fun animation with a blue cat from the future as the protagonist, then the item will surely remind you of the tunnel that can shrink the pers—\nAhem, the rest of the content will not be shown due to copyright issues. Now, please put the arch on the sandpit.

C: 你从嘴巴不牢靠的猎犬们那里打听到了加拉赫的所在位置，筑梦边境。好巧不巧，你此前和他有过一面之缘——或许你可以靠刷脸突破猎犬们布下的调查现场，从加拉赫嘴里打听到有关案情的进一步信息。
E: You learn that Gallagher is currently at the Dream's Edge from some blabbing Bloodhound members. Coincidentally, you had an encounter with Gallagher before. You might be able to access the investigation scene set up by the Bloodhounds by showing your face to Gallagher and glean more information about the cases from him.

C: 匹诺康尼的故事再次告一段落——剧目很快就会迎来最高潮了。
E: Once again, the story of Penacony has come to an end. The play will soon reach its climax.

C:
……

将军：「如若没有一位君王，谁庇护孱弱者，谁对抗横暴者？」
宰相：「我们必当为庇护孱弱者而互助，正如我们必当为对抗横暴者而互助。」

弄臣：「如若没有一位君王，谁能使星辰流转、潮汐涨落、万物生长？」
宰相：「在君王出现前，它们各行其是；在君王离开后，它们依旧各行其是。」

大臣：「可送别君王后，谁来做新的君王呢？」
宰相：「我们不再需要一位君王。我们本是超绝万物的君王。」

……
E:
...

General: "Without a ruler, who would protect the weak and fight back against the tyrants?"
Chancellor: "We must assist each other in protecting the weak, just as we must assist each other in opposing the tyrannical."

Jester: "Without a ruler, who will make the stars follow their paths, the tides rise and fall, and allow life to grow?"
Chancellor: "These things did as they will long before the ruler appeared, just as they will continue to do with rulers gone."

Minister: "However, now that we have bid farewell to our ruler. Who shall take their place?"
Chancellor: "We no longer require a ruler, for we were originally all rulers who stand above all things."

...

C: 终于，匹诺康尼的「开拓」之旅还是迎来了美好的结局。是时候迎接新的冒险了——但在那之前，列车组还想和一些人做个正式的道别。\n为逝者的故事画上圆满的句号，就是最好的告慰。去吧，他们都在流梦礁…就在这里。
E: Finally, the trailblazing expedition on Penacony has come to a preferable conclusion. It's time for a new adventure — but before that, the Crew would like to wish say a formal farewell to certain people.\nDrawing a firm line under the stories of those who passed is the best form of comfort. Go on, then — they're all at the Dreamflux Reef... right here.

C: 你终于来到了真正的折纸大学，方才的怪梦可能只是厌学症的表现…但看看这所流光溢彩的华丽校园，看看这群热情洋溢的精英校友，还有什么好怕的呢？让玫瑰色的青春吞噬灰色的你吧！\n校庆开幕式马上就要开始了，听听吧——不听也没事，考试不考这个。
E: You finally step into the real Paperfold University. The bizarre dream back then might just be a manifestation of your fear of school... But what is there to fear now that you've seen this glittering and magnificent campus, together with the passionate elite classmates? Let the rosy vitality of youth consume your gray!\nThe opening ceremony is approaching. Feel free to join — or not, as it won't impact your exam outcomes.

C: 你终于找到了线索——一群把猴子当祖宗供起来的小可爱。这年头，什么东西都能当祖宗，这次是猴子，下次是香蕉，搞不好有一天你也会成为他们的祖宗。\n想办法进他们的地盘看看。想不到办法？你腰上别的可不是玩具。
E: You have finally discovered some clues: A bunch of lil' fudgeheads worshiping monkeys as their ancestors. Now, anything can be an ancestor... monkeys, bananas, heck, even you might end up in their family tree someday.\nFigure out a way to infiltrate their turf. Struggling? Don't sweat, the pistols in your pockets aren't no playthings.

C: 轻松的课间时光转瞬即逝，接下来是上课时间。请不要迟到，不要交头接耳，认真听讲…但你可能做不到，毕竟规则就是用来打破的。\n去看看你的第一堂课吧，希望筑梦学院不是真的让学生直接开始涂墙打灰。
E: Leisurely break time is almost over, and it is crucial to be on time for your first lesson. Please do not be late, refrain from chatting in class, and focus on the lecture... although you might be tempted not to. Rules are made to be broken, after all.\nHead to your first class and hope that the Dreamweaver Academy is not actually getting students to start with manual labor.

C: 草原…熟悉的呼喊…麦芽汁的香气……\n大多数人都生活在平静的绝望中。
E: The prairie... the familiar shouts... and the smell of malt juice...\nMost people lead lives of quiet desperation.

C: 正所谓春天种下一位停云，秋天就能收获一…似乎不是适合用在这里的道理，并且，这里也远不止一个谜题。「她」是怎样变成了「她们」，又是如何从死亡泅渡回现实当中？
E: As the saying goes: Sow your Tingyun in spring for a healthy harvest in fall... That saying doesn't really seem to apply here, and there is more than one puzzle to be solved. How did "Tingyun" become "Tingyuns" and how did they traverse from death back to reality?

C: 虽然已经一同度过了一段快乐的时光，但毕竟临近告别，停云似乎有话要说。\n老规矩，借一步说话。
E: Though you have spent a great time together, it seems Tingyun has something to discuss with you as farewell creeps near.\nGo for a good old walk-and-talk.

C: 我们与被称作黄金裔的翁法罗斯人发生了初次接触，并跟随两位黄金裔进入神殿进行探索。他们声称来此是为了营救难民，但是在难民中似乎发生了冲突。
E: We had initial contact with the people of Amphoreus known as the Chrysos Heirs, then followed two of them into the Temple to explore. They claimed their purpose here was to rescue the refugees, yet there seemed to be tension and strife among the people.

C: 阿格莱雅对奥赫玛的掌控程度远超我们想象，此前的风波已然传到她的耳中。这位黄金裔的领袖展现出她铁血冷酷的一面，以极端手段再度确认我们的来意。历经如此险境，我们需要重新思索翁法罗斯之旅的可行性。
E: Aglaea's control over Okhema runs far deeper than we anticipated, and the previous incident has already reached her ears. This leader of the Chrysos Heirs revealed a cold and unyielding side, going to great lengths to reassess our intentions. After such perilous moments, we must reconsider the viability of our expedition in Amphoreus.

C: 阿格莱雅对奥赫玛的掌控程度远超我们想象，此前的风波已然传到她的耳中。这位黄金裔的领袖展现出她铁血冷酷的一面，以极端手段再度确认我们的来意。历经如此险境，我们需要重新思索翁法罗斯之旅的可行性。
E: Aglaea's control over Okhema runs far deeper than we anticipated, and the previous incident has already reached her ears. This leader of the Chrysos Heirs revealed a cold and unyielding side, going to great lengths to reassess our intentions. After such perilous moments, we must reconsider the viability of our expedition in Amphoreus.

C: 身处这纷争的国度，白厄与万敌两位黄金裔一时兴起，相约开启竞技，兵分两路杀入悬锋城中。城内机关遍地、危机四伏，必须小心翼翼地前进。
E: In this war-torn land, the two Chrysos Heirs, Phainon and Mydei, agreed on a spontaneous competition. They split into two paths, each eliminating enemies on the way to Castrum Kremnos. Traps and dangers lurked around every corner in the city, demanding that one proceed with utmost caution.

C: 遐蝶向寡言的斗士格奈乌斯坦露了此行的目的。一行人继续前行，沿途收集情报，誓要将尼卡多利的五瓣神魂归位，阻止不死神躯的诞生、重铸纷争泰坦的荣耀。
E: Castorice reveals the true purpose of our mission to Gnaeus, the silent gladiator. The party presses on, gathering information on the way, vowing to return Nikador's five soul fragments to their rightful place to prevent the creation of their immortal divine body, and to reforge the glory of the Strife Titan.

C: 黑塔空间站内，黑塔对博识尊的谒见尚未结束。借助全空间站的能源供给，黑塔启动了谒见系统终端，尝试与博识尊沟通，却意外失败。经过排查，终端内的三个扇区均出现故障，黑塔不得不亲自下场，一一处理。
E: Inside the Herta Space Station, Herta's audience with Nous had yet to end. Using all the energy available in the station, Herta activates the Audience System's terminal to try to communicate with Nous. However, the system unexpectedly failed. Upon investigation, all three sectors within the terminal are malfunctioning, requiring Herta to personally attend to each one to resolve the issues.

C: 阿格莱雅因事务繁多，暂时无法与树庭归来的众人面议。舟车疲顿的{NICKNAME}一行人决定先休息一番。
E: With many matters demanding her attention, Aglaea cannot yet receive those back from the Grove. {NICKNAME}'s travel-weary group decides to rest first.

C: 为了复现记忆、完成对克拉特鲁斯的承诺，*我们*悄悄来到命运重渊，寻找历经当年岁月的事物。
E: To replicate memories and fulfill the promise to Krateros, we quietly visit the Abyss of Fate, searching for objects that have witnessed those years.

C: 如今瑟希斯的火种就在你的胸中，这意味着阿格莱雅迟早会为了逐火之旅将它取出。届时，因火种死而复生的你将会怎样也不难猜到。\n为了求生，也为了求索，你需要寻找既能够保全自己、又能对抗阿格莱雅等人的力量——元老院的使者已经等待你多时了。
E: Now, the Coreflame of Cerces resides in your chest, which means that Aglaea will eventually extract it for the Flame-Chase Journey. It's easy to guess what will happen to you, who the Coreflame had revived.\nTo survive, and to seek, you need to find a power that can protect you and combat Aglaea and others — The messenger from Council of Elders has been waiting for you for a long time.

C: 因为先前的事件影响，我前往树庭，意图调查并记录下这个世界的泰坦神话与相关研究，却在那里偶遇了处理要事的风堇。收集火种的任务已经刻不容缓，所以我决定见证风堇完成天空的仪式，获得前往艾格勒所在之处的手段。
E: Still reeling from recent events, I went to the Grove, hoping to investigate and record the myths of the Titans or some manner of related research. There, I unexpectedly encountered Hyacine, who was dealing with urgent matters. The task of collecting Coreflames could wait no longer, so I chose to witness Hyacine perform the Skyward Rite and gain the path to Aquila's location.

C: 晨昏之眼，被冠以泰坦神名的天空壁垒，既是遥远年代天空一族的故乡，也是如今艾格勒的栖地。在风堇的帮助下，我们踏上了这片域外之地，找寻那位制约天幕的泰坦。
E: The Eye of Twilight, a sky barrier named after a Titan, was both the homeland of the Sky people in ancient times and now serves as Aquila's dwelling. With Hyacine's help, we have set foot on this outworld land to find the Titan who binds the sky.

C: 我以灵水辟出前往创世涡心的通路，风堇将接过艾格勒的神权，与众人告别。而我们则全速赶回奥赫玛支援。
E: I created a passage to the Vortex of Genesis with spirit water. Hyacine will claim Aquila's divine authority and bid farewell to everyone. Meanwhile, we'll rush back to Okhema to provide support.

C: 据{NICKNAME}所述，这段「记忆」中的些许细节，与我们来到翁法罗斯的经历大相径庭。似乎来古士是想借此，将翁法罗斯的真相向{NICKNAME}托出。
E: According to {NICKNAME}, certain details in this "memory" seem at odds with our journey through Amphoreus. It appears Lygus intended to use this to reveal Amphoreus's true state to {NICKNAME}.

C: 来吧，来吧，尽情享受这场，独属于你们的静默恐怖秀。
E: Come now, come and savor this chilling show, crafted just for you — a silent horror all your own.

C: 优秀的电影，当然不止需要一位像我这样杰出的导演，也需要一位足够优秀的演员。
E: Of course, a masterpiece doesn't come from a genius director like me alone... It also needs a brilliant actor to light up the screen.

C: 为什么父亲要献祭自己的女儿？为什么女儿要杀死自己的母亲？为什么神明在折磨凡人？为什么飞鹰要将龟壳掷向诗人的脑袋？\n在数不胜数的酒神诗歌中，人们愤恨、哀叹、无奈，因为那悲剧的起因总是无情无形的，无法被斩首或施以绞刑。就像水手杀不死海。
E: Why would a father sacrifice his daughter? Why would a daughter slay her mother? Why do gods torment mortals? Why would an eagle cast a tortoise shell upon a poet's head?\nIn countless poems of the wine god, people rage, grieve, and despair. It was because the roots of these tragedies are elusive and impassive, beyond the reach of blade or noose. Just as sailors cannot slay the sea.

C: 烈阳焚毁了神悟树庭之下的祭坛，那是「大地」的封印。在我到达神悟树庭之后，这里俨然已受到了「记忆」的影响，「毁灭」既是偶然也是必然，我必须继续前进，深入迷雾之中。\n海瑟音揭露了事实，那神秘的山之民并非是真正的荒笛。
E: The Blazing Sun ravaged the altar beneath the Grove of Epiphany, which was the seal of "Earth." By the time I arrived, the Grove was already warped by the Remembrance. Destruction is accidental, yet inevitable. I must press on, deeper into the mist.\nHysilens revealed the truth that the mysterious Mountain Dweller was not the real Terravox.

C: 权杖内核层已严重损毁，宛如废墟。要想在此搜寻德谬歌的痕迹，无异于大海捞针。真是欲盖弥彰呀，这只说明一件事——\n我找对地方了。
E: The Scepter's kernel is severely damaged, little more than rubble. Seeking traces of the Demiurge here would be like finding a needle in a haystack. How revealing... This only confirms one thing...\nI'm exactly where I need to be.

C:
我来为你讲述「迷路迷境」的故事吧：哀丽秘榭的树林里，住着一群可爱的小朋友，它们的名字能连成一首歌谣——
一、二、三、四、五、六、七♪
哆、徕、咪、发、嗦、啦、嘻♪
生命微种萌蘖于无瑕忆中。心灵最柔软处，由哀怜触动的真挚颤抖，就是「生命的因」。
E:
Let me tell you the story of "Membrance Maze": A group of cute little friends live in Aedes Elysiae's forests. Their names can be connected into a song...
One, two, three, four, five, six, seven ♪
Do, re, mi, fa, sol, la, ti ♪
Tiny seeds of life sprout within pristine memories. In the most tender corners of the heart, that genuine shiver stirred by lament... That's the "mover of life."

C: 时光归墟…这里是权杖的内核层。白厄就在此处，以怒火铸就监牢，镇压着铁墓的恨意。若想与绝灭大君正面对敌，我们就必须踏上最后一次逐火之旅，收拢由众黄金裔升擢的泰坦们的命运，在他们的帮助下走到白厄面前，消融烈阳的执念。
E: The Ruins of Time... This is the kernel of the Scepter. Here stands Phainon, who forged a prison with rage to contain the hatred of Irontomb. If we wish to face the Lord Ravager head-on, we must embark on our final Flame-Chase Journey, gather the destinies of the Chrysos Heirs who have ascended into Titans, and reach Phainon with their aid to dissolve the Blazing Sun's obsession.

C: 时光归墟…这里是权杖的内核层。白厄就在此处，以怒火铸就监牢，镇压着铁墓的恨意。若想与绝灭大君正面对敌，我们就必须踏上最后一次逐火之旅，收拢由众黄金裔升擢的泰坦们的命运，在他们的帮助下走到白厄面前，消融烈阳的执念。
E: The Ruins of Time... This is the kernel of the Scepter. Here stands Phainon, who forged a prison with rage to contain the hatred of Irontomb. If we wish to face the Lord Ravager head-on, we must embark on our final Flame-Chase Journey, gather the destinies of the Chrysos Heirs who have ascended into Titans, and reach Phainon with their aid to dissolve the Blazing Sun's obsession.

C: 绝望，是救世主执念的另一部分。唯有同时卸下沉重的愿望与滚烫的绝望，白厄自己的心愿才能够得到解放。
E: Despair is another part of the Deliverer's obsession. Only by letting go of both the heavy wishes and burning despair can Phainon's own heart be set free.

C: 铁墓的恨意吞没寰宇，它的加冕即将完成，星系内一切存在都已遭其格式化。在宇宙迎来毁灭的前一瞬，我却在静谧的虚空中醒来……
E: Irontomb's hatred devours the cosmos. Its coronation is nearly complete. All existence within the galaxy has already been formatted by it. However, in the final split second before the universe's destruction, I wake up in a silent void...

C: 倘若世间因果是一条顺流而下的溪涧，那么少女就是被岁月之风吹起、溯流而上的花朵。沿着回望的方向，她踮着脚在水面上播撒着涟漪，圆满了因果、拂留了芬芳，将一切重要的瞬间铭刻于此，慢慢地靠近…那最初的起点。
E: If the world's causality were a stream flowing downstream, then the girl would be a flower, blown against the current by the winds of time. Following her backward gaze, she tiptoes across the water, casting ripples, completing the cycle of cause and effect, and leave a lingering fragrance. Engraving every precious moment here, she gradually draws closer... to that very beginning.

C: 如果觉得累了，就在这里好好睡一觉吧——一切珍贵的回忆，都会如温暖的毛绒，包裹着你进入梦乡。
E: If you feel fatigued, feel free to take a respite here. All your precious memories will wrap around you like warm fleece as you drift into dreamland.

C: 一出真假温明德的大戏在此处上演，此前同温明德打交道的你，毫无疑问成了破局的关键。
E: This is a great play where identifying the real Wen Mingde is the main focal point. You were the one that has been cooperating with Wen Mingde and now you've become the key to solving this mystery.

C: 应物科的温世齐受「公司」委托，要盘点空间站的资产亏损。\n他拜托你拍摄月台区域的资产，拍下被损坏的机器人试试吧。
E: Wen Shiqi in the Department of Implement Arts has been tasked by the IPC with compiling a damage report of all the assets in the space station.\nHe asked you to snap some photos of assets around the railway platform. Try taking a photo of the broken robot.

C: 用相机扫描怪物，找到并击败藏有密钥的怪物
E: Use the camera to scan for monsters. Find and defeat the monster that is carrying the encryption key

C: 艾丝妲似乎遇到了很困扰她的事情。\n她正在「老地方」等你，过去问问看到底发生了什么。
E: Asta seems to have encountered something worrying indeed.\nShe's waiting for you at "the old place." Head over and find out what has happened.

C: 按照丹恒的说法，三月七应该是和阿兰在一起的。\n艾丝妲很担心阿兰的情况，赶紧过去问问看吧。
E: According to Dan Heng, March 7th should be with Arlan.\nAsta is very worried about Arlan. Go there and ask what's going on.

C: 奇物「螺中笑声」受到模因病毒的感染，在空间站里大肆传播「毒鸡汤」。艾丝妲请你帮忙调查病毒的源头。\n三位可疑人员，究竟谁会是这场闹剧的起源？
E: The Curio "Crackup Conch" is infected by the memetic virus, spreading anti-motivational quotes in the space station. Asta wants your help to investigate the source of this virus.\nWhich of the three suspects caused this drama?

C: 至此，事件终于告一段落。对于这个结果，你并不意外——不如说现在这样，才更符合你对黑塔的认知。
E: At this point, the incident has finally come to an end. You are not surprised by this outcome — rather, this is now more in line with your perception of the Herta Space Station.

C: 真理医生似乎已经从蛛丝马迹中找到了答案，该回禁闭舱段复盘整起事件了
E: Dr. Ratio seems to already have discovered the answer from what little evidence you have. It's time to return the seclusion zone and reconstruct the entire incident.

C: 你从老歌德那儿接到了一个委托——去花店帮人买束花。
E: You received an assignment from Old Goethe — go to the florist and buy a bouquet of flowers.

C: 身为「地火」的首领以及磐岩镇唯一的医生，娜塔莎每日劳务缠身，想要踏出诊所一步都是难上加难。\n不巧，她又碰上几位颇为顽固的病患，无论如何都不愿配合复诊。\n帮她一个忙，去劝说那些加入了所谓「互助会」的患者吧。
E: As the chief of Wildfire and the only doctor in Boulder Town, Natasha is busy every day, and it's almost impossible for her to leave the clinic.\nWhat's worse, some stubborn patients refuse to come for a follow-up visit.\nDo her a favor and persuade the patients who joined the so-called "mutual aid society."

C: 帕斯卡的日记揭示了零件盗窃案与灯火通明的铆钉镇背后残酷的真相。\n在知晓了这一切后，这台可怜的机器人又该何去何从？你与克拉拉都拿不定主意。\n不妨先返回史瓦罗的基地，与这贝洛伯格中最了解自动机兵的人（或者说，是机器人）探讨一下各种可能性吧。
E: Pascal's diary revealed the cruel truth behind the parts theft and the lights that never went out in Rivet Town.\nWhat will happen to this poor robot after knowing all this? Neither you nor Clara could make up your mind.\nWhy don't you return to Svarog's Base and discuss the possibilities with the one person (or rather, robot) in Belobog who understands automatic robot soldiers the most.

C: 你们成功安抚了茉莉，并让她前往「永动」机械屋暂避风头，同时也获得了证明军中腐败确有其事的口供。\n回到禁区，你们却发现茉莉竟先一步来到此处与犯人对峙。她的处境十分危险——帮帮茉莉！
E: After comforting Molly, you tell her to hide in Neverwinter Workshop, and get her testimony that corruption is happening in the army.\nWhen you return to the restricted zone, you find that Molly has come here to confront the criminal. Her life is at risk, she needs your help!

C: 你和佩拉在「残响回廊」中受尽折磨，好在最后确实找到了茉莉需要的「钥匙」。\n返回「永动」机械屋，将此次裂界之旅的见闻汇报给二人吧。
E: You and Pela have suffered a lot in the Corridor of Fading Echoes, but you find the key Molly needs.\nReturn to Neverwinter Workshop and report the findings from your trip to them.

C: 不知出于何种原因，佩拉被锁在了巨大旋转栈桥的另一边。好在你机智过人，很快破译了老巴拉金留下的谜题，并及时解锁了旋转栈桥。现在，还是快去前往确认佩拉的状况吧。
E: For some reason, Pela is trapped on the other side of the bridge. Luckily, you solve old Balakin's puzzle quickly and unlock the bridge. Go check on Pela.

C: 来到机械屋，你发现希露瓦恐怕不能如愿以偿了——坐镇克里珀堡的新任大守护者布洛妮娅正召唤她返回军队，为铁卫建设贡献力量。\n希露瓦拗不过你与杰帕德二人，悻悻地独自前去与大守护者交涉，而她那爱操心的弟弟显然有些担心她的状况。\n不妨跟着杰帕德一同前往克里珀堡，看看两人交涉得如何了吧。
E: Once at the workshop, you realized Serval probably won't have her wish granted — The new Supreme Guardian Bronya at Qlipoth Fort is asking Serval to return to the army and contribute to the development of the Guards.\nServal could not outspeak Gepard and you in this argument and went unhappily to negotiate with the Supreme Guardian, and her concerned brother is evidently worried about her.\nWhy don't you head to Qlipoth Fort with Gepard and see how the negotiation is going.

C: 你在贝洛伯格的极北之地再次遇见了希莉儿…的幻影。\n最后的谜题已经被解开，你再也想不到能帮助她的办法了。\n和希莉儿说话，做她最后的聆听者。
E: In the farthest northern reaches of Belobog, you reunite with Cyrille... Or at least, her phantom.\nWith the final puzzle solved, you've run out of possible ways to help her.\nTalk with Cyrille, and be her final audience.

C: 卢卡将他的「修炼计划」告知了你和希儿，并且希望你们能够全程陪同，见证他的成长。\n最后的试炼目标是挑战史瓦罗——尽管你和希儿都认为这是纯粹的胡闹，但卢卡依旧坚持要完成自己设立的目标。\n你和希儿决定继续跟着他，防止意外发生。
E: Luka tells you and Seele about his "trial plans" and wants you to accompany him the whole way to witness his improvement.\nThe final goal of the trial is to challenge Svarog. You and Seele both think it is absolute nonsense, but Luka insists on completing the goals he set for himself.\nYou and Seele decide to keep following him in case something bad happens.

C: 为了获取药王秘传的信任，你不得不帮他们截获一份寄往神策府的重要情报。希望那位带着情报逃离药王秘传的「背叛者」一切平安。
E: In order to obtain the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus' trust, you have to intercept an important missive to be delivered to the Seat of Divine Foresight. Let's hope nothing bad happens to the missive-bearing traitor escaping the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus.

C: 「龙蟠虬跃」是一份很诡异的药方，令人不寒而栗。不过，你和青镞都不通药理，读不出更多信息。去问问那些丹鼎司的专业人士吧。
E: Draught of Draconic Surge is a wild prescription that causes shivers just from its requirements. However, neither Qingzu nor you have the pharmacological knowledge to decipher more information. Ask the professionals from the Alchemy Commission.

C: 你找到了陶德的笔记本，但上面并非如他所说那样记满笔记，你对此有些奇怪，却毫无头绪…无论如何，你都得将笔记本交还给他。
E: You find Todd's notebook, but it's not full of notes as he mentioned. You find it a little odd, but don't know what to make of it... In any case, you ought to return the notebook back to him.

C: 虽然主意不算是好主意，但不失为一种尝试，去找找云骑军的甲胄吧。\n这些甲胄严丝合缝，根本看不出士兵的种族和性别，真是太巧了。
E: It's not the greatest idea, but it's an idea. Go look for Cloud Knights' equipment.\nThe armor is tightly sealed, no one would be able to tell the species and gender expression of an individual wearing them, what a find.

C: 按照小聪的说法，只要调低「忧郁」情绪权重，忧郁诗人便能正常对话。动手吧，轻点儿。\n你要是有克拉拉或者希露瓦的技术，也许能把这个忧郁诗人改造成暴躁老头…还是算了吧。\n不至于影响生活的忧郁，算是它的特色。
E: According to Cong, as long as the "gloomy" emotional weight is lowered, the Gloomy Poet can speak normally. Go ahead, easy does it.\nIf you have the skills of Clara or Serval, you might be able to transform this Gloomy Poet into a grumpy old man... Oh, forget it.\nAs long as its gloominess doesn't affect its daily life, it can be taken as its little quirk.

C: 按照钟珊的指挥修理好这些机兵吧。但说真的，这种「机械生物」能让那群大善人买账吗？
E: Follow Zhongshan's direction to repair these automatons. But seriously, can you really sell these "mechanical creatures" to the Benevolent Ones?

C: 按照钟珊的指挥修理好这些机兵吧。但说真的，这种「机械生物」能让那群大善人买账吗？
E: Follow Zhongshan's direction to repair these automatons. But seriously, can you really sell these "mechanical creatures" to the Benevolent Ones?

C: 按照钟珊的指挥修理好这些机兵吧。但说真的，这种「机械生物」能让那群大善人买账吗？
E: Follow Zhongshan's direction to repair these automatons. But seriously, can you really sell these "mechanical creatures" to the Benevolent Ones?

C: 本以为事情暂告一段落，却收到了钟珊奇怪的短信…这件事背后似乎另有隐情，而你始终被蒙在鼓里。去找楠楠问一下好了。
E: You thought the matter had come to an end for the time being, but then you receive a strange message from Zhongshan... There seems to be something else to this incident that you have been kept in the dark from. Go to Nannan and ask him about it.

C: 又一场谋杀、又一出戏剧、又一个谜题。桑博看起来苦恼极了，恨不得马上逃回那与世隔绝的静谧雪国。黑天鹅倒是悠然自得，醉心于花火安排的侦探游戏之中。但他们都不是那种会把真实想法写在脸上的人，所以你也分不清他们是不是真的苦恼、真的悠然。\n不过梦境贩售店好歹也算是个娱乐场所，与其猜测「剧中人」的真实想法，还不如专心研究花火留下的谜题，享受推理的乐趣呢。
E: Another murder, another play, and another puzzle. Sampo seems extremely distressed and ready to escape back into his secluded and quiet Winterland. Black Swan, on the other hand, seems calm and contented, thoroughly enjoying the detective game that Sparkle prepared. However, they are not the type to have their emotions displayed across their faces, so you are uncertain whether they are really distressed or calm.\nHowever, the Dreamscape Sales Store is still a place of entertainment, so perhaps it would be better to focus on investigating the puzzle Sparkle left behind than trying to assess the true thoughts of these "characters." Let's enjoy a game of logic and deduction.

C: 竟然当着客人和爷爷的面说赠剑仪式上的宝剑是魔剑…某种程度上来说，算是小孩子童言无忌的特权了。被怀炎将军叱喝时，她那个表情完全就是不服气嘛。\n提着大剑往工造司里冲，可不得吓坏了路人吗？赶紧帮公输师傅止损吧！
E: Who would've expected Yunli to call the repatriated sword a cursed sword, in the presence of her grandfather and guests, no less... She's lucky her objection could be downplayed as the harmless words of a child, though the tongue-lashing from General Huaiyan clearly left her indignant.\nStorming over to the Artisanship Commission with a giant sword in tow, she'll only scare everyone else on her way! Help Master Gongshu put an end to this frenzy now!

C: 在尚未踏入下一站旅程前，列车接到了来自罗浮仙舟的通讯，景元向暂无去向的众人发出邀请，参加演武仪典。
E: Before embarking on the next stop of their journey, the Express received a comms from the Xianzhou Luofu — Jing Yuan extended an invite to all wanderers to join the Wardance.

C: 按照飞霄的要求，你们踏入幽囚狱留下证词。而她派出的曜青信使将自罗浮仙舟接走关押在此许久的步离人首领，呼雷。
E: In light of Feixiao's request, you stepped into the Shackling Prison and left your statements. The Yaoqing messenger that she dispatched whisked away the long-detained borisin leader, Hoolay, who was being held on the Xianzhou Luofu.

C: 触碰柯柯娜留下的记忆，你感觉到自己离她很近了。
E: Touch the memory left behind by Cocona. You have a feeling that you're already very close to her.

C: 我知道他们后来是怎么评价我的——荒诞无稽、杀人为乐…他们说错了。\n掌权后，我再也没有快乐过，甚至再也没能睡过一整个晚上。恐惧像深海中涌出的巨型乌贼，将我的心死死缠住，试图将它拖进黑暗的深渊。\n除了不断地清除掉那些恐惧的源头…灰骑士，我又能怎么办呢？我又该怎么办呢？
E: I know what they said about me later — outrageous, murdering for pleasure... But they were wrong. \nAfter gaining power, I've never been happy, neither have I gotten a peaceful night's sleep — the fear surges forth like a giant squid from the abyssal depths, entwining its tentacles around my heart, attempting to pull me back into the black abyss.\nApart from severing the origins of these fears... Gray Knight, what can I do? What do I do?

C: 通过心绪空间，你了解到了查德威克博士神秘且震撼的前半生。\n离开这里，看看他的后半生又经历了哪些是非曲折。
E: In Chadwick's Emoscape, you have learned about the mysterious yet astounding first half of his life.\nLeave this place and discover the twists and turns throughout the second half of his life.

C: 虚数脉冲起爆后，为了逃离公司的魔掌，查德威克开始了流亡。\n找到螺丝咕姆的拼图，帮助查德威克与他重聚。
E: Following the Imaginary Pulse's detonation, Chadwick went into hiding to evade the IPC's clutches.\nFind Screwllum's puzzle pieces to facilitate their reunion.

C: 顺着记忆的场景，继续探索奥尔拉的过去吧。
E: Follow the scenes of this memory and keep exploring Orla's past.

C: 来到了流梦礁，在这里到处看看有没有什么发现吧。
E: You've arrived at Dreamflux Reef. Look around to see if you can find something.

C: 在骑士游侠二人组的帮助下，你成功救下了好{F#闺蜜}{M#朋友}青雀。\n一整天紧张刺激的工作内容令你感到疲惫，该去找丹尼斯交接了——他现在化身派对客丹西，正在黄金的时刻尽享美好时光。
E: With the assistance of the Knight and the Ranger, you have successfully saved your good friend, Qingque.\nAfter a long day of exhausting work, it is time to wind down and find Dennis, who is currently enjoying himself at the Golden Hour under the guise of Dancy.

C: 不受束缚的观众在岁月与岁月之间跳跃，跳过她是如何压抑心中的顾虑，如何磨削旁人的冷眼，如何争得仇敌的接纳。她做了很多，终于成为了一名奥赫玛的臣民而非敌手或客人——给她派发任务的，是这位似乎爱着她的人吗？还是说，他们同样都是被束缚的茧呢？\n「我们追求的不仅是好的东西，而且是不朽的东西，爱所盼望的就是永远拥有好的东西。 」
E: Unbound, the spectators leap through time: Skipping past how it was that she suppressed the concerns in her heart, how she wore down the cold stares of those around her and how she won the acceptance of her former enemies. She has done so much to finally become a true subject of Okhema, as opposed to a guest or an enemy... The person that gave her this mission, was it this person that seems to love her? Or are they both simply bound by their own cocoons?\n"What we seek is not only the good, it is also the permanent. What love seeks is to have something good forever."

C: 这只呜呜伯好像已经吓得动弹不得了…过去确认一下它的状况吧？
E: This Wubbaboo seems petrified with fear... Go and check up on it.

C: 科员以斯帖正在为自己的形象而苦恼，你发现她想改变发色，但苦于找不到参考。带着你独特的审美，过去指导一下以斯帖吧！
E: Researcher Esther is having a rough day with her appearance. She wants to change her hair color, but she doesn't know what colors to change to. With your unique perspective on beauty, go and advise Esther!

C: 在你的指导下，希拉就「如何做人」这件事取得了阶段性的成果。不过，你有些怀疑古恩能否接受这样的「学习成果」……
E: Sheila has made remarkable progress in acting human. But you're not sure if Gunn will be satisfied with the result...

C: 在你的指导下，希拉就「如何做人」这件事取得了阶段性的成果。不过，你有些怀疑古恩能否接受这样的「学习成果」……
E: Sheila has made remarkable progress in acting human. But you're not sure if Gunn will be satisfied with the result...

C: 你凭借着自己的智慧给出了最优解。\n去「棋鬼」旁边领取宝箱奖励吧。
E: You provided the optimal solution with your superior intellect.\nClaim your treasure chest reward next to the Chess Ghost.

C: 完成朱明棋手为你准备的「寻径指津」谜题，领取属于你的奖励。
E: Complete the "Pathfinder" puzzle prepared by the Zhuming player for you and claim the reward that belongs to you.

C: 伊来内向你说明了原委：刻法勒曾将火种的「余火」赐予凡人，帮助他们渡过末世的灾厄。\n但你们并不知道「余火」贮藏在哪个火种匣中…会在这一个匣子里吗？
E: Alain explained the situation to you: Kephale once bestowed the "Embers" of the Coreflame upon mortals to help them survive the apocalypse.\nHowever, you don't know which Coreflame Casket holds the Embers... Could it be in this one?

C: 你听见附近有求救声，看来不止一个「阮•梅」造物在这个舱段徘徊，力能所及的情况下，还是去帮帮它吧。
E: You hear a nearby distress call. It seems that more than one Ruan Mei's creation is wandering in this section. If possible, it's better to go and help them.

C: 操纵机巧鸟起飞吧。工作固然重要，但也请不要忽略了周围的美景。
E: Control the cycrane and take off. Your job is important, but you also shouldn't ignore life's beautiful moments around you.

C: 滴答！快，拨动指针，滴答——！\n人们的内心正待你去探索，为他们寻回真正的自我吧！
E: Tick... tock! Quick, adjust the hands... Tick, tock!\nPeople's minds await your exploration. Help them regain their true selves!

C: 小贩依旧不肯承认长矛和盾牌都是赝品。没办法，先用普通的武器来检验下盾牌的质量吧。
E: The merchants still refuse to acknowledge that the lance and shield are both fakes. Left with no other option, you decide to test the shield's quality using a regular weapon.

C: 「人们做不到一起死去。即使同时亡故，他们也只是各自面对了自己的死亡。」\n——见证珀里法斯的朋友们被黑潮杀死的最后时刻。
E: "People cannot manage to die together. Even if they die at the same time, they are simply facing their own respective deaths."\n— Witness Periphas' friends' final moments as the black tide killed them.

C: 要解救被困的刻牢刻和克利克，必须先把游荡的黑潮造物解决。\n克利克为你提供了一条计策，只要你将怪物引到他们脚下，他就能把怪物解决。
E: To rescue the trapped Kelok and Kilik, you must first eliminate the roaming Black Tide Creatures.\nKilik has provided you with a solution. If you can get the monsters beneath his and Kelok's feet, they can solve the monster problem.

C: 等待两位小贩回来的时间里，你们也不能闲着。问问柯库翁下一步计划吧。
E: You can't idle while waiting for the two merchants to return. Ask Glykon about the next part of the plan.

C: 雷金的感应仪又有了新动静！去歌德宾馆瞧瞧具体情况吧！
E: Regin's sensor found something again! Head to the Goethe Hotel to learn about the details!

C: 银狼引起的风波终于告一段落，但伦纳德依旧忧心忡忡。\n为了空间站的网络安全，也为了保住这份工作，他请求你协助进行一项测试……
E: The troubles caused by Silver Wolf have abated, but Leonard still looks concerned.\nHe's asking for your help to carry out a task that will improve the space station's cybersecurity and help him keep his job...

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n这一次，于尔丹希望你根据藏宝图找到合适的藏品。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nThis time, Uldan wishes you to find an exhibit based on a treasure map.

C: 「托帕后援团」的这些人根本不懂得承认失败，简直比顽石都固执。\n但在重新击败他们之前，还是先问个明白吧。
E: Topaz's Support Squad just don't know when to give up. They're more unyielding than actual boulders.\nBut before you stomp them into the earth again, maybe it's wise to get a few things cleared up first.

C: 《以太战线》的核心玩法便是「对决」——挑战不同的玩家，证明自己的实力吧！
E: The core gameplay loop behind Aetherium Wars is "dueling." Challenge different players and show your true strength!

C: 「云骑失控」…若非堕入魔阴身，便是有岁阳妖异作乱。顺着求助帖所言，你们来到丹鼎司查探情况，却意外得知一个更不妙的消息：将军的侍卫彦卿曾来到此处，与那失控的云骑对了一剑，随即离去。而在这名云骑的供述中，他声称自己的刀上有个声音同他说起话来。\n岁阳妖物擅于摆布人心，若是让它扰乱彦卿的心智，那一切可就危险的很了！
E: A Cloud Knight out of control... if it isn't a case of mara-struck, then it would be the work of a heliobus. Following the description in the post, you make your way to the Alchemy Commission to investigate, only to accidentally run into an even more distressing piece of news. The general's retainer, Yanqing, had arrived here and crossed swords with the frenzied Cloud Knight, then left. According to the knight's testimony, a mysterious voice emanated from his own sword and spoke to him.\nHeliobi are known masters of manipulating others' minds. If they ensnare Yanqing, the consequences would be dire!

C: 你遵循正道，作为十王司的代行者严格执法，你觉得这一切毫无问题。但你仍然忍不住会想，那个被夺走了「妻子」的男人之后的生活会过得如何？
E: As you stick to the straight and narrow and strictly dole out justice as an executor of the Ten-Lords Commission's will, you feel no concern about all this. However, you still can't help but think how will the man manage after his "wife" was forcibly taken away?

C: 在罗浮杂俎上，一则「鬼来电」的帖子引起了你们的注意。在桂乃芬私信了发帖人后，你们与自称饱受「鬼来电」骚扰之苦的女子阿月取得了联系。你们约定在长乐天见面，阿月答应她会告诉你们她所知道的一切……
E: A post on Ghostly Grove concerning phone calls from ghosts catches your group's attention. After Guinaifen sends a private message to the poster, you make contact with a woman named A-Yue, who claims she has been constantly harassed by calls from ghosts. You agree to meet her at Exalting Sanctum, where she will share all the information she has...

C: 在这一次的模拟宇宙更新中，阮•梅培育了模拟「博识尊」，并把时空锁定在了#27 帝皇鲁珀特陨落前！然而，一些不同寻常的情况发生了——公司联系到了黑塔，他们似乎对模拟宇宙项目很感兴趣……
E: In this Simulated Universe update, Ruan Mei has nurtured a simulated Nous and set the time before the demise of #27 Emperor Rubert. However, something unusual has happened. IPC has reached out to Herta, showing their interest in the Simulated Universe project...

C: 西衍先生突然联系你，说自己得到了一只很神奇的新宠物，而且「您一准儿会喜欢的！」\n去三余书肆看看吧，也许那只宠物会给你带来什么意外惊喜呢。
E: Mr. Xiyan suddenly contacted you and said that he got a miraculous new pet, and that "you will definitely like it!"\nGo to Spare Time Book Shop and have a look. Maybe that pet will bring you an unexpected surprise.

C: 杰伊将今日美食所需的食材整理给了你，搜集齐全之后就交给他吧！
E: Jay has listed all the ingredients required for today's catering menu. Once you have gathered all of the ingredients, bring them to him!

C: 这个空间中的「证据」已经被搜刮完了。离开这片错乱的梦境空间，和辛格勒聊聊你们的发现。
E: You have collected all the "evidence" in this place. Leave this chaotic and disturbed dreamscape and discuss your findings with Singler.

C: 你收到了一封来自家族的邀请函——鸢尾花家系的缇娜诚邀你去测试一款名为「折纸小鸟对对碰」的三消对战游戏。\n看起来倒不像是诈骗…那么，去看看也没什么损失吧？
E: You have received an invitation from The Family — Tinah of the Iris Family invites you to test a match-3 puzzle battle game called "Origami Bird Clash."\nIt doesn't seem like a scam... So, go take a look? There's nothing to lose.

C: 经过十五日的剑术练习与奇遇，三月七与你所想一致，仅仅是剑斗胜利已经不能满足了。\n十五日中，你们多次与青雀一同经历「江湖奇遇」，也许可以向青雀寻求一点建议。
E: Great minds think alike. A duel victory is no longer March 7th's and your goal after all the swordplay training and adventure in the last fifteen days.\nYou've both experienced numerous "wanderlust escapades" with Qingque during this period. It could be a good idea to ask Qingque for some advice.

C: 你现在是卢卡选手的教练了！\n身为教练，必须好好熟悉比赛的规则。\n正好卡美丽似乎精于此道，向她请教一下吧。
E: You are now Contestant Luka's coach!\nAs the coach, you need to thoroughly familiarize yourself with the rules of the competition.\nLuckily, Carmella seems to be well-versed in this. Go ask her about it.

C: 新闻发布会是体育比赛的特色，不能不品尝。\n准备好应付捕风捉影的、各怀鬼胎的、唯恐天下不乱的媒体朋友们了吗？\n是时候和他们斗智斗勇了。
E: Press conferences are a specialty of sporting events. You've gotta experience it.\nAre you prepared to face the cunning, plotting, devious, and conniving friends working in the media industry?\nIt's time to have a battle of wits against them.

C: 和驭空交谈，进入最后的战斗。愿丹轮高悬，照彻尘心。
E: Speak with Yukong and enter the final fight. May the claret wheel hang overhead, illuminating mortal hearts.

C: 叩关赛的规则非常简单——战胜对手，赢取积分。\n卢卡选手只需要做三件事，胜利、胜利、胜利！
E: The rules of the Knockout Matches are easy — Just defeat opponents and win points\nContestant Luka just needs to do three things: Win, win, and keep winning!

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n乱破打算前去营救遭到拘禁的艾尔菲。而闭幕演出即将开始，你需要和其余两位成员共同为她争取更多的时间。
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nRappa plans to go save Arfey, who is currently detained somewhere. Meanwhile, the closing performance is about to begin. You and the other two members need to buy her more time.

C: 为了完成每日课题、角逐最终奖项，你作为摄影助理，陪同三月七踏上了摄影之旅。\n依据摄影灵感进行拍摄吧。
E: To complete the daily tasks and compete for the final prize, you, as a photography assistant, accompanied March 7th on a photography journey.\nTake a photo based on the photography inspiration.

C: 有好事者前来挑衅，你自然不会退缩。努力工作，堂堂正正地击败这个对手吧！
E: When a worthy challenger shows up, don't shy away. Put in the effort and defeat this rival fair and square!

C: 没想到缇宝率领的奇美拉小队居然后来居上，占据了第二名的位置…但你还有不少时间，努力工作来击败她吧！
E: Surprisingly, Tribbie's chimera squad secured second place... But there's still time to turn the tables. Work hard and outperform her squad!

C: 既然这只奇美拉为战胜你做了如此多的准备，那就拿出真本事来，让它好好见识你的厉害吧！
E: This chimera has gone to great lengths to challenge you. Show it what you are truly capable of and give it your best shot!

C: 瞧瞧这是什么——「折纸小鸟对对碰」游戏公测邀请函？此情此景似曾相识，但发件人换成了公司。
E: Lookie here! An invitation to play Origami Bird Clash on its official launch? This scene feels a bit familiar, but the sender this time is the IPC instead.

C: 为了复原「特调配方」，你受邀成为「惊梦酒吧」的特邀调饮师。今晚，会有怎样的客人不期而至呢？
E: To restore the "Special Mix Recipe," you've been invited as a guest drinksmith at the Dreamjolt Hostelry. What unexpected visitors will drop by tonight?

C: 机缘巧合之下，你成了这只小小的大地兽的监护人。而且，你还听说，它身上似乎有着能够成长为传奇生物的潜质…？总之，在这段时间里，就按照你的方式培养它，让它恢复健康，并茁壮成长吧。
E: By a twist of fate, you've become the guardian of this tiny dromas. And word has it that it might have the potential to evolve into a legendary creature...? For now, raise it in your own way, help it recover, and watch it grow strong.

C: 猎犬家系的凯特找到一个奇怪的梦泡，就梦泡的内容来看，它与「假面愚者」似乎有些关系。\n凯特正在等着你，带着奖励的那种等待。
E: Kate from the Bloodhound Family found a strange dream bubble, and from its contents, it seems to have some connection to the Masked Fools.\nKate is waiting for you... And yes, there's a reward involved.

C: 询问阿兰是否需要帮助
E: Ask if Arlan needs help

C: 坐到沙发上，等待跃迁开始
E: Sit on the sofa and wait for the warp jump

C: 寻找丹恒
E: Find Dan Heng

C: 使用「家用寻物仪」搜寻矿车部件
E: Search for mine cart parts with the help of the Home-Use Object Finder

C: 跟随青雀前往太卜司侧门
E: Follow Qingque to the Divination Commission's side entrance

C: 挑选人们的回礼，置入仪式所用的星槎
E: Select which of the gifts returned by the people you wish to place into the ceremony starskiff

C: 前往珍品室，寻找沙盘的线索
E: Head to the treasure room to look for a clue related to the sandpit

C: 检查█ ███的█ 遗██ 失物█
E: C█eck █he th██gs ███ los█

C: 登上舞台，不要害怕，不要回头
E: Get onstage. Fear not. Never look back

C: 为宾客提供帮助
E: Assist the guest

C: 施展「江湖智慧」
E: Use your "street smarts"

C: 继续跟随指引，前往观看剧目的第三幕
E: Continue to follow the guide and watch Act III

C: （可选）与丹恒交谈
E: (Optional) Speak with Dan Heng

C: 与三月七交谈，准备出发
E: Talk to March 7th and get ready to set off

C: 找个法子闯进睡蕉社的地盘
E: Plot a way to break into the Slumbernana Association's turf

C: 进入神殿，调查争吵
E: Enter the Temple and investigate the dispute

C: 唤醒昏迷的丹恒
E: Wake up the unconscious Dan Heng

C: （可选）继续探索奥赫玛城区
E: (Optional) Continue to explore the Okhema city area

C: 继续前进，深入悬锋城
E: Continue onward deep into Castrum Kremnos

C: 迈向决战，打败尼卡多利！
E: Time for a decisive battle with Nikador!

C: （可选）与遐蝶聊聊
E: (Optional) Speak with Castorice

C: 与缇安对话， 准备前往悬锋城
E: Speak with Trianne and get ready to go to Castrum Kremnos

C: 根据卡吕普索的指引，寻找继续前进的方法
E: Follow Calypso's guidance and find a way to keep going forward

C: 用浑象仪转换天象，重现过往
E: Use the celestial globe to alter the firmament and reveal the past.

C: 尝试利用奇迹宝珠，穿过幕墙
E: Try using the Miracle Orb to pass through the curtain wall

C: 与那刻夏交谈
E: Talk to Anaxa

C: 前进，见证无畏的功烈
E: Go forth. Witness the fearless feats

C: 驾临书中的梦土
E: Visit the dreamland in the book

C: 使用冲拳，击碎平台上的障碍块（3/3）
E: Use the Punch action to break the obstacle blocks on the platform (3/3)

C: 寻找负世的另一半印记
E: Find the other half of the Worldbearing mark

C: 激活目标舱室熄灭的「定锚」电场
E: Activate the extinguished anchor in the target cabin

C: 打听水魈漏网的应对余策
E: Find out about countermeasures to deal with the Xenohydro's escape

C: 持续质询阿兰以得出修行的真相
E: Keep interrogating Arlan to get to the truth behind the trials

C: 重新通过身份校验程序
E: Run the identity verification program again

C: 继续追踪银狼的入侵路线
E: Continue to track Silver Wolf's infiltration path

C: 深入「模拟宇宙」
E: Go deep into the Simulated Universe

C: 与阮•梅交谈
E: Speak with Ruan Mei

C: 在黄金歌剧院找到塞琳
E: Find Celine in the Golden Theater

C: 询问丹恒的意向
E: Ask Dan Heng about his thoughts

C: 回复朗道姐弟的短信
E: Reply to the messages from the Landau siblings

C: 抄写《千手慈怀药王救世品》0/<unbreak>500</unbreak>
E: Copy the Thousand-Handed Merciful Medicus' Salvation 0/500 times

C: 在超级危险的码头中寻找接头地点
E: Find the meet-up point in the super dangerous dock

C: 调查某人遗落的玉扣
E: Investigate a jade tracer dropped by someone

C: 寻找记忆中的「异物」
E: Find the "abnormality" in this memory

C: 在鳞渊境与钟珊汇合
E: Meet with Zhongshan in Scalegorge Waterscape

C: 修理自动机兵•齿狼
E: Repair Automaton Direwolf

C: 在金人巷与桂乃芬谈谈
E: Chat with Guinaifen at Aurum Alley

C: 跟随孤云，探索流落异星的回忆
E: Follow Guyun and live through a memory long forgotten on another planet

C: 击败逃逸的狼卒
E: Defeat the fleeing Wolftrooper

C: 处置呼雷
E: Deal with Hoolay

C: 帮助莱斯利•迪恩摆脱威胁
E: Help Lesley Dean and ensure his safety

C: 寻求护理师乔凡娜的帮助
E: Seek assistance from Giovanna the dream nurse

C: 处理职业危机
E: Handle the occupational crisis

C: 见证蒂索克二世成为一个疯狂的屠夫
E: Witness Tizocic II become a ruthless ruler

C: 和查德威克交谈
E: Talk to Chadwick

C: 前往现实酒店的大堂，和螺丝咕姆汇合
E: Go to the lobby of the hotel in reality and meet up with Screwllum

C: 在流梦礁里到处转转
E: Walk around Dreamflux Reef a bit

C: 视察尾翼，选择涂装，为飞艇取名并验收
E: Inspect the empennage, select the paint, name the airship, and confirm all are of an acceptable quality

C: 关闭可恶的自动服务终端
E: Deactivate all the pesky automated service terminals

C: 前往关押苏克提瑞斯的房间
E: Go to the room where Soctires is being held

C: 抵达神殿尽头，接受泰坦的神启
E: Reach the end of the Temple to receive the Titan's revelation

E: Head to the Starskiff Haven docks

E: Have a Hyperlink Match with Lynx

E: Search for clues about the phantom starskiff

E: Head to the finish line

E: Feel the festive atmosphere of the music party on campus

E: Prepare to take the stage

E: Help Rappa collect inspiration for composing a song

E: Planned activities are completely identical: All stats' improvement rate increases by #1% for today

E: Distributed Attention

E: Huohuo

E: Time to Second Sword Trial

E: Firetwirl Anvil

C: 他好像没什么激情…
E: He doesn't seem very enthusiastic...

C: 我们应该封印星核，帮助仙舟。
E: We should seal the Stellaron and help the Xianzhou.

C: 对了{NICKNAME}，卡芙卡这次现身，完全没提和你有关的事呢……
E: {NICKNAME}, did you notice that Kafka didn't mention anything to do with you...?

C: 事有蹊跷。仙舟联盟是为数不多直接从星神那里汲取力量的派系，他们的实力非常强大，远远超过已逝的阿基维利庇佑下的列车。
E: Something's not right. The Xianzhou Alliance is a small faction, but one that derives its power directly from an Aeon. They have immense strength — much more than a train under the protection of the fallen Akivili.

C: 仙舟联盟很厉害吗？
E: Is the Xianzhou Alliance really that powerful?

C: 不要紧的，这不是还有丹恒在嘛。
E: Relax, I've got Dan Heng here with me.

C: 开拓者！出发！
E: Trailblazers! Assemble~!

C: 出发！
E: ...Let's go!

C: 错过会议不要紧吗？
E: Didn't Himeko say not to worry?

C: 暂时无法离开当前场景，需要完成冒险任务「流光忆彩」
E: Unable to leave the current area, please complete Adventure Mission "Fleeting Lights"

C: 我们聊些别的吧。
E: Let's talk about something else.

C: 久等啦，各位乘客！感谢三位开拓者的鼎力协助，裂界活性已经降到最低，星轨各项读数已经恢复至正常区间！
E: It's about time we hit the road, passengers! Thanks to the three trailblazers, the activity of the Fragmentum has reached the lowest level, and the readings regarding the status of the star rail have returned to normal!

C: 那个瞬间，就像是被某种力量，强行从快乐的虚拟，拽回到悲痛的现实。
E: At that moment, you are forced to return to sad reality from the wonderful virtual world.

C: 「这个物件可以给人带来未知与具体交融的乐趣，具体来说就是——你永远不知道路过的那个人能得几分。是不是有点像开盲盒呢？」
E: "This object can give people the pleasure of intermingling with the unknown, more precisely — you'll never know how well that passerby might score. It's a bit like opening a mystery box, isn't it?"

C: 警告：请务必发笑，不可忍笑。
E: Warning: Try to laugh, don't ever hold back your laughter.

C: 不是说会记得我么？
E: I thought you'd remember me.

C: 我没什么大碍，伤口包扎下就好。谢谢你们，我先向艾丝妲站长汇报情况去了，再见。
E: I'm fine, a quick patching up will do. Thanks for asking. I'll report the situation to Lead Researcher Asta immediately. Bye.

C: 不是我的错，我不可能犯这种错误…我再去外围确认一遍数据！
E: It can't be my fault, I'd never make a mistake like this... I'm going out there to check the data again!

C: 呜啊——
E: Raaaawr!

C: 你感受到了风，和煦的风迎面而来，吹动发梢，盈满全身。风送着你飞越高山，远渡诸海，身后是风车转动，牧歌隽永，远方是流星划落，白雪皑皑……
E: You feel the wind — A warm and welcoming wind blows into your face, plays with the ends of your hair, and fills your body. The wind sends you to fly beyond mountain ranges and vast oceans. Behind you, windmills turn and pastoral hymns chime. Before you, shooting stars stream down and snow glitters...

C: （音乐）
E: (Music)

C: 总觉得事情没那么顺利。
E: I still feel that things won't be going as planned.

C: 唉，那时候的我已经过分早熟了，就知道解孤波难题，忽略了宝贵的童真时代……
E: Oh, I was so precocious — all I cared about back then was solving the solitary wave problem, ignoring my precious childhood...

C: 我再想想。
E: Let me think things over.

C: 就「多管闲事」这一点，你也很有潜质啊，{NICKNAME}。
E: And I think you're pretty good at "meddling" too, {NICKNAME}.

C: 嗨，{NICKNAME}，我都听说了。你要和我们一起上列车，对吧？
E: Hey, {NICKNAME}! I heard the news. You're coming with us on the Express, right?

C: 我还得再想想……
E: I need some time to think...

C: 很有品味。
E: Very tasteful.

C: 说起来那是…留声机？
E: Is that a... phonograph?

C: 看看你家。
E: I came to visit your pad.

C: （门没有锁，要不要进去看看呢……）
E: (The door is unlocked. Should I go in?)

C: 实在紧张的话，我可以陪你聊聊。
E: If you're really anxious about it, I can stay here and have a chat with you.

C: 小三月的事情你听姬子说过了吗？她被封在一块宇宙浮冰里，我们无意中发现，才把她救了出来。
E: Did Himeko tell you about March 7th? She was trapped in ice, floating through space. We happened upon her and rescued her.

C: 我还有别的问题…
E: I still have some questions...

C: 我现在还能做到的事…就是斩除威胁贝洛伯格的恶徒。
E: Eradicate all threats to Belobog's security... that is what I must do.

C: 怎么办，只有守护者大人能帮我了……
E: What am I gonna do? Only the Madam Guardian can help me...

C: 嗯…你们的思路应该是对的——这种不成文的乱序字母确实很像加密后的结果。不过，既然这是六七百年前的东西，那大概用不到我们现在通行的算法。
E: Well, I think you guys are probably on the right track. These disorganized letters certainly resemble cryptography. However, given that this was created <unbreak>600</unbreak> or <unbreak>700</unbreak> years ago, it most likely uses a completely different encryption algorithm.

C: 我们可以去帮你找。
E: We can help you find it.

C: …「优先级」？什么意思？难道在你看来，下层区城镇的重建工作不够重要吗？
E: ...Priorities? What do you mean? Are you saying rebuilding the Underworld isn't one of your "priorities"?

C: 你能理解？太好了…我的意思是，知道这世界上有人能和自己感同身受，真是再好不过的事了。
E: You do? Good... I mean, it's good to know someone in this world feels the same way as me.

C: 过奖了，歌德大哥！我家店面正好在装修，等我忙活完了，一定请你再来参观一次。
E: You flatter me, Goethe! My hotel is getting refurbished. I'll be sure to invite you to visit again when the work is all done.

C: 行吧，看在你请客的份上…
E: You have my attention... as long as the afternoon tea keeps flowing.

C: 不过，有你这样优秀的人作她的旅伴，我的担心大概都是多余的吧。
E: However, with someone as capable as you as her traveling companion, all my worries are probably superfluous.

C: 筒口露出两只信封，它们保持着微妙的平衡：触碰任何一只，都会让另一只被漆黑的大口吞没。如此两难的抉择竟落在你的面前。
E: The opening of the post box reveals two envelopes that are being kept in a delicate balance. Touching either one will condemn the other to be swallowed by the pitch-black maw. Such a dilemma falls in front of you.

C: 铁门冰凉，后面藏着什么事物你不得而知。
E: This iron gate is ice cold. You have no idea what's behind it.

C: 你看见菜单上写着：「一串香！吃一串想两串，吃两串想九串！一天不吃浑身难受！——店主回工厂区省亲了，请改日再来。」
E: You see on the menu: "Tasty Skewers! You can't live without them! Owner visiting family in the factory district. Please come back another day."

C: 不知道。
E: I don't know.

C: 它吸引你的注意，你的眼睛一刻也不能从中离开…你看见了自己，看见三月七和丹恒，星穹列车的命运，未来的终局……
E: It focuses your attention, and your eyes become fixed on it... You see yourself. You see March 7th and Dan Heng. You see the fate of the Astral Express and the end of the future...

C: 感觉怎么样？身体有哪里不舒服吗？
E: How are you feeling? Any aches or pains?

C: 啊，那边缺个对手～你们要玩搏击的话，就来找我吧！
E: Ooh! They need one more player there! I—I gotta go! If you ever wanna fight, come find me!

C: …这么破的东西他们也要？
E: ...They'd take your clothes? These ones?

C: 希儿！还好你来了，要不然我们就——
E: Seele! Thank goodness you came. We were nearly...

C: 没问题，倒是你们要小心点啊，前面有很多机器人！
E: Sure thing, but be careful! There are a lot of robots up ahead!

C: 谢啦，虎克大人。
E: Thanks, o great one.

C: 你把丹恒骗去打拳。
E: You set Dan Heng up.

C: 「地火」到底是什么组织。
E: What kind of organization is Wildfire?

C: 停！停停停！哇…那边有个凶神恶煞的大家伙！
E: Whoa! Stop! Ah! Stop, stop, stop! There's a big evil hunk of metal right there!

C: 我有一种预感，和你们在一起，我能找到失落的线索——将我的疑惑解开。
E: I have a feeling that with you, I can pick up the lost threads... and dispel my uncertainties.

C: 知人知面不知心。
E: Appearances can be deceiving.

C: 其实，我很难相信你们的说法，对于一直生活在贝洛伯格的人而言，你们提到的那些名词太遥远了……
E: You know, it was difficult for me to believe you. Some of the words you use are too alien for those that have lived their entire life in Belobog.

C: 别这样嘛。希儿是典型的嘴硬心软，她没有恶意的。
E: Hey, come on now, Seele's got a sharp tongue but a soft heart. She didn't mean anything.

C: 那是…希儿的声音？
E: Is that... Seele?

C: 她已经考虑得很周全了。不过，那位大守护者的想法…即使是布洛妮娅怕也难以掌握。
E: She gave it some good thought, but whatever's going on in that supreme guardian's head... Even Bronya might have trouble understanding.

C: 我问完了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 但我清楚真正的领袖应该具备什么。强大的内心，还有能团结众人的个人魅力——论这些素养，下层没人比得过她。
E: But the most important thing a leader needs is a strong heart. An ability to unite everyone toward a common cause. In that respect, no one in the underground comes close to her.

C: 找什么借口，说到底不就是没那个胆吗？
E: Excuse after excuse. Really, you just don't have the courage, huh?

C: 我准备好了。
E: Ready.

C: 只要合身，能让我工作下去就行，目前好像也没什么大问题。
E: As long as it fits and pays, no biggie right now.

C: 下一把的对手可是五冠王，懂不懂冠军的含金量？
E: The next opponent is a five-time champion. Do you know what it means to be a champ?

C: 史考特老板跟我说，穿这套盔甲打拳赛，底薪就给我多加一点…咳咳……
E: Mr. Scott told me that if I wear this armor to matches, I will get a raise... *cough*

C: 要不试试这几套幼儿衣服？
E: I do have some toddler clothes. Wanna see?

C: 您有空的话多来啊，不用客气。这不，新赛季马上要开始了，您很快就有机会在擂台上大展拳脚了！
E: And don't be a stranger. New season's starting soon, you can show off your new moves in no time!

C: 现在，我宣布——比赛开始！
E: Now, I declare— let the match begin!

C: 而且，「外来者」在下层区声名远扬——您要是肯赏脸参赛，那这拳馆指定是座无虚席！
E: Besides, the Outsider is well known in the Underworld. If you can grace us with your visit, then the tickets will be sold out for sure!

C: 没问题，您要是有想法了随时和我说！
E: No problem, come back any time!

C: 她是个意志坚定，言出必行的姑娘。有了她的帮助，下层区一定能重获新生。
E: She sees things through and doesn't go back on her word. The Underworld will thrive again under her watch.

C: 这里发生什么事了？咦，这不是匹克嘛——莫非他又在路中间睡着了？
E: Is everything okay? Wait, isn't that... Peak? Don't tell me he fell asleep in the middle of the road again.

C: 确定他当时没在偷懒吗…
E: Are you sure he was "hard at work...?"

C: 如果你愿意的话，就和周围的人们聊聊吧，他们每个人都激动得很呢。等大家都准备好了…我们就一起「回家」。
E: If you have time, talk to the folks here — every one of them will tell you about their excitement. Then, when you're ready... let's "go home."

C: 哈哈哈，我看试探就到此为止吧。答案很明显了，我们的目标是一致的。
E: Haha, I think there's no need for the guessing game to continue. It's obvious we share the same goal.

C: 要、要不然…他们、他们会被那些畸形的怪胎大卸八块的…！
E: Otherwise, those things will t—tear them apart!

C: 我觉得杰帕德没那么心机…
E: He doesn't strike me as the type...

C: 《冒险鼹鼠队》的目录上还有3个章节，{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}想问哪个？
E: There are still three more chapters listed in The Adventurous Moles's table of contents. Which one do you want to ask about?

C: 嗯？你是说《冒险鼹鼠队》？不好意思，你能交给我看看吗。
E: Huh? Do you mean The Adventurous Moles, the book? Could you let me have a look at it first, please?

C: 我才不要垃圾！
E: I don't want any trash!

C: 这是一个垃圾桶，顶盖周圈似乎被人用锐器割开了。
E: This is a trashcan, its lid seems to have been cut open with some kind of implement.

C: 这个景元…不简单哪。
E: Hmm, I think we only scratched the surface of this General Jing Yuan...

C: 我看，把两个星核猎手都抓回来送去符太卜那儿一审是最快的法子。
E: I say we bring those two Stellaron Hunters before Diviner Fu — she'll get an answer out of them in no time.

C: 这件事我已托了列车上的客人去做。不忙，之后大局底定，自有你的用武之地。
E: I've asked our friends from the Express to take care of that for us. Worry not, you'll have your moment when the current stalemate is broken.

C: 这有什么，美少女嘛，随便叹口气，呵出的忧伤都是诗。
E: Hmph, I'm not just a pretty face, y'know! I've got poetry on standby <unbreak>24</unbreak>/7.

C: 但是，星核猎手费尽心思将我们带到这里又是为了什么？这一连串行动的背后，「命运的奴隶」到底看见了怎样的未来？
E: *sigh* Why did the Stellaron Hunters go to such lengths to bring us here? What is the future that Destiny's Slave sees behind this course of action?

C: 动作快点啊，青雀。等你过这一手，咱们哥几个都快坐化了。
E: Hurry up, Qingque! We'll be fossils by the time you're finished.

C: 我这辈子来过这里许多次了，只能白白面对着那边的景色兴叹。
E: I've been here many times in my life, but the scenery can never fully reveal itself to me.

C: 我有时掌握不好与人交流的分寸，希望没有冒犯到你。
E: I do often struggle to judge the boundaries of small talk — I hope I haven't offended you.

C: 这位云骑姑娘是什么人？
E: Who is this Cloud Knight girl?

C: 还有别的问题…
E: I have other questions...

C: 我就知道，谁会赶这会儿功夫来买首饰啊。狐人女孩啊，让我想想……
E: *sigh* I knew it, nobody has time for jewelry in these trying times... A foxian girl you say? Let me think...

C: 也许是星核猎手里那个黑客小姑娘玩的把戏。
E: I bet that hacker Kafka pals around with had a hand in it.

C: 因为，那往往是追猎关系逆转的征兆。
E: It might mean the tables have turned.

C: 不是计划，是「未来」。我们在无数的未来可能性中施与干涉，将最好的「未来」变成现实。
E: I didn't plan anything. It was the future. We interfere on countless future possibilities and make the best future a reality.

C: 不能就地审讯吗？
E: Here would be better.

C: 看来你已有准备啊。
E: It would seem you came prepared.

C: 谁说要让各位上战场了……
E: *sigh* Who said you'd be heading to the battlefield...

C: 这就是云骑军失控入魔的原因？
E: This is why the Cloud Knights lost control and became mara-struck?

C: 这…这…所以，和我们一路同行的停云小姐是军团的人？！
E: W—Wait, hold on a second — are you really saying that Miss Tingyun was a member of the Antimatter Legion all along?

C: 但停云的言谈举止却不像是受蛊惑，或被操纵，若她不是原本的停云，那更可能是幻胧的化形。
E: But there was no indication that Tingyun had been misguided or manipulated... It's possible that the Tingyun we knew wasn't her true self, but an image Phantylia devised to serve her own purposes.

C: （暂时放弃）
E: (temporarily giving up)

C: 诸位，你们的心意我很清楚。
E: I understand your sentiment, soldiers...

C: 是！
E: Yes, general!

C: 用鳞渊境来封印建木？背叛！此乃大不敬！
E: Use Scalegorge Waterscape to seal the Arbor? Treason! Blasphemy!

C: 仿佛经历过剧烈的地质运动，数人合围的柱石被某种巨力摧折，半埋于土砂之间。
E: As if struck by some intense geological movement, the pillars were shattered by a great force, causing the people nearby to become half-buried in dirt and sand.

C: 也许有关。
E: Perhaps.

C: 幻胧…她在做什么？
E: Phantylia... What is she doing?

C: 唔？嘻嘻，来者是罗浮的将军吗？
E: Oh? Hee-hee, has the general of the Luofu chosen to grace me with his presence?

C: 真是大言不惭，妄想破坏这建木所生的贵体。
E: So much bark with so little bite — your attacks are futile.

C: 她临时又要远行了…
E: She's had to embark on another long voyage...

C: 在听先生说书吗？
E: Are you listening to Mr. Xiyan's stories?

C: 在诸位离开罗浮前，我有两样东西想送给星穹列车。
E: Before you leave the Luofu, there are two things I wish to gift the Express.

C: 对啊对啊，什么事这么重要？
E: Yeah! What was so important?

C: …当年的边陲监狱，现在已经变成这副豪华酒店的样子了。虽然列车长我也很好奇匹诺康尼如今的样子，但毕竟没办法下车…你们就代我好好感受一下吧。
E: ...Can you imagine? Yesterday's grim frontier prison is today's lavish hotel. I wish I could wander Penacony's streets today, but I'm pretty train-tied at the moment. You'll have to be my eyes and ears while we're here.

C: 再等等。
E: Hold on a moment.

C: 要去哪儿？
E: Where are we going?

C: 这的确是最后一个问题了，谢谢。我们都还有各自的路要走，就此别过吧。
E: That was my final question, thank you. We all have our paths to walk, so we shall bid our farewells.

C: 我也是刚刚才知道邀请函的事…
E: I too just found out about the invite thingy...

C: 现在没必要讲那么清楚——还不是亮出底牌的时候。
E: No need to expand on that now. It's not yet time to reveal my trump card.

C: 遇到麻烦了吗？
E: Something wrong?

C: 你想合影留念吗？那就把手机交给我吧，我来拍～
E: You want a photo with him? Sure! Please give me your phone. I'll take it for you!

C: 前面就是苏乐达主题休闲区——「艾迪恩公园」。这里人多，要跟紧我哦。
E: That place up ahead is Aideen Park — everything here is themed around SoulGlad. It's a little crowded, so make sure you stay close to me.

C: 一般般，比不上我去过的其他世界。
E: It's alright. I've seen better places on other worlds.

C: 我…我是有合法身份的…现在……
E: I... I'm a lawful resident... at least now I am...

C: …因为有人在跟踪你。
E: ...someone's been following you.

C: 诶哟，还是大姐想的周到！多谢，多谢。
E: Miss Thunderbolt is such a thoughtful person! Thank you so much.

C: 你默默地守护着美梦小镇的和平。根据人物设定，你现在只能发出一声很酷的*哼*作为回应。
E: You silently protect the peace of Dreamville. According to your character traits, you can only make a cool grunting noise as a response right now.

C: 嘿，等等——你…能看得到我？
E: Wait... Can you... see me?

C: 不过，你刚才对那位先生做了什么？他瞬间的情绪变化…有些不可思议。
E: By the way, what did you do to that man earlier? It was like someone took him on an emotional roller coaster.

C: 来这边——
E: Here...

C: 这样就可以去对面啦。隐夜鸫家系就是这么修缮梦境的，很奇妙吧。
E: Now, we can go to the other side. This is how the Nightingale Family repairs the Dreamscape. Fascinating, isn't it?

C: 这一刻终于来了…每次到这儿，我都要卡好久。但终点也快到了。
E: This moment has finally come... I always get stuck here for a long time, but it also means I'm getting to the endpoint.

C: 米哈伊尔，你看起来有心事…
E: Mikhail, you look like you've got something on your mind...

C: 你醒了啊，小瞌睡虫。看来你做了个好梦。
E: You're awake, lazy bug. Looks like you had a nice dream.

C: 这…您竟然汇集了全部「信任的证明」，这份决心不容小觑……
E: Impressive... It's hard to believe you've collected all the Proofs of Trust. Your determination is truly admirable...

C: 哦？从来没有桶敢向我发起决斗，我承认你的英勇…也许我们没有必要进行无谓的争斗。
E: Oh? No trashcan has ever dared to challenge me to a duel. I acknowledge your bravery... Perhaps there's no need to conduct a pointless battle.

C: 我们受够了塔塔洛夫的摧残！要从他的宝库里拿回自己的东西，塔塔洛夫贪婪、暴戾，抢走了大家赖以生计的物资，我们必须打开这道门。
E: We've had enough of Tatalov's oppression! To retrieve our belongings from his treasure trove, the resources vital to our livelihoods seized by Tatalov's greed and tyranny, we must open this door.

C: 你看见她停下脚步，只抿了抿唇，垂下双眼。半晌，她伛下身子，用手像是挽了些什么，复又起身。
E: You see her pause, lips pursed, eyes downcast. After a moment, she hunches down, as if gathering something with her hands, and rises again.

C: 尚且只有一面之缘。但因为你，我们或许能够借此机会加深对彼此的了解呢。
E: We've only met once. But thanks to you, we might be able to use this opportunity to get to know each other a little bit better.

C: 感谢你的救命之恩。
E: Thank you for saving me.

C: 这里…也走不通。
E: This way... is blocked as well.

C: 她看起来…很紧张。
E: She seems... very nervous.

C: 哈哈，看来我们的无名客朋友还没搞清楚状况。没事，我来为你解释一下。
E: Haha, looks like our Nameless friend over here is still confused. Let me explain.

C: （但他也给了我选择…也许我得再和黑天鹅聊聊。）
E: (But he gave me a choice... Maybe I should talk to Black Swan again.)

C: 「愿时光永驻今夜，愿我们永不醒来！」
E: "May this moment last forever, and may we never awaken from this euphoric dream!"

C: ——以及，星穹列车不是你的敌人。
E: ...and the Astral Express is no enemy of yours.

C: 他在虚张声势。
E: He's bluffing.

C: 我把它拿回来了，姐姐。
E: I got it back, Sister.

C: 看这边，模型上有个非常明显的<color=#dbc291ff>缺口</color>，我大胆猜测你是对的。
E: Look, there's a noticeable <color=#dbc291ff>gap</color> in the model. I believe you're right.

C: 候…候…候…候…候……
E: t-t-t-t-t...

C: 很遗憾看到你活着离开沙盘，星期日就在这扇门后。以我粗浅的见解，他不是什么好对付的人，你准备好了么？
E: It's a pity you made it out of the sandpit alive. Sunday is just beyond this door. From my limited understanding, he's not someone easily handled. Are you prepared?

C: 真没得聊？
E: No room for negotiation?

C: ——这个被你果断放弃的匣子里，究竟存放着什么？
E: — The fact that you can decisively forsake the box you asked for, what exactly is stored in it?

C: …呃，梦主来了再说！而且，这只是个比喻，比喻！懂吗？！
E: ...Uhh, we'll talk about this if the Dreammaster is ever here! And, it's just a metaphor. A metaphor! Don't you get it!?

C: 嗯？我打错了？宝了个贝的，你又是谁？
E: Huh? Did I make a mistake? Who the fudge are you?

C: 给你的第一个命令很简单：除你以外，我还买了另外三十…嗯，三十四个奴隶。
E: Your first task is simple. In addition to you, I've purchased thirty... well, thirty-four other slaves.

C: …唉，我就知道。你想知道什么？我的父亲，还是母亲？
E: ...Ugh, I knew it. What's on your mind? Are you trying to ask about my father, or my mother?

C: 现在你能理解橡木家系为何授权无名客协助调查，却又处处对你们有所隐瞒了吧。
E: Well, now you understand why the Oak Family authorized the Nameless to assist in the investigation but kept you in the dark, right?

C: 这扇门开着，看来只能一探究竟了。谨慎前进吧。
E: ...This door is open — looks like we'll have to investigate ourselves. Let's proceed with caution.

C: 你错了。三十枚塔安巴，我会给你，并且远比这更多。财富、地位、权力…公司会给你想要和不想要的一切。
E: You're wrong. Thirty Tanbas... I'll give you that, and much more than that. Wealth, status, power... the IPC will give you whatever you want, even what you don't want.

C: 只要你还活着，埃维金人的血就永远不会流干。所以跑吧，卡卡瓦夏，不要害怕，不要回头。到山的那一边去。雨会长伴你，雨会保佑你。
E: As long as you are alive, the blood of the Avgin will never run dry. So run, Kakavasha, do not be afraid, and do not look back. Go to the other side of the mountain. The rain will accompany you, and the rain will bless you.

C: 既然瓦尔特决定与你同行，说明他信任你，而我们同样相信他的判断。
E: Since Welt has decided to travel with you, it means that he trusts you, and we trust his judgment.

C: 假设事态真的发展到那一步，多一位盟友，也是多一份保险。匹诺康尼山头林立，局势远比贝洛伯格和仙舟复杂啊。
E: Assuming things do escalate to that stage, having an extra ally is a good insurance policy. Penacony has numerous factions, and the state of affairs is significantly more intricate than that of Belobog and the Xianzhou.

C: 再等等…
E: Wait...

C: 为什么？
E: Why?

C: 「——两天时间，活着出来，证明你的本事货真价实。」
E: "If you come out alive after two days, it proves that you're the real deal."

C: …直到一簇火光将你拥入怀中。
E: ...until a fire engulfs you in its embrace.

C: ——只会让我更加怀疑你与真凶有所牵连。
E: ...will only make me more suspicious that you and the real serial killer are connected.

C: 你们——家族——把我这条老狗的脊梁骨打断，拔了獠牙，现在又开始指控我杀人？混账，只有苏乐达喝多了的白痴才会对街边的流浪狗发神经。
E: You — The Family — you broke my spine and pulled out my fangs, and now you want to accuse me of murder? Ridiculous, only idiots who've drunk too much SoulGlad will berate a stray dog on the streets.

C: 认得这东西么？
E: Recognize this?

C: 嗯…我用的是句号。这是一种…陈述。
E: Hmm... I ended it with a period. It was a statement, not a threat.

C: 看来这位先生是见识过许多场面的大人物，有不速之客混入了梦境，此事不假。
E: It appears the good sir has seen many great events, and it's true that an uninvited guest has unexpectedly entered the Dreamscape.

C: 这么多人都在议论，影视乐园闹出的动静可真大呀……
E: So many people talking about it, this commotion at the theme park definitely made waves...

C: 半个系统时后，它会带我们找到卡芙卡，接着就是耶佩拉兄弟会的覆灭。
E: In half a system hour, it will lead us to Kafka, and then comes the downfall of the Jepella Brotherhood.

C: 刚才的声音是…
E: That voice just now...

C: 话说回来，你先前提到过，你见过一个*只有*自己才能看到的钟表小子，是么？
E: Say, you mentioned before that you saw a Clockie that only you could see, right?

C: 这里太危险了。我们还是先带它回去吧，就放在你窗前的木架上。
E: This place is too dangerous for a fledgling. Let's take it with us — we can put it on the wooden shelf in front of your window.

C: 说吧，孩子。
E: And what might that be, my son?

C: 那我们还应该让它们回到天空…再眼睁睁看着它们坠亡在地吗？
E: Should we let them go back to the sky... only to see them crash to the ground and die?

C: 谐乐大典开幕在即，时间已经十分紧张，各位——我们必须出发了。
E: The Charmony Festival is about to start, and time is against us. We must hasten.

C: 唯一要赌一把的，就是砂金是否还平安无事了。不过公司线路向来有专人密切监听，更不用说他是战略投资部的重要干部，单是传递消息应该足够了。
E: The only question mark in all this is Aventurine's current status... but the IPC is always listening, especially senior Strategic Investment Department heads like him. Getting the message across shouldn't be a problem.

C: 今天告解的时间够我进「同谐」乐园了吧？那我走了。希望你成功当选，哼…别让我赔本啊。
E: Well, I've spent enough time in confession today to enter the Harmony's paradise, right? Then I'll take my leave. Good luck with your election, and... don't make me regret my investments in you.

C: 嗯。毕竟，她也提到了「房费」…不是吗？
E: Well, she did make mention of being able to "afford a room"... didn't she?

C: 一位善于思考的哲学家…但愿我没有打扰到您。
E: A philosophical mind... I hope I'm not intruding.

C: 尽管那种生活会平凡、艰难许多，可现在，他在昏迷中接受名为「美梦」的临终关怀，他的结局…已经注定了。
E: That path may have been more ordinary and challenging, but now he's in a comatose state, and the "sweet dream" has become a sort of end-of-life care. His fate... is sealed.

C: 从未有过。
E: Never.

C: 无论员工还是客人都对梦里的情况一无所知，走到哪都是一片其乐融融的景象…要我说，这绝对不是什么好兆头。
E: Neither the staff nor the guests seem to know anything about what's happening in the Dreamscape, and wherever we go, all we see is people enjoying themselves... Definitely not a good sign.

C: 抱歉，这是我的请求。出于一些原因，我遭到匹诺康尼放逐，所幸这位忆者一路随行，我才有机会悄无声息地摆脱家族的控制。
E: I apologize, but she did that at my request. Due to certain... reasons, I have been exiled by The Family. Thankfully, this Memokeeper came to my aid and helped me escape their surveillance unnoticed.

C: …却曾经是我重要的同伴，一群巡海游侠。
E: ...They were once my dear companions, a group of Galaxy Rangers.

C: 谢谢你，陌生人。祝你能在这趟旅途中找到答案。
E: Thank you, stranger. I wish that you find what you seek.

C: 这、这也是没办法的办法啦…我们尽量速战速决！
E: G—Given the situation, this is our best hope... Let's just get it over with quickly!

C: 前方一共有三座舞台。在每座舞台上，你们都能拿到一份剧本梗概。这三份剧本均出自电影大亨「钟表匠」之手，描绘了匹诺康尼拓荒时代的种种逸闻。
E: There are three stages up ahead. On each, you will find an outline of a script. These three scripts were written by the legendary filmmaker, the Watchmaker, and depict various stories from Penacony's era of pioneering.

C: 我生活平凡，她穷困潦倒。
E: I'm leading a normal life, but she ended up destitute.

C: 恭喜你们成为了最早的逐梦客！你们受到「钟表匠」感召，却失望地发现匹诺康尼根本没有遍地黄金，无奈之下，你们从底层做起，等待成功的机会。
E: Congratulations on becoming the first group of Dreamchasers! Answering the call from the Watchmaker, you are disappointed to learn that Penacony isn't paved with gold. Resigned to your current plight, you start from the hierarchical dredges, biding your time for a chance at success.

C: 难道「化身为恐龙」还不够充满想象力，这是只在匹诺康尼才能看见的浪漫。现在，言归正传——
E: Transforming into a dinosaur isn't imaginative enough for you? This is the sort of magic only seen on Penacony. Anyway, let's get back on track. Where were we? Oh, that's right—

C: 二位选手，祝愿你们与钟表小子共度美好的时光！
E: Contestants, may you have a wonderful time with Clockie!

C: 你好，请让我游玩梦境迷钟。
E: Hello, I'd like to play Dream Ticker.
Hmm...

C: 抱歉了，我的挚友。如果你们不能拿出令人心悦诚服的证据，我便绝不能退让，以免辱没纯美骑士之名。
E: Forgive me, my dear friends. If you cannot present irrefutable evidence, I must not yield, lest I dishonor the name of the Knights of Beauty.

C: 这不是重点！{NICKNAME}，别被他绕进去了。
E: That's not the point! {NICKNAME}, don't let him mislead you.

C: 星核问题关乎匹诺康尼所有人的生死存亡。如果各位有更好的提案，列车组愿意洗耳恭听。不妨一五一十地告诉我们那场会谈的来龙去脉吧——
E: The Stellaron issue concerns the life and death of everyone on Penacony. If anyone has a better suggestion, the Crew is more than willing to listen. Also, it'd be best to tell us the ins and outs of that meeting—

C: 天哪…这是怎么回事？你的内心十分混乱！
E: Oh dear... What's going on in here? Your inner self is a mess!

C: 原来那位红发选手是你？！
E: So the red-haired contestant was you all along!

C: 匹诺康尼和这片宇宙都见证过太多无辜的鲜血。强者向弱者挥刀，胜者将败者的生命推向尽头……
E: Penacony and the entire universe have witnessed far too much innocent bloodshed. The strong wield their blades against the weak, and the victors push the vanquished to the brink of life...

C: 再想想看。
E: Think it over some more.

C: 我想要见证遗产。
E: I want to witness the legacy.

C: 我不是正好端端地站在你面前么？
E: I'm right here in front of you, aren't I?

C: 「若是没有主人，又有谁还能赐我自由呢？」
E: "Without a master, who can grant me true freedom?"

C: 可以是可以…但你不会又像上次那样打什么歪主意吧？
E: Of course not... But you're not planning on doing something like last time, are you?

C: 大意如此。
E: More or less.

C: 现在我可以确信，他确实是想和我们公平决斗。否则他当时完全有能力解决掉我们…不费吹灰之力。
E: I can confidently say now, he was truly after a fair fight with us. Had he wanted, he could have easily taken us down... without so much as lifting a finger.

C: 只能说，这对那女孩实在是无妄之灾。我联盟在调停过程中会尽量说服家族对此事慎重裁夺的。
E: I can only say that this incident is an unexpected mess for the girl. The Alliance will try to persuade The Family to consider this matter carefully during mediation.

C: 说起来，{NICKNAME}，匹诺康尼这次，还是你第一次和我一起开拓吧？
E: Come to think of it, {NICKNAME}, this trip to Penacony was the first time we Trailblazed together, wasn't it?

C: 列车即将跃迁——列车即将跃迁——请坐稳扶好帕——！
E: The Express is about to make the jump — please be seated and hold on!

C: 既然这样…我们要不还是先去江户星吧？那里听起来遭遇了危险，身为无名客，我们应该向他们伸出援手。
E: If that's the case... How about we go to Edo Star first? If that planet really is in danger, then we should go help them out.

C: 饰
E: as

C: 前星穹列车护卫，一位武艺高超的枪手。
E: The former guard of the Astral Express and an outstanding gunslinger.

C: 还记得那位星期日的野心么？他计划利用星核、橡木家系十万余人的意志，和匹诺康尼众生的愿望，篡夺「同谐」权柄，令「秩序」重现世间。
E: Do you remember Sunday's ambitious plan? He intended to harness the power of the Stellaron, the collective will of over <unbreak>100,000</unbreak> Oak Family members, and the desires of everyone in Penacony to usurp the Harmony and restore the Order.

C: 你们也从梦里醒来了吗？
E: You've woken up, too?

C: 在梦境被动摇后，计划的第二步由我来完成。我将用「同谐」的歌声为沉睡中的人们调律，将「开拓」的不协和音传入他们心中，指明通往现实的方向。
E: Once the Dreamscape is swayed, I'll complete the second step. I'll fine-tune the slumbering souls with the song of the Harmony, interrupting them with the discord of "Trailblaze" and guiding them towards reality.

C: 这场雨，为什么选中了我呢？
E: Why did this rain choose me?

C: 却同我一起，走过了漫长的日子。
E: They have journeyed with me for such a long time.

C: 请你伸出手，然后，闭上眼睛吧。
E: Please extend your hand, and then close your eyes.

C: 但我依然相信…你的名字应当被人铭记……
E: But I believe... that your name should be remembered...

C: <color=#ff3a3e>雷电 忘川守 芽衣</color>
E: <color=#ff3a3e>Raiden Bosenmori Mei.</color>

C: 是湮厄鹰座。别担心，它依旧在那，只是因为在匹诺康尼内环，只有春夏交织的时候才能看见它。
E: It's the Torment Eagles. Don't worry, it's still there. It's just it's located in the inner ring of Penacony and can only be seen when spring and summer overlap.

C: 就让你看看…「弱者」们的信念吧。
E: Witness... the will of the weak!

C: 并非是你造化万物。
E: It was not you who created all things.

C: 怎么突然聊起这个了？被拖入美梦的时候，我只感觉有一只冰凉的触角伸进了我的记忆深处。但那里好像有什么别的东西，所以它马上就离开了。
E: Why the sudden interest in that? Well, I was dragged into the sweet dream. I felt a cold tentacle diving into my memories, but something else was there, so the tentacle suddenly disappeared.

C: 当然，奥帝先生的品位无可挑剔。能获得苜蓿草家系的邀请、登上「晖长石号」的，也必定是寰宇中一等一的名流贵客。
E: Indeed, Mr. Alfalfa has impeccable taste. Only the most prestigious guests are invited by the Alfalfa Family to board this airship.

C: 这就是个人的感悟了。
E: That was based on my personal experience.

C: 星期日和知更鸟会怎样？
E: What will happen to Sunday and Robin?

C: 有意思…嚯嗬嗬嗬，这下有意思了。
E: Interesting... Ohohoho, now that's interesting.

C: 你这画皮的女人，口气倒是不小！我今天倒要看看，你手里究竟攥了什么牌。
E: You surely have a way with words! Now I'm curious to know what you have up your sleeve.

C: 猜猜看，在全银河都把目光投向匹诺康尼的时候，仅凭这一条消息，公司有多少种方法能在二十四个系统时里把苜蓿币贬得一文不值？
E: Care to guess how many ways we have to turn Alfalfa credits into worthless junk within a measly <unbreak>24</unbreak> system hours? With the entire cosmos keeping a close eye on Penacony, I assure you it won't be too hard.

C: 我的鞭子很长，即便在庇尔波因特，也可以轻而易举地勒住你的脖子。
E: Even from Pier Point, as distant as it may be, I'm more than capable of keeping you on a tight leash.

C: 那就继续方才的话题吧。托帕，邀请「甘露」上桌吧。
E: Then let's continue our conversation. Please, Topaz, invite "Sweet Dew" to join us at the table.

C: 并非是我找到了消息，而是消息找到了我。它来自…一位心系「同谐」未来的女孩。
E: I didn't find the information. It came to me. It was from... a lady concerned with the future of the Harmony.

C: （感觉这个时机不太好……）
E: (No, it's not the best time to do that...)
