C: 太、太好了！我…我的愿望真的实现了！
E: W—Wonderful! My... my wish has actually come true!

C: 可你不一样，如今的你是星核猎手，是「流萤」，一个鲜活的生命。你当然想活下去，但昔日的苍穹战线已经覆灭，知晓这一秘密并能治愈它的人，也不复存在了。
E: However, you are different. You're now a Stellaron Hunter, a living being named Firefly. Naturally, you want to continue your existence, but with the Firmament Front gone, the people who know the secret and can cure the disease are nowhere to be found.

C: …我明白了。
E: ...I understand.

C: 慈玉女士，我如约来交付抵押物了。
E: Lady Bonajade, I've come to deliver the collateral as promised.

C: …谁说我要和你赌了？
E: ...Who said I was betting with you?

C: （不好意思啦，{NICKNAME}。晚点有机会再找你聊天吧。）
E: (Sorry, {NICKNAME}. I'll catch up with you later.)

C: 告诉你也无妨，「石心十人」的基石能力各不相同，有人甚至可以直接读透你的念想，拿捏你的欲望…可要小心哦。
E: Guess there's no harm telling you. The abilities of the Ten Stonehearts' cornerstones are all different. Some can even read your thoughts, grasp your desires... So be careful...

C: 不知道下一站是什么地方。
E: I don't know where our next destination will be.

C: （该办的事应该都办完了…不过时间应该还够，要再去转转吗？）
E: (Everything is settled... But there's still some time left. Maybe I should take a walk?)

C: （算了，转够了，坐下来休息会儿吧……）
E: (Forget it, I've done enough walking around already. Let's take a seat and rest for a while...)

C: 看在你这么努力的份上，我就告诉你一件事好了：炸弹不在这里，有的只有我精心布置的恶作剧——时间不多了，快去找到真正的炸弹吧～
E: Seeing as you've put in so much effort, I'll throw you a bone: The bomb's not here, this is only a prank I've craftily set up. Hurry, time's running out. You'd better find that real bomb quickly!

C: ——如果那娃娃方才所言不虚，那应该确实不会有一枚虚数中子弹在「黄金的时刻」地表爆炸。放心…吧？
E: If the doll's words just now are not false, then indeed there won't be an imaginary neutron bomb exploding on the surface at Golden Hour. No need to worry...?

C: 你不知道家族设下了多少道岗哨，要把你从这里带出去得有多难？
E: Don't you know how many sentry posts The Family has built, and how hard it is to get you out of here?

C: 就算是「盛会之星」也不能天天办盛会吧！
E: Even the Planet of Festivities can't possibly hold a festival every day!

C: 何等狡诈的陷阱！不仅邪祟遍布，还有四处横飞的暗器！
E: What kind of devious trap is this!? Not only are there fiendlings abound, but there are also concealed weapons flying about!

C: 你听懂了？
E: You understood that?

C: 谁？
E: Who?

C: 那弟子该叫什么呢？
E: What should I be called?

C: 要我帮你扛行李吗？扛你也行！
E: Do you need help carrying your bags? Or maybe carrying you?

C: 什么情况，是整人节目吗？
E: What's going on? Is this a gag?

C: 那芮克先生三言两语就能说服家族的人，好厉害啊。
E: Mr. Reca is so amazing. He convinced The Family so easily.

C: 加入甜梦糖霜。
E: Add sweet dream icing.

C: 乱破
E: Rappa

C: 唉，真羡慕各位这么上相，我也好想成为热砂海选的盛会之星呀……
E: I envy how photogenic you all are. I want to be one of the stars featured in the Scorchsand Audition too...

C: 是啊，在我醒来时，我的大脑在说：「仇恨是一切弱者的弱点」。
E: Sure enough, when I came to, my mind was whisperin': Hatred is the frailty of the weak.

C: 这地方空着，半点用处都没有。但摆上「睡蕉」塑像，建成广场，它就能摇身一变成为流梦礁的象征。咱们就能走在家族前边了。
E: This place is useless sitting here empty. But if we put a Slumbernana statue here and build a plaza, it'll instantly become a landmark of Dreamflux Reef. We'll be able to get ahead of The Family again.

C: 哦，就刚才那几个小香蕉自称的？没人管管？
E: Oh, those self-proclaimed banana maniacs just now? And no one's tried to stop them?

C: 呃，没你想得那么简单，如果只是粗浅地了解过睡蕉小猴，完全不可能通过的。
E: Uh, it's a lot harder than it sounds. You won't be able to pass the test unless you're an expert on Slumbernana Monkey.

C: 呃，我看着像那么不负责任的样子吗？一次就可以了。
E: Uh, do I look like I have such poor work ethics? I heard you the first time.

C: 不用担心，已经完全没事了。
E: Don't worry. Everything's fine now.

C: 在你们结束前，这边也会做出决定。
E: Before you wrap up your business, we will have made our decision too.

C: 忍徒•乱破。
E: Ninja Initiate Rappa.

C: 睡蕉小猴绝不是「普通的卡通形象」！
E: Slumbernana Monkey is, by no means, an "ordinary cartoon character!"

C: 阁下就是这折纸村的城主？
E: Are you perhaps the governor of Paperfold Town?

C: 呵呵，宿命啊，真就像香蕉皮一样……
E: Yes, destiny is no different than a banana peel...

C: 折纸大学表面上很热闹，但其实许多学生的蕉皮下都藏着孤独，难以适应太阳时刻的热情氛围，也融入不了匹诺康尼的本地生活……
E: Paperfold University might seem to be an enjoyable place, but beneath their peels, many students are in fact bogged down by loneliness. You know... Struggling to embrace the vibrant energy here in the Moment of Sol, but also realizing that they're unable to live as the Penaconians do.

C: 因为它的口头禅够有趣蕉。
E: Because of its viral catchphrase, bana bana!

C: 可惜我们听不懂它的*蕉声*……
E: It's a shame we don't understand its Banagibberish...

C: 我再准备一下。
E: I need a moment to get ready.

C: 在你关闭它表盘的一瞬间，你似乎与它的愤怒产生了共鸣，你看到了一份不理想的成绩单，一份更不理想的工资单，和一个少年失望的神情……
E: The moment you shut its dial, you seemed to resonate with its anger. You saw a disappointing report card, an even more dismal paycheck, and the look of frustration on a young face...

C: 到底是不是啊！
E: Is that a yes or no!?

C: 蕉，蕉蕉！
E: Bana, bana!

C: 不慎坠入低谷，身负战败之辱。大师到访此处，侠客倾耳拭目——
E: The hero's down and out, defeat hangin' in the air, but in walks the master with wisdom to share—

C: 所以，邪忍先让邪祟们散布装饰过的媒介，以娱乐为掩饰，在诸位忍徒心中植入邪术的种子。
E: Hence, the evil ninja instructs the evil fiendlings to spread through media, masking it as entertainment to implant the seeds of dark sorcery in the hearts of the ninja initiates.

C: 又谋篡了师长之位，对诸位忍徒的心智施以凌虐，使他们心中的邪术发作。
E: Misappropriating the role of actual educators gave them the perfect chance to mangle the minds of innocent ninja initiates, only to hasten the growth of those fiendish seeds they sowed.

C: 可惜，我铤而走险，一心只为拍摄精彩的{RUBY_B#记忆}影片{RUBY_E#}。从一开始，我就已经做好为艺术献身的准备了，所以你的威胁毫无意义。
E: What a pity. I put my life on the line just so I could make this wonderful {RUBY_B#memory}film{RUBY_E#} a reality. I decided a long time ago that I'd do anything for art, so your threat means nothing to me.

C: 那你就做好献身的准备吧。
E: Be prepared to sacrifice yourself then.

C: 这就是我从睡蕉小猴身上学到的一切……
E: And that is everything that Slumbernana Monkey taught me...

C: 多谢了，无名客姐们。没想到你在这话语权还挺大——星穹列车开拓到猴子身上了？
E: Appreciate it, Nameless gal. You have quite the authority 'round here, eh? Has the Astral Express begun to take on monkeys?

C: 但这地转来转去净是些孩子，让我为难他们？原始博士没少干过推人当靶子的烂事，类似的套中一次就够了。
E: But they only planted kids in this place. I can't be using my ways on them. It's not the first time Dr. Primitive's used others as scapegoats. I ain't gonna step on the same rake twice.

C: 蒙塔娜？
E: Montana?

C: 「不完全的退化」…这十分有趣。
E: A partial regression... How very interesting indeed.

C: 是你啊，过来，小可爱！
E: It's you? Get over here, you shirthead!

C: 那可真是一道无穷无尽的怒火。
E: I see. That is one vast and endless wall of rage you have there.

C: 对啊，你明明是来这里享受校园的，为什么又遇上了这种麻烦事？这些破事儿到底跟你有什么关系蕉？
E: Yeah, you came here to enjoy campus life, so why are you getting caught up in this mess? What do these *banana* troubles have to do with you anyway?

C: 混账……
E: Damn it...

C: 日后再谈吧，与梦土千百众生的安危相比，在下的往事不值一提。
E: That's a story for another time. Nothing's more important than ensuring the safety of the countless people on this land of dreams.

C: 邪祟•总长。别再用污言秽语羞辱人们了，忍道绝无高低贵贱之分——
E: Fiendling Chief, stop insulting others with your filthy language. The way of the ninja does not discriminate between classes...

C: 这群小猴好像正在阻拦我们……
E: This bunch of monkeys seems like they are trying to stop us...

C: 邪祟已然所剩无几，战况值得欢喜！
E: There aren't many fiendlings left. This is cause for us to rejoice!

C: 二人来到了流梦礁的露天舞台前……
E: The two arrive before the open-air stage in Dreamflux Reef...

C: {RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}的祭坛。
E: It's the altar of {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#}.

C: …啊、啊啊！
E: ...Ah! Wait, no!

C: 反物质军团？
E: The Antimatter Legion?

C: 哈托努斯，我无意加害你！
E: I have no intention of hurting you, Chartonus!

C: 「至于不打算流血的懦夫…现在就滚出我的视线。」
E: "Of course... cowards who hope to avoid bloodshed are better off disappearing from my sight this instant."

C: 阁下大概有所不知…缇安大人每次使用「百界门」，对身体都是很大的伤害。
E: You might not be aware of this... but using the Century Gate takes a significant toll on Lady Trianne.

C: 「至是，工程已毕，言尽于此。」
E: "And now, the objective is complete. That is all."

C: 美狄亚，对阵「智种学派」的白厄。
E: Medea. She went up against Phainon of the Nousporists.

C: 开弓没有回头箭，你决定尝试……
E: Once the bow is drawn, there's no turning back. You decide to proceed...

C: 呵呵，怎说得这样不吉利话哪。
E: Heh, you're making it sound so ominous.

C: 呵呵…好。吾方才回答字字属实，不打诳语，过去与未来亦是。
E: Hehe... Alright. I was completely truthful in my response just now. I have not deceived you, nor will I.

C: <size=36>呼哇——！</size>
E: <size=36>Waaaah!</size>

C: 动身吧，阁下。附近有{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}祭司的宝珠…但愿可堪一用。
E: Let's get a move on. The orbs belonging to {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s priests should be nearby... Hopefully, they'll be of some use.

C: 吾实在奈何他不得，只得裂身而逃，以免戕害，迁延日月，伺机求援。可惜，这也并非长久之计。
E: As I could not do anything about them, I split my body up and escaped to avoid harm. I bided my time for a chance to seek assistance. Unfortunately, this was not a sustainable long-term plan.

C: 缇、缇安也会保护大家的，缇安很勇敢！
E: T—Trianne will also protect everyone! Trianne is brave!

C: 怎么只有你们几个？大人呢？
E: Why are you kids here alone? Where are the grown-ups?

C: 这是一场谋杀！别让婴孩无辜的鲜血玷污悬锋人的荣耀——别把软肋暴露给你的敌人！
E: This is murder! Do not sully the noble name of Kremnos with the blood of an innocent child! You mustn't reveal your weaknesses to the enemy!

C: 若无王冠便无以为悬锋…那我就夺来它，掷碎它，激醒众人吧。
E: If there is no Kremnos without the crown... then I shall seize the crown and smash it to pieces to bring the people to their senses.

C: 不、不对…这次不是缇安……
E: Wait, no... It's not Trianne this time...

C: 与此同时……
E: In the meantime...

C: 对…所以我由衷地感谢你，迈德漠斯。
E: That's right... And that's why I am truly thankful to you, Mydeimos.

C: 快去救人，缇宁她，缇宁她……
E: Hurry up and go save Trinnon! She... She...

C: 天啊，这么多人…？！
E: Oh! This many people...!?

C: …您现在，是那刻夏老师吗？
E: Are you... Professor Anaxa?

C: 好吧，那他们都来自哪里呢？
E: Alright, then where will they come from?

C: 哼，开始不是，但领教到它的厉害后也甘拜下风了。就算请神上身，我也难以招架对方的锋刃……
E: Hmph, not at first. But the god relented after having had a taste of its power. Even with a god possessing me, I couldn't fight against that blade...

C: 缇安，把它丢到了很远的地方，远远的，再也回不来。
E: Trianne threw it away. Far, far away. It's never coming back.

C: 这边这边！跟缇安来——
E: Over here! Follow Trianne—

C: 一旦夺回火种，{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}的门径就会开启。大家必须马上逃离，绝不能停留。
E: Once we take back the Coreflame, {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}' passage will open. When that happens, you must evacuate immediately. Don't stay behind.

C: 我母亲的印戒。它本是王者的证明，现在，我将赋予它崭新的意义。
E: My mother's signet ring. It served as a symbol of kingship, and I now imbue it with a fresh significance.

C: 你来了，迈德漠斯……
E: You're here, Mydeimos...

C: 还真是直截了当的画面啊。
E: Well, that is a rather straightforward scenario.

C: 话说回来，目睹一位新的半神站在眼前…真是不可思议。
E: Well, I must say, it feels quite incredible... to see a new demigod standing right before me.

C: 不必了。我已和阿格莱雅道过别，来见神谕者只是出于礼仪。
E: No need. I have already bid farewell to Aglaea. Meeting with the oracle is simply a matter of courtesy.

C: 是日，悬锋千年王朝宣告终结。
E: On that day, the Kremnoan dynasty, which had lasted for a thousand years, came to an end.

C: 我会在祭典上打败你！
E: I'm going to beat you at the festival!

C: 呵…这么快又要去见那女人了，看来属于我的劫难远未到头啊。
E: Heh... a meeting with that woman again so soon? I just can't catch a break.

C: 可黑潮已经降临，{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}也长眠不醒…如果为凡人指点迷津的门神都无法抵抗灾厄，我们又能奈灭亡的命运如何？
E: But the black tide has already arrived, and {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} remains in slumber. If even the god of passages, known for guiding mortals, cannot resist this catastrophe, then what can we do against the incoming destruction?

C: 哦？是什么问题呢？
E: Oh? What do you want to ask?

C: 不是的，{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}……
E: No, {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#}...

C: 如此…甚好……
E: Thus... it shall be...

C: 妈妈…明天见。
E: Mother... I shall see you tomorrow.

C: 所以，如果感到自己迷失了方向，就回到这儿来吧。我把启程时的心愿留在这里，等待着你——我自己——再度拾起。
E: So, if you ever feel lost, return to this place. I'll keep this memory here for you — or for me — to embrace it again.

C: 「雅努萨波利斯的圣女」缇里西庇俄丝，为平息世间祸乱，背负火种，成为雅努斯之半神。
E: "Janusopolis' Holy Maiden" Tribios bore the Coreflame to quell the world's chaos and became a demigod of Janus.

C: 当然了，许愿的资格无比珍贵。就像人生中大多数比赛那样，要想得偿所愿，就得和其他竞争者角逐！
E: Of course, the right to make a wish is a privilege beyond measure. And like most competitions in life, if you want to claim your reward, you'll have to fight for it!

C: …所以，从者呢？
E: So... Where's the Servant?

C: 我也察觉到了。
E: I've noticed that as well.

C: 为了让这位从者理解这个沐浴在忆质的梦中世界，你大谈特谈起星际旅行和银河地理。
E: To help this Servant understand this dream world bathing in memoria, you go on a lecture about interstellar travel and cosmic geography.

C: 亲爱的御主，我看起来和你们这个奇怪的世界有任何关联吗？
E: Master, do I look like I have any ties to this bizarre world of yours?

C: {NICKNAME}这时候给我发短信干什么？他宝贝的，这台词，{F#她}{M#他}给纯美骑士夺舍了？算了，反正也不是第一次见{F#她}{M#他}这样。
E: {NICKNAME}'s texting me now? What the fork? These lines... Did {F#s}he just get possessed by the Knight of Beauty? Whatever. Not the first time {F#s}he's acted like this.

C: 但那是我的名字！我的名字！我的名字！
E: But it's my name! My name! Mine!

C: 但那场仪式所造成的影响，至今残留在匹诺康尼人的心灵角落中…如果可以，我想使用圣杯抹除、治愈那些创痕，弥补兄长犯下的过错。
E: But the impact of his actions still lingers in the hearts of the people of Penacony... I wanted to use the Holy Grail to erase and heal those scars, to make up for my brother's mistakes.

C: 我是无名客！我不属于这儿！
E: But I'm a Nameless! I don't belong here!

C: 请不要再说下去了……
E: Please no more... I don't want to hear anymore...

C: 不过在谈判场上，这场闹剧会是个好用的借口，为翡翠女士在匹诺康尼撬开更大的入口。
E: The silver lining is that this little spectacle will serve as the perfect excuse during negotiations for Madam Jade to pry open an even bigger opportunity in Penacony.

C: 那就约好了，列车长。下一次停靠匹诺康尼时，请为我、为拉扎莉娜、为铁尔南…请为我们鸣笛。我们要是能听见，一定会回来见您。
E: It's a deal then, Conductor. The next time the Express stops at Penacony... please sound the horn for me, Razalina, and Tiernan. If we can hear it... then we'll definitely come visit you.

C: 这老东西太阴了。
E: He's far too shrewd.

C: 各位，节目已经完结了，但如果有什么能实现我的愿望——
E: Alright, folks! The show's over! But if there's anything still out there that can hear and fulfill my wish —

C: 所以，老奥帝居然向贵部门的人也寄出了请柬吗？可我记得他们往匹诺康尼派驻的成员寥寥无几，莫非你就是……
E: So Old Oti even sent invitations to your department? But I thought you folks barely stationed anyone at Penacony. Unless... unless your name is...

C: 哎，你就别落井下石了，真正的答案，你早就意识到了吧？
E: Hey, no need to egg things on. You already figured out the real answer, didn't you?

C: 你这欺软怕硬的混账！
E: You coward, pick on someone your own size!

C: 以肉眼难以捕捉的速度，音符小姐抓住袭击的怪物，残暴地将它们的脑袋砸向地板。
E: In a blur too fast to track, Miss Note grabs the attacking monsters and viciously smashes their head into the floor.

C: 怎么看，这也不能算一场魔术师的战斗…看来在匹诺康尼，人们对Caster的定义真是足够宽泛。
E: Can't say that counted as a fight between mages... Guess people in Penacony really have a broad definition of Caster.

C: 如果你打算愣在这里，我不介意考虑Assassin的建议，让你提前退场。
E: If you're just gonna stand there, I might take Assassin's advice and write you out early.

C: 你和正义哪点搭边？
E: What do you even have to do with justice?

C: 在道谢之前，还有更重要的事要做吧。那小姑娘不是说，只要让所有的自己聚到一起，就能变回原样吗？
E: Let's save the thanks for later. Didn't that girl say if we brought all her split selves together, she could return to normal?

C: 呱，老朋友，我会在背后支持你的呱。
E: *ribbit* Old friend, I'll be rooting for you.

C: 你说得对，我无法反驳。
E: You're right. I won't deny that.

C: 啊…啊……
E: Ugh...

C: 如果是，你会怎么做？
E: And if that were indeed the case?

C: 嗯？
E: Hm?

C: 找到啦！如果我没记错，这位停云小姐的特点是……
E: Found her! If I remember correctly, this Miss Tingyun's trait is...

C: 这倒是实话。
E: That is true.

C: 为什么是我……
E: Why me...?

C: 仙舟使者已经到了吗？
E: Has the messenger from the Xianzhou arrived yet?

C: 我来接你回去了，停云。
E: Tingyun, I'm here to take you home.

C: 话虽如此，这些星星有些陌生，没有一颗是熟悉的。让人感到不安。
E: Still, these stars are unfamiliar to me. I don't recognize any of them, and it makes me feel uneasy.

C: 也许两者皆有。
E: Perhaps it's both.

C: 合二为一也好，一方消失也罢，我将这场调律的结果交由命运，并以此验明——我能否敞开怀抱，接纳一切自己厌憎的事物。
E: Whether it's us merging or one of us disappearing, I'll leave the tuning to fate, and see if I can embrace all that I detest.

C: 我没法欺骗自己，也许我们更适合做萍水相逢的过客，而不是同道。
E: I won't pretend I'm okay with it. You can be our passenger, but you're not joining us.

C: 她说自己只是个搭车客，不该干涉航路去向，会在派对车厢等待结果。
E: She doesn't think it's right to join in on our vote when she's only hitchhiking with us, so she's waiting in the Party Car.

C: 这就推翻了之前所有的结论，还不至于。
E: Throwing in the towel already? I don't think we're at that point yet.

C: 我也想说，吐槽的人没了。
E: Yeah, I was wondering where that chatterbox had gone.

C: 我都这样了…你就别吓人了……
E: Have a heart, will you? Stop scaring me...

C: 放心交给我吧。
E: Leave it to me.

C: 嘿嘿，知道你靠得住。
E: Heh, I know I can always count on you.

C: 我也没有异议，悉听各位的安排。
E: I'm fine with any arrangement you have for me.

C: 呃…我这不是想给咱们的出场增加点仪式感嘛，黑塔女士。
E: Wh—Why, I was just ramping it up for our grand appearance, Madam Herta.

C: 寻找污染源头的事可以晚点再说。既然我本人已经到场，也就不需要这些人偶了。来吧，把残次品统统送进维修厂！
E: Finding the source of the corruption can wait. These puppets no longer have use now that I'm here. Take them all out! Defective goods ought to be sent back to the repair center!

C: 哦？让我听听。
E: Hmm? Let me hear them.

C: 这些家伙没有气息…是无机生命？
E: These things aren't breathing. ...Inorganic lifeforms?

C: 我们很久没有像刚才那样围坐在一起，纵情吟唱古老歌谣了，感谢各位让我重新回忆起和平辉煌的年代。现在想想，是我之前过于偏执了。
E: It's been a long time since we sat together like that and sang ancient ballads to our heart's content. I'm grateful to all of you for reminding me of those glorious and peaceful times. Looking back now, I admit I was too stubborn.

C: 主干道被堵住了！缇宝老师……
E: The main road's been blocked off! Tribbie...

C: 连圣城的「入殓师」都这么说，看来我是能活过这一战了？
E: Well, if the "mortician" of the holy city says I'm needed, then it sounds like I'm gonna live through this mess.

C: 这便是翁法罗斯的逐火之旅——「<color=#dbc291ff>一众英雄踏上弑神的旅途，摘得十二枚火种，实现再创世的伟业。</color>」
E: This is Amphoreus' Flame-Chase Journey — "<color=#dbc291ff>a band of heroes dedicated to slaying the gods and reclaiming the twelve Coreflames for the world to start over anew.</color>"

C: 二位是守护了圣城的英雄吧，我达米亚诺斯看见了你们英勇的身影。
E: I know you. You're the heroes who helped defend our city, right? I, Damionis, saw your valiant figures in the battle.

C: （表达关切）其实……
E: (Express concern) Well, actually...

C: 也有一种说法，它是{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}长眠前的低吟，是天父将自己的神血洒向大地，从此，世间开始诞生黄金裔…当然，这只是诸多民间传说中的一种。
E: There's another theory that it is the whispers of {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} before their eternal slumber. It was the sky father who scattered their divine blood all over the land that gave rise to the Chrysos Heirs... Of course, this is just one of many popular folktales.

C: 欢迎来到大地兽的居所…虽然这么说，但我也只是刚好路过。
E: Welcome to the dwelling of the dromases... Well, I'm also just passing by.

C: 真教人羡慕呀。
E: It makes me envious.

C: 达米亚诺斯——
E: Damionis...

C: （把手伸进狮子嘴里）
E: (Put your hand into the lion's mouth)

C: 仔细想想，时至如今，你经历的所有波折和苦难——它们有那么值得么？躺在这里，迎来永恒的舒适酣睡，也许那才是你该有的归宿……
E: Think about it. All the twists and turns and hardships you've been through... are they worth it? Lying here and welcoming an eternal, comfy slumber... Maybe that's where you belong...

C: 将红土饲料喂给大地兽
E: Feed the dromas with Redsoil feed

C: 粉霞天女，奥赫玛的明光……
E: Rosy Celestial Maiden, Okhema's light...

C: 尽说无妨。
E: Do speak your mind.

C: 竟有两位黄金裔愿意为你们作担保，呵…看来是我独断孤行了。
E: So, two Chrysos Heirs are willing to vouch for you. Hah... It seems my actions were too high-handed.

C: 阿格莱雅大人心中的坚冰恐怕难以消融……
E: Thawing the ice in Lady Aglaea's heart won't be easy...

C: …谁？是谁？你…我…我是谁？
E: ...Who? Who is? You... I... Who am I?

C: 有点意思。我接受你的挑战。
E: Interesting. I accept your challenge.

C: 我了解他，这家伙只爱单打独斗。这前面有两条通路，{NICKNAME}就跟我走一边。
E: I know Mydei. He prefers to fight alone. There are two paths ahead. {NICKNAME} and I will take the same one.

C: 不像堆放在这里的旧物，看着也太新了，是谁留下的？
E: It doesn't look like the rest of the things that were left behind. It looks kind of new, in fact. Who could have left this here?

C: 别怕，隔壁不还有一位专家么？等和万敌合流了，让他看看吧。
E: Don't worry. We have an expert next door. We can show it to Mydei when we group back up.

C: 看起来像是在制造泰坦眷属，或许这就是「铸魂」的意义？
E: Looks like they're creating Titankin. Maybe this is what "Soul-Forging" means?

C: 用原石打造出一具躯壳，再注入神明的金血赐予其活力……
E: Crafting a body from rough stones and then infusing it with a god's golden blood to bring it to life...

C: 说吧，吾师！我会聆听你的教诲。
E: Please, teacher, share your wise counsel with me!

C: 走吧，你的战场另有他处，「救世主」。
E: Go, Deliverer. Your battlefield lies elsewhere.

C: 但愿一切都能顺利……
E: May everything go well for us...

C: 我需要仔细聆听它的话语……
E: I have to listen closely to what they are saying...

C: 我理解，这样的奇观可不多见。
E: I understand. Such a spectacle is rare to witness.

C: 刃别过头去，不再理会你的呼唤。
E: Blade turns away, ignoring your call.

C: 母亲…是谁？
E: Who is... Mother?

C: {NICKNAME}，<color=#dbc291ff>听我说——</color>
E: {NICKNAME}, <color=#dbc291ff>listen...</color>

C: {NICKNAME}，发生什么了？
E: {NICKNAME}, what happened?

C: 能获得星神的瞥视，是否就意味着……
E: To earn the gaze of an Aeon, does that mean...

C: 一直以来辛苦你了。如果你也会做梦…希望你的梦是甜美的。
E: Thank you for all your hard work. If Titans can dream... May your dream be a sweet one.

C: 玩的就是个刺激！
E: It's all about that adrenaline rush!

C: 幸好阿格莱雅大人十分仁慈。她只是让我立下誓言，然后就放我回家了。
E: Fortunately, Lady Aglaea is quite lenient. She let me go after I made a vow.

C: 金色的丝线轻轻地裹住女孩的手掌…现在她们心灵相通了。
E: The golden thread gently wraps around the girl's palm... now their hearts are connected.

C: 我们没有别的意思，只是想再提醒你一次——<color=#dbc291ff>黄金裔对圣城的管理是临时的，这只是非常时期的权力托管。</color>
E: We bear no ill will. We just want to reiterate that <color=#dbc291ff>the Chrysos Heirs' governance of the holy city is only temporary, a provisional transfer of authority during these extraordinary times.</color>

C: 在你眼中的世界，预言仍如第一日那般清晰吗？
E: In the world as you perceive it, does the prophecy remain as clear as it was when it first descended?

C: 万敌是个…逃兵？
E: Mydeimos... is a deserter?

C: 看来我们回到了黄金战争的末年，悬锋城正面临内部分化和泰坦失神的两重打击。
E: It seems that we've traveled back to the last years of the Chrysos War, a time when Castrum Kremnos grappled with both internal strife and the Titan's waning divinity.

C: 看来你不止是口齿不清，连耳朵也不怎么好使…你如果继续胡搅蛮缠，休怪我们不客气。
E: Hmph, so you're not just inarticulate, but also hard of hearing... Keep up this act of nuisance, and I'll be sure to show you how uncivil we can get!

C: 血脉偾张的戏码已经快让人审美疲劳了，加入一组实力相差悬殊的「插曲」亦是不错的调剂。
E: The adrenaline-pumping scenes are becoming a bit tiresome, so adding a wildly mismatched "interlude" would make for a refreshing change and spice things up.

C: 我不确定…
E: I'm not sure about this...

C: 我也听到了，那是……
E: I hear it now. That's...

C: 你坚持得住吗，遐蝶？
E: Do you need a break, Castorice?

C: 右边的高台上没有铁球……
E: The platform on the right is missing an iron ball...

C: 他虽然只是{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的一枚碎片…但也是一位英雄。
E: Although he was but a part of {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador{RUBY_E#}... he was nevertheless a hero in his own right.

C: 请先回去吧，{NICKNAME}阁下，我稍后就会跟上。我想再和格奈乌斯阁下沟通一次…最后一次。
E: Go with the rest, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}. I will catch up with you later. I would like to talk to Lord Gnaeus again... one last time.

C: 阿雅，他们回来了！
E: Agy, they're back!

C: 我不怀疑他的力量和资质…成神的景象，他也一定在脑海中预演过千遍。但他之所以推托，正是不想再带领族人走上相同的道路。
E: I do not doubt his strength and talents... In fact, he must have imagined himself becoming a god a thousand times over. But he turned it down because he does not want to lead his people down the same path again.

C: 等白厄的晋升仪式结束，我们也该仔细盘算下这些麻烦了。
E: Once Phainon's ascension ritual is over, we should start working out these problems of ours.

C: 个性…？你总是会说些人家听不懂的话，很调皮呢！
E: Personality...? Hmph, you're always saying things I don't understand!

C: 神谕，请宽赦这迟来的献礼。漫长的万余个黑夜里，我等黄金裔竭尽全力重启「逐火之旅」，如今，撒下的种子终于迎来丰收。
E: O prophecy, forgive us for this late tribute. We Chrysos Heirs have striven to start the Flame-Chase Journey anew over these myriad nights. The seeds we sowed have finally yielded a good harvest.

C: 他已经走上了战场，那是只能由他独自赢下的战役。
E: He has stepped onto the battlefield to fight a campaign that can only be won by him alone.

C: 那…那就……
E: Then... Then I'll...

C: 是我和迷迷一起。
E: WE are ready, Mem and me.

C: 或许，它也在默默等候后继者的到来。
E: Perhaps they're also quietly waiting for the arrival of their successor.

C: 说不好，这就是<color=#dbc291ff>「『我们』究竟为何物」</color>的答案呢。
E: For all we know, this could be the answer to the question, <color=#dbc291ff>"What exactly are we?"</color>

C: …当然，现在您是这边的一员了。请，为免隔墙有耳，我们换个地方继续。
E: ...But now that you're an ally of ours, we can continue talking somewhere else. As you know, these walls have ears.

C: 哦？我们今天的客人似乎有些过多了。
E: Oh? Well, I do believe that we might have a slight overabundance of guests today.

C: 那就让我们拭目以待吧。
E: We shall see, then.

C: 看来方才的智辩实属枯脑焦心哪…若翁法罗斯有来生，记得多加强身健体，也别再逃避人情酬应了。
E: So, the intellectual debate from earlier was too draining for you, huh... If Amphoreus gets a new lease on life, you should focus on strengthening your body and stop shirking social interactions.

C: 人家心里的一块大石头，总算能落地了…呼……
E: Phew. I feel like a huge burden has finally been lifted off my shoulders...

C: 那就去做吧，阿蝶！
E: Then go do it, Cas!

C: 这…还请阁下先过目，如果不喜欢，拒绝也不迟。
E: Then... Perhaps you can have a look at it first? You don't have to take it if you don't like it.

C: 她似乎在说：「对的，哦不对，对的对的，对的。」
E: She seems to be saying, "Right. Oh, no, yeah yeah, yes."

C: 既然你知道这是一件礼物，就请还给我吧。不要混在人群里千里传声了。
E: Since you know it's a gift for someone else, please give it back to me. Stop hiding among the people and letting the wind carry your voice.

C: 你说起话来眉飞色舞，仿佛稳操胜券。
E: You sound like you have all the confidence in the world.

C: 她付的是金银财宝，给生者。你呢，要付的是「死者」的部分。
E: Her payment was in gold and precious stones, which only covers the living passenger. You need to pay me as a member of the dead.

C: 我…可以把它们全都交给你。
E: I... I can give them all to you.

C: 逗逗你，别放在心上。
E: Aw, I was just teasing. Don't take it to heart.

C: 哈，只是为了给这趟旅程增加些仪式感，别太放在心上。
E: Hey, I'm just trying to make this journey feel more special, okay? Don't read too much into it.

C: 百夫长亲自嘱咐过，要把那个铭刻镶嵌在他的盾牌上。
E: The centurion personally instructed us to inlay the inscription into his shield.

C: 好心？这无论怎么看都……
E: Goodwill? I can't see anything good out of—

C: 即便是{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}，恐怕也无法接纳黑潮造物……
E: Even {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} wouldn't be able to accept black tide monsters into their realm...

C: 请退后…我来应对这些敌人。
E: Please stay back... Let me deal with these enemies.

C: 他回到了斯缇科西亚…但也只支撑了短短半日。而正是他的见闻，使我们决意集结。
E: Though he returned to Styxia... he only had enough left in him to last no more than half a day. However, it was his intel that convinced us to rally together.

C: 将赐人以死的重责转嫁到我身上。一旦我陷入对处刑的痴醉，他们便有了理由断绝黄金裔的征途。
E: They have shifted the heavy responsibility of granting death over to me. If I ever become obsessed with executing people, they will then have ample reason to terminate the Chrysos Heirs' journey.

C: 解释一下你的猜想？
E: What did you figure out?

C: 莫非，是在远处那座崩塌的塔楼里？
E: Could it be in that collapsed tower in the distance?

C: 所以，小小蝶，不要哭！请你，收下这个——
E: So, Little Cas, don't cry! Please accept this...

C: 还有，「墨涅塔的爱」……
E: And "Mnestia's Love"...

C: 嘻，看来我们可爱的蜗居公主已经下定决心了……
E: It seems our sweet Princess Homebody has made up her mind...

C: 呵…我也一直在思考同样的问题，孩子。但恐怕这个问题没有确切的答案。
E: Heh... I have pondered the same question, child. But I'm afraid there is no clear answer to it.

C: 太好了，我们出发吧。
E: Great, let's go.

C: 别留遗憾…
E: No regrets...

C: 嘿嘿，人家果然也适合当{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}祭司吧？
E: Heehee. Aren't I a good fit for {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}'s priest?

C: 待你们在心中下完了判断，再把目光投向她们吧——看看那你们以为冷漠的半神，是否还闪耀着人性的光；而那披着人皮恶语中伤的，又是否着了权欲的魔！
E: Make your judgment, then turn your gaze to the demigods whom so many of you regard as cold and merciless — do you not see the light of humanity in them? And those who wear the mask of humanity yet utter only hurtful, slanderous words — can you not see that their souls have been corrupted by power?

C: 最后，它们会变成无声的细雨，落向人间大地。同一颗灵魂将以不同的面貌轮回流转，直至世界尽头……
E: Eventually, they will descend to the mortal land as gentle rain. Every soul undergoes the perpetual cycle of reincarnation, albeit in varied forms, until the world meets its end...

C: 属于「死亡」的星座……
E: A constellation for Death...

C: 既然汝斗胆声明，吾等连同世界本身，皆凭他人记忆而生……
E: As you've so boldly stated, we and the world itself live on through the memories of others.

C: 也就是说，到我自证清白的时间了……
E: In other words, now is the time for me to prove my innocence...

C: 当然，前提是那些「角落」在星际和平通信的服务范围内。这是一项联名技术。
E: But of course, these "corners of the cosmos" must be within the coverage zone of Interastral Peace Communications. After all, this is collaborative technology.

C: 您的莅临在我计算之外，却也带来了惊喜。可惜未能做足准备，以符合您身份的礼节周到款待。
E: Your visit, although not part of my calculations, is a pleasant surprise. It's a pity that the preparations are not yet in place to receive you with the hospitality that someone of your status deserves.

C: 正在众人静候「纷争」的半神从试炼中诞生时，意外也发生了。开拓小队立即随万敌深入试炼，并救出了困于其中的白厄。正当众人松了一口气时，新的问题却随之而来。
E: While everyone is awaiting the demigod of Strife to emerge from the trial, something unexpected happens. The Trailblaze squad immediately follows Mydei into the trial and rescues Phainon, who is trapped inside. Just as everyone breathes a sigh of relief, a new problem arises.

C: 猜想已经形成，亟需落成定理，接下来只要向{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}求证即可。如此一来，我便能够解答{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的疑惑，夺回身体……
E: The conjecture has taken shape and must now be solidified into a theorem. Next, I only need to seek verification from {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}. By doing so, I can answer {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}' question and reclaim my body...

C: （哼，算了…我一人也足够。）
E: (Hmph. Doesn't matter... I can do this myself.)

C: 我对树庭还不够了解，方便问几个问题么？
E: There's still much I don't know about the Grove. Do you mind if I ask you a few questions?

C: 我也很在意…有什么研究，是连我这个讲师助理都不知情的？
E: That's what I'd like to know. What are these experiments he's involved in? Even I, the assistant lecturer, know next to nothing about them...

C: 根石之间，那刻夏老师的炼金实验室。
E: I'm talking about Anaxa's alchemy lab, hidden between the cornerstones.

C: 不必感到愧疚，这反而是个好消息。元老院的盟友并不忠诚，那刻夏的野心定能为我们所用。
E: No need for guilt, for this is good news to us. The Council of Elders has found themselves a traitorous ally. Anaxa's ambitious desires will be something we can exploit.

C: 无妨，我认得你。少主对你的勇猛赞不绝口。
E: That's fine. I recognize you. The young lord has nothing but good words about your courage.

C: 我会等你的。事关重大…{NICKNAME}阁下应该知道整个过程。
E: I will wait for you. This matter is of great consequence... and {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME} should hear the entire story from beginning to end.

C: （这些人的目光，跟刀子一样啊……）
E: (Wow, these people are shooting daggers with their eyes...)

C: 依吾所见，这尊雕像里封存的，或许是此子之「坚韧」。
E: I believe that his Tenacity is sealed within this statue.

C: 尽兴…？
E: Enjoying?

C: 别心急，我一直都记得你的问题。
E: Don't get antsy, I still remember the question you posed to me.

C: 聆听风堇的总结。
E: Listen to Hyacine's summary.

C: 但她曾那样炽烈地爱着世人……
E: Yet she once loved us with such fierce devotion...

C: 但这并非你的过失，塞涅俄丝。你唯一的错谬……
E: This isn't your fault, Seliose. Your only mistake...

C: 看啊，你们看到了吗？从我的伤口里渗出的是金色的血液！没错，我也是一名黄金裔…我和塞涅俄丝大人同为被神谕选中之人！
E: Look! Can you see it? Golden blood is spilling from my wounds! I am a Chrysos Heir too... chosen by the prophecy, just like Lady Seliose!

C: 我和先祖们卑弱的性命…都只悬于塞涅俄丝的一念之间……
E: My whole clan's fragile mortal life... was simply spared on Seliose's whim...

C: 欧洛尼斯——
E: Oronyx —

C: 如果你还能听到我的声音，塞涅俄丝大人——
E: If you can still hear my voice, Lady Seliose —

C: 誓言救世之人的力量…请你一定要好好见证！
E: Behold the strength of those who've pledged to save the world!

C: 天空的英雄，苏醒过来吧！
E: Hero of the sky, awaken!

C: 不过这都是小事！能把在心里憋了一千年的秘密一股脑都说出来，我现在可是痛快得很哪。
E: But that's beside the point! Getting to spill the secret I've been holding in for a thousand years feels amazing right now.

C: 汪，汪汪！来呀，扔到嘴边的骨头飞了，你不会这么轻易就放弃了吧？
E: Woof, woof! Come on. Come on, you're not gonna let a little setback like a lost bone stop you, are you?

C: 那只是为了以防万一，现在还没到……
E: That was just a precaution... It's not the time...

C: 「支撑世界的支柱。」
E: "Pillars of the world."

C: …降下温柔的虹光，守护尽可能多的生灵。
E: ...Cast down a gentle rainbow, protecting as many lives as I can.

C: 那边的大家伙——就是那个正在往外喷陨石的黑球——你觉得它和那「绝灭大君」有关吗？
E: That big guy over there — the black ball spewing meteors — you think it's got anything to do with the Lord Ravager?

C: 「遥远星辰的视线」…？
E: "The gaze of distant stars"...?

C: 但这一路走来，我们…他们，所有逝去的人，从未获得神谕应允的公正。
E: But along the way, we... they, all who passed, never once received the justice promised by the prophecy.

C: …不行不行，不能把气氛弄得这么沉重！
E: No. No! This shouldn't be so depressing!

C: …说得对，约好了要继续逐火之旅，可不能让小蝶担心呀。
E: ... You're right. We promised Cas that we'd continue the Flame-Chase Journey, so we can't let her worry.

C: 嗯…「难道盗火行者在这附近」？
E: Hmm... We thought that maybe the Flame Reaver was around here somewhere?

C: 况且咱们还得搭伙寻宝呢，对吧？闲话就说到这儿，该出发咯……
E: Besides, we still need to team up to go treasure hunting, right? Let's wrap up here. It's time to get going~

C: 正是。在翁法罗斯的十二位泰坦神明中，艾格勒是最为阴晴不定的一位。
E: Exactly. Of the Twelve Titans of Amphoreus, Aquila is known for being the most capricious.

C: 并不。但安提基色拉人对于机械一向敏感——刻法勒在捏造我族时赋予了得天独厚的优势，令我们极擅解构和学习。
E: Not exactly. But we Antikytherans are inherently sensitive to machinery. Kephale endowed our kind with a unique advantage for analyzing and learning.

C: 另外，当我询问你是否会出手的时候，我的意思是……
E: When I asked if you'd help, I meant...

C: 劲爽文学，你的最爱。
E: Invigorating literature, your favorite.

C: 哇…好精致！人家也好想拥有这样的牌呀。
E: Wow... it's so exquisite! I'd love to have a card like that.

C: 要战便战，少废话！
E: If it's a fight you want, let's get on with it — enough chit-chat!

C: 说说看吧，你们手里究竟藏着什么牌。但是，千万要小心组织语言，别说错话。
E: Alright, let's hear it — what are you hiding? But watch your language, and don't say anything you might regret.

C: 你这毛贼，礼数不多胆量不小，竟敢穿着这般凋敝的衣衫闯进我的织坊？
E: Little thief, you've got some nerve, barging into my shop dressed in those tattered rags!

C: 穿上它吧，赛法利娅，下次别再被抓住了。你姣好的容颜值得更为悉心的保护。
E: Put them on, Cifera, and don't get caught again. A face as lovely as yours deserves better protection.

C: 猫儿最讨厌沾水——这有什么不好理解的？
E: Cats hate getting wet. What's so hard to understand about that?

C: 真麻烦哪，明明宝贝就在眼前了……
E: This is so annoying. The treasure is right in front of us...

C: 赛法利娅——你是我交给这世界的一颗真心…也是它向我发起的一次挑战。
E: Cifera — you're an honest thing I've given to this world... and also a challenge the world has given to me.

C: 呵，真是不可教也。来世，让我好好教你该如何承担神职吧。
E: Ha, some things never change. In our next lives, I'll teach you how to truly embrace your divine duties.

C: 作为刻法勒神躯的一部分，它是真正的无价之宝，即便「金织」也无从染指它的珠光。
E: It's truly a priceless treasure, being a part of Kephale's divine body. Even I, the Goldweaver, cannot witness its glamour.

C: 我也有此意。树庭现在危机四伏，多一个人就多了一层保障。
E: I was thinking the same thing. The Grove is fraught with danger right now, and an extra pair of hands translates to extra security.

C: 特克菈将军…和史料中记载的形象反差很大，是一位相当温柔的人呢。
E: General Ektra is... so different from how the records described her. She's quite a gentle person.

C: 不过…很遗憾，至今还没有哪位先祖能解读出这道预言的涵义。
E: But unfortunately, no ancestor has ever been able to truly decipher its meaning.

C: 虽为尼卡多利戳盲九十九目，仍独留一只眼睛，怒视那领受它赐福、却举戈相向的晨昏后嗣。
E: Though struck blind in ninety-nine eyes by Nikador, they kept one eye, glaring at the children of twilight who received divine blessing yet turned their weapons against the gods.

C: 愿你们都能平安归来，阁下。
E: I hope you all return safely, my lord.

C: 假如翁法罗斯与天外的隔绝的确是{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}降下的诅咒，那今天过后，你们就能重返家园了。
E: If the curse separating Amphoreus from the world beyond the sky is truly {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}'s doing, then you'll be able to return home after their fall.

C: 换言之，她和泰坦融为了一体…换做以前，我会把它当作天方夜谭。但有了那刻夏老师的先例，也不足为奇了。
E: In other words, she became one with the Titan... I would have considered it a fairytale, but after seeing what happened with Professor Anaxa? Not anymore.

C: 啊——风堇，莫非它是传说里的……
E: Ahhh! Hyacine, could it be the legendary...

C: 需要手下留情吗？
E: Do we need to show mercy?

C: 艾格勒的印记…飞走了？
E: Aquila's mark... flew away?

C: 「变幻吧，『天象画壁』。」
E: "Change, Celestial Mural."

C: 这是…描绘哪位泰坦的画像？
E: Which Titan is this?

C: 哪怕经历了背叛和驱逐，她依然愿意为族人踏上弑神的征途。
E: Despite experiencing betrayal and exile at the hands of her own people, she was still willing to set out on the path to slay the gods for them.

C: 我们已经修改了两处画壁的天象，它还能去往哪里？
E: We've already changed two scenes on the Mural. Where else can they go?

C: 追忆…显形！
E: Recollection... Reveal!

C: 抱歉，小家伙…希望此后我们还有时间一起聊天。
E: Sorry, little one... I hope we still have time to talk later.

C: 那会是个残酷的真相，注定动摇你的信念。你准备好面对它了吗，风堇姑娘？
E: It will be a harsh truth, one that is bound to shake your beliefs. Are you ready to face it, Miss Hyacine?

C: 风堇姑娘…方才，你如何确信自己能让索拉比斯挣脱痛苦？
E: Miss Hyacine... How were you so certain that you could free Solabis from suffering?

C: 这片黑暗…它的力量恐怕凌驾于泰坦的权能之上。
E: This darkness... Its power probably surpasses that of the Titans.

C: 天父刻法勒，原谅那些无知又卑微的人子吧……
E: O Sky Father Kephale, please forgive these ignorant and lowly children of humanity...

C: …成功了。
E: ...It worked.

C: …我明白了。
E: ...I understand.

C: 我们…绝不可能在这里倒下！
E: We... will not fall here!

C: 就是捍卫一切行将飘逝的希望。
E: ...is defend all the hopes that are on the verge of fading away.

C: 我以为你会在创世涡心等我。你还好吗？
E: I thought you'd be waiting at the Vortex of Genesis. Are you all right?

C: 记好咯——拯救了翁法罗斯的，不是刻法勒那个呆子的恩泽，也不是欧洛尼斯那个娃娃的呓语……
E: Remember this well... What saved Amphoreus wasn't the grace of that simpleton Kephale, nor was it the babbling of that child Oronyx...

C: 输送平台的路径被碎石阻断了……
E: The transport platform's route is blocked by rubble...

C: 去见证「再创世」吧。
E: Time to see the Era Nova begin.

C: …再引入第一缕烈阳的光芒。
E: ...Then usher in the first ray of blazing sunlight.

C: 众神啊，看哪！翁法罗斯已完成了她的胜利，再创世即将到来——
E: Behold, O gods! Amphoreus has achieved her victory, and the Era Nova approaches—

C: 最壮丽的诡计也在他的呼吸与言辞里显形——
E: The greatest of schemes reveal against his breath and words—

C: <color=#dbc291ff>走下去…背负这个世界…直到…灰白的英雄…无名的救世主…带来黎明……</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Continue onward... bearing this world upon your shoulders... until the ashen hero... the nameless Deliverer ushers in the dawn...</color>

C: 能被迷境的妖精认可，算是我们童年的最高荣誉了。
E: Getting approved by the Maze's fairies was like our childhood badge of honor.

C: 嗯，我也很好奇呢。不如……
E: Mmm, I wonder too. Perhaps...

C: 我的内心……
E: My heart...

C: 一枚戒指？恐怕不是普通的饰品吧。说说看，这小东西背后有什么故事？
E: A ring? Not just any ornament, I'd wager. What's the story behind this little treasure?

C: ——得寸进尺，真以为我会对你滔滔不绝？
E: Don't push your luck. Think I'd pour my heart out to you?

C: 坚定的决心…
E: A heart of steel...

C: 有意思。好啊——若你能凭这一张纸牌胜过我，今后，我就用这三个字来称呼你！
E: Interesting. Very well — if you can beat me with this card, then that's what I'll call you from now on!

C: 来吧，您的席位已经备好，敬请落座：十三次心跳后——
E: Come, come, your seat awaits. After thirteen heartbeats—

C: 所以，这是我们看{RUBY_B#奥赫玛}她{RUBY_E#}的最后一眼了。
E: So... this is the last time we'll see {RUBY_B#Okhema}her{RUBY_E#}.

C: 现在，泰坦已然揭示了命运的入口，敬请阁下踏入其中，一睹为快。
E: The Titan has revealed the gateway of fate. Please, accept the invitation to step across the threshold, and behold!

C: 我也想和你们一起玩！
E: I wanna play with you guys too!

C: 第两千三百五十七万次轮回…这一次，我感受到了，在早已被挖空的胸腔内，升起了一簇不同于救世执念的火苗……
E: In the twenty-three million five hundred seventy-thousandth cycle... This time, I felt it: a tiny spark rising in the hollow cavity of my chest, different from the obsession with Deliverance...

C: 翁法罗斯已经等待了这一刻太久。在空虚、冰冷而孤独的演算尽头——「毁灭」抵达了终点。
E: Amphoreus has waited for this moment for too long. At the end of the empty, cold, and lonely extrapolations — the Destruction has reached its final destination.

C: 在那「记忆」中，你一定会再次遇见我。那个一无所知的小昔涟会躺在软软的草堆上，吹着轻快的风，憧憬着远方的世界。
E: In that "memory," you will definitely meet me again. The little Cyrene who knew nothing, lying on a soft patch of grass, feeling the light breeze, dreaming of the distant world.

C: 而我会继续走下去。即便前路是一片黑暗，我也会燃烧自我将其照亮。
E: And I will keep going. Even if the road ahead is dark, I will burn myself to light the way.

C: 为什么？
E: Why?

C: 当然。最初踏上逐火之旅时，缇宝老师怎么也教不会我的<color=#dbc291ff>欧洛尼斯神迹</color>……
E: Of course. When I first set out on the Flame-Chase Journey, Lady Tribbie never managed to teach me <color=#dbc291ff>Oronyx's Miracle</color>...

C: 它的离席，已经不会在我心中掀起波澜了。
E: Their departure no longer stirs anything in my heart.

C: …这姿态真是丑陋啊，「救世主」。
E: ...You don't look so good, Deliverer.

C: 无需再去追逐什么，如今，我已是长夜尽头的烈火……
E: No more chasing is needed. And now, I am the fire at the end of the long night.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>我会燃烧…会燃尽。我会成为这一世的盗火行者，履行和昔涟的约定。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>I will burn... and fade away. I will become the Flame Reaver of this life and keep my promise to Cyrene.</color>

C: 桀桀桀！猫耳小贼，快逃，去找阿格莱雅……
E: Heh, heh, heh! Cat-eared thief, run! Go find Aglaea...

C: 谁…是谁？！
E: Who's... who's there!?

C: 我们…十分焦急。因为你被抹去的记忆…对于忆庭，无比重要。
E: The situation is... dire. Your lost memories... they're crucial to the Garden of Recollection.

C: 找到你的过去，然后醒来…和我们一起旅行。
E: Find your past, wake up... and travel with us again.

C: 人家说的是识刻锚。智械朋友不是说过吗：「必要时，它能成为内外沟通的桥梁」。
E: I'm talking about the Chronocognitive Anchor. Didn't that Intellitron friend say "When required, it can also serve as a bridge for communications between the internal and external world"?

C: 在「昔涟」的记忆里，她把这个房间当作秘密基地。没人发现她在这里偷偷练习欧洛尼斯祷言，或者试着和神明对话。
E: Back in "Cyrene's" memories, this room was her secret base. No one noticed her practicing Oronyx's Prayer here or trying to speak with the gods in secret.

C: 世界外部的情况如何？
E: How are things outside this world?
You feel ██████████

C: 断锋爵，将这人的骨灰收起来，撒到神殿和人群中去。
E: Dux Fragoris, take the ashes of this man and scatter them in the Temple among the crowds.

C: …这身行头可配不上「救世主」的名号。呵，看来得尽快为你们准备一身礼服了。
E: ...These rags on you are not worthy of the title of "Deliverer." I must prepare some proper attire for you.

C: 阿格莱雅，好久不见。
E: It's been a while, Aglaea.

C: 所以，千万不要有负担，请放松放松再放松。
E: So, please don't worry. Feel free to relax and relax some more.

C: 正是欧洛尼斯告诉人类，「天外的救世主」会降临在翁法罗斯。
E: It was Oronyx who told mankind that the Deliverer from beyond the sky would descend upon Amphoreus.

C: 不要难过…让*我们*唱首童谣吧！阿雅乖乖，把心门开开……
E: Please don't worry... We'll sing you a lullaby! Little Agy be a good girl and open your heart...

C: 「曳石爵」阿波罗尼与「吟风爵」维吉妮娅，他们是逐火军的参谋与史官，一人为凯撒出谋献计，一人将她的无上功绩书作诗篇。
E: "Dux Helkolithist" Apollonius and "Dux Carminum" Verginia serve as the army's advisor and historian, respectfully. One offers advice and counsel to the Imperator while the other writes verses of her supreme glory.

C: 愿您的征途踏尽漫天繁星，凯撒大人。
E: May your journey reach that sky full of stars, Great Imperator.

C: 见笑了。每次同盟会议结束后，城中难免有些虫豸坐不住。
E: My apologies. After every Alliance Meeting, there are always some pests in the city who get restless.

C: …罢了。虽然流言的影响可以降低，但凯撒大人雷厉风行，以近乎威胁的方式收拢兵权，已是不争的事实。
E: ...Never mind. While the influence of rumors can be minimized, the fact remains that the Great Imperator did swiftly consolidate military power in an almost threatening way. It's undeniable.

C: 很久很久以前，我曾在海中栖居。在那无光的海底，文明目不能及的地方，大鱼每刻都在吞食小鱼的生命，而在大鱼死后，它又会成为新生儿的食粮，滋养整片海洋。
E: Long, long ago, I lived in the sea. In that lightless abyss, far beyond civilization's reach, the great fish consumed the small, and when the great fish perished, their bodies became sustenance for the newborn, nourishing the whole ocean.

C: 阿格莱雅的眼睛……
E: Aglaea's eyes...

C: 对了，灵水盆。虽然刻律德菈说创世涡心已被封锁，但说不定…？
E: Oh right, the spirit basin. Even though Cerydra said the Vortex of Genesis was sealed off, perhaps...

C: 敬逐火之旅！
E: To the Flame-Chase Journey!

C: 凯撒？何时出现的…
E: The Imperator!? When did she...

C: 你胆敢将我与「失败」二字放在同一句话里？
E: You dare mention my name alongside the word "lost"?

C: 这是…什么意思？
E: What does she mean...?

C: 审判之时已至。{NICKNAME}阁下，我为您建设的监牢已经竣工……
E: The time of judgment is nigh. My {M#lord}{F#lady} {NICKNAME}, the prison I have built for you is now complete...

C: 那你可得活着回来啊！
E: Then you've got to come back alive!

C: 实则不然。<color=#dbc291ff>我竭心尽力促成铁墓的诞生，只为纠正「智识」这一由人亲手造就的错谬。</color>
E: I am certainly not. <color=#dbc291ff>I have tried so hard to ensure Irontomb's birth, just so that I can correct the error named "Erudition" that humanity crafted with their own hands.</color>

C: 来吧…离开{RUBY_B#理性}逻各斯{RUBY_E#}的监牢……
E: Come... Leave the cage of {RUBY_B#reason}logos{RUBY_E#}...

C: <size=28>嘿！本姑娘哐哐给你两拳，看你想不想得起来！</size>
E: <size=28>Hey, are you sure? Maybe a couple of punches will help to jog your memory?</size>

C: 我相信三月…哪怕她变了模样。
E: I trust in March... even if she no longer looks the same.

C: 我就是从悬锋城回来的，只是比消息快了一步。
E: I just came back from Castrum Kremnos, only a step ahead of the news.

C: 「毁灭」的意义。
E: The meaning of "Destruction."

C: 我曾以为，我能将黑潮一饮而尽。但再深邃的酒杯也终会满溢，我已无法容纳更多泥泞。
E: I once believed I could drink the black tide dry, but even the deepest chalice must one day overflow... and I can hold no more of this filth.

C: 在那深海，我从不知晓「火」的存在。而当我踏上岸，第一次瞥见的光…便是金血点燃的战火。
E: In the deep sea, I never knew what "fire" was. But when I set foot on land, the first light that I saw was the flames of war lit with golden blood.

C: …就是她最忠诚的剑旗。
E: ...was her most loyal Gladius.

C: 爱浸没在死中…多么可口……
E: Love steeped in death... how delicious...

C: 翁法罗斯的凯撒或许冷酷，或许暴戾，但决不虚伪。当我说出「生命亦是微不足惜的代价」——
E: The Imperator of Amphoreus may be ruthless and cruel, but never a hypocrite. When I say "life itself holds little value."

C: 我很期待。不过，你的使命也差不多该结束了吧——
E: Please. Do surprise me. But I'd say, your mission is nearly done here, isn't it?

C: ——最终皆无意义。
E: It is all utterly meaningless.

C: 见你的第一眼我就知道，虽然不知道发生了什么，但现在的你——是一道记忆的「模因」。
E: I'm not sure how this happened, but I knew it as soon as I saw you. You are currently a "memetic entity" of the Remembrance.

C: 所以，我们原本也没打算这么做哦？
E: So that's why we never wanted to do that in the first place!

C: 可曾见过大海的面貌？
E: Was there ever a memory of the ocean?

C: 去吧。告诉指挥官们，若没收到凯撒亲笔手谕，绝不得擅自发起进攻，否则格杀勿论。
E: Tell the commanding officers not to launch any attacks unless they receive the Imperator's handwritten approval. Disobedience will be punished by death.

C: 「但，不知为何，在我搁笔沉思之际，一段记忆悄然闯入了脑海。」
E: "However, for some reason, a memory suddenly entered my mind just as I was about to put down my pen."

C: 但无论深海或大地，我或者你，两位无从逃离洞穴的囚徒……
E: But, whether under the ocean or on land, we two prisoners who can never escape this cave...

C: 似乎…比印象里矮小些哪。
E: She seems... shorter than I remember.

C: 然后，就用这枚被「记忆」祝福的火种，回应他们的期许，开拓未来吧。
E: Then, with this Coreflame blessed by the Remembrance, respond to their hopes and blaze a trail to the future.

C: 要折磨一个安提基色拉人，我有一万种方法。而在{NICKNAME}经历的那段逐火之旅中，前世的我已经给出了最优解。
E: I have ten thousand ways to torture an Antikytheran, and in the Flame-Chase Journey that {NICKNAME} experienced, the previous me already discovered the optimal solution.

C: 轻轻敲门。
E: Knock gently.

C: 他们的投影，就在观景车厢帕！
E: Their projections are in the Parlor Car!

C: 但是，为什么？
E: But... why?

C: 哎呀，它也总是这么准时，从不迟到……
E: Aw. It's always so on time, never late at all...

C: 翁法罗斯至深的遗迹，埋葬「全世」过往的大墓……
E: The deepest ruin in Amphoreus, the great tomb where the pasts of "all worlds" are buried...

C: 漫无止境的等待，将由我们打破。
E: We will put an end to this endless waiting.

C: 果然，信息流汇入了中央的晶体。
E: As expected. The data stream flew into the crystal in the middle.

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>EleOs<unbreak>252</unbreak>，已下载。分支#2，开始归档。</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> EleOs<unbreak>252</unbreak>, downloaded. Branch #2, archiving.</color>

C: 在温热的黄金中，「浪漫」铸成了世人的长阶。如果她能亲眼见证黎明到来，该有多好呀。
E: Romance, in warm gold, forged the long staircase for humanity. How wonderful it would be if she could witness the dawn with her own eyes.

C: 虽然知道你是诚心诚意在夸我……
E: I know you mean that as a compliment...

C: 这…你什么时候拍的，储存卡不是满了么？
E: Huh... when did you take this? Wasn't the storage card full?

C: 兴许是照片捕捉到了一丝「岁月」的神力，给你重放了回忆中的幻听。
E: Perhaps the photo captured a trace of Time's divine power, which replayed echoes from your memories.

C: 你…你怎么也！再这样的话…眼泪…会止不住！
E: Y-you too?! If this keeps up... I... I won't be able to stop crying!

C: 喂喂喂！现在开始列车广播——
E: Hey hey hey! Incoming train broadcast—

C: 气色不错，{NICKNAME}。别担心，无论下一站去哪，我都会保护好你们。
E: You seem in good spirits, {NICKNAME}. Rest assured. Wherever our next stop is, I'll make sure you're all protected.

C: 变成这副样子后，人家也如鱼得水，更适应忆域了。
E: In this form, I'm way more suited for the Memory Zone. I'm totally in my element!

C: 「揭开记忆的帷幕——」
E: "Lift the curtain of memory—"

C: 真情流露？我都要潸然泪下了。
E: That was so sincere... I might actually tear up a little.

C: 她们在做什么？
E: What are they doing?

C: 要么帮我抵御孽物，要么就退回记忆的阴影里去，丹枫。
E: You can either help me deal with these abominations or return to the shadows of memory, Dan Feng.

C: 鳞渊境是你的家乡，对么？在{NICKNAME}的记忆中，我看见你们并肩而立。
E: Scalegorge Waterscape is your home, isn't it? In {NICKNAME}'s memories, I saw you two standing side-by-side.

C: 为了我们遥远的未来～♪年轻的光辉，照耀着银河宇宙～♪
E: For our distant future~♪ A young light~ Shining upon the cosmos~♪

C: 丹恒，好久不见…
E: Dan Heng, it's been a while...

C: 「你高兴什么？不相干的人越多，事情不是越麻烦？万一那帮开拓者先一步找到了<color=#dbc291ff>『记忆』的种子</color>……」
E: "What are you so happy for? Aren't things gonna get messier with more irrelevant people turning up? What if those Trailblazers find the <color=#dbc291ff>seed of Remembrance</color> before we do..."

C: 任何意图染指实验的变量都值得我关注。
E: Any variables that desire to influence the experiment deserve my attention.

C: …白厄，我回来了。
E: ...Phainon, I'm back.

C: 你…还记得我们。
E: You... still remember us.

C: 感谢赏脸，我还以为，您不打算搭理我这位老熟人了呢。
E: Thanks for the honor. And here I thought you weren't ever going to acknowledge your old friend.

C: 翁法罗斯的因果从穷观阵中消失了——在爻光将军看来，这一异象主何吉凶？
E: Amphoreus's karma has vanished from the Matrix of Prescience. What omen does General Yao Guang see in this anomaly?

C: 嗯？
E: Huh?

C: 「好久不见，我…回来啦？」
E: "Well, long time no see. Guess I'm... back?"

C: 「别再给翁法罗斯的世界观加怪东西啦！眼见为实，跟上神谕的指引，来黎明云崖吧——」
E: "Please don't add weird stuff to Amphoreus's lore! Just go see it with your own eyes. Follow the prophecy's guidance and come to Dawncloud."

C: 你说到了重点，螺丝。「赞达尔」的举动，证明了德谬歌存在；而「长夜月」的说辞，还有现状，都反映出它不存在……
E: And that's the key, Screwy. Zandar's actions prove the Demiurge exists. But what "Evernight" said and what we've actually seen all point to the opposite...

C: 三千万次轮回，我与「侵晨」交锋过不可数的日夜。若你了解那个男人，就会知道……
E: Across thirty million cycles, I've crossed blades with Dawnmaker countless times. If you knew that man, you'd understand...

C: 我乃天谴之矛，迈德漠斯。以我的一千道伤疤和一百条性命——
E: I am Mydeimos, the Lance of Fury. I trade a thousand scars and a hundred lives of mine...

C: 换取「毁灭」——在史诗中永恒的终结！
E: For the Destruction's eternal end!

C: 你的意思是……
E: You mean...

C: 呃。两位姑娘，长得还真像呀？
E: Uh. You two ladies... really look alike, huh?

C: 也许，「卡厄斯兰那」已经了却遗憾。
E: Perhaps Khaslana has found his peace.

C: 「他听见了世人的声音，只是，没有余力再做出热情的回应。」
E: "He heard the voices of the people, but could no longer respond with the same ardor."

C: 光的范围，变大了。
E: The light's spreading.

C: 那是希望的光芒。正如他汇集的愿望，变得越发贪婪。
E: That's the ray of hope. Just like the wishes he gathered, it's grown ever more insatiable.

C: 好奇怪，他好像有体温。很…温暖。
E: It's weird... He's warm. Like, really warm.

C: 不妨也用上听觉。
E: Why not listen as well?

C: 我不需要你的同情。
E: I don't need your pity.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>他的…「自我」。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>His... "sense of self."</color>

C: 「就算是神明，也不能忽视锻炼呀？」
E: "Even gods shouldn't skip exercise, you know?"

C: 银河联军已经完成布阵。别留后手，给我狠狠打！
E: The Cosmic Alliance has finished its deployment. Don't hold back. Give it everything you've got!

C: 倒也不必。只需安静沉睡，「识刻锚」自会将我们唤醒。
E: That won't be necessary. We can simply sleep, and the "Chronocognitive Anchor" will wake us up.

C: 没想到的是你。咱俩早就是新世界的一部分了，你是最后一个。
E: We've both become a part of the new world ages ago. You're the last, slowpoke.

C: 也是，「昔涟」的诞生之地。
E: Also... the place where "Cyrene" was born.

C: 我可是列车长。很奇怪么？
E: What's the big deal? Pom-Pom's the conductor, after all.

C: 「做好最坏的打算——你会消失在忆域中，连一行数字都不会留下。」
E: "Then you must be prepared for the worst. You will disappear in the Memory Zone, utterly gone, without even a single line of data to remember you by."

C: <color=#b9effff>你我曾是不是神明人子因罪行祝福降临陨落凡间经你我之手写下抹去的诗将是曾是你我在善见天的记忆忘却。</color>
E: <color=#b9effff>you/i were/weren't once progeny of deities cast/fallen to the mortal realm for blessings/sins the verses written/erased by your/my hands were/shall be your/my remembrance/oblivion in the eden of blessed insight.</color>

C: 就将三千万世的记忆凝聚到我们身上，让权杖得出它被篡改以前的答案吧？
E: Let thirty million cycles of memories be condensed upon us, and let the Scepter reach the answer it had before it was distorted.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>▀▄毁灭▄▀</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>▀▄Destruction▄▀</color>

C: 但你的果实是以鲜血浇灌而成——
E: But your harvest was watered in blood—

C: （狠狠掐一下自己）
E: (Pinches self hard)

C: 交给我们吧，昔涟。你们的故事，会被许多世界传唱。
E: Leave it to us, Cyrene. Your story will be sung across many worlds.

C: 嘘，你们听——
E: Shh, listen...

C: 尽情表演吧，阿那克萨戈拉斯。这一次，你不用担心被打断了。
E: Take it away with your performance, Anaxagoras. This time, you won't have to worry about being interrupted.

C: 孩子们的心性，缇里西庇俄丝女士肯定最了解啦~
E: When it comes to understanding children's hearts, Lady Tribios definitely knows best...

C: 一人走向未来。
E: One will walk toward the future.

C: 是呀，将这组数字旋转<unbreak>180</unbreak>°，就能看见美丽的永恒，我们所相信的……
E: That's right. Turn these numbers upside down, and you'll see a beautiful eternity, something we believe in...

C: 至此，「记忆」的旅途就抵达终点啦。
E: Now the journey through "memory" has reached its end.

C: 阿格莱雅；迈德漠斯；遐蝶；赛法利娅……
E: Aglaea. Mydeimos. Castorice. Cifera...

C: >>>订正：PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>的记录#496，已归档。
E: >>> Correction: PhiLia<unbreak>093</unbreak>'s Record #496. Archived.

C: >>>桃子的记录#……
E: >>> Peach's Record #...

C: 总是惴惴不安，尽力翻找不一样的「记忆」，希望能为一成不变的命运带来改变，找到这座迷宫的出口。
E: "I" was so anxious, trying to find as many different "memories" as possible, hoping to bring some change to this unchanging destiny and find the way out of this maze.

C: 「这扇门背后会是什么呢？闪闪发光的水晶，还是一个我从未见过的美丽世界？」
E: "What could be behind this door? Glittering crystals? Or a beautiful world I've never seen before?"

C: 呀。人家懂了，难道这就是…「空白」！
E: Ah. I got it. Is this... "blank space"!?

C: 我希望，把它变成我们一起写下的故事。
E: I hope to turn it into a story we write together.

C: 我想，花朵碎裂的那天，小妖精会看见，空荡荡的地面什么也没有。
E: I'm thinking that... when the flower broke, the little fairy would instead see nothing on the ground.

C: 然后它就会明白，<color=#dbc291ff>原来「无瑕」的水晶花，既没有「心」，也不懂「爱」。</color>
E: Then it would understand that <color=#dbc291ff>the "flawless" crystal flower doesn't actually have a "heart," nor does the flower understand what "love" is.</color>

C: 很简单呀。如果它对小妖精敞开心扉，就会拥抱对方的杂质，变得不再「无瑕」。
E: It's simple. If the flower lets the little fairy into its heart, then it would have to include the fairy's impurities, and would no longer be "flawless."

C: <color=#dbc291ff>然后小妖精会看见，地上的每一枚碎片，都映出自己的双眼。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Then, the little fairy will see that each shard on the ground holds the reflection of their eyes.</color>

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>>格式化进程：<unbreak>23.815%</unbreak>……</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>>>> Formatting progress: <unbreak>23.815%</unbreak>...</color>

C: 如果「心」与「身」合一…
E: If "mind" and "body" become one...

C: 我要求，立刻召开俱乐部会议——用最宏观的思想，服务最宏伟的事业！
E: I request a Society meeting to be held immediately! We shall serve the grandest cause with the most macroscopic ideas!

C: 且不论成功率，小魔女…如果你能做到，然后呢？
E: Never mind the success rate, little witch... What's gonna happen if you succeed?

C: 尽管卡厄斯兰那如今已不存于世，但{NICKNAME}仍能触及他的一簇记忆。
E: Though Khaslana is no longer part of this world, {NICKNAME} can still reach a fragment of his memory.

C: ███████你我必已无数次相遇，在宇宙的起点与终点。如先至的{RUBY_B#边星贸易战争、第一次帝皇战争、「帝皇」陨落、列神之战}第一、第二、第三、第四时刻{RUBY_E#}必已来临███████
E: ███████ You and I must have met countless times, at the beginning and end of the universe. Just like the preceding {RUBY_B#Borderstar Trade War, The First Emperor's War, The Fall of the Emperor, War Among the Aeons}First, Second, Third, Fourth Instants{RUBY_E#}, must surely have arrived ███

C: 好啊，要是顺路的话就去玩一下吧～目标地点在哪儿？
E: Fine, I guess we can swing by and play with it if it's not too far. What's our destination?

C: 成功了…我终于成功了！终于为阿尔弗雷德报了仇！
E: I did it! I finally did it! I finally avenged Alfred!

C: 你可别输不起啊。
E: Don't be a sore loser.

C: 事已至此，我也只能陪你们玩玩了——
E: Well, I guess I'll have to sort you out.

C: 难得出来一次，就应该抓紧浪费时间！
E: It's not often you get the chance to waste time like this. Enjoy it while you can!

C: 什么天价报酬…我怎么不记得我答应过？
E: What a big reward... I don't remember making such a promise.

C: 我想要点别的。
E: I want something else.

C: 来啰来啰，一大桶新鲜灌装的<color=#dbc291ff>「卡利白」</color>…就是这个味道！
E: Come on, a big bucket of fresh <color=#dbc291ff>Kapo-Kali</color>... That's the taste!

C: 绝对够意思的何塞•拉萨罗
E: Hosea Lazaro the Terrific

C: 你们怎么不下去？
E: Why don't you go down there?

C: 要眼里能放出十万伏特的微笑电力，能把人家都电晕的那种笑容哦～
E: Make sure you capture her electrifying smile — the one that stuns people into a trance — that million-volt smile~

C: 你是为了站长中饱私囊的事来的？没想到你这么八卦…居然还追了过来。
E: So you're here about the lead researcher's corruption? Anything for a good story, huh?

C: （她说的…好像是个<color=#dbc291ff>戴黑框眼镜的斜刘海</color>小伙吧。）
E: (She said... a young man with <color=#dbc291ff>black-rimmed glasses and a slanted fringe</color>.)

C: 在嘘实埋间的僻静终点，寂寞蒙尘的地面上，发现了黯然闪烁的卡片。
E: On the dusty floor of the room at a quiet corner of the Disposal Site, a card can be seen glimmering faintly.

C: 你这白毛倒是不错，看来和我一样对于「潮流发型」颇具心得。
E: Your silver hair is not bad either. It seems you and I have similar tastes in hairstyle.

C: 莉莉，我的莉莉…
E: Ley, oh, my Ley...

C: 不。她答应了洛奇的表白。
E: No, she said yes.

C: 所以你想告诉他真相。但请你告诉我，他又能做什么？
E: If you want to tell him the truth, then tell me — what can he do?

C: 要把精力放在研究上，毕竟个别人…的认同不重要，重要的是同事们的认可。
E: I should shift my focus back to my research. After all, some people's recognition... doesn't matter. Recognition from my colleagues is what matters.

C: 也罢…要是我伯纳德的徒弟一点血性也没有，那才是丢尽了我的脸。
E: Fine... I would be ashamed if my student is a cold-blooded lizard.

C: 放心交给我吧。
E: Don't worry. Just leave it to me.

C: 年轻人，你回来了，嘘，不必多说。让我闭上眼，「检阅」你的工作。
E: {F#Young lady}{M#Young man}, you're back. Let me concentrate and inspect your work.

C: 我也应该反思自己，是否也和众人一样，陷入了对「智识」的路径依赖，忽略了简单有效的身体力行。
E: I should also reflect on whether I, like so many others, have fallen into the trap of overreliance on Erudition and disregarding the much simpler and perhaps more effective methods.

C: 录像带？
E: Videotapes?

C: 对了，你那里还存着希拉的录像带吧？是时候把它们归还到应去的地方。
E: By the way, you still have Sheila's videos there? It's time to return them to their rightful place.

C: （这位好像就是克里斯，先观察下他的行为举动好了。）
E: (I think this is Chris. Let me observe his behavior.)

C: 这就要从你的英雄事迹与特殊身份说起了。
E: Let me start with your heroic deeds and your special identity.

C: 军团虽已退走，异变仍在发生。空间站多处区域出现了裂界化的征兆，为此在艾丝妲的远程支援下，你深入现场展开了对未知危机的调查。
E: The Legion has retreated, but the mutation hasn't stopped. There are signs of Fragmentum in multiple areas. With remote support from Asta, you go deep into the field to investigate the unknown crisis.

C: 不不，你想啊，我作为代理站长，要是当着这么多科员的面调查阿兰的行踪。
E: Y—Yes! Think about it — if people see me, the acting lead researcher, searching for Arlan...

C: 看到那些个围在他身边的粉丝，你还不明白么？
E: Look at all his fans! Need I say more?

C: （可不能让他就这么溜了，如果他实在不肯说的话，那就——）
E: (I can't let him get away like this. If he doesn't want to tell me, then...)

C: 你被波少粉丝后援会团团包围，被迫接受了漫长的思想教育，逐渐忘记了过来问询的原本目的……
E: You've been surrounded by the Master Capote Fan Club and listened to a frustratingly long lecture, thus gradually forgetting what you're going to ask...

C: 你闭着眼来感受，毕竟你这个是从心的修行嘛！听我指挥，再来一次……
E: Close your eyes and feel the trail of the heart! Follow me, try once again...

C: 啊？什么！原来阿兰来找我一起执行任务，是为了体验压力啊！
E: Huh? Arlan wanted to go on assignments just to experience stress!?

C: 小姐，虽然我很…很感动。但是……
E: My Lady, I... I'm very touched, but...

C: 不要随便翻没有名字的笔记！
E: Don't just read any anonymous journal!

C: 呵呵，不愧是拯救空间站的英雄。胆子真大！
E: Huh. Of course, you are not scared easily. You're the BIG hero of the space station, after all.

C: 照片上的诡影？那、那是什么？从来没听说过，你们怕不是找错人了。
E: Photoed spectral things? Wh—What are those? I've never heard of it. I think you got the wrong person.

C: 才开始就说漏嘴了，唉……
E: Spilling the beans right from the start... *sigh*

C: 是可出其右。教你很多遍了，心脏在的地方才是左边。
E: You mean outachieve. I told you many times, outsmart is about cunning. I am all about work and intellect.

C: 一路战斗打得很痛快。
E: That was a pretty satisfying fight.

C: 有一点我很好奇，呜呜伯为什么要搜集荣仓终科员的所有物？
E: I'm curious. Why do the Wubbaboos want Researcher Eikura Shuu's belongings?

C: 荣仓终这个名字，我好像有点印象……
E: The name, Eikura Shuu... it feels somehow familiar...

C: 也许他已经改换课题，重振旗鼓。
E: Maybe he had already changed his research interests and gained a renewed passion.

C: 我们过去看看吧。
E: Let's have a look.

C: 这么做未免也太粗暴了。让我想想…嗯，有了。
E: That's a bit too heavy-handed. Lemme think... Oh, I've got an idea.

C: 时间拖得再久，无非也是沉溺在伤感中。让我想想…嗯，有了。
E: Shying away from this simply won't do any good to lessen their sorrow. Lemme think... Oh, I've got an idea.

C: 黑塔女士应该在自己的办公室里，请走这边，我为你带路。
E: Madam Herta should be in her office. I'll take you there. Right this way.

C: 哦，我懂了，这是一个电子涂鸦，倒是挺符合朋克洛德给人的印象。如果我没猜错，这应该是某种自动加密。
E: O—Oh, I see. This is digital graffiti that appears to represent Punklordian symbols. If I'm not mistaken, this should be some kind of automatic encryption.

C: 啊？你不会把我忘了吧…《太空大战争》，还记得吗？
E: Huh? You don't remember me...? Cosmic Warfare, remember?

C: 我感觉是这事优先级比较低，空间站的待办事项都堆到天上去了。
E: This wouldn't have been a high-priority issue. The space station's to-do list is ridiculously long at this point.

C: 放轻松，朋友，我伦纳德做这个很熟练的，你看这个协议——
E: Relax, friend. I've done this a million times. Look at this agreement...

C: 我听说在朋克洛德有一种传统，那儿的骇客在入侵时，都喜欢故意留下点什么，等待着被人发现——就像是一封挑战书。
E: I heard from a friend that the hackers on Punklorde have a tradition. When they hack, they purposely leave something behind for people to discover — kind of like throwing down the gauntlet.

C: 不是你的错。
E: It's not your fault.

C: 总之，我会为你加油的！
E: Anyway, I'll be cheering for you!

C: 那是通讯模组在正常运作——黑塔常说这是项华而不实的功能，为了提升算力，她通常会将其关闭。
E: That's the communication module doing its job — Herta often speaks of it as an expensive and impractical function. She often shuts it off to increase calculating power.

C: {NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，请站在原地，让我试着利用一下这份记录吧——
E: {F#Young madam}{M#Young sir}, please stay still. Allow me to see what I can do with this record...

C: 「错了，这是个诱饵信号。」
E: "Hmm, not what we're looking for. It's a bait signal."

C: 星核猎手「银狼」，我们曾有过一段交锋，当时黑塔也在场——她或许向你提起过此事。
E: Stellaron Hunter, Silver Wolf. We've fought against one another before. Herta was there as well — she may have mentioned it to you.

C: 在我看来，那并不算胜利。
E: From my point of view, it wasn't a victory.

C: 「除非，有一位合适的向导。」
E: "Unless she had someone to guide her there."

C: 「哈，要不要先和边上这位解释下发生了什么，我看{F#她}{M#他}已经满头问号了哦？」
E: "Ha, you wanna explain it to {F#her}{M#him} first? I can see the confusion in {F#her}{M#his} eyes."

C: 哦，一份复制品，是在刚才的对话过程中完成的？
E: Oh, a copy. You completed it while we were talking just now?

C: 这算什么，你们花这么大力气布置了一个陷阱，却什么也不打算做？
E: What is the point of this then? You guys went out of your way to put together this trap but don't plan on doing anything at all?

C: 啊…是的。我拿上一版方案参加了评审，得到了不少反馈，有正面的，也有负面的。
E: Ah, yes. I submitted the last edition to the board and received feedback. Some good, some constructive.

C: 维修科一共就那么点人，还要照顾整个空间站，忙死了。
E: There are only a few of us in the Maintenance Department to maintain the entire space station. We've really got a lot on our plate.

C: 我们现在需要…唔，这个可能会有点用！可移动列车清洁机——原本是帕姆备用来做这次列车大扫除，用来擦列车顶的工具！
E: We'll need... Hmm, this mobile Express cleaner should come in handy! I was planning to use it to sweep the Express's ceiling during spring-cleaning!

C: 原来如此。他有这种想法，我毫不惊讶…不得不承认，我看到类似的行为，偶尔会想起年轻时的自己；出于理性，我并不认可这种作法。但…{NICKNAME}，你又如何看待？
E: I see... Based on our dealings with him so far, I can't say I'm overly surprised. Sounds like the kind of plan a younger me might have come up with... but that doesn't mean I approve of it. How do you see things, {NICKNAME}?

C: 我很感谢，但你无需勉强。
E: I appreciate that, but it would be best for you to remain on the Express.

C: 这么漂亮的星空……
E: ...And the starry sky...

C: 「纯美」的形态各异、变化万千，每个人心里的答案都不同…我很好奇，纯美骑士在银河中追寻的究竟是什么？
E: Beauty takes many forms, and different people have different answers... I wonder what exactly it is that the Knights of Beauty are pursuing through the cosmos.

C: 我…怎么会看到另一个我呀？
E: Why... Why did I see another me?

C: 维利特，我会护送你抵达终点；骑士会信守诺言。
E: Velite, I will escort you to your destination. A knight always keeps his word.

C: 本质上，这取决于你是否支持他对那份「幻觉」的执着。
E: It all depends on whether you support his dedication to that hallucination.

C: （黑塔…被袭击了？）
E: (Herta... was attacked?)

C: 是技术研发部。亚婆离女士是位能人，但手下尽是些门外汉，野心勃勃，充满热情，脑袋却一点没有——大小可以和原始人一较高下。
E: Ah, the Technology Department. Charming little place, isn't it? Madam Yabuli does possess some semblance of competence, but her subordinates? Oh, they're a riot — brimming with enthusiasm yet utterly devoid of intellect. It's as if evolution halted prematurely for them.

C: 科员的连续失踪？
E: Researchers' disappearances?

C: （询问失踪奇物的线索）
E: (Ask for clues about the lost Curio)

C: （一时不记得另一个人了，但其中一人是辛克尔。我记得她……）
E: (I can't recall the other person, but one of them was Hinkel. I remember her...)

C: 大哥别急，虽然我知道你很急。
E: Calm down, brother Arlan — I know you're upset.

C: 也行，看着啊，这几天我给你整点刺激的。大的要来了！
E: Sure thing. Anyway, keep your eyes peeled — I'll be bringing you something big soon!

C: 可黑塔的收藏多如繁星，很难想象她会对一件寻常奇物如此珍而重之。
E: Herta's collection — an endless trove of trinkets and baubles — and yet she singles out one nameless, ordinary Curio? It's hard for me to imagine she would treasure one Curio so much.

C: 关于这一点，{NICKNAME}想必也已知晓。
E: {NICKNAME} probably already knows about this.

C: 恐怕这就是阿德勒在调查中发现的真相。
E: I fear that is the truth Adler discovered.

C: 逻辑：是第三者救了他们。
E: Logic: A third party saved them.

C: 终于见到你了。
E: We finally meet.

C: 阮•梅让我回收泄漏的实验体。
E: Ruan Mei is asking for me to recover the leaked experimental specimens.

C: 你这个没心没肺的点心。
E: You heartless dessert.

C: 要尊称「芝士流心」大人！
E: You need to call it the honorable Molten Cheese Tart!

C: 黑塔把我和螺丝咕姆叫来空间站，为了商议些重要的议题。她还给斯蒂芬发了邀请，但他没回信，黑塔似乎不想再等了。
E: Herta called Screwllum and I to the space station to discuss some important topics. She also sent an invite to Stephen, but he didn't reply and Herta didn't seem to want to wait any longer.

C: 行，我同意。只要对研究有益，你想做什么都无妨。
E: Alright, I agree. As long as it helps you with your research, you can do whatever you want.

C: 我把自己的指令卡给你。把手给我，我为你将指纹录入其中。
E: I'm giving you my access card. Give me your hand, and I'll input your fingerprint into it.

C: 选择以下服务：一，访客记录查询。二，「培养皿」入口开启。
E: Select from the below services: 1. Check visitor records. 2. Open incubator entrance.

C: 「培养皿」入口开启。
E: Open incubator entrance.

C: 这些琐事也占不了我们太多时间，而星穹列车和黑塔空间站一直保持着良好的关系，能帮的还是尽量帮一下。
E: These trivial things really don't take up too much of our time. Plus, the Astral Express and the Herta Space Station have always maintained a good relationship. It makes sense that we help them as much as we can.

C: 你们不嫌麻烦吗？
E: Do you not find it irritating?

C: 等你准备好了再出发。你可以先熟悉一下这位「小助手」。
E: You can take some time to prepare before you head off. Why not get used to working with your "trusty assistant" first?

C: 伟大的科学组合确实需要一张供后人纪念的合照。
E: You're right. A great scientific team will require a photo to serve as a memento for future generations.

C: 等下，我裙子有点皱，我稍微整理下。
E: Wait a moment. My skirt is a little wrinkled. Let me fix it quickly.

C: 因为我的内存有限，也许有一天我会自动删除我的创造者的记录，所以想到了用照片的方式来保存。
E: As my internal memory is limited, there may come a day when I automatically delete the records of my creators. Therefore, I thought I could use a picture as a way of preserving them.

C: 这是我从没见过的作战方式，不，不对…你们不是我们的敌人。你们不是……
E: I have never seen this fighting style before... No, this is not right... You are not our enemies. You are...

C: 杜老板将调配好的「海的味道」倒入茶碗中。
E: Boss Du pours the "Taste of the Sea" he has brewed into your teacup.

C: 就是啊，连台备用的雪地车都没有——咱们的列车真抠门呀。
E: Me neither, if only we had a snowmobile... We never get to bring anything cool from the Express.

C: 据说很久以前，常有{RUBY_B#星际旅行者}天外异客{RUBY_E#}来到这里……但「寒潮」发生以后，就再没有人穿过雪幕，来到贝洛伯格……
E: It is said that a long time ago, {RUBY_B#Interstellar Travelers}strange visitors from beyond the sky{RUBY_E#} would visit us here... but that after the Eternal Freeze, the blizzards made passage impossible... and Belobog would cease to witness such arrivals.

C: {NICKNAME}，要不我们去问问姬子吧？没准她愿意跟咱们一起去呢！
E: {NICKNAME}, why don't we go ask Himeko to tag along? She might be up for an adventure!

C: {NICKNAME}，三月…欢迎你们回来。抱歉，我本打算盛情迎接两位，但那位自称「公司」使者的女士突然出现，打乱了我的思绪……
E: It's good to see you two again, welcome back to Belobog. I'd planned a special reception, but I had to deal with an unexpected guest — the lady you just witnessed. She claims to represent the IPC...

C: 哎呀，对了，自我介绍——我是三月七，是星穹列车的乘客…星穹列车你们应该听说过吧？旁边这位是咱的同伴{NICKNAME}，也是列车组的成员。
E: Oh, right, we should probably introduce ourselves. I'm March 7th, a passenger of the Astral Express — you may have heard of it? And this is my friend and fellow passenger — {NICKNAME}.

C: 喂，{NICKNAME}，快看！那不是托帕身边的扑满吗？好像是叫…「账账」，我没记错吧？
E: Hey, {NICKNAME}, check it out! Isn't that Topaz's little trotter over there? What was it again... Numby, right?

C: 你该问问布洛妮娅。
E: You're better off asking Bronya.

C: 我从朋友那里拿到了些数据：真正能在公司的技术扶持下重获生机的星球，数量占项目总数的<unbreak>63%</unbreak>。
E: According to the intel provided by my friend, the success rate for the ecological reconstruction of worlds using the IPC's technology is <unbreak>63%</unbreak>.

C: 关于本次事故，你需要向「钻石」额外提交一份报告。如果对于处罚有任何异议，你也可以通过书面方式进行申诉。
E: You will also need to submit an additional report regarding this incident to Diamond. If you have any objections to this penalty, you may also file an appeal in writing.

C: 噢…我猜跟之前那群乱来的黑衣人有关系，是吧？
E: Let me guess — something to do with these unruly people in black showing up everywhere?

C: 妈妈！我要吃！
E: Mom, can I get one, pleeeease!?

C: 嚯，那你就快回去吧，帮我谢谢娜塔莎医生的关心。
E: Hah, you should head on back then. Thank Dr. Natasha for her concern.

C: {NICKNAME}，我想让你再去见一位病人，她也是那「特效药」的受害者——我想让你看到滥用药物给患者带来的切实后果。
E: {NICKNAME}, I want you to go and visit another patient — a victim of the wonder medicine... I want you to see the real consequences of abusing that medicine.

C: …你不知道…她也不知道…大家都不知道……
E: ...You don't know... they don't know... nobody knows...

C: 我不能接受他们把死者的境遇单纯地归结为「不幸」或是「风险」，{NICKNAME}——没有一个称职的医生能接受这种事。
E: I cannot accept that their fate was simply the result of misfortune or risk, {NICKNAME}. No true doctor would accept that.

C: 接下来的一段时间，搏击俱乐部会为新赛季做充分准备。相关前期工作目前已在紧密筹备中，敬请期待！
E: Now the Fight Club will be preparing for the new season. Planning and preparation for the new season are already underway, please stay tuned!

C: <size=36>{NICKNAME}！{NICKNAME}！{NICKNAME}！</size>
E: <size=36>{NICKNAME}! {NICKNAME}! {NICKNAME}!</size>

C: 最近身上有不少事…
E: I have a lot going on lately...

C: {NICKNAME}，你看，经过「不世之材」修复的道路，进入三个房间联通的最深处……
E: {NICKNAME}, look, after passing through the road that was repaired with Unearthly Marvel, we entered the deepest part where the three rooms are connected...

C: 得找到走出去的办法才行…我到底是哪一步没走对呢？
E: I have to find a way to get out... Where on earth did I go wrong?

C: 不管了，多一双眼睛也不是坏事。我们试试看吧。
E: Anyway, one more pair of eyes might not be a bad thing. Let's try it out.

C: 不要再故作坚强了，佩拉小姐…
E: No need to put on a happy face, Miss Pela.

C: 谢谢你关心我，不过我没事——毕竟我可是银鬃铁卫的情报官。
E: Thank you for your concern, but I'm fine. I'm an intelligence officer of the Silvermane Guards, after all.

C: 多亏了那位医生留下的抗寒药，我们才能安心地在这雪原里扎营、巡视，不用担心自己会被冻成冰雕。
E: But thanks to the medicine the doctor leaves us, my soldiers are able to withstand the cold. They can make camps in the Snow Plains as footholds for our patrols... If it weren't for the doctor, we would have long since frozen to death.

C: 你看，这就是我提到的「麻烦」。
E: Here – this is the issue we're trying to deal with.

C: 咦？你们怎么还在这儿，不去调查吗？
E: Huh? You're still here? I thought you were off to investigate.

C: 可以的话，能拜托你去外面调查一圈吗？等你回来，我们再把碎片拼在一起——麻烦你了。
E: In the meantime, do you think you could head out and look for more clues? We can compare notes when you're done – I'm counting on you!

C: 我们只要收集一定数量，足够把它重新拼起来就行…咳，缺失的那部分零件和细节，我再找人补上就是了。
E: We just need enough parts to put it back together... Ahem, as for the rest, I'll have replacements made.

C: 这次又丢了什么？
E: What went missing this time?

C: 啊，不，你误会啦。
E: Oh, uh, that's not the issue...

C: 对，我们看法一致，这样做的效率最高。
E: Agreed — that'll be more efficient.

C: 但不知从哪天起，诺尔伯特突然不来参加茶会了，整个人仿佛人间蒸发了一般。我还记得他最后跟我说过的话，大概意思是……
E: And one day, Norbert suddenly stopped showing up to our tea parties. It was as though he disappeared into thin air. I still remember the last thing he said to me...

C: 他们说诺尔伯特公子最近的确经常在奇怪的时间点出门，每次被问到的时候总是支支吾吾地说自己要去商店街「踩点」。
E: They say that Mr. Norbert was indeed leaving at odd hours recently. Whenever someone would ask where he was headed, he'd mumble something about going to the shopping street to "inspect the site."

C: 克鲁斯帕家的诺尔伯特，还有在他旁边的家伙——转过来，面对我！把手放在我能看得见的地方！
E: Norbert of the Cusper family, and everyone else here — turn around and face me! Put your hands where I can see them!

C: …咳，这就是我来找你的原因，{NICKNAME}。
E: ...Ahem. That's what I wanted to discuss with you, {NICKNAME}.

C: 嗯？诺尔伯特，是你吗？
E: Hm? Norbert, is that you?

C: 辛苦你了，克拉拉。
E: Thanks, Clara.

C: 第一，要及时响应观众的疑问和诉求，帮助大家了解展馆和展品；第二，要爱护展区展品和其他公共财产，维护展馆整洁；第三……
E: Firstly, I should respond to the questions and needs of the visitors promptly and help everyone to understand the museum and the exhibits. Secondly, I should take care of the exhibits and other public properties, as well as maintain the cleanliness of the exhibition hall. Thirdly...

C: 嘿，你可真是越来越会做生意了！等博物馆这茬忙完，要不要考虑来姐姐我这里帮忙经营机械屋啊～
E: Hey, you're getting better at doing business! How about you help me manage this workshop after you get the museum thing over with?

C: 博物馆？好像听布洛妮娅说过这个…不会就是她派你来的吧？
E: Museum? Bronya seems to have mentioned that before... Did she send you here?

C: 可是布洛妮娅会伤心的啊。
E: But Bronya will be so sad about this.

C: …啊啊，真是的！算了算了，我就是见不得那家伙哭——这下你满意了吧？
E: ...Aah! Fine! I just can't take it when she cries! Are you happy now?

C: 我…我只是第一次以这种姿态和你对话，不知道该说什么好……
E: This... This is my first time speaking to you in this position, and I don't know what to say...

C: 先去找个安全的地方吧。
E: Go and find somewhere safe.

C: 现在的史瓦罗，算是据守炉心枢纽的一桩硬茬。很多流浪者在枢纽附近建立了营地，寻求史瓦罗的保护。
E: Now he guards the Furnace Core hub. Many vagrants have established bases in the vicinity, seeking Svarog's protection.

C: 也辛苦你们了。才刚到地下就解决了这么大的冲突，真不知道要怎么感谢你们才好。
E: The same to you and your friends. You've just arrived and already helped resolve such a sizable conflict. I don't know how to thank you.

C: 听他们刚才谈话的内容，似乎是出了什么故障。去亲自检查一下也无妨。
E: From what they were saying, it sounds like there's a fault. There's no harm in taking a look though.

C: 这、这是什么？！
E: What the heck!?

C: 哔嘟…不要垃圾箱！对对对，需要找东西的时候，呼唤查宝就对了。
E: Beep, beep, beep... Not a trashcan! Yes, yes, yes. When you need to find something you can't see, just call upon Findie. That's me.

C: 而且还不让其他人一起跟过去，好像是有什么危险的事…你得替我们去看看！
E: And she refused to let anyone go with her. I feel like she's doing something dangerous... You have to go check on her for us!

C: 可能是因为我常拿它寻找矿脉，结果被不怀好意的家伙盯上了吧？这么稀有的东西，被偷也是正常的……
E: I often carried it around looking for a fresh claim, perhaps some villains up to no good took notice. It's a rare device you know, no wonder somebody stole it...

C: 矿山冲突结束之后，「地火」把避难所的人都集合了起来。为了确定伤员情况，还清点过一次人数，<color=#dbc291ff>当时有四个人不在场</color>。
E: After the conflict in the mines, Wildfire gathered everyone at the shelter and took a headcount to check on the wounded. <color=#dbc291ff>Four people were not there.</color>

C: 没错，嫌疑人的范围一下就缩小了。
E: Indeed, now we can narrow down the scope of our search considerably.

C: 聪明人办聪明事，叔叔我啊，就喜欢跟聪明人做生意！
E: Smart decision. I love doing business with smart people!

C: 脑子。
E: Brains.

C: 喂，你怎么动摇了？我们再去找找证据，让他向虎克求饶吧！
E: Hey, you're not questioning yourself, are you? Let's look for evidence and let him beg me for mercy!

C: 这么快就回来了？怎么样，那两件矿具找到了吗？
E: Back so soon? How's it going? Did you find those two mining tools?

C: 可不敢，可不敢！再一再二不能再三，这点道理我可太懂了，嘿嘿。
E: I wouldn't dare no more! Fool you once, shame on you. Fool you twice... hehe... I won't do it again, I swear!

C: 无论如何，这次的危机应该就算告一段落了。你还好吗，{NICKNAME}？
E: Whatever the case, we've managed to avert a crisis. Are you okay, {NICKNAME}?

C: 好啊，那我先安装炉具好了。如果觉得拿不准，随时来问我哦。
E: Okay, then I'll go set up the stove. If you have any questions, just ask me.

C: 没有…姐姐和我说，这个是全新的……
E: No... Serval told me this was a brand-new stove...

C: 总之，危机解除——我们可以好好准备露营餐了……
E: Anyway, crisis resolved! We can now make some food...

C: 没关系，做成火锅就没问题了。只要加入奶油和饼干碎，再加入我准备好的鲱鱼罐头……
E: Don't worry. We'll make them into a hotpot. Just add cream, biscuit crumbs, and the canned sardines I brought...

C: 星核事件之后…这应该是规模最大的一次极光了。
E: This is the largest aurora since the Stellaron crisis passed.

C: 嗯？怎么了？
E: Mm? What's up?

C: …我知道啦。谢谢你，玲宝。
E: ...I see. Thank you, Lynxy.

C: 唯一值得庆幸的…大概就是佩拉能够顺利诞生吧。
E: The only good thing... was that Pela was born healthy.

C: 那软盘又是怎么回事？
E: So what about the floppy disk?

C: 妈妈…妈妈……！
E: Mom... Mom...!

C: 没关系，我和杰帕德都理解的…对吧，老弟？
E: That's okay. Gepard and I understand... right, Gepard?

C: ——小心！背后有敌人！
E: Careful! Enemy behind you!

C: …嗯，有这个可能性。也只有这样才能解释，为什么我的记忆这么模糊。
E: ...Yes, it's a possibility. That would explain why my memory of it is so blurry.

C: 我是来给伤员找药的。
E: I'm looking for medicine to help the injured.

C: 虎克有一个好消息，还有一个坏消息——你想先听哪个？
E: I got some good news and some bad news. Which do you wanna hear first?

C: 就只是这样？
E: That's it?

C: {NICKNAME}，你先进去，虎克随后跟上！只要你吸引了足够的火力…虎克就能安全突围！
E: {NICKNAME}, you go first and Hook will follow! As long as you attract enough attention, I'll be safe from the old witch!

C: 帕斯卡——你终于恢复正常了！
E: Pascal, you're back to normal!

C: 我来看看…钢板、纱布、止痛剂、医用酒精……太好了，需要的物资都齐全了。
E: Let me see... metal plates, gauze bandages, painkillers, rubbing alcohol... Perfect, that's everything I needed.

C: 没打招呼就消失了，抱歉。
E: Sorry for the unannounced disappearance.

C: 哎哟，这叫什么话！天底下还有比我桑博更言行一致的人吗？
E: Hey, what are you trying to say!? Name me someone above or below ground that walks the talk like Sampo Koski.

C: 哎！吓我一跳。
E: Ah! That scared me.

C: 战、战斗模组？是不是哪里出了问题……
E: Combat module? This thing's faulty, right...?

C: 行了，这下就差一步认证了。你们快走吧，让我一个机器人呆着……
E: There you are, only one more to go. Now, please leave me in peace...

C: 你这孩子……
E: Listen kid, you—

C: 要不再想想别的办法？
E: Why don't we think of another way?

C: 克拉拉也一直在尝试说服史瓦罗先生，请大家再等等……
E: I'm always trying to convince Mr. Svarog. Please give me more time...

C: 希望他的记忆库里确实藏着和「星核」有关的数据。
E: I hope his memory bank really does contain data on the Stellaron.

C: 与「星核」相关的数据和录音记录已经整理完毕。是否立即调用，外来者？
E: I have finished collating the Stellaron data and records. Do you wish to proceed, outsiders?

C: 咳…不必遗憾，孩子，你还有很多时间。等你们找到摧毁——咳，摧毁「星核」的办法…我们的努力都不会白费。
E: *coughing* Don't be upset, child. You still have lots of time ahead of you. When you find a way to destroy — *coughing* — destroy the Stellaron... our efforts will have been worth it.

C: 逃到磐岩镇之后，我就下定了决心：同样的悲剧不能再次上演。所以我才召集了奥列格他们，创建了最初的「地火」。
E: After we fled to Boulder Town, I made up my mind: A tragedy like that could never be allowed to happen again. That's why I gathered Oleg and the others together, and created the first sparks of Wildfire.

C: 嘿，我老早就猜到你们要惹祸上身，所以就提早去找奥列格搬救兵咯。明智吧？
E: Ha, I knew that you'd get yourselves into trouble eventually, so I got Oleg to send relief in advance. Pretty sensible, right?

C: 怕什么，不是还有你在嘛！只要你能帮虎克拍下来就行，全靠你啦，荣誉队员！
E: That's nothing — you're here too! I've got the honorary member here to help me with the bidding!

C: 你让我费这么大力气缝补好「菌菌」，原来就是为了能把它卖出去啊——虎克？
E: So you made me go through all this effort to repair Junjun just so you could sell him...?

C: 罢了，看你也不像有钱竞价的样子，就告诉你吧——那熊玩偶的眼睛可是货真价实的黑宝石！
E: Huh, you don't look like you'll be bidding on much, so I'll tell you... That teddy bear's eyes are genuine erebus!

C: …那个……
没错，里面就有虎克的大熊玩偶哦！歌蒂阿姨的侄女一定会喜欢的！
E: That's right, my teddy bear is one of them! Your niece will love him!

C: 唉，真是诸事不顺啊……
E: *sigh* When am I gonna catch a break...?

C: 这不是刚才那个小孩儿吗？
E: Isn't this the kid we just saved?

C: 六百冬城盾三次，成交！
E: <unbreak>600</unbreak> shield going three times... aaaand sold!

C: 虎克想抓住小偷，把探针夺回来！荣誉队员，你有什么办法嘛？
E: I gotta catch the thief and get the probe back! Any ideas, honorary member?

C: …什、什么？你们是谁，跟我接头的人呢？
E: ...Huh — what? Who are you? Where are the people I'm supposed to meet up with?

C: 拍卖还剩下一些钱，虎克要拿给老巫婆——她帮虎克修复了玩偶，我要请她吃烧洞螈！{NICKNAME}，我就给你口头奖励吧！
E: We've got some money left over — let's use it on the old witch. She helped Hook repair Junjun, so Hook's gonna treat her to some stone-grilled olm! As for you, {NICKNAME}... you've earned Hook's verbal praise!

C: 虎克…你喜欢老爹送你的礼物吗？
E: Hook... do you still like the gift I got for you?

C: 奇怪的绰号增加了…
E: Another nickname for the collection...

C: 天才侦探少女，出发！
E: Genius detective girl, move out!

C: 克拉拉听说，营地里有的叔叔阿姨会把偶尔捡到的小机器人当成宠物来养。
E: I've heard that some vagrants in the dwelling keep the little robots they find as pets.

C: 那我去把其他机器人的扒下来！
E: I'll go and strip them from the other robots!

C: 正在运行故障诊断……
