E: Troubleshooting...

C: 我相信帕斯卡不会做出伤害人的事情…但，万一——万一真的出了什么意外——
E: I'm certain Pascal won't do anything to harm anyone, but if something goes wrong...

C: 考虑到自动机兵仍有可能通过自身算力开发出情感模块，我对此类事件已有预案。
E: Given that automatons can still develop emotion modules using their own processing power, I have a backup plan in place.

C: 没有别的办法了吗……
E: Is there no other option...?

C: 克拉拉不敢想象…不知道被遗忘了很多次之后，自己还能以什么样的情感面对帕斯卡……
E: I can't imagine it... How will I feel when I have to face Pascal after being forgotten so many times?

C: 嗯…正好，克拉拉也需要些时间，做好心理准备。
E: Okay... I need some time to emotionally prepare myself anyway.

C: 花、花、花，给你，别丢了。
E: Flower, flower, flower, for you — don't forget.

C: 不要啊，杰帕德长官最厌恶走后门，您提都别提我，就是最好的美言了……
E: No, no, Captain Gepard hates all that under-the-table stuff. I'd have a better chance if you don't mention me at all...

C: 所以从今天开始，每天训练增加两百次卧推，外加三十分钟的单手平板支撑！听明白了吗？
E: As such, starting from today, we will be adding <unbreak>200</unbreak> bench presses and <unbreak>30</unbreak> extra minutes of one-arm planks to our daily drill! Is that clear?

C: 所以我才跟守门的说，我们是来做紧急检修的呀！除了后方，前线肯定也有需要维护的设备吧？
E: That's why I told them we were here for urgent maintenance! The front line equipment needs servicing just as much as the rest.

C: 我也很想跟你们一起啊，真的很想！「星核」近在咫尺了，离我那么近，我一直想看它一眼——
E: I want to go with you, I do! I always wanted to catch a glimpse of the Stellaron with my own eyes, and now it's so close...

C: 那批机器人，可能已经被部署到禁区里了。
E: Those robots may have already been deployed to the restricted zone.

C: 你现在觉得自由了吗？
E: Do you feel free now?

C: 记忆…终于…我终于记起来了。我的身份，我的过去，我在寻找的东西……
E: I remember... finally... I can remember. My identity, my past, what I'm looking for...

C: （无论如何，还是把这件事报告给负责禁区治安的人吧…）
E: (In any case, let's report this to the security personnel responsible for the restricted zone...)

C: 对，绝对没错！否则不会有那么巧的事……
E: Right, she must be! This can't be a coincidence.

C: 你们听到声音了吗？这道机关肯定也打开啦！
E: Did you hear that? This mechanism must be on now!

C: 洗脑就到此为止吧，魔女！
E: Your brainwashing ends here, you witch!

C: 先祖用双手建起了这座城市，在风雪摇曳中奋力延续文明。就算这个世界注定分崩离析，通向结局的路途也该由人类亲手铺就——
E: Our ancestors built this city — striving in the bitter snow to prolong our civilization. Even if this world is doomed to fall apart, we should allow humanity to pave the way to its final outcome...

C: 必须把她救下来。下层区…不，这个世界都靠她了。
E: We have to save her. The Underworld... no, the entire planet relies on her.

C: 母亲…您有没有从梦里…醒来呢？
E: Mother... Did you wake up from that dream...?

C: …风雪凌厉，难以骤停。
E: ...The storm still rages on.

C: 把真相告诉所有人吧。
E: Tell everyone the truth.

C: …你是在叫我吗？
E: ...Are you talking to me?

C: 当然知道。换种说法，稍微学过点历史的人应该都知道吧？
E: Of course. I mean, anyone who's studied a little history has heard of her, right?

C: 呵呵…有意思。这个结果还真是出乎意料呢。
E: Heh... Interesting. What a surprising turn of events.

C: 等等，我还有些疑惑。
E: Wait, I have some questions.

C: 过了一段时间，丹鼎司的医者救援队已经将梅姐带走了。
E: Some time has passed, and the Alchemy Commission's healers had taken Mei away.

C: 这些年有好多次机会想要换掉，有时候我舍不得这便宜的价格，有时候也只是嫌麻烦。
E: I have tried so many times over the years to change her out for a different housekeeper, but I just couldn't let go of her affordability, and sometimes I feel it's just too much of a hassle to make the change.

C: 更多的时候，我觉得梅姐这样的人，到哪肯定都没人要，我要是再赶走她，她无依无靠的，说不定生存下去都很困难。
E: But most of the time, I feel someone like Mei would not be hired anywhere else. If I dismissed her, she would have no one to turn to. She might even struggle just to stay alive.

C: 我听见那个<color=#dbc291ff>肇事星槎的引擎声音非常大，跟一般星槎不太一样。</color>
E: I heard the <color=#dbc291ff>engine sound of the offending starskiff. It was loud and different from ordinary starskiffs.</color>

C: 咱们就当没有事故发生过吧。
E: Then let's pretend this never happened.

C: 嘶，你怎么也这么说？
E: Tsk, why would you echo her?

C: 俺两眼一黑，没有看清楚，就摔出去了。好像是艘<color=#dbc291ff>蓝色</color>的星槎，又好像是<color=#dbc291ff>黄色</color>的……
E: I blacked out. I didn't see anything when I got thrown outside. It could be a <color=#dbc291ff>blue</color> starskiff, but it could also be <color=#dbc291ff>yellow</color>...

C: 就以这张照片为参照吧，哪一艘才是肇事星槎呢？
E: Which is the offending starskiff in this picture?

C: 您好，我是天舶司管理航道安全的执法人员檀檀，这是我行政执法的证件。
E: Hello, I am Tantan, a law enforcement officer of the Sky-Faring Commission who manages lane safety. Here's my ID.

C: 我记得她就在附近，你可以去问问她。医典外借这种事，向丹士长大人咨询是再合适不过了。
E: I think she's somewhere around here. You can try asking her. It's best to ask the chief alchemist about important businesses such as outsiders borrowing our medical texts.

C: 乱是乱了点，这丹还得炼……
E: It sure is chaotic around here, but the alchemy has to go on...

C: （诚实）丹枢的药方…
E: (Tell the truth) Dan Shu's prescription...

C: 我回来了。
E: I'm back.

C: 我回来了，你好像有事找我？
E: I'm back, did you need something?

C: 听说你有事求人？
E: I heard you needed help?

C: 还有什么想叮嘱的吗？
E: Any other advice you want to give?

C: 寻物启事下方还贴心地准备了「阴晴伞」的绘影图形。
E: A visiograph of the Baroumbrella has been thoughtfully provided below the Lost and Found notice.

C: 帝弓贯虹无悔意，不破妖寇终不还。
E: Reignbow's piercing rainbow, never regret. Destroyer of demons, never forget!

C: 壮士保重。
E: Take care, brave warrior.

C: 没错！看的出来，你很了解诗歌呱！
E: That's right — I can see that you have a deep understanding of poetry, croak!

C: 你放心，只要我见到这些离愁别绪，诗作就能完成，我会把灵感玉兆交给你们，好让你们交差呱！
E: Don't worry. I just need to see that human emotion of parting, and the poem would write itself. Then I can give you my Inspo Jade Abacus, and you'll be done with your mission.

C: 我买几个橘子去。你就在此地不要走动。
E: I'm going to buy some oranges. You stay put and don't go anywhere.

C: 阁下风流杨先生。
E: Mr. Yang is a flirt.

C: 你到目前为止只是在写诗吗？
E: Have you just been writing poems so far?

C: 你也有一把同心锁吧？
E: You also have a lock like that, don't you?

C: 你这是让我主动被骗。
E: You're asking me to actively be the target of a scam.

C: 会不会干涉了他的隐私…
E: Would we be encroaching on his privacy?

C: 这是什么新的搭讪手法吗？还是要向我推销什么商品？
E: Is this some kind of pick-up line? Or are you trying to sell me something?

C: 是啊，长生种与短生种确实能建立某种程度的友谊或是爱情。
E: You're right, friendships and romance can exist, to some degree, between long-life and short-life species.

C: 可是…要是我去了仙舟还要继续研究材料，那不就还是成天待在实验室里？
E: But... if I continue to research materials even after transferring to Xianzhou, wouldn't I be trapped in the laboratory for days on end?

C: 我…我是经纪人。
E: I... I am her manager.

C: 走吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 你得到了「美丽狐仙聊天」的真相，去把它带给艾丝妲吧。
E: You have uncovered the truth behind the Foxian Beauty Chat. Go and inform Asta.

C: …我已经向罗浮仙舟的司辰宫发送了学术交流的申请，你不要着急。反倒是你，你这外驻申请写得完全不像样，我建议你再回去修改修改。
E: ...I've already sent the request for academic exchange to the Palace of Astrum on the Xianzhou Luofu, so don't you worry. You, on the other hand, your transfer application is so messily written, I have to ask you to rewrite and edit it before submitting again.

C: 我先追过去啦，你等会儿赶过来！
E: I'll go after it first, you can catch up in a bit!

C: 嗨呀，跑来跑去还真是费劲啊，今天的运动量就到此为止了。{NICKNAME}，我先告辞啦。
E: Hey, running around everywhere takes a lot of energy, so that's enough exercise for today. {NICKNAME}, I'll see you later.

C: 你可不可以拜托那个「狐仙」拍个视频，大概内容就是「我们两人实在是不合适，请温符瑞忘记她」之类的。
E: Can you ask that "Foxian Beauty" to record a video for Wen Furui, where she says "I don't think the two of us make a good pair, please forget me forever," or something to that effect?

C: 你肯定这是你老师的记号？
E: Are you sure this is your master's marking?

C: 你还真会看图说话。
E: I must say you're very good at making up stories.

C: 陶德压低声音，看了看四周，仿佛在确认自己说的话没有被人听见。
E: Todd lowers his voice and looks around as though to make sure not a single soul can hear him.

C: 瞧瞧我，年纪大了脑子就不太灵光了。让我想想……
E: My memory is failing me because of old age. Let me think...

C: （这个图案…看着有点像什么巨木的树根，难道是…建木？）
E: (This drawing... looks like the roots of an enormous tree. Is it... the Ambrosial Arbor?)

C: 你整容啦？
E: Did you get plastic surgery?

C: （答应守口如瓶）
E: (Promise to keep it secret)

C: 他显然不会再回住处了，吾等正在追索其踪迹。
E: He obviously won't be heading back to his residence. My team is on his tail.

C: 白露大人，我都说了这一趟你要听我的安排。你施展能力时，太引人瞩目了，我们还有正事要办啊。
E: Lady Bailu, I told you to follow my plan — you draw attention when you use your powers... We still have to take care of the matter at hand.

C: 你好，十王司来抓你了。
E: Hello, Ten-Lords Commission here, you're under arrest.

C: 抓住叛徒要紧，我先去另一个方向搜索了。
E: We must catch the traitor. I'll go search in another direction.

C: （再翻翻上衣内侧）
E: (Check his jacket pockets again...)

C: 白露和半夏确定没有他人追上，从房间里走了出来。
E: After making sure they are not pursued anymore, Bailu and Banxia walk out of the room.

C: 稍、稍等一下！我再找找。
E: W—Wait a minute! I'll keep looking.

C: 我本以为只要逃出来便没事了…没想到那些人还是追来了。
E: I thought we'd be fine after we escaped... I didn't know those people would come after us.

C: 看了这么多年诊，还是不习惯见到有人受苦哩。
E: After all these years, I'm still not used to seeing people suffer.

C: 在我变成一个真正不谙世事的婴儿之前，我想纵情快乐一下。
E: I want to have one last good time before I turn into a mindless baby.

C: 是我让梁沐躲在这儿的，我不能让「药王秘传」的人找到他，只好让他躲进流云渡的集装箱里。
E: I told Liangmu to hide in a Cloudford shipping container.— I couldn't let the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus find him.

C: 小妹妹，你不要突然就哭了呀，这也没有什么呀。
E: Hey, little girl, no need for tears. It's no big deal.

C: 不必。有三月在，什么也瞒不住啊。
E: No need. March will find out sooner or later.

C: 白露小姐已在鳞渊境等候了。
E: Miss Bailu is already waiting at Scalegorge Waterscape.

C: 受死吧，丹枫！
E: Die, Dan Feng!

C: 那咱们这就出发吧。
E: Let's go then.

C: 也许是用云吟操纵水雾，欺骗视觉的把戏。和我们来时一样，这里恐怕早已埋伏好了刺客……
E: They may have used a cloudhymn to create mist and provide a smokescreen. I'm afraid this ambush was probably lying in wait for us...

C: 也可能是龙师派出的刺客？
E: Was the assassin sent by the Preceptors?

C: 当心，他们在等待着我们的靠近露出破绽。
E: Careful, they're waiting for us to get close enough to reveal our weak spots.

C: …我不喜欢这个蜃影。
E: ...I don't like this Mirage Echo.

C: 我从一开始就不信什么龙尊！你们不配来问我的罪！
E: I have never believed in the High Elder! You are unworthy of the condemnation you spout!

C: 杨叔，说什么呢？我们当然相信你的判断啦！对吧，{NICKNAME}！
E: What are you talking about? Of course we trust your judgment, Mr. Yang! Right, {NICKNAME}?

C: 我不擅长！
E: My forte? Says who!?

C: 哎呀，讨厌你！我说真的，《渔公案》里出现过一模一样的场景。
E: Shh — you're being annoying! I'm not kidding — this is straight out of the book.

C: （罗刹先生肯定有办法解开这个锁啊。连一扇门都打不开，还惦记偷运星核呢？）
E: (You think that would stop the likes of Luocha? What kind of a Stellaron smuggler would he be if he couldn't get past a door?)

C: 怎么这样啊…听人说话只说一半，就像照片只能洗出半张一样难受……
E: Ugh, don't do this to me... Hearing half a sentence is like developing half a photo. I'll be up all night thinking about it...

C: 那就…有劳二位恩公了…我再去星槎海随便逛逛，暂时还不是很想回到天舶司……
E: In that case... thank you so much, benefactors... I'll head back to Starskiff Haven. I'm not ready to return to the Sky-Faring Commission yet...

C: 没事了。
E: Nothing.

C: 你们母女可真像啊。
E: You two are very similar.

C: （在晴霓的回忆中，驭空似乎一直对斗舰飞行士的生涯讳莫如深，也不希望晴霓和自己走上同样的道路…这是为什么呢？）
E: (Qingni remembers that Yukong has always avoided talking about her career as a fighter pilot, and that she wants to prevent Qingni from following the same path... Why?)

C: 这世上任何人都能做斗舰飞行士，唯独司舵的女儿不能！怎么会有这么荒唐的事！您自己不愿意再飞，也不该捆住我啊！我不是你养在笼子里的鸟儿！
E: Why can anyone in the world become a fighter pilot, except the helm master's daughter? Don't you realize how ridiculous that is? You may not want to fly anymore, but don't trap me down here with you!

C: （「我」的事情）
E: (Ask about myself)

C: 所以，可以说你就是独一无二的星核「容器」。
E: Therefore, you could say that you are a one-of-a-kind Stellaron vessel.

C: 什么意思？
E: What's that supposed to mean?

C: 不，注定的是「有价值」的未来。
E: No, but what is predetermined is the future that has value.

C: （试试用气势震慑他们！）
E: (Try to intimidate them!)

C: 破碎未消融的冰并不鲜见。但眼前这些闪烁奇异光泽的「碎冰」，毫无疑问只可能来自某位你所认识的少女。
E: Ice is no rare material on its own. However, the ice shards glittering with strange colors before you must have come from none other than a specific girl you know.

C: 我是…银河球棒侠。
E: I'm... the Galactic Baseballer.

C: 倒不是贬低各位的本事。恩公若是一不留神闪了腰，我心里也过意不去呀。
E: Not that I'm doubting your skill, but I'd feel terrible if you hurt yourself in the process.

C: 很简单吧？那你怎么不做。
E: Right! So why don't you do it?

C: 关于那封匿名信…
E: About the anonymous letter...

C: 罗浮洞天广大…再加上不少部队出发配合曜青征伐，云骑也是首尾难顾，哪来那么多人手到处驻扎来着？
E: The Luofu's delves are big places... Besides, some of the troops were deployed to the Yaoqing's campaign. The Cloud Knights were spread thin — it was impossible to guard everywhere at once.

C: 「战斗就像一次次锻冶，用烈焰熔去杂质，展露一个人内在的本性。」
E: Combat is like smelting — purging the impurities with burning flames and exposing a person's true nature.

C: 小心。
E: Careful.

C: 怎么了？{NICKNAME}，找我有事吗？
E: What is it, {NICKNAME}? Do you need something?

C: 有什么本事，尽管让我瞧瞧。
E: Show me what you've got.

C: 好久没有如此尽兴了……
E: I haven't had this much fun in a long time...

C: 没错。慈怀药王，任何守法的联盟公民都不会念出这个敬称。
E: Correct. The term "Merciful Medicus" is one of respect — one that any law-abiding citizen of the Alliance would never dare utter.

C: 你是罗浮上的生面孔，还是化外民，这件事交给你来办，我放心很多。
E: You are a fresh face on the Luofu and an outworlder. I would feel more at ease if I could leave this matter with you.

C: 你顺利地抄完了第四遍。
E: You complete the fourth copy.

C: 请静下心来，慢慢抄写，慢慢体悟《千手慈怀药王救世品》至善至美的启迪。
E: Take your time, still your mind, and transcribe the text. Allow the beautiful enlightenment of Thousand-Handed Merciful Medicus' Salvation to permeate your being.

C: 这篇《千手慈怀药王救世品》是药王秘传不知从何抄来的经文，多半是「神降时代」禁书的残篇。
E: Thousand-Handed Merciful Medicus' Salvation is a manuscript transcribed from a sacred text — I don't know where the Disciples obtained it. It likely consists of fragments of banned works from the {RUBY_B#Theophany Era}befall era{RUBY_E#}.

C: 关于执信给的药方…
E: About the prescription that Zhixin gave me...

C: 但那些诡异的配方，往往都能产生极为神奇的效果。丹枢大人就是这样一位天才丹士。
E: ...still, those same prescriptions have always been able to produce miraculous effects. Lady Dan Shu is a truly gifted alchemist.

C: 青镞让我向你咨询…
E: Qingzu asked me to find you...

C: 你为丹枢朗读了药方的内容。
E: You read the prescription to Dan Shu.

C: …呃，没办法，罗浮上的每个人都有帮助十王司办案的义务……
E: ...Well, there's nothing else for it, we're duty-bound to help the Ten-Lords Commission...

C: 呃，实在抱歉…十王司征用云骑，按规矩我是必须得听……
E: Uh, sorry... All Cloud Knights answer to the Ten-Lords Commission. Duty calls...

C: 我并非云骑。
E: I'm not a Cloud Knight.

C: 你看到了吧？司里面到处长的是什么东西？！
E: You saw it, right? What happened to the Artisanship Commission?

C: 方便匠人们随时查阅吧。有什么关系，工造司又不会有别人进来。
E: It makes things easier for the craftsmen. It's not like outsiders can just walk in here.

C: 本座这阵子都忙得很，有事相求的话便直说吧？
E: I am extremely busy of late. If you have something to ask of me, do not delay.

C: 你们向符玄讲述了三月七丢失记忆的情况。
E: You tell Fu Xuan about March 7th's memory loss.

C: 这是…我们第一次遇到{NICKNAME}的时候…但这里没有{NICKNAME}……
E: This is... the first time we met {NICKNAME}... But {NICKNAME} isn't here...

C: 您是打尖还是住店？
E: Are you looking for food or accommodation today?

C: 所以，我要从这些人里挑一个出来，清除它的「干涉」？
E: So, I have to pick someone and clear them of "interference"?

C: 嗯？这个突然出现的东西是什么？
E: Hm? What is that?

C: 多半是因为本座从没去过真正的苦寒之地。得了，你就自个体会自己经历中的寒冷吧。
E: Hmm, most likely a result of me never having experienced true cold. I'm afraid you'll have to do the shivering by yourself.

C: 别担心，本姑娘已经完全明白这一切了。
E: Yeah, yeah, I get it.

C: 不知道你注意到没有，在关于罗浮的记忆中，你遇到的每个人都在明里暗里地劝你「不要继续回忆」。
E: Perhaps you didn't notice, but in your memories of the Luofu, everyone you met was either hinting or explicitly stating that you should stop trying to remember.

C: （清除「失真」）
E: (Clear distortion)

C: 夕葵小姐在招待客人？
E: Are you hosting any guests, Miss Xikui?

C: 这都是过去的传说，现在谁也没见过。
E: Well, those are just legends from the past. No one today has witnessed it firsthand.

C: 没想到这把剑竟然出自令尊，能将它物归原主，真是——
E: I didn't realize this sword was actually forged by your father. Returning it to its rightful owner is —

C: 你都已经学会抢答了。
E: Oh, so now you're a mind reader?

C: 看来在这里是蹲不到了，我得直接去工造司。
E: Looks like they're not going to show up here. I'll just head straight to the Artisanship Commission.

C: 我觉得你最好和怀炎将军聊聊。
E: I think you should talk to General Huaiyan about it.

C: 我没偷。
E: No, I didn't.

C: 如果能找到这把剑，就别怪我先下手为强了。
E: Well, don't blame me if I find it first and melt it down.

C: 我早说过了，那是一柄铸入岁阳的魔剑，一定是这把剑控制了银枝！也许在抵达罗浮之前，他就被控制了。
E: Like I said, the sword contains a heliobus. Argenti must have been under the control of the sword! Maybe he was under its control even before you arrived on the Luofu.

C: 这才是魔剑的可怕之处。
E: That's what makes cursed swords so scary.

C: 跟着我来吧。
E: Follow me.

C: 余生，你们仙舟人的余生可太长了。感到绝望了吗？一个人，面对一个充满敌意的世界。
E: The rest of a Xianzhou native's life could be terribly long. Are you feeling any desperation? All by yourself in this hostile world?

C: 凭你那样低微的本事，能反抗一整支步离人的军队吗？你到底在坚持什么啊？
E: Do you really think you can oppose an entire borisin army with your limited skills? What are you holding out for?

C: 熔剑的时候你可比谁都斩钉截铁，怎么现在反倒一副心不甘情不愿的样子啊？
E: You were completely determined when melting down the sword, so why the sudden change of heart?

C: 云璃…你和你父亲，至少在这件事上还是有点像的。
E: When it comes to swords, you... you and your father are cut from the same cloth.

C: 属于我的战争早已经结束了。
E: My war ended long ago.

C: 罢了罢了，你能注意这是个庄重的场合就行。
E: Well, just remember this is a very serious ceremony.

C: …这是结案了？
E: ...Is the case closed?

C: 你彻底懒得圆了是吧？
E: You're too lazy to be a suspect, right?

C: 卟卟——回答错误！怎么可能是这种无聊的答案！
E: Wamp wah — wrong answer. How could it be as boring as that!

C: 他利用职务之便，偷来佐罗的领带，对花火大人说：「大人，请移步试衣间，我要为您展示一条与您相称的领带。」
E: Taking advantage of his position, he stole Lefton's tie and told Miss Sparkle: "Miss, please come with me to the changing room. I'd like to show you a matching tie."

C: 几个…时辰？这种没用的信息我一点都不想知道啊。
E: ...A few hours? *sigh* Do you have any vacancies?

C: 唷，稀客啊。
E: Wow, a rare honor.

C: 一经启动，「穷观阵」会演算属于「卡芙卡」这一目标所蕴藏的信息，将其中与仙舟相关的部分送入卜算者的识海。
E: Once activated, the Matrix of Prescience analyzes all the information contained in the target — Kafka in this case — and transfers anything pertaining to the Xianzhou into the diviner's consciousness.

C: 你是擅长以「言灵」术搅乱人心的通缉犯，本座对你的话毫无兴趣。
E: I have no interest in the words of wanted criminals — especially those skilled in the art of manipulation...

C: 「不朽」的龙、「纯美」的伊德莉拉、「秩序」的太一、「繁育」的塔伊兹育罗斯、以及…「开拓」的阿基维利。
E: Long the Permanence, Idrila the Beauty, Ena the Order, Tayzzyronth the Propagation... Akivili the Trailblaze.

C: 这些都是曾经响彻寰宇的名字，现在，祂们都消失了，只剩下无主的命途。
E: These names were once known all over the universe. Now, THEY've all but disappeared, leaving behind only masterless Paths.

C: 除非卡芙卡欺骗了穷观阵……
E: Unless Kafka deceived the Matrix of Prescience...

C: 依本座之见，眼下要务是召集云骑军，赶往「建木」根植的洞天，拔除星核邪祟，止住它重生的势头。
E: From my perspective, convening the Cloud Knights is our immediate priority. We must head into the roots of the Ambrosial Arbor, expel the Stellaron spirits, and prevent the Arbor's resurrection.

C: 本以为太卜司的事一了，小女子接引的职责也能卸下了。
E: *sigh* I thought I might be relieved of my guiding duties once the Divination Commission affair was over...

C: 咱们也算出生入死的交情了。
E: Through thick and thin, we're like two peas in a dangerous pod.

C: 啥成果能比自己的命还重要啊？
E: Is research data more important than life?

C: 省点时间吧，去哪，打谁？
E: We're short on time. Where are we going? Who are we fighting?

C: 仙舟人与岁阳经历好一番角逐，最终困住了它们，将之封禁在一处容器中。
E: After a prolonged struggle, the people of the Xianzhou finally managed to trap and seal the heliobi in a vessel.

C: 咳咳…不提这个。如果你诚心诚意想加入「罗浮三少」，我们倒也不是不能同意。但你得先说说，自己有什么加入我们的本钱吗？
E: Ahem, ignore that last one... If you really, truly wanna join the Luofu Trio, we might be able to make an exception... But tell me, what can you bring to the table?

C: 三个小孩逃走了。你也带着小姑娘离开了这个是非之地。
E: The three troublemakers flee from the scene. Taking the chance, you lead the girl away from the site of the conflict.

C: 在下不要求你站队…只是希望你能远离罗浮，远离这一切。这一切本就与你无关，我也不想与你为敌。
E: I do not ask for you to pick a side... I just wish for you to leave the Luofu — to leave this all behind. This isn't your fight, and I do not wish to make an enemy of you.

C: 在下这些日子一直在想…妖弓祸祖不是善神，慈怀药王亦不是恶神。你站在景元那边，只是因为你先认识他们罢了。
E: I have been thinking... The Devilish Archer Author is not a benevolent god, nor is Merciful Medicus a malevolent one. Your choice to align with Jing Yuan was simply due to meeting him first.

C: 魁首大人，我们得走了。
E: Master, we should leave now.

C: 另外，如果你再次遇到丹枢…请及时通知附近的云骑。
E: If you run into Dan Shu again — contact the nearest Cloud Knights.

C: 我也不同意啊！这人一看就只会打打杀杀的，哪里晓得「放生」的精义？
E: It's nay for me too! This person seems to be violent by nature. Can they understand the spirit of "releasing life"?

C: 「机械生命」？「战略合作伙伴」？哈哈哈，你这人用词真有意思。
E: Mechanical lifeforms? Strategic partner? Hahaha, interesting choice of words.

C: 伤了我，放生帮得赔到破产…
E: If I'm injured, the Unshackled will have to bankrupt themselves to compensate me.

C: {NICKNAME}，你好啊，有什么可以帮到你的？
E: Hi, {NICKNAME}. Can I help you with anything?

C: 不过也好，那三个魔怔的家伙不在了，地衡司盯「放生帮」也没那么紧了，现在我的日子倒是舒服了不少。
E: Well, this isn't entirely a bad thing. Now that the obsessed trio isn't here, The Unshackled will be off the radar of the Realm-Keeping Commission. It makes my life a lot easier.

C: 一眼鉴定为假，不看营销号。
E: Vids or it didn't happen... and no clickbait.

C: 这东西很危险？
E: Are heliobi dangerous?

C: 是个屁，大爷我什么都没瞧见，你个小怂包。
E: It's nothing. You scaredy-cat, I didn't see a single thing.

C: 我说了「不」，滚出去！
E: I said no! Get out!

C: 混蛋，混蛋混蛋混蛋！尾巴、你、还有那些判官，总有一天…
E: You wretched fools! Tail, the judges, you... One day...

C: 幽幽的门扇静谧无声，你效仿话本的做法，叩击门钹左边三次，右边三次。
E: The gloomy doors are silent. You follow the instruction in the book and knock on the doors, three times on the left, three times on the right.

C: …这里好像不是正确的地方，我们选错铜镜了。
E: ...This isn't the right place. We picked the wrong bronze mirror.

C: 你觉得藿藿性格怎么样？
E: What do you think about Huohuo's personality?

C: 今夜行动结束后，藿藿将被开除，十王司这份工作不适合她。
E: She will be expelled after tonight's operation. She is not fit for her job at the Ten-Lords Commission.

C: 我想出去学习，努力拿奖学金……
E: I want to go out and learn, and work hard for a scholarship...

C: …我知道了。
E: ...I see.

C: 她把唱片丢进花坛，磕碰到边缘时发出一声闷响。
E: She hurls the record into the flowerbed, and it emits a dull echo as it hits the edge.

C: 梦的细节…我有些记不清了。但我隐约感觉……
E: The dream's details... I can't remember them clearly, but I can vaguely feel that...

C: 最后，他找到了我——可惜也只找到了我。「星云之末」上有许多值得被拯救的灵魂…愿他们安息。
E: Finally, he found me... Unfortunately, I was the only one that he found. As for the many souls that deserved to be rescued aboard Nebula's End... May they rest in peace.

C: 我还记得，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}——上次在梦中和您见面时，我说过我想「自救」。
E: I still remember that last time I met you in the dream, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}... I said I wanted to "save myself."

C: 一艘艘太空战舰轰然炸裂的震撼镜头过后，莱斯利•迪恩英俊的脸庞以大特写的形式跳入画中。
E: After a series of shocking scenes featuring exploding warships, a close-up of Lesley Dean's handsome face takes the screen.

C: 我深爱着他。我深爱着他。我深爱着他。
E: I love him deeply. I love him. I love him so much.

C: {NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}，您会出手吗？纠缠住姬莲小姐的负面迷因如此汹涌，只有借助更为强大的力量才能将之驱逐。
E: {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, will you take action? The negative memes affecting Ms. Jillian have grown so powerful that we will only be able to dispel them with an even greater power.

C: 就在今晚，我要和一个女人道别。她在我的人生路上扮演了无可替代的重要角色——尽管她对此并不自知。
E: Tonight, I will bid farewell to a woman. This woman has played an irreplaceable role in my life... Even if she does not know it.

C: 冷芯带着你来到了甲板上。
E: Caldwick takes you to the deck.

C: 果真吗？
E: Really?

C: 想不到刚一来就看到了这么一幕——但我觉得无妨！既然这位{F#小姐}{M#先生}是无名客的一员，这也就意味着{F#她}{M#他}将是匹诺康尼集团的长期合作伙伴！
E: I never thought I'd see such a scene as soon as I arrive, but I think it's all right! If this {F#lady}{M#gentleman} is one of the Nameless, that means they'll also be one of our longstanding partners with the Penacony Conglomerate!

C: （正式开始工作之前还得先做点准备…嗯…该从哪开始呢？）
E: (Better prepare before I officially start work... Hmm, where should I begin?)

C: 砸烂它！
E: Smash it to smithereens!

C: 吨…吨…吨…吨……
E: *Gulp*... *Gulp*... *Gulp*... *Gulp*...

C: 你要找的人住在几号房？
E: The person you're looking for... what's the room number?

C: 哼，彼此彼此。
E: Hmph, right back at you.

C: 不够，得加钱。
E: That's not enough. I want more.

C: 呃，非常抱歉，刚才似乎发生了些小误会，您别介意。同事已经把情况告诉我了，{NICKNAME}经理。
E: Er, I'm very sorry, but there seems to have been a bit of a misunderstanding. Please don't take it personally. My coworker has filled me in on the situation, Manager {NICKNAME}.

C: …停！你是干嘛的？我警告你，不许再往前了！
E: ...Stop! Who are you? I'm warning you to go no further!

C: 可我跪下来也比你们高啊？
E: But I'm still taller than you even when I'm on my knees.

C: …宝了个贝的，他们还想来真的？
E: ...Holy forkeroni. Do they really want to get physical?

C: 「四尺神王」已然发话…祂令我们不要慌张，要以理解与敬畏之姿面对我们的敌人。
E: The Four-Foot Aeon has spoken... They urged us not to panic, but to face our enemies with understanding and respect.

C: 知更鸟！知更鸟！
E: Robin! Robin!

C: 看呐，是知更鸟！
E: Look, it's Robin!

C: 不会是「苏打豆汁儿」吧？
E: It's not mung bean soda, is it?

C: 按接驳客船的时间来看，曜青的客人已经快到了。
E: Judging by the standard vessel transfer time, the Yaoqing guests should be arriving at any moment.

C: 不久之后，曜青的客人就登上星槎离开了港口。
E: And just like that, the Yaoqing guests boarded their starskiff and left the port.

C: 巧了，老夫也是说笑的。
E: Oh good, me too.

C: 你听见了吗？刚才有什么东西碎裂开的声音…那是本座为罗浮仙舟操劳的心。
E: Did you hear that? It's a sound of something smashing to pieces... That was my heart thinking about working on the Xianzhou Luofu again.

C: 我还以为你们已经知道了，我是会把天聊死的。
E: I think you're all well aware that I'm a conversation killer.

C: 唉，将军，请不要再给人加深曜青人爱把天聊死的印象了。临行之际，说些快活的话题吧。
E: Ah, general, please don't reinforce the Yaoqing stereotype of being conversation killers... Let's talk about something happy before we leave.

C: 不过与敌交锋，还有更多可打磨淬炼的余地。在曜青仙舟，这样的机会遍地都是。若是你有朝一日想飞出罗浮，瞧瞧更广阔的天空，就来曜青仙舟找我吧！
E: Although, there is still room for improvement when it comes to your technique in battle. The Xianzhou Yaoqing offers so many opportunities for this, so if you one day have the urge to leave the Luofu and see a broader horizon, come and find me on the Xianzhou Yaoqing!

C: 可是，这工造司里到处都是不受控制的机巧、建木催生的孽物，我…我不敢……
E: But the Artisanship Commission is filled with uncontrolled ingenia, and abominations awakened by the Ambrosial Arbor... I dare not...

C: 不会拒绝的吧？的吧？吧？
E: Right? Right? Riiight?

C: 我同意了，但是我有一个条件。
E: I agree, but only on one condition.

C: 你心里有我。那我就歇着啦。
E: Alrighty then, I'll take a break and leave the rest to you.

C: 这是一份活动设计案，提到了名为「枘凿六合」的空间接合装置。活动设计方考虑到这些魔方状的器械无人问津，决定狠下心来将魔方突兀地放置在洞天的各个角落。
E: This is an event proposal that mentioned a spatial fusion device called "Hexanexus." The organizers realized that these Rubik's Cube-like contraptions were not getting any attention, so they decided to take matters into their own hands and awkwardly place them in every nook and cranny of the venue.

C: 你别太难过了。
E: No need to beat yourself up.

C: 也许现在不是悠然喝茶的时候。
E: Perhaps now is not the time to savor a pot of tea?

C: 再后来，我们俩师傅和徒弟一个教一个学，彼此都很快乐…但是短生种的师傅很快迎来了自己的极限。
E: Later on, we studied and learned together, passing the days happily... But as a short-life species, my master soon reached the limit of his life.

C: …我已经开始听不懂了。
E: ...I'm already starting to lose track of everything being said.

C: 啊，抱歉……
E: Oh, I'm sorry...

C: 别在这里光说不练。
E: Time to walk the walk, then.

C: 设计稿的修改还顺利吗？
E: How's it going with the manuscript?

C: （停航）
E: (Stop)

C: 实在不好意思，虽然你看到的只有这一次，实际上每一次都失败了……
E: As a matter of fact, this is just one of my many failures...

C: 啊…公输师傅，今天有个事情想麻烦你。
E: Master Gongshu, there's something I need to trouble you with today.

C: 好了好了，我什么都没说。
E: Fine, I'll keep my mouth shut now.

C: 我的工作雷达很准的，它现在就在警告我「别继续了，全是无用功」……
E: My work radar is pretty accurate. It's trying to get me to stop because my effort will be in vain...

C: 十王司判官会在一个生命抵达自己的极限之前——比如仙舟人堕入魔阴身之前会被带走，以灵魂的形式送入因果殿。
E: When someone's life is on the brink of death — for example, when they become mara-struck — a judge of the Ten-Lords Commission will take them away and send their soul to the Hall of Karma.

C: 十王司？
E: Ten-Lords Commission?

C: 将特定「某个人的信息」组合起来，便能在在因果殿中找到莱恩师傅的「灵魂」。
E: After combining all the information, we'll be able to find Master Ryan's soul in the Hall of Karma.

C: 那只是一个很蠢的设计，根本就没有完成。即便你是长生种，也不应该将时间浪费在这叠破纸上，那不过是我学艺尚浅时不成熟的作品。
E: That's nothing but a dumb and incomplete design. Even though you're a long-life species, you shouldn't waste your time on it. That's a poor design I made when I was still a novice.

C: …没什么，就是奥列格头儿之前说的那事。
E: ...Nothing. Just that thing Chief Oleg mentioned before.

C: 再说了，我是真的佩服你的实力，所以才一直想跟你过两招。
E: I've always been impressed by you — I've wanted to spar with you for ages.

C: …不然呢？难道我们就把你晾在史瓦罗的老家不管了？
E: ...Where else? You think we'd leave you on Svarog's turf?

C: 哈哈哈，放心！最多也就持续到这次试炼结束，我保证——哎唷，我今天是不是「保证」太多次了？这可不是啥好习惯……
E: Hahaha, don't worry! I promise you, it'll only last till the end of my training. Actually, have I been making too many promises today? That's not a good habit...

C: 我又不是要去挑衅他，你别把事想复杂了。我是要请他跟我来一场公平公正的对决，就像在拳台上那样！
E: I'm not going to rile him up! Don't make this more complicated than it is. I'm just inviting him to have a fair fight with me, like how you'd have in the cage!

C: 史瓦罗应该会顾及我们的面子…
E: Svarog might go easy because we're here...

C: 卡西迪，你也有今天……
E: You had it coming, Cassidy...

C: 正巧有黑塔女士牵线，我本打算在启程前为天才俱乐部#81阮•梅女士从「金伦加深域」带回一具古兽遗骸，做些人情交换。不过这么一算，至少需要几周时间才能返航。
E: With Madam Herta's help, I was planning to deliver some Leviathan fossils from Calenga Abyss to Ruan Mei, member #81 of the Genius Society. It could earn us some favors before we set off. However, it may take a few weeks.

C: 人间烟火气啊…确实，现在我们这些客户啊，尝遍了惊险刺激的梦境。也许反而是这类接地气的内容能让他们找回感动。
E: Everyday vibe... Yeah, our clients have had their fair share of adrenaline-pumping Dreamscapes. Maybe something down-to-earth would touch their hearts.

C: 也许人家就没走远，不再找找吗?
E: Perhaps she's around here somewhere? Shouldn't we take a look?

C: 嚯嚯，你们认得啊，看来不用介绍了！
E: Oh, you two already know each other? Guess we don't need any introductions then!

C: 原来不是选手么？我明明瞧你也是个练家子。
E: So, you're not a participant? You look like you know your way around a fight.

C: 我听得很清楚，也想得很明白！我的话说得更直白：没戏！
E: I'm hearing you loud and clear! I'm thinking clear! And my answer is crystal clear: Not a chance!

C: 对了，我要是抡起球棒一砸，你就不得不请人来核计损失索赔吧？这样一来，岂不就省去了安全检查？
E: I've got a brilliant idea! I'll just smash everything with my bat, and then you can hire someone to assess the damage. That way, your cargo won't need any inspection, right?

C: 你觉得这两位到底谁更厉害一点？别怪我，我是真心好奇。
E: Between these two, who do you think is tougher? Don't get me wrong, I'm just curious.

C: 这也是没办法的……
E: Sorry, but it can't be helped...

C: 看我的！
E: Watch this!

C: 已接受使命「阻击逃犯」…
E: Mission accepted. Stop the fugitives...

C: 三月七的剑术训练，就这么开始了。
E: Thus begins the journey of March 7th's sword training.

C: 立刻出发！
E: Let's go now!

C: 没想到来眺望竞锋舰的人还不少啊？
E: Looks like a lot of other visitors have also come to catch a glimpse of the Skysplitter.

C: 彦卿自小就被将军带在身边，教授剑术与兵法。每日挥剑斩击一万次，刺击一万次，如是往复，如是往复……
E: Since I was a kid, I've been training in swordplay and the art of war under the General. Every day I'd swing my sword ten thousand times, and then thrust it ten thousand times, repeating the process over and over...

C: 我就开门见山了：起初，星穹列车受通缉重犯星核猎手的引导前来此地，试图解决星核危机。
E: Let's cut to the chase. Before the crisis struck, the Astral Express was guided here by a Stellaron Hunter, a wanted felon, in an attempt to resolve the Stellaron Crisis.

C: 太卜符玄是罗浮重臣，她的证词自然可以信任。但…即便是本人亲眼所见依然有被蒙蔽的可能。祸首来去自由，又离奇蒸发，当然让人心生疑惑。
E: Of course not, we can trust the testimony of Master Diviner Fu Xuan. However... even if she saw it with her own eyes, we can't completely rule out the possibility that she might have been deceived. After all, it's suspicious how the culprit just bizarrely vanished.

C: 飞霄将军打算怎么做？
E: What's in this plan, General Feixiao?

C: 我会召来接引者，带两位送往十王司问字部判官处，两位只需留下证言即可返回，不必担忧。
E: I'll call for a messenger to take you to the Interrogation Division. You just need to give your testimony and then you can head back. So, no need to worry.

C: 在仙舟上的其他地方，也许六御更有权威。但在幽囚狱里，十王司的判官却是至高无上的。
E: The Six Charioteers might have more power over the rest of this Xianzhou ship, but here, in The Shackling Prison, it's the judges of the Ten-Lords Commission who call the shots.

C: （嚎叫声）
E: (Howling noise)

C: 不知灵砂小姐是否清楚，为何最后呼雷没有被狐人居多的曜青仙舟收押，却独独囚禁在了罗浮之上？
E: I wonder if you know why Hoolay wasn't taken into custody by the foxian-majority Xianzhou Yaoqing, but instead imprisoned in the Xianzhou Luofu, Miss Lingsha.

C: 也许在那些学士眼中，步离人与实验动物也没什么区别。步离人之所以会袭击那艘舰船，也许就是想报复博识学会对他们的同胞的实验？
E: Perhaps to those scholars, borisin are no different from lab animals. Maybe the borisin attacked that ship to retaliate against the Intelligentsia Guild for experimenting on them?

C: 但正如我方才所说：许多利人善举，不过是灾难的开始。自那之后，六御合议决定，丹鼎司不再有司鼎一职，直到你今日前来。
E: But just as I mentioned earlier, the road to catastrophe is always paved with good intentions. Since then, the Six Charioteers decided that the Alchemy Commission would no longer have a Cauldron Master, until your arrival now.

C: 他们对长生种的模仿真是太过头了。
E: Their imitation of long-life species has crossed the line.

C: （继续前往港口）
E: (Continue towards the port)

C: （云骑应该早就察觉幽囚狱的状况了吧。飞霄会不会亲自带队来抓捕呼雷呢？）
E: (The Cloud Knights must have been aware of the situation inside The Shackling Prison for some time. Will General Feixiao personally lead a squad to capture Hoolay?)

C: 你敏锐地察觉到计程槎驾驶员附近的狐人乘客上下打量着你。
E: You keenly notice that the foxian passengers near the Starskiff Pilot are looking you up and down.

C: 想去玉界门外边，方便吗？
E: I want to get outside the Jade Gate. Can you take me there?

C: 很好，你没有蠢到用惨叫吸引别人的注意。这样也不会有人白白送死。
E: Good, at least you didn't try to draw attention with a scream. That way, no one will die in vain.

C: 你是谁？
E: Who are you?

C: 在狼群眼中，我们只是流淌着狐血的耗材，是战场冲锋时用来拖住仙舟攻势的炮灰。
E: In their eyes, we're mere consumables, cannon fodder used to slow down Xianzhou attacks on the battlefield.

C: 真的，这竞锋舰不够气派！
E: Seriously, the Skysplitter is nowhere near impressive enough!

C: 我就知道，走吧。
E: I knew it. Let's go.

C: 或许是长时间和{NICKNAME}相处，让三月七产生了「可以问问长椅」的冲动。
E: Maybe it's because she spends so much time with {NICKNAME} that March 7th has the urge to interrogate the bench.

C: 你就别再继续知己知彼了，走吧，我想去看看擂场。
E: That's enough knowing the enemy for now. Come on, I want to see what the ring looks like.

C: 眼下…他唯一能看到的船，只有天空中的竞锋舰了。
E: Right now... the only ship he'd be able to see is the Skysplitter.

C: 绝不允许！
E: Never!

C: 不管他们嘴有多硬，我都有办法撬开，让他们吐露些情报出来。
E: I don't care how tight their lips are sealed. I always have a way to crack them open and get the information we need.

C: 天击将军，我向你发出最后的邀请：我会在竞锋舰上等候你的到来。
E: The Merlin's Claw, I shall extend a final invitation to you: I will be waiting for you on the Skysplitter.

C: 「饮血酒」…听说步离人的战俗，是在上阵前杀俘饮血，激发狂性……
E: Drink bloodwine... I hear it is a borisin custom to kill prisoners and drink their blood before battle to stir up their madness.

C: 三月，我正在擂台下方！
E: March, I'm below the ring!

C: 呼雷…？
E: Hoolay...?

C: 他们还在，不要停！凝梨，抬头，看天上的光！
E: They're still behind us, don't stop! Neergul, look up! Look at that light in the sky!

C: 我去个盥洗室的工夫，你们都给我安排好了是吧？{NICKNAME}，你能不能陪龙女大人玩点阳间的游戏？
E: I was only in the bathroom for a little bit, and you've already arranged my death? {NICKNAME}, can't you play some normal games with Dragon Lady?

C: 我只是一介武人，所以，我也只能给你一种承诺……
E: I am just a warrior, so my pledge to you is simple...

C: 代表将军印信的光消逝殆尽，如同它降临时那样迅速。
E: The light representing the general's seal fades as swiftly as it arrived.

C: 不好意思啊陛下，帮不上什么忙。
E: My apologies, Your Majesty, I couldn't be of help.

C: 别理他。那边有个猎犬家系的成员，我们去找他谈谈。
E: Don't mind him. There's a member of the Bloodhound Family over there. Let's go talk to him.

C: 这点小事，犯不上陛下作保——我稍后就通知家族公馆释放埃夫姆。
E: This is too trivial a matter to be worthy of Your Majesty's guarantee. I'll inform The Family's mansion to release Ephraim shortly.

C: 哈哈哈，恭喜啊，荣升骑士了。
E: Hahaha, congratulations, you're now a knight.

C: 就像咱们皇帝陛下说的那样——在咱们这个时代，「好人」可是稀缺资源。
E: As Her Majesty said — good people are a rare resource in our time.

C: 恐怕正如我们所担心的那样，她在来到匹诺康尼之后，就与「家族」的某些高层做了笔交易，将自己过去的记忆彻底封存了。
E: It's probably just as we feared — after coming to Penacony, she made a deal with The Family's upper echelon and sealed her past memories away.

C: 有话好好说！
E: Let's calm down and discuss this!

C: 你有点水平。
E: You've got some guts, girl.

C: 嘿嘿～生在帝王家嘛，耳濡目染。
E: Tee-hee! I was born into imperialty, after all. Just putting what I've learned and heard to practice.

C: 朕当然不想做这种事，但…你能保证他们长大后不会憎恨自己的杀父仇人，再次掀起叛乱吗？
E: I don't want to do this either, of course, but... can you guarantee that when they grow up, they won't hate the one who killed their father, and attempt another coup?

C: 走吧，我可以当做没看见。
E: Leave, and I will pretend we never met.

C: 琳儿玛，灰骑士让你活得太久了。
E: Lenamar, the Gray Knight has let you live for too long.

C: 蒂索克二世颓然地看着你，突然开始嚎啕大哭。
E: Tizocic II dejectedly looks at you, and suddenly starts bawling.

C: （或许以后能在网络上刷到讲述她生平的内容吧……）
E: (Maybe I'll be able to get an update on her life when I browse the network in the future...)

C: 没问题，和臣民交流感情也是皇帝的工作～
E: No problem. It's the Emperor's duty to communicate with her subjects.

C: 此事背后疑点众多，我暂且无法根据有限的信息梳理出有信服力的结论。
E: There are too many uncertainties surrounding this matter. For now, I'm unable to come up with a convincing solution based on the limited information.

C: 我和{NICKNAME}此次前来，是为了探访一位住客。
E: {NICKNAME} and I are here to visit a hotel guest here.

C: 之前，在筑梦边境，我为你破了一次例。同样的事不会再发生第二次了。
E: I was lenient to you last time at the Dream's Edge. The same thing won't happen again.

C: 年轻的卡尔德隆•查德威克就站在你的面前。几个琥珀纪过后，你仍然一眼便能看出他神态中的积虑。
E: The young Calderon Chadwick is standing right before you. He wears the same contemplative expression even after several Amber Eras.

C: …亏你们能找到这么个地方。我还是第一次看到活体。
E: ...I'm impressed you guys managed to find this place. This is the first time I've seen living True Stings.

C: 按下起爆按钮。
E: Hit the detonate button.

C: 「致黑塔女士：尽管我在有生之年守住了自己的阵地，但以公司掌握的资源，他们终有一日会找到复现『虚数坍缩脉冲』的技术和方法。」
E: "To Madam Herta: While I've held my position during my lifetime, given the resources the IPC possesses, they will inevitably discover the means and techniques to reproduce the Imaginary Implosion Pulse."

C: 哦…真是张令人怀念的相片。
E: Oh... This photo really brings back memories.

C: （软的不行…就别怪我来硬的了！）
E: (If a good cop won't work... guess I'll have to go bad cop then!)

C: 「赤红大哥」的熟人。
E: A close associate of Boss Red.

C: …赤红大哥？好奇怪的名字。
E: ...Boss Red? What a strange name.

C: 抱歉，这已经是我能找到的最好的结局了。
E: I'm sorry, this is the best ending I could come up with.

C: 蓝色的折纸鸟如玩偶般安静，它拒绝再次开口。
E: The blue origami bird is as quiet as a doll, it refuses to speak again.

C: （唤醒奥尔拉）
E: (Wake Orla)

C: （保持沉默）
E: (Remain silent)

C: 没在夸你！哎…这点怎么也跟「钟表匠」一样。你们无名客都是一个模子里出来的吗？
E: I wasn't complimenting you! *sigh* ...Why are you exactly like the Watchmaker? Are all you Nameless cut from the same cloth?

C: 哼哼，等不到你，于是本公子只好屈尊来下面的「大树」了…不必谢我啾～
E: Heh-heh, you weren't coming, so yours truly has to personally come down to the Great Tree below... No need to thank me, tweet!

C: 四只折纸小鸟将中心的蓝色小鸟围住，啾啾声连成一片。你看到湛蓝爵士发自内心的笑容。
E: The four origami birds surround the blue bird, tweeting in unison. You see Dr. Blues' sincere smile.

C: 你回来的速度比我想象中快许多，调查已经结束了吗？
E: You're back faster than I thought. Is the investigation over already?

C: （不知这场抗争的结果如何。或许能在奥尔拉的记忆中找到最后的真相……）
E: (I wonder how this resistance ended. Maybe I can find the true ending in Orla's memories...)

C: 听见了没有，赔钱！
E: You heard that? Pay up!

C: 当这问题真正爆发时，民意势必如洪水般汹涌。我从未听说有人能因身份尊贵而免于淹溺。
E: When this problem truly explodes, public opinion is bound to surge forth like a deluge. A person's status has never saved them from drowning.

C: 我只是想见见外邦人出糗的模样罢了，他们中的某些家伙确实不太守规矩……
E: I just want to see outlanders make a fool of themselves. Some among them like to test the law's patience...

C: 这得看我能从他那里换来什么。
E: That would depend on what they'd have in exchange.

C: 怎样才能帮到他们？
E: How can we help them?

C: 谢绝了老店长的帮助，你带着篮子一路回到了重渊。
E: After politely declining the shopkeeper's offer to help, you bring the baskets back to the abyss.

C: 妈妈，我们什么时候到圣城？我要吃烤苹果派！
E: Mama, when will we reach the holy city? I wanna eat baked apple pie!

C: 您的这份恩情我们一定会回报——虽然暂时没钱，但如果有需要我们的地方，您尽管开口，我们随时乐意效劳。
E: We will definitely repay this favor. Though we have no money now, but if you ever have need of us, just give us the word, and we will be more than happy to help.

C: 来，宝贝，你也跟这位{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}道声谢吧。
E: Darling, say thank you to this kind {F#lady}{M#man}.

C: 审判将在三天后的<color=#dbc291ff>刻法勒广场</color>举行。届时也请您一同出席，见证圣城律法的公正。
E: The trial will be held at the <color=#dbc291ff>Kephale Plaza</color> in three days. We also invite you to attend, to witness the justice of the holy city's law.

C: 我建议你学习刻法勒的品德。
E: I suggest you learn from Kephale's virtues.

C: 为什么…为什么啊？你不是和我们一起去了重渊吗？你明明亲眼看见了一切，却还是……
E: Why... But why? Did you not go with us to the abyss? You clearly witnessed it for yourself, yet...

C: 圣城守卫们接走了所有能找到的外邦人——当然，没有带进城区，只是送到了避难所。这是我能给予的最大仁慈。
E: The guards of the holy city escorted all the outlanders who could be found. Of course, they were not brought within the city walls, but to the shelter. This is the greatest mercy I can offer.

C: 啊，有顾客！我刚才在向瑟希斯祈求赐予同胞们智慧，想买什么书？
E: Ah, a customer! I was just praying to Cerces to gift intelligence to my fellow citizens. Is there a book you are after?

C: 我的兄弟姐妹们说，它曾告诉他们的先祖：宁战死，毋荣归。唯有死于战场之上，成为纷争的祭品，才是值得骄傲的命运。
E: My siblings used to tell me of a prophecy that Nikador had told their ancestors: "Valorous death before glorious return." Only offering your life to the battlefield and becoming a sacrifice to strife is a fate worthy of pride.

C: 坏了坏了，伙计，这可怎么办呢？
E: Oh crap, oh crap. My friend, what do we do?

C: 有瓜！
E: Ooh, gossip!

C: 回去得问问她怎么保养的。
E: We'll have to ask her for her skincare routine.

C: 哈哈，我当然不知道了。如果我有答案，就绝不会在这奥赫玛多逗留一秒。
E: Haha, how would I know? If I knew that, I wouldn't linger one second longer in Okhema.

C: 但是似乎我们还是没有找到什么与阿卡迪亚有关的信息…得让追忆的岁月继续向前一些……
E: But it looks like we still haven't found enough information on Arcadia... We need to take these memories forward a little more...

C: 啊，原来你已经知道了……
E: Ah, so you already knew...

C: 不要再犹豫了，我们去找阿卡迪亚，躲开纷争与死亡，永远在浪漫中生活下去！
E: Hesitate no more. Let us go in search of Arcadia! We can escape strife and death and live a life of eternal romance!

C: 你可以继续锻造饰品、烹饪美味的食物、编织美丽的挂毯，让你在奥赫玛找到的新生活在那里延续……
E: You can continue crafting jewelry, cooking delicious meals, and weaving beautiful tapestries. Your new life that you discovered in Okhema... you can continue it there...

C: 而、而且，戍卫们会将菲罗克的死怪罪于你们！或许还会将你们捉回奥赫玛，处以最严厉的审判！
E: Further... Furthermore, the garrison guards will all place the death of Philoc on both of your heads! They may even bring you back to Okhema and see that you receive the most brutal of judgment!

C: 开拓力转动！你运转周天，双臂发力，气动山河——
E: Unleash the spiraling Trailblaze Power! You ignite the energy within, channeling it through your arms, gathering strength enough to move mountains and rivers...

C: 根据相对认知学派提出的等待第一定律，当你在进行无谓的等待时，大脑体验到的相对时间将会呈现指数提升的状态。
E: According to the School of Relative Cognition's First Law of Waiting, when you wait without purpose, the relative time your brain experiences will experience a state of exponential increase.

C: 呃，好乱的字迹，「又一个声音消失了，我还记得…帕西提亚，你是最该死的骗子，是你杜撰了神谕，所有人皆因你而死。」
E: Ugh, what messy handwriting. "Yet another voice disappeared, and I still remember... Pasithea, you're the most despicable liar. It's you who fabricated the prophecy, and everyone perished because of you."

C: 千万别想不开啊！
E: Please, don't do anything rash!

C: 荣耀将伴你左右，而后，石板上将雕刻出你的英勇。
E: Glory will follow your path, and after that, your heroism will be etched in epitaphs.

C: 继续往前吧，新的天外之音应该就在不远的地方。
E: Let's continue forward. New echoes from beyond the sky should be nearby.

C: （来自过去的幻影，变得越来越清晰了……）
E: (The illusions of the past are getting clearer and clearer...)

C: 可能是你的故事太精彩，让她不治而愈了？
E: Perhaps your story was so fascinating that it cured her without any treatment?

C: 列位看官，翁星翻覆千轮事，都付于你我笑谈。若是大限之后，老朽能与那群黄金裔英雄一同，让故事代自己为诸位铭记，倒也算妙事一桩。
E: Good sirs and ladies, the countless turns of Amphoreus's fate are now entrusted to our cheers and chatter. Should it be, when my final hour arrives, that this old man may join those Chrysos Heir heroes, and let the tale remember me on your behalf... Why, that would be a fine thing indeed.

C: 船长，你知道吗？我以前不是电话，而是一只猫头鹰。但现在，我不是猫头鹰，而是一台电话。
E: Captain, did you know that I wasn't always a dial phone? I used to be an owl. But I'm not an owl anymore, I'm a dial phone.

C: 忆质构成的世界？我不信，一定是橡木家族编出来的。
E: A world made of memoria? No way. That's gotta be something the Oak Family made up.

C: 科员们依旧那么忙碌。嗯，是熟悉的空间站。
E: The researchers are still as busy as ever. Yep, this is the space station I know.

C: 世界前所未有地安静，仿佛能听见心跳的声音。
E: The world has never been so quiet. It is as though you could hear the sound of heartbeats.

C: 我们的光！
E: Our light!

C: 翁法罗斯？由忆质构成的世界？胡扯！
E: Amphoreus? A world made of memoria? What a joke!

C: 但我的梦想，却很平凡，远远称不上有什么光芒。我只想成为能被大家接受的，和大家一样的人类。
E: But my dream is very ordinary, far from being "dazzling." I just want to be a human being who can be accepted by everyone.

C: 我说话还要关心你的想法？那我干脆去代理站长得了！
E: Why should I care about what you think? If I do, I might as well become the acting lead researcher!

C: 难怪大家说你不会说话…
E: No wonder people say you're difficult...

C: 哎呀！烦死了…我…我也不知道该怎么办嘛！说话难听这事…我知道！
E: Whoops! That's annoying... I... I don't know what to do! People say I don't have good communication skills... I'm aware of that!

C: 你真棒！
E: You're awesome!

C: 麻烦您帮个忙吧……
E: Please... I need your help on this...

C: 对啊，但这玩意情况有些特殊！
E: Yes, but this thing is special!

C: 你说的这个朋友是不是你？
E: You sure you're not talking about yourself here?

C: 你怎么一副神神秘秘的样子…
E: Why do you look so shady...

C: 对啊，它本来是我们科室借来的奇物。
E: Right. It was originally a Curio that my department had borrowed.

C: 他们人呢？
E: Where are they?

C: 不就是金色和绿色…
E: It's just gold and green...

C: 曼娅不想和你做朋友…
E: Manya doesn't want to be your friend...

C: 我的心中没有任何杂念，只想交一个真心朋友。反倒是我接触的那些人顾忌太多，或是对我的家世怀有疑问，或是对我抱持着无中生有的偏见。
E: I have no other intentions. I just want to make true friends. It was the people I came into contact with... They were too cautious. Some of them had suspicions about my family background, and some held prejudices against me for no reason.

C: …什么？他看过照片了吗？他有说什么吗？
E: What...? Has he seen the photo? Did he say anything?

C: …这么说，他来自贝洛伯格的上流社会？
E: So, he is from the upper class of Belobog?

C: 你听说了啊？你也知道，我常来这里思考，看着眼前的垃圾桶，就像看着我自己，年近三十却一事无成。
E: Did you? You know, I often come here to contemplate life. When I am looking at that trashcan, I feel like I am looking at myself. I'm close to <unbreak>30</unbreak> but I haven't achieved anything in life.

C: 呀，原来{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}是为这个来的吗，阿丽娜好开心哦~
E: Wow, did you come here for this? I am so happy.

C: 我找到了这些东西。
E: I found these.

C: 多亏了咱们的努力，「鼹鼠党振兴计划」又向前迈出了一大步！喏，这些奖励你拿好了，以后还要继续帮尤利安打下手哦。
E: Thanks to our effort, The Moles Reinvigoration Plan has taken another big step forward! Here, take these rewards, and keep up the good work!

C: 不愧是荣誉队员，要的就是你这股劲！
E: Not bad for an honorary member! That's the spirit!

C: 走吧，我们去诊所问问看——嘿嘿，这下说不定还能得到娜塔莎姐姐的表扬……
E: Let's go ask around in the clinic. Hehe, a helpful kid like me might even earn Natasha's praise...

C: 多谢你的帮助，荣誉队员{NICKNAME}！「鼹鼠党振兴计划」今天又向前迈出了一大步，这都多亏了你的努力…还有我的周密计划！
E: Thanks for your help, honorary member {NICKNAME}. The Moles' Reinvigoration Plan has taken another big step forward. This is the fruit of your contribution... as well as my careful planning!

C: 这有一封你父亲给你的信。
E: This is a letter from your father.

C: 那我推荐您买上一束「七彩虹」——这种小花色彩斑斓艳丽，是年轻人之间送礼的不二之选。
E: Then I recommend the Rainbows — these small flowers are a riot of color, perfect for gift giving between young people.

C: <unbreak>42</unbreak>辆。
E: <unbreak>42</unbreak>.

C: 当然，也请您不要气馁，继续加强学习。到那时再来挑战吧。
E: Of course, you shouldn't be discouraged! Keep working on your studies, and then come back to try again.

C: 你来得正好，都这么久了，教育部那边也该有回音了吧？快去帮我问问吧。
E: You're a sight for sore eyes. It's been ages. Has the Ministry of Education sent anything? Go on, help me find out.

C: 你就放心吧！肯为我做这么多事的人，你是第一个——我雷金不会亏待你的。
E: Rest assured! You're the first to ever do so much for me. I, Regin, will definitely make it all worth your trouble in the end.

C: 哎，你也来了啊？给你介绍一下，这位是波瓦大臣，贝洛伯格教育部的大臣。
E: Oh, you've come too? Let me introduce to you Minister Bova — Belobog's Minister of Education.
"Option three."

C: 咦？您的意思是……
E: Hmm? Do you mean...

C: 哎呀，答错也没关系，能活动活动脑筋总是好事，对吧？能帮上您的忙是教育部的荣幸。回见！
E: Ah, it's okay to get it wrong sometimes. Just giving your brain a workout is good, right? It's an honor for the Ministry of Education to serve you. See you next time!

C: 讨厌啦~怎么把小女子说得像巫婆似的。
E: Oh dear. No! I'm not a witch. Why would you say it like that?

C: 塔米拉？哦…有点印象，就是那位出名的歌剧演员吧。
E: Tamila? Ah... I remember, you mean that famous musical actress?

C: 我该去找谁？
E: Who should I find?

C: 看我心情…
E: It depends on my mood...

C: 吃一堑长一智嘛，留点心眼总是好的！
E: I'm just being smart. It's good to be on your guard around other people!

C: 难道你的意思是…我已经死了？
E: Are you saying that I... I'm dead?

C: 随后，这被困于裂界的小小回声很快便化作微光、四散无踪了。
E: Then, this tiny echo trapped in the Fragmentum scatters into particles of light and disappears.

C: 谢谢，年轻人…谢谢。
E: Thank you, kid... Thank you.

C: …喂！{M#你小子}{F#你这小姑娘}，看什么看！有啥好看的！
E: ...Hey! {M#Boy}{F#Girl}, what are you looking at? Nothing to see here!

C: 但我个人觉得这是个非常有意思的发明——我会顺着你的思路想想看，是否有复现的可能…感谢你提供宝贵建议，大兵！
E: But I personally think it's a very interesting invention, and I will follow your line of thinking and see if it can be made... Thank you for your valuable advice, soldier!

C: 这毫无疑问是一个漂流瓶，还是漂洋过海的那种。
E: This is undoubtedly a drift bottle, one that has crossed the ocean, too.

C: 「但是逃避不能解决问题，一时的解脱只会造成长期的痛苦。很多时候，凭一人之力无法改变环境，但是你可以改变自己……」
E: "But running away cannot solve anything, as a brief escape will only cause long-term suffering. More often than not, you cannot change the world on your own, but you can change your own perception of it..."

C: 哈哈，当然是免费的了，研发成本和前期测试的这点小钱都舍不得掏，我还做什么生意呀。
E: Of course it's free. If I can't cover the costs of research, development, and preliminary testing, what kind of business am I running?

C: 你连忙收起手指，但你继而又想到——三月七数手指是因为她有十根手指头，那么帕姆究竟是如何数指头的呢？从一数到二，还是从零数到零？
E: You quickly curl your fingers, but then you start to wonder: March 7th counts her fingers because she has ten of them, but how does Pom-Pom count their fingers? Do they start at one and count up to two, or start at zero and end at zero, too?

C: 无功无过吧。
E: Not bad, but there's not much else to say about it.

C: 精美的点心与盛放佳酿的水晶杯在架子上无人问津，有时候，最奢侈的不是享用它们的机会，而是拒绝它们的勇气。
E: The gorgeous delicacies and crystal goblets filled with the finest wine sit ignored on their shelves. Sometimes, what is most extravagant isn't the opportunity to enjoy their offerings, but the courage to decline them.

C: 这片区域被提供给了学者们，用于讲学或是辩论。人们会为了奥赫玛的未来而贡献出自己的智慧——或者为了「烤肉卷饼该不该加奶酪」一事而进行言语上的激烈交锋。
E: This area has been allotted to the scholars for academic lectures and debates. People will contribute their own wisdom to Okhema's future... or be engaged in fervent debate on whether cheese should be placed on grilled meat wraps.

C: 悬锋城文化的神龛，里面存放着英雄们的魂灵。
E: A shrine from the Castrum Kremnos culture, housing the souls of heroes within.

C: 你不禁觉得会产生这个想法的自己还真是个天才。
E: You think yourself quite the genius for even having this thought.

C: 他将钱袋塞到你手里，竟不给你拒绝的机会，一溜烟就跑开了。
E: He shoves the money pouch into your hands and scurries away before you can even refuse.

C: 原本为读者照明的灯盏早已熄灭，在你的帮助下，光亮重现。蒸汽折射出柔和的光晕，仿佛回到了浴场最繁盛的那段时光。
E: The reading lamp had long been extinguished, but with your help, it is reignited. The steam reflects a soft aura as if returning to the most prosperous days of the baths.

C: 灯柱回到了岗位，但你总觉得它们在背后偷偷打着哈欠——这大概就是工作太久的后遗症。
E: The lamppost returns to its post, but you can't shake the feeling that they're all sneaking a yawn behind your back — probably the aftermath of too much overtime.

C: 星际和平公司预祝仪式圆满成功，愿欢声笑语洒满弁才天国的每一个角落。
E: The Interastral Peace Corporation wishes the ceremony every success, expressing the hope that happiness and celebration will spread throughout all of Benzaitengoku.

C: 泰坦的时代后，惟有黄金色被奉为神圣。
E: After the era of the Titans, only the color gold is considered holy.

C: 掘石场
E: Excavation Ground

C: 还是说你怕了？觉得正当竞争比不过我，只好预先告饶？
E: Or are you saying that you are scared? Perhaps you think that your skill in battle is no match for mine, and you have no choice but to ask for mercy in advance?

C: …没错，尊贵的黄金裔，我恳求您予这可怜的生物一死。
E: ...That's correct, honorable Chrysos Heir. I implore you to grant this pitiful creature its death.

C: …事无巨细。
E: ...No matter how big or small?

C: 你记住了「失去故乡的女孩与她重新踏上的道路」
E: You remembered "The Girl Who Lost Her Home and The New Path She Took"

C: 你记住了「曾打碎过雕塑以及引发的某起事件」
E: You remembered "Breaking a Sculpture and the Incident it Caused."

C: 或许这就是记忆的本质——被时光包裹，却永远不会磨灭。
E: Perhaps this is the essence of memory — wrapped by the passage of time, but never truly erased.

C: …仙女木捎来讯息：在密林的彼端，学者们的圣地。
E: ...The White Dryad brings word: At the end of the forest, at the sacred site of scholars...

C: 想要更惊险刺激的世界，很好。想想你来这的旅程吧，穿过幽暗的密林，遭遇无数模样骇人的怪物的热烈欢迎，还顺势将路途中的宝物全都搜刮干净。
E: Craving more thrilling adventures? Perfect. Recall your journey here — passing through shadowy forests, greeted warmly by monstrous creatures, and naturally looting every treasure along the way.

C: …趁他们没发现，还是赶紧离开吧。
E: Best leave quickly before they notice.

C: 看他那服饰，挺面生的，估计是哪个逃荒至此的难民吧。
E: Judging by their clothes and the fact that I don't really recognize them... Probably a refugee seeking solace here?

C: 对，我们最想问的就是这个：那庭院里头…真的有「光」吗？
E: Yeah, that's what we really want to know: That courtyard... Is there really "light" in there?

C: {RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}与{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}在上，愿你的旅程兼具启迪与沉淀。
E: By {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} and {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, may your journey bring both enlightenment and reflection.

C: 这种简单的问题，竟然能难倒富有智慧的勇士吗？答案远在天边，近在眼前——就是正在和你说话的这头狮子吼吼！
E: Such a simple question, and yet it can confound a Warrior of wisdom like yourself? The answer is far away, and yet right before your eyes — it's the lion speaking to you now!

C: 嗯…<color=#dbc291ff>某座花园的墙外侧</color>……
E: Hmm... <color=#dbc291ff>outside the walls of a garden</color>...

C: 嗯…<color=#dbc291ff>瑟希斯的壁画前</color>……
E: Hmm... <color=#dbc291ff>before the mural of Cerces</color>...

C: 嗯…有位织者想成为祭司，却因不懂预言而遭嘲笑。金丝带来消息，它正趴在<color=#dbc291ff>某个房间的祭台前</color>，抱怨其它虫的不识货呢。
E: Hmm... there's a Weaver who dreams of becoming a priest but is mocked for not understanding prophecy. The golden threads bring word that the Weaver's sulking <color=#dbc291ff>before an altar in a room</color>, complaining about the others' lack of vision.

C: 眼睛、酸酸的…
E: My eyes are sore...

C: 海豹竟然都是活的？
E: The seals are alive?

C: 负责摆渡的木马，在冥河河畔的微风中轻轻摇曳，目前暂不营业。
E: The ferryman wooden horse gently sways in the breeze along the River of Souls, now out of service.

C: 为什么要买这个？
E: Why did you buy it?

C: 刻法勒的旁边。
E: By Kephale's side.

C: 泽弗，执拗是大工匠的老脾气了。当初尼卡多利袭城，哪次他没有挺身而出？
E: Zeph, stubbornness has always been the Grand Craftsman's trademark. When Nikador attacked the city, didn't he always step forward?

C: 一千年的时光…我见证了十位泰坦的殒落。从最初的娇蛮无知，再到摸索着为众人引路……
E: In these one thousand years... I've witnessed the fall of ten Titans. From my naive arrogance at the beginning to slowly learning how to guide others...

C: 你回想起车厢跨过云层被长枪洞穿的那一刻，那是冒险的伊始。在那之后，你目睹了燃尽血火的抗争，涉过月色下的花海…直到如今，主宰翁法罗斯命运的星辰渐次亮起。
E: You recall the moment the Express Car crossed the clouds and was pierced by the long spear. That was the beginning of the adventure. After that, you witnessed the strife that burnt out humanity's blood and walked through the sea of flowers under the moonlight... until now, when the stars that govern Amphoreus' fate are slowly lighting up.

C: 噗通——
E: Plop —

C: 哀丽秘榭的时间，的确过得很慢。
E: Indeed, time seems to pass very slowly in Aedes Elysiae.

C: 所有景象都与记忆中分毫不差。你一时难以弄清自己具体的所在，只好在这海滨一隅整理思绪。
E: Everything looks exactly as you remembered. You can't quite tell where or even when you are, so you take a moment by the sea to gather your thoughts.

C: 木马没有回应，感觉有些古怪。但貌似你也没有别的选择——
E: The wooden horse doesn't respond — it feels a bit odd. But you don't really have a choice...

C: 毫无疑问，你曾在故事里见过这个庞大的木制道具，瞧它那高高昂起的头颅，以及宽广到足以装进好几个人的空洞腹部——所有特征都与你的认知相符。
E: No doubt you recognize this massive wooden prop from stories — its proud head held high, with a belly so big it could fit several people. Every detail matches what you know.

C: 咕咚一声，你滑进了木质的容槽，内部远比外侧看上去更加宽广，但却残破不堪——还带着些许啃食的痕迹。
E: With a thud, you slide into the wooden container. The inside is much bigger than it looked from the outside, though it's in bad shape, with scratches and gnaw marks everywhere.

C: 不再流动的瀑布，如琥珀封印鱼群。就好似被困于此的歌者，那被命运禁锢的一生。
E: The waterfall no longer flows, its fish frozen mid-leap as if in amber — just as fate has bound the singer whose life remains sealed within.

C: 不过首先我要声明，这是门复杂的学问，我不会谈论那些你们可能强烈希望听到的*有趣杂谈*，我要讲的是你在别的教授那里听不到的知识。
E: But first, I must clarify that we're dealing with a complex subject. I will not be discussing any interesting trivia that you want to hear. I am here to share knowledge that you cannot get from any other professor.

C: 在那之后，她将回到她应去的地方，完成她应行的职责……
E: After that, she returned to where she belonged, to fulfill the duties she was destined to complete...

C: 但凭借这一抹心跳，和怀抱的温热……
E: But with this heartbeat, and the residual heat of this embrace...

C: 是么，放不下过去的人，却能抛舍旧物。那你呢？你既已决心与过去告别，为何还留着这只臂鞲？
E: Really? Someone who can't let go of the past, yet can throw away old belongings. What about you? If you're so determined to bid farewell to the past, why do you still keep this bracer?

C: 接纳过去，并赋予它独属于我的意义，这便是我的做法。
E: I accept the past and give it meaning that belongs to me alone. That is my way.

C: 把你的答案藏在心底，直到那个问题真正到来的那天。或许你心中的答案与此时此刻相比，已经发生了变化呢？
E: Keep your answer hidden in your heart until the day that question truly arrives. Who knows? Perhaps by then, your answer will have changed from what it is right now.

C: 嗯嗯，真是精妙绝伦的火筒设计…这个问题…原来是这样解决的吗？
E: Hmm, such an ingenious rocket design... So this is... how the problem was solved?

C: 对了，差点忘了火筒的发射咒语：明天见喀——
E: Oh right, I almost forgot the firing chant for the rocket: see you tomorrow, crrk—

C: 左脚踩右脚的独步？
E: A peerless step? Is that just your left foot tripping over your right?

C: 破碎如镜面的缺口，幽暗如深渊的忆海…我感受到了，我感受到了，那一定就是传说中无数强者纷纷挑战的……
E: Shattered like a broken mirror's edge, dark as the abyss in sea of memories... I can feel it, I can sense it... That must be the legendary place where countless mighty warriors have come to challenge...

C: 三月七和丹恒呢？
E: Where are March 7th and Dan Heng?

C: 我想问别的…
E: I'd like to ask about something else...

C: 既要脑子，也要肌肉。哔——啵。
E: It takes not just brains but also brawn. Beep-boop.

C: 那些家伙真是没完没了，怎么烧也烧不完。前线缺少了您的战斗力，只靠铁卫兄弟们也很难再进一步了。
E: Those guys just never give up, and we can't seem to deliver the final blow. Without your prowess on the front lines, it's hard to make any progress just by relying on the Silvermane Guards.

C: 请带路吧。
E: Please lead the way.

C: 你好，我是星际和平公司的员工，负责在此接引来客。你打算去旧武器试验场吗？
E: Hello, I am an IPC employee, I am in charge of welcoming travelers. Are you planning a visit to the Old Weapon Testing Ground?

C: 人赃并获！虽然你不是人…
E: Caught you red-handed! You're not human though...

C: 佩佩朝你露出了个灿烂的笑容。
E: Peppy flashes a splendid smile at you.

C: 「管家」的谎言被你和佩佩一一戳穿，它呆立在原地，不知所措地望向你。
E: Peppy and you exposed the lies of the butler. It stands rooted to the ground, looking at you, distraught.

C: 汪汪汪！
E: Woof woof woof!

C: 有些事不是我能决定的。
E: Some things are beyond my control.

C: {NICKNAME}，你是不是饿了呀……
E: Are you hungry or something, {NICKNAME}...?

C: 什么叫「既然你来了」？
E: What do you mean by "since I'm here"?

C: 等待指令输入…
E: Awaiting input...

C: 你找错人了，我现在就离开。
E: You've got the wrong person. I'm leaving now.

C: 再说了，老夫每天能处理的实验数据也是有限的，咱们就先到此为止吧。下次我再给你带点儿更好的东西过来。
E: Besides, the experimental data that I can process every day is limited, so let's stop here. I'll bring you something better next time.

C: 那就来吧！
E: Let's do it!

C: 真、真的吗？
E: R—Really?

C: 别高兴得太早。以前都是我故意让着你，现在我要发挥真实水平了！
E: Don't celebrate too soon. I was going soft with you before. Now, I will unleash my true potential!

C: 那就开始了。
E: Then let's go.

C: 你出的棋局也蛮有挑战的。
E: Your chess puzzles are pretty challenging, actually.

C: 您一定是{NICKNAME}大人吧？我患有眼疾，看不见您，还请见谅。
E: You must be {NICKNAME}. My apologies, but I unfortunately can't see you because of an eye affliction.

C: 我感觉心里有只鸟儿要飞出来了——飞翔…歌唱！
E: I feel like my inner bird is about to take flight and sing anytime!

C: 对。
E: Yes.

C: 在奥赫玛，若虫们以蝴蝶的样貌存在。它们身上的「浪漫」气息非比寻常，应该不难分辨。
E: In Okhema, the nymphs exist in the form of butterflies. The aura of "Romance" oozing from them is unusual, and should not be difficult to distinguish.

C: 等搜集到足够的若虫后，再回来找我吧，贵客。
E: Esteemed guest, return to me once you have gathered enough nymphs.

C: 哪里还有没搜集的若虫？
E: Where are the remaining nymphs?

C: 看来又得接待客人了，先打理下我的触角喀……
E: More visitors again, let me tidy up my horns first, crrk...

C: 晴空、青草、遛弯的公民们…扎格列斯老祖有云：「无所事事的午后，连思考都是罪过。」
E: Clear skies, green grass, citizens out and about... Our ancestor Zagreus once said: "The slightest thought is a sin on an idle afternoon."

C: 看见这黑潮侵袭过的大地，你不会想到沙漠中的秘宝吗？
E: Seeing this land ravaged by the black tide, doesn't it remind you of the secret treasure in the desert?

C: 巴特鲁斯是贼灵，{RUBY_B#诡计之泰坦}翻飞之币{RUBY_E#}是巴特鲁斯的祖师爷和老朋友，这不是显然的吗？
E: As a Spirithief, I, Bartholos, am blessed to call the {RUBY_B#Trickery Titan}Coin of Whimsy{RUBY_E#} both ancestor and friend. Rather obvious, no?

C: 老巴特鲁斯我偷走一本，那誊写商就多一笔生意——咱俩两两分账，实在是财源滚滚呀！只可惜，好好的生意又被你搅黄咯。
E: Every book old Bartholos steals, the scribe gets another commission — and we split the profit! We were just rolling in cash! A never-ending river of money! Though, you just had to dam it up.

C: 让我能活着遇见你。
E: So I could meet you while still alive.

C: ——事已至此，也只有打一架能让我找回点活着的实感啦，桀桀！
E: In that case, only a real fight can make me feel alive again, hehehe!

C: 呀呀呀…原来你是这么看啊。
E: Ahh... Is that how you see it?

C: 我在意。
E: I would.

C: 「于万物主宰有大信心者，可以吃一切存在之事物！」桀桀…暴食的形骸是可鄙的，暴食的灵魂却是高贵的！
E: "Those who truly believe in the ruler of all things may feast upon whatever exists!" Hehehe... The physical act of gluttony might seem disgusting, but the spirit behind it is absolutely noble!

C: 所以，怎么回事？
E: So, what's going on?

C: 这里是巴特鲁斯为自己精心挑选的归隐之地。换句话说…如果您哪天觉得自己手头不够宽裕…回这里翻翻，巴特鲁斯的财宝也是您的财宝！
E: This is the secluded retreat that I hand-picked for my retirement. In other words... should you ever find your coin purse a bit light, feel free to come back and rummage around. What's mine is yours!

C: 嗯……差不多是这个意思？不过为了避免误会，你还是听我解释一遍吧。
E: Umm... Kind of? But let me explain so you don't misunderstand me.

C: 说到「自己无法控制、甚至意识不到」的感官体验，那最容易想到的就是「做梦」了吧？
E: And naturally, the sensory experience that we aren't aware or in control of is dreaming.

C: 感觉事情没这么简单……
E: This doesn't feel that simple...

C: {NICKNAME}阁下…我相信，这些话对你也拥有类似的价值。您不妨告诉自己——
E: {NICKNAME}, I believe these words hold value for you as well. Perhaps you should tell yourself—

C: 迷津展露，交给你了。
E: The Maze has been revealed. I'll leave it to you.

C: …实话说，我也没有太大把握。情爱相关理应依靠墨涅塔的权能…总之，相信伟大的{RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}雅努斯{RUBY_E#}，先试试看吧。
E: To be honest, I'm not entirely confident about it either. Matters of love should ideally fall under the domain of Mnestia. Still, let's trust the great {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Janus{RUBY_E#} and give it a try.

C: {RUBY_B#门径之泰坦}万径之门{RUBY_E#}，请指引我们——
E: O {RUBY_B#Passage Titan}Gate of Infinity{RUBY_E#}, please guide us —

C: 嗯…愿你的前路明晰，辅祭。门径会永远为你敞开。
E: Hmm... May your path be clear, acolyte. The Passage will always remain open to you.

C: 总共有一、二、三…三个球！
E: There are a total of one, two, three... three balls!

C: 秘锁消融、褪去，贮藏其中的物事缓缓显现……
E: The seals unravel, fading away as what lies within slowly comes into view...

C: 这样就够了吗？
E: Is this enough?

C: 唉，克里珀没来，我也猜到了——选那个把护盾转化为伤害的祝福吧，咱们走快点。
E: Alas, Qlipoth didn't come. I guessed as much — Pick the Blessing that turns Shields into damage, and hurry onward.

C: 噢，你说得对，是我得意忘形了…抱歉，{NICKNAME}，你做得很棒！如果方便的话，请你再进去测试一下。
E: Oh, you're right. I got too excited... Sorry, {NICKNAME}. You did very well! If you don't mind, could you please go in for another test?

C: 不如多给点奖赏来得实际。
E: Not as good as adding more rewards...

C: 噢，那是肯定的——毕竟你要花更多时间在这个项目上。
E: Oh, but we will — after all, you're gonna be spending more time on this project.

C: 所以我更愿意和你谈谈更多奖赏的部分。
E: ...so I'd rather talk with you about the added rewards part.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「一个可悲的神灵，被仇恨与宿命束缚，永远得不到片刻的停歇。」</color>从她的语气里，你倒并没有听出可悲的意味，<color=#dbc291ff>「不过活着就是这样。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"A tragic Aeon bound by hatred and destiny, never to have even a moment's rest."</color> You don't hear any hint of sympathy for the said tragedy in her voice. <color=#dbc291ff>"But that's life."</color>

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「喂！怎么回事——」</color>一个女声说着，<color=#dbc291ff>「你的脑波有点不对劲，喂——」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Hey! What's going on — "</color> A female voice is speaking. <color=#dbc291ff>"There's something wrong with your brainwaves. Hey — "</color>

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「振作起来吧，{NICKNAME}，下一次Ⅸ的招数就没那么容易生效了。你很重要，真的，你的生命非常有价值，有很多人爱你。」</color>她毫无感情地说，<color=#dbc291ff>「你有意义，你是个了不起的人，你很受爱戴，你为世界带来了光明和未来。现在继续玩『模拟宇宙』，快！」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Cheer up, {NICKNAME}. IX's trick won't be so effective next time. You are important, really — Your life is very valuable, and there are many people who love you."</color> She continues emotionlessly. <color=#dbc291ff>"You have meaning. You are an amazing person. You are loved and respected. You bring light and a future to our world. Now, keep playing the Simulated Universe. Go!"</color>

C: 你一进入「模拟宇宙」，就听见黑塔抑制不住兴奋的声音：「{NICKNAME}，」你听得出她在努力佯装正常，「目前的『模拟宇宙』你还适应吗？」
E: You can hear Herta's excitement as soon as you enter the Simulated Universe: "{NICKNAME}," she asks, trying to play it cool, "Have you adapted to this version of the Simulated Universe yet?"

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「阿基维利，阿基维利！」</color>一个愉悦的声音笑道，<color=#dbc291ff>「真的是你？还是某个小小生灵在和我开致命玩笑呢——好啦，我很想张开双臂欢迎你，可是我没有手臂！毕竟我只是个被囚禁在计算机里的虚假神灵！」</color>祂的说话有种神奇的魔力，令你情不自禁地感到放松。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Akivili! Akivili!"</color> A cheerful voice laughs. <color=#dbc291ff>"Is that really you? Or is some tiny being playing a fatal joke on me — well, I'd love to welcome you with open arms, but I don't have any arms! I'm just a false god imprisoned within a simulation, after all!"</color> There's something magical about THEIR words that causes you to completely relax.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「这个混账又知道了，我得让螺丝咕姆再改改祂的数据…」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"This punk has figured it out again. I have to get Screwllum to edit THEIR data once more..."</color>

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「干得不错，今天就到这儿吧。我和几位合伙人商量了一下，决定加大投入。等你下次来的时候，会看到一个更完善的『模拟宇宙』。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"Great job. That's it for today. I've chatted with a few of my collaborators, and we've decided to re-double our efforts. Next time you come back, you'll see an even more perfected Simulated Universe."</color>

C: 里面的星神真的是虚拟的吗？
E: Are the Aeons in there really simulations?

C: 黑塔的人偶出现在模拟宇宙里，她之前只用声音和你交流，因此这次现身着实令人意外。她看了看你，面无表情。
E: Herta's puppet appears in the Simulated Universe. Having only communicated with you via voice before, it's a little surprising to see her manifesting like this. She looks at you expressionlessly.

C: 你凭借巡猎的直觉找到了答案所在的那一页——是概念的膨胀！祂的子嗣吞噬了太多食物…祂毁坏了宇宙「秩序」…祂威胁了世间「均衡」…祂拦住了「开拓」的道路…
E: With The Hunt's instinct, you find the page with the answer — it is the expansion of concepts! THEIR descendants have gobbled up too much food... THEY have disrupted the Order of the universe... THEY have threatened the Equilibrium of the universe... THEY have blocked the way of the Trailblaze...

C: 你察觉阮•梅的模拟形象轻盈地翕动着。她正欲言又止地注视一个于推演中生成的含糊剪影：
E: You notice Ruan Mei's virtual image swaying gracefully. She hesitates to speak while gazing at a blurry image generated in the derivation.

C: 「{NICKNAME}，还在等待星神回应？好无聊啊，玩个游戏吧。」黑塔嗤嗤地笑了，「你觉得谁最能跟阿哈合得来？」
E: "{NICKNAME}, are you still waiting for the Aeon's response? It's so boring. Let's play a game." Herta snickers. "Who do you think can get along with Aha the best?"

C: 你付的筹码是啥？
E: What kind of chips are you paying?

C: 于雄壮的锤音、呜咽音与不可知的音节响起之前，脚腕扭曲的「自灭者」凝视着你…他称自己一人与故去的事物对话已久，这里从来没有旅行者踏足。
E: Before the powerful hammering, whimpers and indecipherable words sound off, the Self-Annihilator with crooked ankles gazes upon you... He claims to have been alone in dialogue with the past for a long time, and that no traveler had ever stepped foot here.

C: 应当是第一个清晨？还是第二个？你的脑海有些混沌不清。你已经分不清过往的一切是想象，还是切实发生过的——那些杏仁香的苦涩味道无处不在，游戏的快乐也无法盖过它。接着，████████……连你的手指也█████……███渐渐变得沉重……
E: This should be the first dawn? Or the second? Your brain is a little addled. You can no longer tell if everything in the past was an imagination or actual occurrences — That almond-scented bitterness is everywhere, and even the joy of gaming cannot overtake it. Then, ████████... Even your fingers █████... ███ gradually grow heavier...

C: 应当是第一个清晨？还是第二个？你的脑海有些混沌不清。你已经分不清过往的一切是想象，还是切实发生过的——那些杏仁香的苦涩味道无处不在，游戏的快乐也无法盖过它。接着，████████……连你的手指也█████……███渐渐变得沉重……
E: This should be the first dawn? Or the second? Your brain is a little addled. You can no longer tell if everything in the past was an imagination or actual occurrences — That almond-scented bitterness is everywhere, and even the joy of gaming cannot overtake it. Then, ████████... Even your fingers █████... ███ gradually grow heavier...

C: 一种纯粹的「仇恨」突然涌现。你打量着身边的芸芸众生：这些该受审的「罪名」…欺诈者、双面性的背叛、彻头彻尾的虚伪，以及无知的狂妄……
E: A pure kind of "Hatred" suddenly manifests. You take in the crowd around you. These "crimes" that should be judged... deceivers, two-faced betrayal, absolute hypocrisy, and ignorant egotism...

C: 唷，{NICKNAME}，最近过得怎么样？
E: Hey, {NICKNAME}. How's it going?

C: 总之，麻烦你进去看看咯。
E: Anyway, please go ahead and take a look.

C: 倒是挺个性的…
E: It's quite unique...

C: 当然，也是斯蒂芬的点子——他总是把问题想的很简单，算了，能帮上忙就行。
E: No doubt, that's another of Stephen's ideas. He always underestimates the trickiness of an issue. Ah well, I guess as long as his ideas work.

C: 可喜可贺，你没记错——阿基维利！你也是局中之人。
E: Nice one, you remembered correctly — Akivili! You are also one of the actors in this piece.

C: 「我从未离开。」螺丝咕姆的声音响起，「{NICKNAME}，我会为你保驾护航。十分感谢，我的学术伙伴们。借由本次对『博识尊』的研究，我希望能溯源历史上的几位机械君王，考察无机生命的起源。结论：模拟宇宙的旅程从这一秒开始。」
E: "I never left," Screwllum's says. "{NICKNAME}, allow me to escort you. My deepest gratitude to my comrades in science. With the current research on Nous, I hope we can unearth the history of these machine monarchs and investigate the source of inorganic life. Conclusion: The Simulated Universe's journey begins this very second."

C: 越来越快地，新的*认知*覆盖了旧的*认知*，而更新的又在路上。你没有反应的时间，你的意识在不停奔跑、删档、重写、覆盖，思想被某种不可知的*力量*牢牢牵住——你的大脑正在飞速运转！
E: Faster and faster, this new *cognition* overwrites the old *cognition*, with even newer updates on the way. You have no time to react, while your consciousness hurtles without pause — deleting, rewriting, and overwriting. Your thoughts are fettered by some unknown *strength*. Your mind churns at an unfathomable speed!

C: 善见天？还未等你反应过来…你便感到周围的一切倏忽间化作泡影拉远——你注意到善见天不断缩小的倒影里，彩色的油污从漂浮的忆泡中溢出…等等，那不是浮黎！那是——
E: Eden of Blessed Insight? Before you can even react, you feel everything around you turning into shadowy bubbles and pulling away in an instant. You notice that in the quickly-shrinking reflection of Eden of Blessed Insight, multicolored oil oozes out from the floating Memory Bubbles... Wait, that isn't Fuli! That is —

C: 你已经知道：战争持续两个琥珀纪后，「博识尊」计算中的第二个时刻就会到来。
E: You already know: After the war lasts for two Amber Eras, the second moment that Nous calculated will arrive.

C: 「『迷思』…我看到了祂的痕迹。」阮•梅思忖道。
E: "Mythus... I saw THEIR trace," Ruan Mei says contemplatively.

C: 接着你看见…全宇宙的*货币*和*资源*都汇聚到这条河中！它被<color=#dbc291ff>路易斯•弗莱明与东方启行握在手中！</color>你惊恐地瞪大双眼…你明白这就是银河*财富*最终的归处。
E: Then, you see all the *currencies* and *resources* in the universe converging into the river! It is <color=#dbc291ff>in the grasps of Louis Fleming and Dongfang Qixing!</color> Your eyes widen in consternation... as you realize this is where the wealth in the universe ends up ultimately.

C: 「赞达尔祝福你！」这位智械开心地大笑了起来，「期待你的自我认知发展，旅途愉快。」
E: "May Zandar bless you!" The Intellitron breaks into hearty laughter. "I look forward to seeing your development of Intra-Cognition. Have a great trip."

C: 「帝皇祝福你！」这位智械开心地大笑了起来，「期待你的自我认知发展，旅途愉快。」
E: "May His Imperial Majesty bless you!" The Intellitron breaks into hearty laughter. "I look forward to seeing your development of Intra-Cognition. Have a great trip."

C: 为了笑容。
E: For smiles.

C: 它能够永恒吗？
E: Can it really be forever?

C: 很显然，这并非他们想要的回答。
E: Obviously, this was not the answer that they wanted to hear.

C: 斑斓星的地下警报迭起，最高等级的危机即将到来。整装待发的泯灭帮集结了上千艘战舰，他们要剥开这颗「存护」的果实，吃掉它的骨肉，蹂躏它的种子。
E: The underground alarms are ringing on the Resplendence, the highest-level threat looming. Locked and loaded, the Annihilation Gang has assembled thousands of warships and is ready to peel open this fruit of "Preservation" — eat its flesh and bone, while grinding its seeds to dust.

C: 愤怒地驳斥。
E: Angrily refute.

C: 当你知晓军团的下一个目标时，嘴角立即浮现出一抹愉悦。踏着毁灭的火焰，反物质的车轮在不知恐惧的世界间驰骋，君王们以强大与豪横作为自己的代名词，而你是掀起浩劫的军团指挥，带着杀伐的屠灭武器，将他们碾压作齑粉。
E: Once you learn of the Legion's next target, a hint of joy instantly turns up at the corners of your mouth. Riding upon the flames of Destruction, the wheels of antimatter careen through a world that knows no fear, with the kings themselves being symbols of power and arrogance. And you are the commander of this legion that wreaks havoc, wielding your murderous weaponry as you smite your adversaries down to powder.

C: 来自各界的讨论很快淹没了拍卖，自称是学者和收藏家的投影竞相涌入会场，争抢在蒂玫德星诞生的首件艺术品。
E: Heated discussion from various factions swamps the auction, and projections of self-proclaimed scholars and collectors rush to materialize at the venue, each eagerly competing for the debut artwork created by a Demeter artist.

C: 小小的作弊。
E: I may have cheated a little.

C: 水民们从海里爬出来，冒着在海滩搁浅的风险，将干瘦的孩子送到你的面前，成年人不断地把海水泼到病人身上，以防他们被太阳烤干。
E: The water people crawl out from the seas, risking becoming stranded on the beaches to bring their malnourished children before you. The adults constantly pour seawater onto the bodies of the sick to prevent them from drying out in the sun.

C: 好极了，能吃下整窝蚂蚁。
E: I feel fantastic! I could devour a whole ants' nest!

C: 苍白的天花板，红色的玫瑰，哭泣的家人，奇怪的来访者。你不知道这些人是谁，他们突然出现在行将就木者的病榻前，你的家人们握着你的手抽噎：你有救了，你有救了。你的心脏依然在蒸腾着已为数不多的血液。
E: A blank white ceiling, a red rose, a crying family and strange visitors. You have no idea who these people are, as they suddenly appear at your deathbed. Your family takes your hand and sobs: You can be saved. You can make it. The little blood you have remaining still burns in your heart.

C: 「实验到此为止。」高大来访者说，他举起枪，击穿了你的心脏，你清楚地听到自己的心脏发出一声哀鸣。你怒嚎着冲向他，但最终倒在半路，纵有银亮月光洗涤，鲜血依然浑浊不堪。
E: "The experiment ends here." The tall visitor raises a gun and shoots you through the chest, as you clearly hear a cry of despair coming from your own heart. You rush at him with a furious roar, but collapse to the ground before you can reach him. Though cleansed by the silver light of the moon, your blood remains clouded and dull.

C: 一股轻微的震颤自脚下传来，视线扭曲，你感到苦痛的眩晕。
E: You feel a light shaking beneath your feet. Your vision starts to waver, and you feel a painful dizziness.

C: 意识在逐渐消散。
E: Your consciousness is slowly dissipating.

C: 他是「权杖」组成的神经系统中，唯一的细胞核。他在铸铁的王座上，<color=#dbc291ff>自我加冕！</color>
E: He was the only cell nucleus in the nervous system formed by the Scepters. He <color=#dbc291ff>crowned himself</color> upon the Iron Throne!

C: 他会杀死所有的生命。
E: He would have killed all life.

C: 女人看向天空，她那无形的视线宛如钉死蝴蝶的标本针，将某个结果确凿无疑地钉死在了模拟宇宙中——天空中星罗棋布的「权杖」开始瘫痪熄火。
E: The woman looks skyward, her invisible gaze like an insect pin that stakes down butterflies, pinning down a certain outcome in the Simulated Universe without the shadow of a doubt — The Scepters scattered among the sky begin to malfunction and extinguish.

C: 波尔卡离去了。你松了口气，你们捡回一命。
E: Polka has left. You relax. Your lives are safe.

C: 你睁开眼，如一片遮蔽海洋的云翳在转瞬间散去，星光投射在你的传感器里。无论将视线往什么地方移动，能看到的，只有一望无际的星海。
E: You open your eyes. A great nebula disperses in front of your eyes like clouds over a vast ocean as starlight hits your sensors. No matter where you cast your gaze, all you can see is an endless sea of stars.

C: 你迫切地想要知道，那些曾受你保护的人去了哪里？为了替他们赎回笑容，你甚至献出了最后的机心。
E: You desperately want to know where the people you once protected have gone to. You even sacrificed your last mechanical heart to buy back their smiles.

C: 打开奇物商店。
E: Open the Curio Store.

C: 蚂蚁很快摆出了几个像素字「那就是你呀！」你决定不再理会这些蚂蚁。你在一朵飘来的像素云上看到几个蜡笔字「黑塔制造」。
E: The ants quickly form several pixel characters that read, "That's you!" You decide to ignore the ants. On a pixel cloud that drifts in your direction, you see some words written with crayons: "Produced by Herta."

C: 「出了个小意外，不过问题不大。」黑塔的声音突然传来，你找不到声音的来源。「系统里一部分球形代码产生了熵增，常有的事。」
E: "There is a small glitch, but it can be easily taken care of." It's Herta's voice, sourceless, ephemeral. "Entropy appeared in some spherical codes in the system. It is a common occurrence."

C: 你抓住了一缕长发…你很愧疚。
E: You catch a handful of long hair... and regret doing so.

C: 「你知道什么是超乐透体验吗？」他小声在你耳边耳语，「我可以为你提供…超乐透体验…呃，只要你为『奥斯瓦尔多·施耐德』的竞选投上一票」
E: "Have you heard of the Super Lottery Experience?" He whispers into your ear. "I can provide you with... the Super Lottery Experience... as long as you vote for Oswaldo Schneider in the election."

C: 「答对了…就有奖励。」
E: "If you answer it correctly... you'll be rewarded."

C: 一盏烛火被点亮，司美之神隐约阔绰的面容在碎片中摇曳…你看得更清晰了，但此时，一位揽镜人的面容却突然从巨大碎片中出现！
E: As one of the candles is lit, a vague image of the God of Beauty's broad face flickered within the fragment... Just as the image gets clearer, the face of a Mirror Holder suddenly appears within the massive fragment!

C: 你要接受吗？
E: Do you want to take the deal?

C: 「真是怀念，曾经，也有个像你一样的有机体站在这里，被帝皇亲手创造的生命所震撼。」
E: "How nostalgic. Once, there was also an organic creature like you standing here, marveling at the lives created by the emperor."

C: 当你回过神来，智械老人已经带着它走远了，身前只留下满地的辙印。
E: By the time you snap out of your trance, the ancient Intellitron has gone far with the machine, leaving behind tire tracks on the ground.

C: 疲惫的现状并非你期望的样貌。考虑的太多，却使你常常错过眼前的机遇，并为此陷入悔恨之中。
E: The weary state you find yourself in isn't what you hoped for. Overthinking has cost you a lot of opportunities, leaving you wallowing in regret.

C: 它问你，有什么特别想吃的东西。你说——随便。
E: It finally asks you: "Is there anything you really want to eat? Just tell me, anything."

C: 柜员们的皮肤在黄与蓝间转换，表达他们的送别。「感谢您对时间代理银行的支持——请务必牢记，时间就是金钱，金钱就是一切。」
E: The staff's skin colors fluctuate between yellow and blue, indicating their farewell. "Thank you for your support of Time Agency Bank. Always remember: Time is money, and money is everything."

C: 由于没几个人押中了这艘飞船，你一下子赚得盆满钵满。
E: As not many people placed bids on this ship, you ended up making a massive fortune in an instant.

C: 但你笃信，再多的失败，也掩盖不住你的光芒。
E: But you firmly believe that no amount of failure will overshadow your radiance.

C: 锐利的阴影将牢狱的石壁撕裂，凄厉的寒风刺骨，公正之秤的赐福也到此为止。
E: Sharp shadows shred the prison's stone walls, piercing winds chill to the bone — the Scale of Justice's blessing ends here.

C: 随着你一根木棒挥下，扮演怪物的孩子们便纷纷入戏地倒下，然后发出咯咯的笑声。
E: With a swing of your wooden stick, the children playing monsters would fall dramatically to the ground, followed by gleeful giggles.

C: 已功成名就的你骤然意识到，这正是多年前被你无视的错误数据，在机缘巧合下诱发的结果。如果这件事被捅了出去，想必你很快就会被树庭扫地出门。
E: Having achieved fame, you suddenly realize that this is the result of a stroke of luck from the erroneous data that you ignored all those years ago. If this matter were to get out, you would surely be unceremoniously cast out of the Grove.

C: 战争仍未结束。
E: The war is far from over.

C: 可圣树不解真情。
E: But the sacred tree did not understand those feelings.

C: 然后，人子啊，披上黄金的残蜕，化茧成蝶吧，替陨落的神明带回消逝的美丽。
E: Then, children of humanity, don the golden remnants, transform from the cocoon to butterflies, and bring back the faded beauty of the fallen gods.

C: 如无足的飞鸟。
E: Like a bird without feet.

C: 气流变得越来越不稳定，飞行器像落叶一样飘来飘去，连棉花糖也被撕扯掉不少，你知道这是艾格勒在搜索你。
E: The winds grow more erratic, tossing your machine like a drifting leaf. Strips of cotton candy are ripped away by the turbulence. You know what this means — Aquila is searching for you.

C: 一周后，你收到了神悟树庭发来的悲报「您的学术成果非常具有科研价值！但遗憾的是与主流研究方向不符，您的简历已进入人才库，期待未来与您合作。」
E: A week later, the Grove of Epiphany delivers its verdict — a polite rejection. "Your research holds immense academic significance! However, it does not align with our current primary research direction. Your credentials have been added to our talent database, and we look forward to potential collaboration in the future."

C: 你的才华彻底征服了面试官，他直言不讳地说你是这么多年来最优秀的面试者。
E: Your sheer intellect and mastery leave the interviewer speechless. With rare, unfiltered admiration, he declares you the most outstanding candidate he's seen in years.

C: 可不要去责怪塔兰顿的无情，去看看大地断裂的脊梁，那就是生命无休止繁衍的代价。
