E: Ever since I lost my ability to move in a Spheroid accident, I've come to realize something... What they need more than pity and sympathy is respect and equal treatment.

C: 曾有一个孩子好不容易鼓起勇气唱出自己的声音，却被人当面嘲讽难听。回去之后，我便再也没有见过她。
E: I had a child who worked really hard to gather her courage and sing out loud, yet people laughed at her and told her she was terrible. I have not seen her again since she left.

C: 我会一直坚守在这里，为了我自己的理想……
E: I am going to always stay here... for my ideal...

C: 你见过忆域迷因吗？那是一种因人的情感与欲望而诞生的梦境生命体——或者说一种类似于生命体的「现象」。你见到的折纸小鸟也是差不多的东西。
E: Have you seen a Memory Zone Meme before? That is a Dreamscape lifeform born out of people's emotions and desires, or simply put, it's a "phenomenon" akin to a lifeform. The origami birds you've seen are no different from that.

C: 嗯…有个到处捣乱的小鸟老爱在别人的作品上恶作剧，<color=#dbc291ff>入口那边的海报上</color>看看吧，它估计又在那干坏事呢。
E: Hmm... There's a mischievous bird that loves playing pranks on others. Take a look at <color=#dbc291ff>the poster by the entrance</color>. It could be up to no good there.

C: 等找到它了再来吧。
E: Come back again when you find it.

C: 一枚硬币换一条线索——不许讨价还价啾。
E: A coin for a clue, and no haggling, tweet.

C: 客官，您就忍心看着一只可爱的小鸟为此落泪吗？啾啾？
E: Honored guest, would you bear to see an adorable bird shed tears because of this? Tweet tweet?

C: 于是我蓦然惊醒——\n耽于美梦者醉死梦中，无缘黎明
E: And so I wake up in a start...\nThe dreamer drowning in his own dream, never seeing the light of daybreak.

C: 亲爱的朋友，恭喜你夺得热砂盛典的冠军！
E: Dear friend, congrats on winning the Scorchsand Festival championship!

C: 咳咳，我刚才说的是不是很振奋人心？下次采访我也这么说！
E: Ahem, did I move you with my re-telling? I'll do it again the next time you interview me!

C: 顾客，你一定在梦里见过那些痛苦的「美梦剧团」吧？
E: Customer, you must have seen those suffering Sweet Dreams Troupe members in the Dreamscape, no?

C: 是球棒星。
E: It's Planet Baseball Bat.

C: 朋友，好好逛逛流梦礁吧，这里藏着家族不愿展露给世人的东西…和我希望你能看到的东西。
E: My friend, be sure to make the most of your stroll around the Dreamflux Reef. There are hidden things that The Family does not wish for the world to see... as well as things I hope you will see.

C: 我从出生以来就在听从「同谐」的教诲，与兄弟姐妹们服务于各个分家，从未有过二心……
E: I obeyed Harmony's teachings since I came to this world and served the various clans with my siblings, never once betraying them...

C: 请别急着拒绝，现在尚且为时过早……
E: It's too early for you to reject me just yet...

C: 抱歉，美丽的女士，我已经有安排了。
E: Apologies, beautiful lady. I've already made plans for tonight.

C: 它不过是强行将人们连接在一起，勉强拼凑出欢乐美好的假象…我深谙它何其虚假，就如同我了解自己是多么的虚伪不堪。
E: It merely forces people together in a feeble attempt to create the illusion of bliss and happiness. I understand this is a fantasy, just as I am inherently aware of my own hypocrisy.

C: 倒不是我卖弄资历，近年来年流行的复古风潮，在我看来实在是太浅薄了……
E: I'm not one to flaunt my seniority, but in my opinion, the retro revival fad in recent years is too superficial.

C: 她完全没有注意到你的接近，这实在不是什么好习惯。
E: She doesn't notice your approach at all. You really shouldn't make a habit out of this.

C: 以极其小心的动作，她从口袋了取出了管状的密封容器，随后轻巧地打开。
E: With great care, she removes a sealed tube-shaped container from her pocket and opens it.

C: 哦？看来您对这方面还是很感兴趣嘛。
E: Oh? You look interested.

C: 既然你能够看到作为记忆存在的光影，触摸到作为记忆存在的人们……
E: I know you can see and touch the shadows of those who have become memories.

C: 所以，免费的忆域潜水不成问题，我甚至还可以提供许多必要的支持。
E: Meaning, I'm more than happy to provide you all the support you need for your free Memory Zone dive.

C: 没错，冷静下来，好好想想该怎么把握机会……
E: That's right, calm down and take a moment to consider how to make the most out of this opportunity...

C: 话又说回来了，我只是个穷鬼而已…这种豪华旅行的直播，大家应该更想看纸醉金迷的部分吧？我连花天酒地的资本都没有，更别提播给别人看了……
E: Also, I'm just a broke girl... Those who watch luxury travel channels are probably drawn in by the opulence. I don't have the funds to splurge, much less flaunt them on-camera...

C: 可是我总感觉事情没那么简单…不行不行，还是得再好好想想……
E: Though I doubt it'll really be that easy... Ugh, these thoughts need to go away. I'll have to think harder...

C: 啊，我知道了！一定是因为自己又弄巧成拙了……
E: Ah, I get it. I must have messed it up again...

C: 我想和你聊聊…
E: I want to chat with you...

C: 你看起来很苦恼，怎么了？
E: You seem distressed. What's on your mind?

C: 碰到这种客户，我就感觉自己像是跟整个世界为敌——想想吧，连你的客户都不信任你该有多伤士气！
E: With such clients, it's as though I'm fighting against the world. What if it were you? Can you imagine how demoralizing it is when your own client refuses to trust you?

C: 但和其他星球没什么不同…在所有光鲜亮丽的表面下，都有它的阴暗面，匹诺康尼也不例外。
E: Just as how the other planets have a dark side beneath their welcoming and dazzling appearance, the same holds true for Penacony.

C: 让我想想…对了，有个孩子非常喜欢食物的香气，或许这会正在<color=#dbc291ff>餐桌附近</color>转悠呢啾~
E: Let me think... Oh right, there's a child who loves the aroma of food. Perhaps it is hovering around <color=#dbc291ff>some dining tables</color>, tweet~

C: 你都卖些什么…
E: What have you got for sale...?

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 弹琴的那点手艺没有让我变成大明星，却让我成为了调饮师，给了我一份稳定的工作。
E: The skill I honed from playing the bass didn't turn me into a superstar, but instead, landed me a stable job as a drinksmith.

C: 或许不是每个人都能理解，但我觉得或许这就是成年人的自我和解吧。打工也没什么不好的，至少我不会再为生活费发愁了。
E: Some may disagree, but I guess this is just coming to terms with adult life. There's nothing bad about having a job, at least I never have to worry about making ends meet anymore.

C: 我与每位船员都深入地聊过，以了解他们的兴趣、特长以及梦想，然后根据这些信息为他们设计最合适的工作分工。
E: I've had deep conversations with every one of the crew members to learn their interests, strengths, and dreams. I use this information to create jobs that suit them to a T.

C: 嘿，你想听个…关于我的小故事吗？
E: Heh, do you want to hear... a little tale about me?

C: 朋友说我三杯下肚后，直挺挺地倒了下去，像块大板砖拍在了地上。这动静惊动了隔壁桌的哈鲁小姐，她以为我出了什么事，急忙跑过来……
E: My friends said I fell to the ground like a log after chugging down those three shots, creating so loud a thump that it startled Haru at the table next to ours. They also said she hurried over to check on me...

C: 他终于察觉到了你的存在，你看着他的脸由红润变得煞白，过一会又转为青绿，最后总算恢复了血色。
E: When he finally notices your presence, you see his face flit through a spectrum of colors: from the bright red of a flashing siren to a ghostly pallor, and to a noxious green before returning to normal.

C: …我就知道你要问这个！别以为皮皮西人的体型小，就可以随便欺负！
E: ...I knew you were going to ask that! Don't think that you can just bully Pepeshi because we're small!

C: ——那家伙真是气死人！下次再让我见着，非得给他来个过肩摔不可。
E: ...That guy just makes me so dang mad! Next time I see him, I'm gonna judo throw him into next week!

C: 没什么问题。
E: I don't have any more questions.

C: 那些没有职业素养的人…真让人作呕。
E: Those who lack professionalism... They make me sick.

C: 唔…刚刚那句措辞似乎不够严厉…换成「拿学生们的前途开玩笑」或许更适合些？
E: Hmm... I don't feel like that phrasing is harsh enough... Maybe I should change it to: "making a joke of student futures"?

C: 现在，我是财富学院的英雄——忍者•契波大人！哈哈哈哈！
E: Now, I'm the hero of Fortune Academy — Master Ninja Czipo! Hahahaha!

C: 经理{F#小姐}{M#先生}想聊天的时候，随时来找我就行！
E: If you ever want to chat, do look for me anytime!

C: 「——我等乃是『缭乱』！！！」
E: "...We are The Dazzling!!!"

C: 那你后续有什么打算？
E: So what's next for you?

C: 我始终以音乐作为人生的目标，这点不会改变。但现在，比起在学院里接受训练，我想去接触更丰富的音乐形式，拓展自己的眼界。
E: I have always made music my life's goal. That much hasn't changed. But now, rather than practice at the academy, I'd rather expose myself to an even wider variety of music forms and broaden my horizons.

C: （写下煽情的寄语）
E: (Write an emotional message)

C: 确实，我赞成你的看法。
E: Honestly, I fully agree with you.

C: 还是先毕业再说吧。
E: Graduate first, please.

C: 我曾经为此感到害怕，感觉在这里失败后人生就丢失了许多价值，浪费了许多时间…但自从那天跟乱破同学聊过后，我好像明白了什么。
E: I was once really afraid of this, like my life would lose so much value, and I'd have wasted so much time if I failed here... But ever since I spoke to Rappa that day, I feel like I've come to understand something.

C: 在列车上的生活…
E: Life on the Express...

C: 没什么。
E: It's nothing.

C: 整座地窖价格最低廉的产品，花上十年的工资就能买到。
E: It's the cheapest product in the whole cellar, and you'll be able to afford it with a mere ten years of salary.

C: 「让我们为盛会巨星的诞生献上喝彩——本海选由苏乐达独家赞助播出，快乐美梦速速达，大家一起苏乐达。」
E: "Let us cheer the birth of a superstar for this competition. These auditions are sponsored by SoulGlad: 'Make Your Dreams a Blast, Everyone Have Some SoulGlad.'"

C: 你握住舵轮，它的手感比你预想的还要顺滑，可惜自动驾驶程序正按照既定线路航行，令你突如其来的手感无处发挥。
E: You grasp the wheel, its texture even smoother than you imagined. It's a pity the navigation program is traveling on its pre-determined route, preventing you from wielding the sudden rise of your navigational spirit to its fullest.

C: 在摆弄片刻后，瞭望镜的镜头对准物体自动缩放——
E: After fiddling with it for a moment, the telescope's lens is aimed at an object and auto-zooms...

C: 瞭望镜的镜头在不断缩放后，焦距达到极限。
E: The telescopic lens' focal length reaches its maximum after continuously zooming in and out.

C: 这片战场，是众泰坦与黑潮死斗的证明。
E: This battlefield stands as testament to the death struggle between the Titans and the black tide.

C: 我得把自己变高一点。
E: I have to make myself taller a bit.

C: 先拿个签名再说！
E: Get their autograph first and ask questions later!

C: 那不然呢？
E: What else?

C: 咱们报纸卖得多好啊…
E: Our papers have been selling well...

C: 这就是艺术的殿堂吗？
E: Is this the hallowed ground of the arts?

C: 匹诺康尼，传奇云集…
E: Penacony, a wonderland where legends gather...

C: 别惦记你的现实女友了！
E: Just forget about your girlfriend in reality!

C: 这面墙不是可以穿过吗？
E: Isn't this wall supposed to be passable or what?

C: 三个惊梦剧团。
E: Triple Dreamjolt Troupe.

C: 好想坐过山车…
E: I want to ride the roller coaster so bad...

C: 或者您最近有理财投资的打算吗……
E: Or maybe you're looking for investment plans...?

C: 那什么时候下班呢？
E: What about outside working hours?

C: 此刻在你眼前有报纸一份，斑驳字迹潦草涂遍它全身；
E: A newspaper lies before you, scribbles abound. In its heart, bitterness, a desire profound.

C: 我…我紧张不行吗！等我先做一下心理建设！
E: I... I'm getting nervous, okay? Let me calm down a bit first!

C: 这都多少起袭击事件了，到底什么人啊，一天到晚就盯着「美梦剧团」祸害……
E: How many attacks have there been? Those culprits seem to target only the Sweet Dreams Troupe... Why?

C: 是不是该发个号。
E: Maybe they need to give us queue numbers.

C: 嘶——我这破记性……
E: Tsk... Curse my terrible memory...

C: 您看，这份投资计划…
E: Look, this is the investment plan...

C: 直视我，恶徒！
E: Face me, villain!

C: 广告词呢？说词儿！
E: Where's the ad? Run it!

C: 那是个厉害的家伙。
E: He's really strong.

C: 这…你不会把工资都全搭进去了吧？
E: Err... You didn't bet your entire pay, did you?

C: 别说是你，就算来的是知更鸟小姐和梅芙恩女士，我们也照拦不误。
E: Even if Miss Robin or Lady Maeven were here, we'd still intercept them, much less you.

C: 不是，这次是我自己打听到的，听说是「慈玉女士」亲自坐镇，我绝不可能被骗！
E: No, no. I asked about this all on my own this time. I hear Lady Bonajade is personally assuming command! I couldn't have been lied to!

C: 我以为在学校里避嫌就好，没想到在艾迪恩公园还能碰见自己的学生。
E: I thought I'd be fine if I just stayed away from gossip at school — I wasn't expecting to run into my own students at Aideen Park.

C: 匹诺康尼大剧院的舞台，你曾经奋力战斗过的地方。即使过去了不短的时间，你仍旧能清晰回忆起响彻天际的乐声，以及那场没有尽头的梦。
E: The Penacony Grand Theater, a stage you once fought tooth and nail on. It has been a while, but you can still freshly remember the divine melodies and that endless dream.

C: 可能会有人好奇校长的藏书品味，但书架上有哪些书可能连校长本人都不知道。
E: Someone might be curious about the tastes of the dean's stashed book collection, but even the dean wouldn't know what books there are on the shelves.

C: 啾~啾啾~啾啾啾啾~这位客人，我们在跟随舞台的旋律练习合唱啾，会吵到你吗？
E: Tweet! Tweet tweet~ tweet tweet tweet tweet~! Hello! We are practicing our chorus with the stage's melody. Is it disturbing you?

C: 啾啾！那我们就开始正式合唱了！
E: Tweet tweet! Then let us begin the chorus in earnest!

C: 窥梦电话已拨通——您将会听到：藿藿的梦境。
E: The Dreampeek Call connected. You are about to hear Huohuo's dream.

C: 不愧是藿藿——十王司最可靠的判官，这次就全靠你了……
E: Oh Huohuo, you really are the most reliable judge of the Ten-Lords Commission. I'm counting on you...

C: 美妙的歌声盖过了全部杂音，世界仿佛在此刻彻底安静了下来。
E: A splendid voice blankets all cacophonies — it is as if the world has gone completely silent in the moment.

C: 它并非简单的雕塑，而是一艘能够正常行驶的航模。
E: It is not a simple sculpture, but a model ship that can operate along a route as per its designations.

C: 你敲了敲桶身，发出清脆的声响…你最终还是克制住了掀开桶盖的冲动。
E: You tap the can, producing a crisp sound... but ultimately, you suppress the impulse to lift the lid.

C: 它的意思是：「就分我一口嘛！」
E: Its response means, "Just share a bite with me!"

C: 你好像很懂大地兽？
E: You seem well-versed in dromas.

C: …阿格莱雅大人应该不会把这当成虚假宣传吧？
E: ...Lady Aglaea won't consider this false advertising, right?

C: 这个白麻布是整个奥赫玛应用最广泛的布料。走在街上你能看见的十个人里，有九个都穿它制成的衣服呢。
E: White linen is a staple fabric in Okhema. It's everywhere — chances are, nine out of ten people you see are wearing clothes made from it.

C: 这一杯是跳跳糖一样的口感，一口下去，嘴巴里炸开了无数个微酸的气泡…嗷呜？你好像听到了自己嗓子眼里发出了小奇美拉的叫声……
E: This drink tastes like popping candy, bursting with countless tangy bubbles the moment it hits your mouth... Awoo? You think you hear a little chimera-like sound coming from your throat...

C: …怎么每次醒来都是这句话？
E: ...Why do I always say that every time I wake up?

C: 都说了我不是了，你愿意信就信。
E: I told you I'm not. Believe what you want.

C: 怎么也飞不出，{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的天界，原来你是一只，酒醉的蝴蝶。
E: You can fly, but you never escape {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}'s hands. Turns out, you're just a drunken butterfly.

C: 不管哪种食材，炖出来，味道都不会差。赞美吉奥里亚。
E: Everything tastes great when stewed. Praise Georios.

C: 你要知道，膜拜泰坦的人虽多，但真的像祭司那样可以借用泰坦力量的人，其实少之又少。
E: While many folks worship the Titans, only a handful can actually harness the Titan's powers as the priests do.

C: 照理说，这应该是一种不负责任的行为…但我们的确生活在一个预言真实存在的世界。即便是那些被奉若神明的泰坦，也无力改变预言——这也就是为什么，我觉得他们没资格高高在上。
E: To be honest, this isn't being responsible... but we live in a world where prophecies genuinely exist. Even the Titans, who are considered gods, are powerless to change prophecies. That's why I don't think they have the right to be all high and mighty.

C: 俗话说「开卷有益」，坚持用碎片时间来看书，哪怕一天只能看几页，一年下来还是能收获很多。
E: Reading is nourishment for the soul. Even a few pages each day can accumulate over a year, and you'll learn a great deal.

C: 去往那仁慈神祇的庭园吧\n彼处仍留笑语、欢宴与佳酿
E: Within the garden of that merciful god, solace can be found.\nLaughter, feasts, and wine, joy in abundance unbound.

C: 「最初的人们聚集在刻法勒脚下，文明的种子便在翁法罗斯萌芽。请看——」
E: "At Kephale's feet, humanity's dawn unfurled. Civilization's roots in Amphoreus twirled."

C: 穿越长夜之幕，临世的闪耀星辰
E: In the night's embrace, a star so bright. World's shimmering beacon, a radiant light.

C: 还好，之前的袭击确实产生了一定影响，好在总体还算安稳。只是…战士或是卫兵之类的客人可能需要我们额外关注一下。
E: It's all right. The previous attack has had some effect, but everything else is fine. It's just... we need to be more watchful with guests who are warriors or guards in some capacity.

C: 没别的了？
E: That's it?

C: 没什么想买的。
E: I have nothing to buy.

C: 事不宜迟，你回到私人浴池，想要立刻试试……
E: With no time to waste, you head back to the private bath, eager to try it out...

C: 看来阁下依然对那时的试探耿耿于怀。{NICKNAME}阁下尽可指责我的失礼，但请别对遐蝶心生芥蒂。
E: I see that you still bear a grudge over her scrutiny. {F#Lady}{M#Lord} {NICKNAME}, you may by all means hold me accountable for my discourtesy. However, please do not foster resentment against Castorice.

C: 呼——轰炸空间！
E: Ha! Space bomb!

C: 至于我的同胞们…悬锋人思乡的方式，就是在战场上恣意拼杀。当他们在战场上染血高呼着「宁战死，毋荣归」的时候，我就知道…奥赫玛，无法成为他们真正的家。
E: As for my kin... the Kremnoans show how much they miss their home by fighting without restraint. When I see them on the battlefield, blood-stained and raising a cry of "valorous death before glorious return," I knew... that Okhema could never be their true home.

C: 至于扫墓…奥赫玛的墓园里，有许多长眠者，都是由我来「入殓」的。我会定期前去清扫他们的坟墓——不知为何，我总担忧他们未能安眠。
E: As for visiting graves... Many of the deceased around the graveyards of Okhema were personally embalmed by me. I periodically go to their tombs to dust... I'm not sure why but I'm always concerned that somehow they cannot rest in peace.

C: 如果阁下不介意，我确实有些有趣的故事可以与你分享。
E: I do have a number of interesting stories that I could share with you. That is, if you do not mind.

C: 最可气的是…他竟然说被卷入黑潮的人都不得安宁！说什么他看到他们队长的脸，总是出现在雾里，什么在黑潮来临的时候，听到同伴喊他进去的声音……
E: The worst thing of all is that he claims those who are devoured by the black tide will never be at peace! He says that he sees their captain's face in the mist and hears his comrades calling him to join them in the black tide...

C: 你说那套啊，我也很喜欢，可惜当时抢了好久都没抢到，最后只能高价收了几个散件。
E: You have that set!? I love that set. I was trying to get my hands on one for ages, but I never managed. All I could do was pay extortionate prices for a few spare pieces.

C: 你瞧——就连那位被神明垂青的圣女大人都无法真正掌控自己的命运，更遑论我们这些普通人呢……
E: See — even that maiden chosen by the gods wasn't even able to master her own destiny. What chance do mere mortals like us ever have...

C: 嗯…挺好的。承蒙惠顾，一个苹果。
E: Mmm... It's pretty good. Thanks for coming — one apple, please.

C: 吵什么呢？你们怎么回事——
E: What's all the fuss here? What's going on—

C: 呃…怎么了？
E: Uh... What's up?

C: 你想聊的是什么？
E: What do you want to talk about?

C: 你说，会不会是现在吉奥里亚打盹去了，所以这些大家伙才这么不安生？
E: Would you say that Georios is now taking a nap, so these big fellas are starting to grow restless?

C: 悬锋城？不不，其实只有我而已，要不我怎么叫「狡猾的」尤利克赛斯呢~
E: Castrum Kremnos? No, no, this is just me. Why else do you think they call me "Ulixes the Cunning"?

C: 你个老头，不讲武德！
E: You have no honor, old coot!

C: 祝你早日寻得荣耀。
E: May you find glory soon.

C: 不理它，聆听星宿之声。
E: Ignore it. Listen to the Voice of Constellation

C: 不聊了吧。
E: Let's stop here.

C: 白厄？
E: Phainon?

C: 阿格莱雅，不需要。金线，锋利无情，像她的手腕。
E: Need, Aglaea does not. Like her style, sharp and merciless, gold thread is.

C: 秘酿是如何制作的？
E: How is ambrosia made?

C: 托{NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}的福，我很少再梦到那些黯淡无光的往事，也不再听见母亲的声音了。
E: Thanks for asking, {F#Miss}{M#Mister} {NICKNAME}. I've rarely dreamed of those dark memories of the past, and I don't hear my mother's voice anymore.

C: 呵呵，向他人展示心境还真是有些难为情…但若是你，我倒并不介意。
E: Hehe, it's a bit embarrassing baring my emotions for others to see like this... But I don't actually mind at all if it's you.

C: 没事，守城辛苦！
E: No worries, guarding the city is tough work!

C: （质疑：大前提有误。）
E: (Question: The main premise is flawed.)

C: （质疑：小前提有误。）
E: (Question: Your minor premise is flawed.)

C: 还有谁会去探究真理，改变世界？怀疑看似绝对正确，却无法带来任何收益。为了向前走，为了更好的生活，我们需要信念。
E: Who would still go in search of truth and transform the world? Though suspicion can seem absolutely certain, it cannot bring us any benefits at all. We require faith to keep moving forward and create a better life.

C: 没什么想打听的。
E: Nothing more I'm curious about.

C: 什么吃苦他们就练什么！不过，要说最热门的……
E: Whatever's the most grueling, that's what they train in! But if you want to know the most popular routine...

C: 哈哈，真是个务实的年轻人，但实不相瞒，这方面可能会多少让你失望。先听听情况如何？
E: Haha, you're quite the pragmatic youngster. But to be honest, this might not meet your expectations. How about we first see what the situation is?

C: 呵，能被你这样有活力的年轻人欣赏，大叔我有点开心。
E: Hah, being admired by an energetic youngster like yourself... I must admit this has made me smile.

C: 好，好，真有礼貌。下次见，愿艾格勒注视着你，孩子。
E: Good, good, such courtesy. Until next time, may Aquila watch over you, child.

C: 你不是也还没去过吗，朋友，不如下次我们一起想办法混进去瞧瞧？
E: You haven't been there either, right? How about next time we both find a way to get in and take a look?

C: 好，慢走…我再泡一个时刻也该出去了…不，或许两个…？
E: Alright, take care... I should probably head out after soaking for a little longer... no, maybe two more rounds...?

C: 看不出来吗？我正在进行学术研究，是伟大的真理追寻者！
E: Can't you see? I'm conducting academic research — I'm a seeker of the great truth!

C: 行啊，没问题，由你说了算！那就聊到这里，我还正愁找不到借口打发你走呢！
E: Alright, fine, it's your call! Let's end the conversation here. I was actually looking for an excuse to send you on your way!

C: 要我说，奇美拉是瑟希斯赐给翁法罗斯的礼物——上哪再去找这么可爱又听话的小动物呢。复原古生物只是一厢情愿的想法，我们该接受现实才对。
E: I say, the chimera is a gift that Cerces bestowed upon Amphoreus — where else can you find such a cute and obedient critter? Reviving creatures of the past is nothing but a pipe dream, so we should just accept reality.

C: 没什么感兴趣的。
E: Nothing that interests me.

C: 你别看树庭号称什么「智慧殿堂」，什么「瑟希斯庇佑的圣地」，其实都是些虚名。
E: The Grove may have monikers like the "Erudite Temple," "Cerces' Blessed Sanctuary" and whatnot, but they're all just lies.

C: 既然你刚到奥赫玛不久，你想买点「种子」带走吗？里面都是树庭的珍藏噢。怎么样，要不要来点？
E: Since you haven't been in Okhema for long, how would you like to take home some "seeds"? They're all precious treasures from the Grove. How about it, care for some?

C: 至于我，我啊，就是把这些高深莫测的知识整理成大家能看懂的东西，然后再反哺树庭的开支。说白了，就是把知识变成钱，再把钱变成更多知识。
E: As for me, well, I organize this profound knowledge into something that everyone can understand, then support the Grove's expenses with the money. In simpler terms, it's turning knowledge into money, and that money into even more knowledge.

C: 踏进试炼场之前，得先填满肚子才行。来，把这个吃了暖暖身子吧。
E: You have to fill up your belly before stepping into the trial ground. Come, eat this and warm yourself up.

C: 之前跟你出外勤，收集到了足够多的训练数据，所以功能上也有一些升级……
E: After our last field operation, I gathered enough data to upgrade some functions...

C: 是啊，何其缥缈的说辞…可父亲却依旧因此变得焦躁多疑、惴惴不安。我们…姐姐们和母亲都很担心他。
E: Indeed, it's extremely vague... But my father is now overcome with anxiety and paranoia. We... My elder sister and my mother are all very worried about him.

C: 我是悬锋间谍，这就回报出兵。
E: I'm a Kremnoan spy. I will report back to send troops here.

C: 不如稍等些日子再来找我，命运泰坦们一定会给您最正确的指引。
E: Perhaps you should come and find me in a few days. I know that the Titans will provide you with the most accurate guidance possible.

C: 说来也是好笑，我在神殿里侍奉了这么久，大家记住我的不是我这个人，反而是我烤出来的小甜饼。
E: The funny thing is, after all these years serving in the temple, people remember not so much me, but more so the sweet treats I bake.

C: ——后来大家发现他那时是急着想上厕所。
E: Turns out, he just really needed a bathroom break.

C: 你们的大表演家，那刻夏。
E: You lots' Great Performer, Anaxa.

C: …小灰，不用欲言又止的，*我们*已经没那么难过啦。与缇安的告别仪式都已经结束了，再不将脚尖指向明天，缇安也会伤心、生气的。
E: ...Little Gray, there's no need to hesitate. We're no longer that sad. We've already held a farewell ceremony for Trianne. If we don't turn our toes toward the future, Trianne will feel sad — and even angry.

C: 那是什么…难道是*我们*不知道的雅努斯神迹吗？
E: What is that? Is it some kind of miracle of Janus that we do not know about?

C: 大家都喜欢你和你的庭院。
E: Everyone really likes you and your courtyard.

C: 但请你相信我…我的私仇，在翁法罗斯的未来面前，根本微不足道。
E: But trust me... my grudge pales in comparison to Amphoreus's future.

C: 黑幕可还行…我不知道什么黑幕。不过嘛，我这里有一些非常不靠谱的八卦，没人知道那是真是假，我给你讲讲。
E: Scandals? Hah, I wouldn't know anything about that. But I do have some wildly unreliable gossip. No one knows if it's true or not — want to hear it?

C: 所以，我想到了一个解决方法——只要这些占据着道德制高点的人能给我钱的话，我会提供救援，我可以不收逃难者一分一毫。
E: So, I came up with a solution: If those moralistic types want me to provide aid for free, they can pay for it themselves. I'll waive all fees for the refugees.

C: 基于此，本质上完全不同的许多城市，都以同样的名字出现在云端之上…她既是信徒们的圣城，也是弄潮儿的时尚之都，更是学者的书院、勇者的兵营……
E: Because of this, many fundamentally different cities appear in the clouds under the same name. It's the holy city for believers, the fashion capital for trendsetters, a library for scholars, a barracks for warriors...

C: 你可能听说过奥凯纳斯人喜欢追求肉体极限，但是你可能没有见识过极限——现在你就见到了，我就是极限。
E: You may have heard that the people of Okeanas love to push the limits of their bodies, but you've probably never seen "the limit." Well, now you have. I am the limit.

C: 你为什么会成为祭司？
E: Why did you become a priest?

C: 这样啊？嗯…如果冒犯到你，请允许我致歉。
E: Is that so? Well... Please allow me to apologize if I've offended you.

C: 没事了，祝你好运。
E: That's all from me. Good luck.

C: 愿{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}保佑你。
E: May {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} protect you.

C: 你在说什么？
E: What are you talking about?

C: 只是回想起阿那克萨戈拉斯的那番言论，感到有些后怕罢了。
E: I was just recalling Anaxagoras's words, and it made me feel a bit uneasy.

C: 啊，多谢！像你这么热心肠的年轻人，可不多见了。
E: Oh, thank you! We don't see many accommodating young fellows like you nowadays.

C: 啊…无人的浴场——放在平时能有几人得见这一幕？我们还真是幸运。
E: Ah... an empty bathhouse, how many people would ever get to witness such a sight under normal circumstances? We are truly fortunate.

C: 虽然我对此还挺好奇的，但也仅此而已啦。比起这个，我对你们讨伐天空泰坦的经历，反倒更感兴趣些呢…那么大的宫殿究竟是怎么盖在天上的？难道说世界本无天地之分？
E: Curious? Certainly. But I'm more intrigued by your Sky Titan conquests... How does one build such an enormous palace in the sky? Does that mean that the sky and earth are not separated?

C: 弄不好，无论我们积极努力还是消极摆烂，它都会如期到来。当然，牺牲者的规模可能完全不同，所以这两种情况也不能同日而语。
E: It might arrive right on schedule, whether we actively fight for it or passively accept our fate. Of course, the difference in casualties would be enormous, so these paths aren't remotely comparable.

C: 走吧，走吧！就像{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}抛弃我们一样！
E: Go then, go! Just as {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} abandoned us all.

C: 你不知道，金织女士的事件之后，元老院饱受非议，我也被人指指点点的，这班简直上够了。
E: There's something you don't know. After Lady Goldweaver's incident, the Council of Elders has been heavily criticized, and even I've been pointed at. This job I have right now is just beyond my tolerance.

C: 嗯…有位织者渴望揭开世界的真相，正在寻找聪明的伙伴。金丝带来消息，它藏身于<color=#dbc291ff>一个隐秘的竹篮内</color>，得擦亮眼睛才能找到。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who dreams of unveiling the world's hidden truths and is searching for a clever companion. The golden thread brings tidings: They now conceal themselves <color=#dbc291ff>within a secret woven basket</color>. Look closely, and you may discover them.

C: 提供「记忆残晶」。
E: Provide Memory Crystal Shards.

C: 我注意到你已经获取了预言所指的目标。在业已崩坏的奥赫玛，果然发生什么都不奇怪……
E: I see you've obtained the object foretold in the prophecy. In a place as shattered as Okhema, nothing should come as a surprise...

C: 这是我上周猎的鹿，肉质特别好，炖完之后又香又嫩，可惜你没赶上口新鲜的……
E: This is from a deer I bagged last week — real tender meat. Would've been even better fresh out of the pot... too bad you missed it.

C: 没事，我自己再四处找找，反正今天不进林子…哼，我还能治不了他？
E: No problem. I'll keep looking. Not heading into the woods today anyway... Hmph, he thinks he can outrun me?

C: 都是你种的麦子吗？
E: Did you plant all this wheat yourself?

C: 我刚梦见田地里的藤蔓长成了参天大树，到处挂满了白色的小花，风里都是甜甜的香气，怎么闻也闻不够。
E: I just dreamt the vines in the fields had grown into towering trees, covered in little white blossoms. Even the breeze smelled so sweet... I could've sniffed it forever.

C: 除此之外，还要向迷境深处祷告，聆听岁月的呼唤，解读它降下的预言。
E: Then there's the praying — to the heart of Maze. Listening to the whispers of time, interpreting the prophecies it leaves behind.

C: 唉，我猜你肯定也没见过迷。
E: Alas... I bet you've never seen that either, memi.

C: 明明只有你一个呀！
E: But you're the only one here!

C: 嗯…有位织者率真随性。金丝带来消息，它正躺在<color=#dbc291ff>覆着叶片的餐桌上</color>，懒洋洋地休息呢。
E: Hmm... There is a weaver who is laid-back and free-spirited. The golden thread brings tidings: They are laying on <color=#dbc291ff>a dinner table strewn with leaves</color>, lounging languidly.

C: 确实感觉不到时间流逝。
E: It's true. I can't feel time moving forward at all.

C: 和初次见面时相比，麦田守望者 / 神圣呜呜伯 / 好好奇美拉 / 黄豆粉糍粑 / 奇美啦迷似乎真的变了呢。说不定再过些日子，就能抱着它一起玩了。
E: Compared to our first encounter, Guardian of the Wheat Field / Holy Wubbaboo / Curious Chimera / Soy-Dusted Mochi Cake / Chimeramem seems to have really changed. Maybe before long, we'll be able to cuddle and play with it.

C: 含而不发，又身临其境……
E: Restrained yet immersive...

C: 还不够奢华！
E: Still not lavish enough!

C: 苹果。
E: Apple.

C: 正，正确答案是——葡萄。
E: The r—right answer is grape.

C: 也许是被幻梦迷醉的缘故，衣匠沉默不语，又或者它的声音已经随海浪一同远去。
E: Perhaps intoxicated by illusory dreams, the Garmentmaker remains silent, or perhaps its voice has already been lost to the sea.

C: 哦哟，这可是个好东西，它真的有这么灵？
E: Oh wow, that's really awesome. Is it really all that effective?

C: …不提也罢，不提也罢啊。
E: ...Better let that go.

C: 欸，哥们儿，不对吧？这茴香不是我俩前天一起进的货吗？大姐也是老主顾了，你不给她便宜便宜？
E: Eh, bro, this isn't right. Didn't we purchase this fennel together just two days back? This lady is a regular customer. Can't you give her a discount?

C: 比如说家里有三个小朋友，每个人都想要获得一颗糖。为了不让这些孩子打起来，老奶奶你应该买几颗糖呢？只买三颗，真的够吗？
E: For example, if you have three children at home, and each of them wants a piece of candy. To keep them from fighting, how much candy should you buy for them? Will three pieces do the job?

C: 嗷嗷呜！
E: Awooooo!

C: 你最喜欢什么珍稀物种
E: What is your favorite rare species?

C: 军团的余孽凭借那里错综复杂的路径，隐匿起身。
E: Remnants of the Legion are taking advantage of the complex terrain there to hide in.

C: 具体的时间？记不清啦。
E: I don't remember exactly how long.

C: 给你个忠告，出门在外要学会保护自己，知人知面不知心……
E: Here's my advice for you. Learn to protect yourself when you are outside. You never know what people are thinking.

C: 排得满满当当，喘口气的时间都快没了。这种时候，最忌讳忙中出错。
E: My schedule is so packed that I can't even spare time to breathe. I better not make any mistakes.

C: 我是医疗科的成员乔安。具体负责的工作…或许比医生还杂乱一些。
E: I'm Joanne, a member of the Medical Department... My scope of work... may be even more complicated than the doctors'.

C: 或许是因为关于那个姑娘的传闻太多，以至于大家都忘记了一个最关键的事实。那就是她自己本身的个人能力，是多么的超凡绝伦。
E: Maybe there are so many rumors about that girl that everyone has forgotten one important fact — her individual capacities are simply extraordinary.

C: 这种话我怎么好评价？你会思考如果自己有幸加入天才俱乐部，要进行什么样子的自我介绍吗？
E: How am I supposed to comment on something like that? Would you prepare for an opening speech for the Genius Society? You won't!

C: 瑟希斯说它不想再回应你了。
E: Cerces says they don't want to respond to you anymore.

C: …别说什么「放弃吧」、「不如重新再写一份」之类的话。
E: ...Please don't tell me to "just give up" or "why don't you start over."

C: 你可算来了，我快要被水流冲下高台了喀！
E: Finally, you're here! I was about to get swept off this platform, crrk!

C: 难道这就是若虫一生一次的闪现吗？
E: Could this be the one-time flash of a nymph's lifetime?

C: 简直比那{RUBY_B#扎格列斯}两面窃贼{RUBY_E#}的胃袋还要深邃喀。
E: It's even deeper than that {RUBY_B#Zagreus}double-crosser{RUBY_E#}'s bottomless pit of a stomach, crrk.

C: 真是难选喀！
E: What a hard choice, crrk!

C: 没事，我喜欢听清唱的版本。
E: It's fine. I like listening to the a cappella version.

C: 行了，无聊的玩笑到此为止。总之出于各种原因，我们现在的研究课题是「星空」。
E: Alright, enough with the teasing. Long story short, for various reasons, our research topic is now the "Starry Skies."

C: 这两位又开始了…咳、总之，等餐厅开起来，我们都期待你的光临哦，无敌的冒险家。
E: Here they go again... *ahem* Anyway, once the restaurant opens, we look forward to your visit, O invincible Adventurer.

C: 我知道自己在做什么，也知道自己将付出何种代价。
E: I know what I'm doing, and I know what price I'll have to pay.

C: 你啊、你啊，终其一生，被名为「仇恨」的洋流推着走的鱼儿……
E: Ah, you... you're just like a fish, forever swept along by the currents of hatred...

C: 是呀，我还想多学几招，将来长大和您一样，成为以一当百的「王翼冠军」！
E: Yeah! I want to learn more skills so that when I grow up, I can be just like you... A King's Aegis worth a hundred fighters!

C: 啥玩意？我就是路过……
E: Huh? I was just minding my own business...

C: 没想到还有机会沐浴新世界的曙光…曾经那些末日景象，如今回看，竟好似一场逐渐消弭的噩梦……
E: Never thought I'd have the chance to bask in the dawn of a new world... Looking back now, those apocalyptic scenes feel like a nightmare slowly fading away...

C: 好事？我只觉得工作的热情无处释放，很是憋闷嗷呜……
E: Good thing? I just feel like I have all this pent-up work enthusiasm with nowhere to release it. It's so frustrating awoo...

C: 闲得浑身难受。莫非…生命花园已经不需要奇美拉了嗷呜？
E: I'm so bored I can't stand it. Could it be... that the Garden of Life doesn't need this chimera anymore? Awoo?

C: o((◣'ω´◢ ╬)o「来吧！绷带海豹，战斗还远远没有结束，再和我来一场激烈的豹豹碰碰大作战吧！」)∋
E: o((◣'ω´◢ ╬)o "Bring it on, Bandaged Seal! The battle is far from over! Face me again in another intense round of Seal Slammers!" )∋

C: 是红烧天堂吗？
E: Is this the paradise of braising?

C: 既然大家都同意，那么等我勘定场地，便择日开工。对了，赛法利娅，今后你可不能再用「裁缝女」这个称呼叫我了。
E: Since you all agree, I'll survey the site and then pick a date to start the work. By the way, Cifera, you don't wanna address me as "seamstress" from now on.

C: 我很高兴，能在你的见证下重建织坊。
E: I'm glad that I can rebuild the weaving workshop with you as my witness.

C: 唔…感觉，好像没区别！
E: Hmm... Doesn't feel like there's much of a difference!

C: 但我从未怨悔。
E: But I've never regretted it.

C: 背离了同胞所行之路的的人，却终有机会走上了第三条路吗？有趣，我对「开拓」的理解又加深了几分。
E: Someone who deviated from their comrades' path yet ultimately found the chance to walk down a third path? Fascinating. I have gained a deeper understanding of the Trailblaze yet again.

C: 每位星神的诞生都意味着一道「命途」的开启；命途的本质仍是个谜，我们只好用凡人能理解的方式进行类比：就是某种哲学「概念」。
E: The birth of an Aeon gives rise to a Path. The nature of the Paths remains a mystery, leaving us to draw an analogy in a way that mortals can understand: It's a philosophical concept of sorts.

C: 「连结」世界与世界，踏出永不断绝的道路。
E: Connect worlds together, carving an endless path.

C: 那是一种非常特殊的冰块，叫做「六相冰」，是遵循虚数法则的造物，不会因外界干扰而转变形态。
E: It was a unique type of ice known as Six-Phased Ice — a substance that adheres to Imaginary Law, meaning that external forces cannot change its form.

C: {NICKNAME}，你回来了。
E: {NICKNAME}, you're back.

C: 没错。
E: I thought so.

C: 要不还是让我闲着吧…
E: I am happy to just hang around.

C: 没关系，我这蠢徒弟什么都还没搞明白，你先去忙吧。
E: That's alright. My useless apprentice still hasn't mastered anything I've taught him so far. You can carry on with what you were doing.

C: 黄灯，黄灯……
E: Yellow light, yellow light...

C: 我们还是该用点柔和的方法解决问题，比如跟家族谈判、加大剧团福利、改良工作规范……
E: We have to use gentler means to solve the problem, such as negotiations with The Family, improving theater welfare and worker regulations...

C: …滴答，如果我真有那么厉害就好了，但我总是不忍心做坏事。
E: ...Tick-tock, if only I were really that powerful, but I cannot bear to pull the trigger.

C: 是的，我的心境坚不可摧，如果你认为自己能轻松改变我的想法，就尽管试试看吧！
E: Yes, my inner self is impenetrable. If you think you can change my mind easily, go ahead and give it your best shot!

C: 别担心，现在我好多了。你感觉怎么样？有哪里不舒服吗？
E: Don't worry, I'm much better now. How are you feeling? Any discomfort anywhere?

C: 有点难度。
E: Not really, no.

C: 「你在追查我的事，对不？那咱们来比一场吧……」
E: "You're trying to catch me, aren't you? Then how about a little contest..."

C: 「虽然不知道你的名字，但还是要夸夸你，做得真不错！没几个人能发现我留下的这个漏洞。」
E: "I don't even know your name, but I want to praise you on a job well done! Not many people at all know about this exploit."

C: 虽然要谢谢你的赞美…但这不是我想要的答案。
E: Thanks for the compliment... But that wasn't the answer I was looking for.

C: 另外，托我给于尔丹带个话——我们搞艺术的，每一次拖稿都是值得的！
E: By the way, send a message to Uldan for me. We artists procrastinate our art for a reason, and it cannot be rushed!

C: 咦，怎么觉得你有点眼熟呢…也许是错觉吧。
E: Huh, something seems really familiar about you... I must be wrong, though.

C: 我拿到绘有黄金歌剧院的画了。
E: I've got the painting with the Golden Theater.

C: 我收集到机体数据了。
E: I've got the data.

C: 你说的对，估计歌剧院的人巴不得坏了以后讹我们一笔呢。
E: Well, I guess the folks down at the theater would just love to extort quite a sum from us if we did that.

C: 为了吸引更多参观者，博物馆需要一些实物照片来制作模型。所以，我想请你去给<color=#dbc291ff>反物质兵团的冰雕</color>拍几张照片。
E: We're trying to get more visitors in, so the museum is after some photos from which to model replicas. Can you please go and snap a few pictures of the <color=#dbc291ff>Antimatter Legion's ice sculptures</color>?

C: 你觉得…在介绍中该如何描述母亲大人的早年比较好呢？
E: What do you think... How should we describe mother's early years in the introduction?

C: 你印象中的歌剧院穹顶似乎并不像画中一样饱满。这大概就是所谓的「艺术加工」吧。
E: You don't recall the Golden Theater's dome being as full as it was portrayed in the picture. Perhaps this is what they call "artistic license."

C: 如今的冬城人依旧钟情这种传统且可靠的交通方式——尽管在通勤高峰时，它的可靠性会有所动摇。
E: Belobogians still love this traditional and trustworthy form of transportation, even though its trustworthiness can waver during rush hours.

C: 七百年来，这部放映机从未放映过任何电影——因为缺乏拷贝和拍摄电影的基础，电影本身已名存实亡。
E: In the past <unbreak>700</unbreak> years, this projector had never shown any films. Due to the lack of copying and filming basics, the film industry only exists in name.

C: 「她的人生是一场庸碌浮沉的悲剧；她的统治让贝洛伯格的人民尝尽疾苦；」
E: "Her life was a tragedy full of mediocrity, arduity, ups, and downs. Her administration caused every anguish known to humanity to the Belobogian citizenry."

C: 但是，你看到了网上的帖子。
E: But you saw the post online.

C: 多好的机会呀！我还以为我能登上去拍个视频呢…这下可好，白白错失了一个爆火新闻的机会。
E: What a pity! I thought I could board it and film a video... And now I've missed the opportunity to make a hit post.

C: 你能重温故地的美好回忆，借机学习摄影技术，顺便还收获了美少女的感谢——这还不够吗？
E: You can relive beautiful memories of your travels, use this chance to learn about photography, and also earn the gratitude of a beautiful girl — isn't that enough?

C: 不管怎么说，总算是把咱的照片全都救回来了，这次的事情也可以算是旅途中的珍贵回忆之一了！
E: Either way, we finally managed to get all of our photos back. Now, this whole ordeal will become another precious memory along our journey!

C: 但多一个人又有什么关系嘛，作为到处吃喝…咳，外出看诊的名医，我对仙舟各地有什么好吃好玩的地方了如指掌，雇了我可绝不会让你吃亏的！
E: But the more the merrier, right? I go out all the time to see patients, so I know the food establishments around here like the back of my hand. I'm the best tour guide you could hope for!

C: 快点快点，要是去晚了小吃都卖完了怎么办？
E: Hurry up! Do you want the snacks to sell out!?

C: 「苏打豆汁儿」颜色灰绿，味道酸腐，我看这东西只有一些本地老饕能受得了，您呀，也别抱着兴趣随便尝试了。
E: It has a grayish green color and a sour, rotten flavor... I reckon there's a handful of food connoisseurs that actually like it. Try some if you dare, but don't get your hopes up.

C: 喜欢，这里的人都很友好。
E: Yes, the people here are very friendly.

C: 我差点就在小吃摊上吃饱了，正事还没有做呢。
E: *sigh* I'm so full of snacks I can hardly move. I haven't even gotten around to business yet.

C: 姑娘的好意，我们又岂能不知，可就是……
E: We appreciate you sticking up for us, but this...

C: 你放心好了。
E: You betcha.

C: 你不可能和这件事没关系。
E: I think this has a lot to do with you...

C: 金人巷商会，请准备好发言。
E: Aurum Alley Merchant Guild, please prepare to make your opening statements.

C: 这毫无疑问是你们的功劳。
E: Undoubtedly, yes.

C: …我们没有公司能挣钱？
E: We don't earn nearly as much money as the IPC?

C: 公司能给的肯定比你们多，但是评审的标准并非只看财力。
E: The IPC does have more capital on hand, but the review criteria are not solely focused on financial resources.

C: 你比我更熟悉小秘书，她会用假数据来说服你吗？
E: You know Mingxi better than I do. Would she deceive you with fake data?

C: 它充分证明了即便是最辉煌的时期，金人巷的交易量也几乎是与现在持平的。
E: In the golden era you described, the old Aurum Alley had a trading volume similar to today.

C: 会长要求你和他进行公开会议辩论，那些拒绝交流的商铺们才有机会了解到你们的理念。
E: His invitation to debate this matter publicly was a chance for the more difficult business owners to hear from you directly.

C: 就是这样，很可爱，要拍咯！
E: That's it! Cuuuute... Here we go!

C: 去拍摄「白露与机巧鸟」。
E: Take a photo of "Bailu and Cycranes."

C: 走吧，公开会议就要开始了。
E: Let's go. The bidding is about to begin.

C: 我想既然经历如此重要，我应该多去经历。金人巷复兴的方法既在金人巷里，也在金人巷之外，我不能一直停留在这里。
E: If that's true, the only way to get a wider perspective is to leave my comfort zone and look outward. The answer to reviving Aurum Alley isn't necessarily within the Alley itself...

C: 霍三哥没告诉你的事多了，放下吧。
E: Mr. Huo never mentioned a lot of things to you, kid. Just hand it over.

C: …等着，你听我说完。
E: ...Wait a minute. Hear me out.

C: 一定一定，我做了这么久生意，最懂遵守法律了。
E: Of course, of course. I'm a business veteran, you know. Following the law is my forte.

C: 哎唷，不妙，这味儿冲得阿姨有些吃不消了。我得到后厨缓缓劲。
E: Wait... I think I'm gonna throw up. Excuse me now...

C: 第三位客人点的是脆皮仔猪，还有份饮料，是什么来着？
E: The third diner wanted crispy suckling pig and a drink of — what was it again?

C: 要是懒病能填病假证明，我也想填，但是你懂的。
E: If I could use laziness as an excuse on a medical certificate, I would — but you know I can't.

C: 大意是希望我转让店铺所有权，获取高额转让费…公司不明白，长生种无所事事比没钱更加可怕，所以商户们也没有立刻倒戈。
E: The general idea is for me to transfer ownership rights of the store on to someone, and claim a nice fat transfer fee... But the IPC doesn't understand that having nothing to do is far worse than being poor for a long-life species, so the merchants haven't immediately flipped sides.

C: 《琼玉牌秘技丛集》？
E: Celestial Jade Techniques 101?

C: 其实{NICKNAME}你来之前，我就联系好了小秘书，没有告诉你，实在是抱歉。
E: Actually before you came, {NICKNAME}, I contacted Miss Secretary. Really sorry for not mentioning that to you.

C: 商业区开发竞标并不会当场宣布中标结果，但是离场的双方似乎已经心里有数。
E: The result of the Commercial District bid is not announced, but both parties leave with a good idea of the outcome.

C: 公务要紧，还是生意要紧？
E: Is official business more important? Or business?

C: 看来就是这里了，「美馔阁」…地图路径上传中…请稍等。
E: Looks like this is it. The Delicacy Pavilion... Uploading pathing data... Please wait.

C: 偷懒的是谁啊？
E: Who's the slacker?

C: 别八卦了，该回去干活了。
E: Hey, enough chattering. It's time to get back to work.

C: 这台售货机并无明显的异常，但眼见不一定为实……
E: The vending machine doesn't seem to have any obvious anomaly, but don't judge a book by its cover...

C: （拍拍它）
E: (Pat it)

C: 旁听
E: Listen

C: 啊？我看画得挺好的…没必要吧？
E: Huh? It looks well done... For real?

C: 啊？这天气也没那么冷…没必要吧？
E: Wha? The weather is not that cold... For real?

C: 嗯…好像并不顺利。锁芯并没有如预想中那般丝滑地转动，更没有清脆的「咔嚓」声传来。
E: Hmm... It doesn't seem to work. The lock is not turning as smoothly as expected, and there are no crisp sounds of clicking.

C: 不会的…我不会弄坏的！你让我玩嘛，让我玩嘛！
E: No, I won't break it! Let me play with it! Let me play with it!

C: （居然变成了雷金的样子！而且还会模仿人类说话？）
E: (It transformed into Regin! And it can speak like a human!?)

C: 你自己看看，我这「研究笔记」内容清清楚楚，怎么可能全是错别字呢？
E: Just look at this! My research notes are perfectly clear. How can there be typos?

C: 未来的经营工作就请交给我吧。您忙碌了这么久，也该有时间欣赏一下自己给这座博物馆带来的变化了。
E: Leave the future management work to me. You have been busy for so long, you should have the time to appreciate the changes you have brought to this museum.

C: 我看到宣传短信了。
E: I saw the promotional message.

C: 你了解过本餐厅的招牌美食「钟表披萨」吗？
E: Have you ever heard of our restaurant's signature dish, the Clockie Pizza?

C: 最初，只有那些在折纸大学上课的筑梦师们吃披萨，他们喜欢以这种手拿式的快餐充饥。但人们很快就发现圆形披萨的社交作用——现在，它已经是所有宴会上必不可缺的派对美食了。
E: Initially, it was only the Dreamweavers attending classes at Paperfold University who indulged in pizza. They favored this handheld fast food for a quick bite. However, people soon realized the social significance of circular pizza — now it's become an indispensable party delicacy at all gatherings.

C: 啾！原本只是想修缮一下房间里的老旧设备，没想到被压在这里了…感谢你啾。
E: Tweet! I just wanted to repair the old equipment in the room, but ended up being trapped here... Thanks for your help, tweet.

C: 滴答…怎么办啊滴答……
E: Tick-tock... What do I do, tick-tock...

C: 在混乱的梦境中，你和狱友一阵东跑西颠，总算在一处梦境房间发现了你们要找的目标——哈努兄弟和跟班。
E: In the chaos of the Dreamscape, you and your cellmate run around endlessly, finally locating your target in one of the dream rooms — Brother Hanu and his men.

C: …就是这个！漂浮在酒店走廊中的诡秘画作，甚至可能无缘无故地吞噬迷路的宾客……
E: ...This is it! That creepy painting floating in the middle of the hotel hallway. And it may even devour lost, unwitting guests too...

C: 我们还没有证据。
E: We still have no proof.

C: 证据还是不足。
E: We still don't have enough evidence.

C: 挑战
E: Challenge

C: 那你想跟我聊什么呢？
E: What do you want to talk about, then?

C: 来啊，来教训我啊！嘻嘻…我就这个样，打出生就没变过，谁都拿我没辙！
E: Bring it on! Show me what's what! Hehe... I've been like this since the day I was born. Nobody can deal with me!

C: 呜…呜啊啊啊！我还不想死！明明才下定决心以后要快乐生活，我才不要……
E: Waaa... Waaaahhhh! I don't want to die yet! I just decided to live a happy life from now on! I don't want...

C: 舒翁，瞧瞧你现在的样子，当时那股敢和整个鸢尾花家系对抗的气势呢？还记得那天，你兴奋地跑来找我——「艾米绮！捡了只狗，它想跟我回家！」
E: Look at you now, Siobhan! What happened to that boldness you had when you confronted the entire Iris Family? Remember when you came to me all excited, saying, "Hey, Amiky! I found a dog, and it wants to come home with me!"

C: 艾米绮，我说过要逃避吗？反倒是你，有段时间没见，游说的本事进步不小嘛，总算是比以前成熟了，我很开心。
E: Did I ever say I was running away, Amiky? Well, you've become quite the lecturer, haven't you? I'm happy to see you've grown more mature.

C: 更何况，{NICKNAME}最近的行动也证实了，它们的状况能够得到控制。
E: What's more, {NICKNAME}'s recent actions have proven that they can be controlled.

C: 没想到，是躲在这儿等着「秩序」为他们创造天堂。
E: Who knew that he was hiding here and waiting for the Order to create Paradise for them?

C: 我要亲手抓住他，哪怕他现在只是一段支离破碎的记忆，一个残存的梦泡。
E: I'll catch him with my own hands, even if he's just a shattered memory or a fragment of a dream bubble.

C: 要是我，就把重要的东西全砌到地板下面。
E: If it were up to me, I would have hidden everything of value underneath the floor.

C: 烦人的广告牌终于安静了，看来您已经找到一份隐藏起来的宝物了……
E: The annoying billboard has finally gone quiet. Looks like you've found a hidden treasure already...

C: 修复工程得到了进展，影城银幕上的虚无侵蚀逐渐消退了……
E: The refurbishment project is progressing along, and the corrosion of Nihility on the theme park's screen gradually fades...

C: 开始剪辑。
E: Begin editing.

C: 再见！哈努兄弟，再见！
E: Goodbye! Goodbye, Brother Hanu!

C: 鸢尾花家系拥有最优秀的导演与最专业的演员，我们可以提供所有的拍摄器械与工作人员。
E: The Iris Family has the best directors and most professional actors. We can provide all the film equipment and staff.

C: 「因罗盘号的突然失灵，钟表小子误闯进一一片神奇的美梦仙境。帮助折纸小鸟，战胜惊梦剧团，钟表小子终于得到用折纸魔法修好罗盘号的机会。」
E: "The Compass' sudden malfunction allows Clockie's accidental entry into a wondrous sanctuary of dreams. After helping the origami birds and defeating the Dreamjolt Troupe, Clockie can get a chance to fix the Compass using origami magic."

C: 你可以挑选扮演敌人的演员拍摄打戏，让他们提前退场。
E: You can pick the actors to play the enemies for this fight scene, and have them exit partway.

C: 哎呀，被你发现啦？
E: Dang, you found me already?

C: 它固然珍贵——但你更是我不可替代的朋友呀！滴答！
E: It may be precious, but you're a friend that can never be replaced! Tick-tock!

C: 急急急，我现在就要看到这位导演的下一部作品！
E: Let's go! I need to see what this director makes next!

C: 如果按苏乐达广告里的说法，他曾是一个信奉同谐的伟大厨师，善良、无私、和蔼、彬彬有礼……
E: Based on SoulGlad's ads, he was this incredible cook who believed deeply in Harmony. He was kind, selfless, affable, courteous...

C: 关于「咕噜噜」。
E: About the gurgles

C: 再见。
E: Goodbye.

C: 或许是家族察觉到了什么，在一次约谈过后，这个角色几乎就没有在剧集中登场过了……
E: Perhaps The Family picked up on something, because after one meeting, this character never made it back onto the series again...

C: 终于开始动工了。
E: Finally getting started on that job.

C: 我想想…宣传词应该是这么说的……
E: Let's see... How did we put it in the tagline...

C: 预祝你们获得圆满的成绩！
E: I wish you a successful performance!

C: 你们的表演远未达到令我满意的程度！
E: Your performance is far from satisfactory!

C: 上回书说到，哈努兄弟做好了战斗准备。就在这时，他听见走廊外传来了沉重的脚步声。果然，恶棍军团的喽啰们已经闯入了哈努兄弟的宅邸！
E: Last we saw, Hanu was preparing for battle. Suddenly, he hears heavy footsteps coming from the hallway. The Malevolent Mischief Makers have broken into his home!

C: 「游玩」…这么说来，我不仅是个失败的钟表，还是个失败的玩具。
E: "Play"... So, I'm not just a failed clock, I'm also a failed toy.

C: 这里也有筑梦师们留下的「筑梦遥眼」…时间紧迫，有需要就直接用吧。
E: There's also a "Dream's Eye" left here by a Dreamweaver... We're running out of time, we'll have to use it if necessary.

C: 全都搞定了…胜利在望，我们出发前往最后的关卡吧。
E: It's all done... Victory is in sight. Let's head to the final stage.

C: 还想看下去。
E: I want to keep watching.

C: 正如你们所体验的——危险与趣味并存的挑战，危险的忆域迷因，香甜美味的苏乐达，沉浸体验的热砂盛典的旅程……
E: Just as you've experienced, it's all about a thrilling blend of danger and excitement, the perilous memes of the Memory Zone, the delectable delight of SoulGlad, and an immersive journey through the Scorchsand Festival.

C: 哈哈，你说的没错，它一定会成为这里最受欢迎的吉祥物！
E: Haha, you're right. It'll definitely be the most popular mascot here!

C: 我是有话直说的。放心吧，你是真有天赋。
E: I'm just speaking my mind. Trust me, you're really talented.

C: 看来三月小姐没少看幻戏。不过在彦卿看来，三月小姐若是以「提升自己」为目标，学成之后即便放下剑再拾起弓，你一样会感到学有所成。
E: Seems like you've seen your fair share of immersia, Miss March. But if you want my opinion, if your goal is self-improvement, you'll feel just as accomplished even if you put down the sword and go back to your bow.

C: 本姑娘对仙舟幻戏、小说，都很感兴趣的！我虽然是用弓箭的，但是幻戏里的大侠几乎全都是用剑的，我也想成为那样的大侠！
E: I'm super interested in Xianzhou immersia and novels! Even though I use a bow, almost all the great heroes in those immersia use swords, so I want to be a swordmaster too!

C: 小老板娘，这——不对吧？我早就听说仙舟茶文化底蕴深厚，有待客之道。奇了怪了，我不是客人吗？我到底是不是客人啊？
E: Hey, this is... not how it's supposed to be, right? The Xianzhou is known for its tea culture and hospitality, but you're not treating me like a guest at all! Seriously, am I not a guest?

C: …我不会，不是喝了这个烈焰浓茶就能会吗？
E: ...No, I figured I could just learn it by drinking Flaming Potent Tea.

C: 可是，护甲已经很厚了。
E: But the armor is already pretty thick.

C: 我要向不夜侯的小老板娘道歉，是我惹事生非、故意找事，全都怪我！
E: I want to apologize to the owner of the Sleepless Earl! It's my fault for causing trouble and making a scene on purpose!

C: 规则就是用来打破的！
E: Rules are made to be broken!

C: 我还以为尾巴大爷会附在我身上，引导我展现出超凡绝伦的岁阳剑法呢……
E: I thought Mr. Tail would possess me and teach me some super cool heliobus swordplay...

C: 啊，原来是这样…对不起，斯科特，是爸爸不分青红皂白就骂了你。爸爸向你道歉。
E: Ah, so that's how it is... I'm so sorry, Skott. I shouldn't have scolded you. I apologize.

C: 喔～很不错嘛斯科特，很直球！老子很欣赏你。
E: Oh! Well done, Skott! I like your straightforward style!

C: 我们确实有点卑鄙了。
E: I guess we did fight a bit too dirty.

C: 师父们肯定可以啊！但和他们比，是不是太为难我人见人欺的小三月了？
E: Masters could handle them for sure! But isn't it asking too much of a poor little rookie like me?

C: 你懂什么，这叫狗尾续…这叫继往开来！好了，现在不是讨论仙舟俗语的时候，快去让斯科特尝尝你的厉害吧。
E: What do you know? Just let sleeping dogs lie! Anyway, now's not the time for discussing Xianzhou sayings. You've got bigger fish to fry. Go and show Skott what you're made of.

C: 瞧瞧，斯科特，你兄弟们看得比你透彻。
E: See, Skott? Looks like your bros have different ideas of what "family" means.

C: 你说你负责公司运输船，这运输船很重要吗？
E: You claim to be in charge of IPC's transport ships, but are they really that important?

C: 看向三月七
E: Look at March 7th

C: 姬子、杨叔、帕姆：见信如晤。我们在罗浮一切都好，请各位放心。你们的旅行还顺利吧？
E: Dear Himeko, Mr. Yang, and Pom-Pom, We're all good here on the Xianzhou Luofu, so no need to worry! By the way, how's your trip going?

C: 看来是鄙人失礼了…那么，请问正经的三月小姐在行医市集做些什么呢？
E: It appears I have made a faux pas... Now then, may I ask what the respectable Miss March is doing in the Healer's Market?

C: 我看二位此时来到行医市集，是有想要买的药材？
E: I noticed the two of you walking about the Healer's Market, is there something you wish to buy?

C: 那倒不必，你们感兴趣的话就留下听听呗。
E: It's fine. You can stay if you're interested.
...Huh?

C: 让我看看，你都找到了些什么好东西？
E: Let me see, what have you found there?

C: 真是狡猾又随便的解释啊…
E: Such a sly and half-baked solution...

C: 你好啊，{NICKNAME}。虽然你不认识我，但我可是对你知根知底。
E: Hello, {NICKNAME}. You may not know me, but I know all about you.

C: 可不要惯着它们！如果真能靠暴力手段交到朋友，它们就会变本加厉。到时候可就是血流成河了！
E: You mustn't indulge them! If they really do make friends using these violent methods, they will only get more brutal. If that happens, it will be a bloodbath!

C: 「友谊凭证」的事，找我可就对了！毕竟我可是你最值得信赖的老桑博啊，是吧？
E: You came to the right person for a Proof of Friendship! I'm your trustworthy old Sampo after all, right?

C: 佩拉害羞地展示了自己主笔的同人文，那是与好朋友玲可一同成为贝洛伯格魔法少女的故事。
E: Pela shyly shows a fanfic she wrote — it's a story of her and her good friend Lynx becoming magical girls of Belobog together.

C: 我能去你们的世界吗？
E: Am I able to go to your world?

C: 真要是那样…那我也算是问心无愧了……
E: If that was the case... I'd have nothing to feel bad about...

C: {NICKNAME}，你是来和卢卡先生一起参加比赛的吗？
E: {NICKNAME}, are you here to join the tournament with Mr. Luka?

C: 你那个情况明显不同。
E: Your situation is clearly different.

C: 也算是他乡遇故知。
E: I guess you can say she's an old friend of his from back home.

C: 卢卡，你打得不错。是你赢了。
E: Luka, you fought well. Victory is yours.

C: 公司不需要灵魂这种虚无缥缈的货品。它想要的只有利润。
E: The IPC doesn't need fleeting intangible goods like souls. They only want profit.

C: 我也这么认为。如果幻觉太严重，还是早点去看病比较好。
E: I agree. If the hallucinations are getting bad, we should see a doctor sooner rather than later.

C: 没有哎，那是什么？如果虎克大人能吃到这个魔偶糕，我就，我就册封你为…鼹鼠党美食探索大队长！
E: I've never eaten it before. What's that! If I can taste this sun-gloters cake. I'll... I'll make you The Moles' Grand Captain of Gourmet Discovery!

C: 呃，事情说来有些诡异……
E: Uh, this might sound weird...

C: 感谢您的梦貘，我一定会好好爱护它。
E: Thank you for the tuskpir. I will treasure it and shower it with love.

C: 出发吧
E: Let's go.

C: 哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈。
E: Hahahahahahaha.

C: 再稍等一下。
E: Please give me a moment.

C: 不算很熟，也就是过命的交情罢了。但我可不会对你手下留情。
E: We ain't exactly best buddies — our lives were just raveled in the tangles of destiny. But that don't mean I'll be showin' any mercy.

C: 咿…我没有……
E: Eek... No...

C: 信不信老子抽你？
E: You wanna get smacked?

C: 真希望有一天，我也能变得和卢卡哥哥一样强大……
E: I really hope I can grow up to be strong like Luka one day...

C: 停停停，我受不了别人谢我。你既然振作起来，就好好打你的复活赛！
E: Stop, stop, stop it! I can't stand people's gratitude. Now that you've gotten yourself together, it's time to give it your all in your repechage!

C: 我也感到惊奇…为何总会在不同世界的不同事件中与你相遇？我猜想，大约是因为我们践行的道路殊途同归，因而免不了彼此交汇吧。
E: I'm surprised too... Why do I keep running into you in different events across different worlds? If I may venture a guess, it's probably because the paths we tread lead to the same destination, so they're bound to converge.

C: 好好休整一下，接下来你将与罗浮的守擂剑士对决。
E: Get some rest. You're up against the ringmaster of the Luofu next.

C: 啊！不如这样吧！我们去看看别人的比赛怎么样？按照时间表，现在正在举行的比赛是…现在正在举行的比赛是……
E: Ah! How about this! Let's go watch someone else's match, shall we? According to the schedule, the current match is... the current match is...

C: 哎呀，哪他呜呜伯的那么多事？杜老板那里也有全年龄的饮品！
E: Tsk, son of a Wubbaboo, that isn't an issue at all! Boss Du's place also offers beverages suitable for all ages!

C: 对不起，没有当面告诉你我的名字，我就是罗浮守擂剑士彦卿。
E: Sorry for not revealing my name previously. I'm the Luofu's ringmaster, Yanqing.

C: 仙舟不愿意相信丹轮寺，也不给予他们表达的机会，如此一来，矛盾将永不消解，血火轮回将常在。
E: The Xianzhou is unwilling to believe Claretwheel Temple, while depriving them of a chance to speak their case. Thus, conflict will never dissipate, and the cycle of war and bloodshed will be ever-present.

C: 二位施主，请原谅，我即将向你们展示身为步离人的凶相。
E: Patrons, please forgive me, for I am about to display the ferocious visage of the borisin.

C: 奢摩，这也是所有仙舟住民们的愿望啊。
E: Samatha, this is also the wish of all the people on the Xianzhou.

C: 容我再休息一下。
E: Please allow me to rest.

C: 赛场上的成长不可估量…
E: Potential growth in a fight is immeasurable...

C: 真的吗？其实你是知道故意不说吧。
E: Really? Are you sure you're just trying to not out them?

C: 教练，下次记得教教我，如何拥有横跨黑白两道的广阔人脉……
E: Coach, you've got to teach me your rizz with both the good and bad guys...

C: 一定一定！我们回去就换个直播赛道，再也不玩抽象了！
E: For real, definitely! We'll switch to another live-streaming track when we get back, no more playing with abstract stuff!

C: 这场比赛的对手叫做…「朱明三不」。听名字感觉是什么大人物的绰号。你们了解这个对手吗？
E: The name of the next opponent is... the Tri-Dis of Zhuming. Just from the name, it seems like a nickname of some big shots. Do you guys know anything about the opponent?

C: 比起卢卡选手本人的临场发挥，我更关心教练您的战术安排。
E: Luka's performance in the ring aside, I'm more concerned about your tactical measures.

C: {NICKNAME}教练，这「弃赛风波」是真的么？
E: Coach {NICKNAME}, is the match forfeiting true?

C: 请你立刻出去！
E: Please remove yourself from the premises immediately!

C: 我记得，卢卡之前是打不过史瓦罗大佬的，{NICKNAME}，他到底是为什么打赢的？
E: I remember that Luka couldn't defeat Boss Svarog before. So, {NICKNAME}, how exactly did he do it?

C: 例行的采访环节已经结束，接下来该去办正事了。
E: Now that the routine interview is over, it's time to get down to business.

C: 卢卡选手能再度逆转战局吗？
E: Can Luka turn the tides again?

C: ——纯美的轮舞！
E: ...the rondo of Beauty with me!

C: 请认真一点吧！卢卡选手！
E: Please take this seriously, Luka!

C: 自我介绍一下，我叫召夏，是地衡司的勤务。没想到我这样的小人物也有资格认识你啊！
E: Allow me to introduce myself, I'm Zhaoxia, an orderly at the Realm-Keeping Commission. I can't believe a small fry like me would have the honor of meeting you!

C: 总之不要在意那些细节，把我们当气氛组就好。
E: Anyway, don't mind the details. We're just here to hype people up.

C: 切！真拿你没办法！我只讲一个笑话哦，多了我可不讲！
E: Tsk! Fine! I'm only gonna do one, and just one!

C: 诸位若还有兴致，就请诸位随在下去勘察此次修行的「战场」吧。
E: If everyone is still interested, please follow me in the inspection of the training battleground.

C: 我可以帮你们到处打听，整理信息，标注位置…很方便的，让我加入吧！呜呜呜。
E: I can ask around for you, organize the information, label their locations... It'll be super convenient for you! Please let me join! Boohoo!

C: 都让她懂完了。
E: She's SSR grade in music.

C: ——乱破小姐日常最喜欢做的事是什么呢？
E: ...What does Ms. Rappa like to do every day?

C: 唔。气氛炒得差不多，「缭乱乐团 / 缭乱众 / 缭乱号飞艇 / 缭乱忍徒旅店 / 缭乱流派对」——准备登台了！
E: Mm, the crowd has been warmed up enough. Dazzling Band / Dazzling Collective / Dazzling Airship / Dazzling Initiate Hotel / Dazzling School Party, prepare to take the stage!

C: 嗯！盛会巨星去忙吧，舞台方面的工作尽管交给我就好！
E: Okay! Go be busy, Festive Superstar! Leave the stage work to me!

C: 没什么事情了。
E: That's all.

C: 咕咕咕，老鸟是「猫头鹰老师」，是钟表小子的好朋友——看看这片折纸树林里的小鸟们，它们都是我的学生。
E: Hoot hoothoot, I am Professor Owl, a good friend of Clockie's. See the birds in Paperfold Woods? They're all my students.

C: 别太在意，这是希露瓦最近喜欢讲的冷笑话。她偶然在雪地里找到了一架坏掉的机兵，动轮摩擦履带的声音就像是在演奏吉他，还挺好听的。
E: Don't mind it. It's just a dad joke that Serval enjoys telling lately. She found a broken automaton in the snow — the noise it makes when its wheels are rubbing against the track sounds like a guitar playing, and pretty good too, I might add.

C: （邀请她们来观看演出）
E: (Invite them to watch the performance)

C: 契波不顾乱破的劝说，匆忙离开了现场。
E: Czipo hurries out of the room, completely ignoring Rappa's attempts to persuade him.

C: 乐队核心，不应由这种不懂音乐的成员担任。
E: The band leader should not be undertaken by someone who doesn't know music.

C: 金属•大师，在下问的是贝斯•忍徒。
E: Metal Master, I was asking Ninja Initiate Bass.

C: 忍界浩瀚无边，无数忍村的规范与法令无穷无尽，忍者是否都要一一遵守？
E: The ninja world is vast and endless, with infinite standards and laws throughout countless ninja villages. Is it true that a ninja must honor every single one?

C: 我可是盛会巨星！
E: But I am the festive superstar!

C: 酒吧里要处理的事多着呢，我哪有这个闲工夫。不过是偷个空，随便凑凑热闹而已。
E: I have a lot to do back at the lounge, so I don't have much time for this. I'm just taking a break to enjoy the vibes here.

C: 没有我的允许，谁敢动谐乐学院的学生！来，试试看啊！
E: Who dares take liberties with the Charmony Academy's students without my approval! Come on, just try it!

C: 永不结束的音乐节！
E: A music festival that never ends!

C: ——但我错了，世界太大，永远太长。在这两个无穷的尺度组成的坐标轴中，再伟大的英雄也显得微不足道。
E: ...But I was wrong. The world is too vast and an eternity too long. Within the coordinates of these two fathomless dimensions, even the greatest heroes would appear insignificant.

C: 答对有奖啊，奖品就是——之前风靡校园的「睡蕉小猴玩偶」！
E: You get a prize for the right answer! The prize is... a Slumbernana Monkey doll that once took the campus by storm!

C: 经理…您是能和这些小动物沟通吗？可以的话，请帮帮这个受排挤的孩子吧。
E: Manager... Can you communicate with these animals? If you can, please help that ostracized child.

C: 来听我的演唱吗喵？
E: Are you here to listen to my performance, meow?

C: 你们好。
E: Hello.

C: 缭乱•忍侠
E: Dazzling Ninja Hero

C: 我才是原创！不信给你看时间，文件夹老早就建好了。他就是个跟风的！
E: Mine's the original one! Look at the timestamp for my folder if you don't believe me — the folder was created a long time ago. He's just trying to jack the trend!

C: 还行吧？玩法新鲜，画质优秀，像这样高品质的游戏现在可不多见，作为我的第一部作品，算是相当厉害了。
E: Not bad, eh? Innovative gameplay, excellent graphics — there aren't many high-quality games like this out there anymore. It's really impressive for my first title.

C: 不要啊！丹恒乘客！
E: Noooo! Dan Heng!

C: 我只是想把道理当面讲清楚，他怎么开始跟我道歉了？
E: I just wish to clearly explain my reasoning in person. Why did he start apologizing to me?

C: 下锅热油后放凉…要多凉呢？黄油融化时加入…是指开始融化还是完全融化时？这瓶是盐吧？我尝尝…哦，是洗衣粉……
E: Heat the oil in the pan, then let it cool... How cool though? When the butter is melting, add... Does it mean when it starts to melt or has fully melted? This bottle is salt, right? Let me try... Oh, it's detergent...

C: 放什么好呢？就这首《野火》吧。
E: What should I put on? This Wildfire should be good.

C: 列车需要一些*智识*。
E: The Express needs some Erudition.

C: {NICKNAME}出手。
E: Send {NICKNAME}.

C: 还是解释一下吧…你要怎么做？
E: You'd better explain it still... What're you trying to do?

C: 我们找到了。
E: We found it.

C: 生物防治。
E: Biological preventive measures.

C: 三月，到你发言了。
E: March, your turn to say your piece.

C: 准备应急物资。
E: Prepare emergency supplies.

C: 3系统时后
E: 3 system hours later.

C: 循着沿脊背攀爬而上的怪异感，你找到了异样气息的源头。
E: Following the strange feeling that is crawling up your back, you find the source of that unnatural presence.

C: 汪！汪汪汪～
E: Woof! Woof woof!

C: 不是，你为啥要把垃圾放到观景车厢？
E: Hang on. Why did you place the trash in the Parlor Car?

C: 那座雕像的位置和打光都不错，我们过去拍拍看吧。
E: That statue's location and lighting are pretty good. Let's take some shots over there.

C: 那么——初出茅庐的摄影师「三月七 / 赵相机」，正式亮相啦！
E: Now then, the budding photographer March 7th / Say~Cheese~ is officially making her mark!

C: 都开拓到这儿来了，真让人肃然起敬呀。
E: I'm filled with awe that you've even trailblazed to this place.

C: 「星穷列车」深深欠身，随后离开了场地。
E: The Arstral Express expresses their deepest apologies and leaves the site.

C: 蕉蕉蕉蕉！
E: Nanananana!

C: 不知道这家伙又想捣什么鬼。既然她留下了娃娃的提示，那我们就去找来拍拍看吧。
E: I wonder if she's up to something again. Since she left behind the doll as a clue, we'll just use that and take some photos.

C: 「嚯嗬嗬嗬」，老奥帝被表演逗得直笑。
E: Ohohoho, Old Oti is tickled pink by the show.

C: 呵，连我都敢骂，总算是长点儿出息了。
E: Heh, she was even brave enough to berate me. At least she's grown some guts.

C: 这么一来，今天的课题就完成啦。总感觉今天好漫长——藿藿，尾巴大爷，给你们添麻烦啦~
E: With that, today's task is complete. What a long day... Huohuo, Mr. Tail, sorry for the trouble!

C: 那可太感谢啦——{NICKNAME}，你想看什么阵？
E: Much appreciated then! {NICKNAME}, what formation do you want to see?

C: 所以比起那冤诬的称呼，这相片还是叫「剑锋入世再砺图」更恰当。
E: Which is why, better than those accusatory titles, this photo should be more appropriately called "Worldly Sword Travels for Tempering."

C: 这么一来，这次摄影展就告一段落啦。
E: And with that, this photography exhibition comes to a close.

C: 一段时间之后……
E: Sometime later...

C: 乌拉尼娅的眼睛并非此刻目视你的这一双，乌拉尼娅的眼睛能看到更多——
E: Urania's eyes aren't the eyes looking at you right now. Urania's eyes can see more...

C: （艾格勒的眼目……）
E: (Aquila's eyes...)

C: 不过没关系，我来给你施加一点{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的祝福，这样就能解决啦。
E: But that's no matter. Allow me to cast the blessings of {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}, and this should solve it.

C: 距离最终期限还有不少时间，大家一起去放松下吧！嗯…去集市转转，给灰宝和小奇美拉买些好吃的，然后舒舒服服地泡个澡~走吧走吧！
E: There's still some time before the deadline. Let's all take a breather! Mm... You can go walk around the shops and buy something delicious for Grayie and the chimeras, then soak in a comfy bath! Let's go, let's go!

C: 嗯…好吧。现在你们是合格的小队了，该想想后面的打算，争取更高的名次，或是停留在舒适区里都行。不过，首先你得给队伍改个名字。
E: Hmm... all right. You're a qualified squad now, so you need to consider what to do going forward — achieve a higher ranking, or stay stagnant where you are in the comfort zone. But, you have to name your squad first.

C: 在近期工作中，我听到了些异样的声音。有空的话，您可以详细观察。
E: During my recent work stints, I heard some unusual sounds. You should investigate when you're free.

C: 咳。自从灰宝接手以来，我们团队取得了长足的进步。能克服诸多困境，接连击败对手，获得如此成绩，当然离不开各位的努力。先表示感谢~
E: Ahem, ever since Grayie took the reins, our squad has seen excellent progress. To have overcome a multitude of difficulties and defeated a string of competitors, these results wouldn't have been possible without everyone's hard work. I'd like to first express my appreciation!

C: 老大派我来砸场，就是要叫的足够大声，喊得足够响！
E: Boss sent me to cause a scene, meaning I gotta howl loud enough, and roar proud enough!

C: 这个问题的深奥程度似乎超过了奇美拉的思考能力，现场都陷入了沉默。
E: The profundity of this question has exceeded the chimera's thought capacity, and a muted silence descends.

C: 哎，原以为和这只小东西站在同一边，真能赚点什么回来，是我想多了啊。
E: *sigh* I thought there'd be some benefits to siding with this fellow. Looks like it was just wishful thinking.

C: 忆庭之镜映照的封闭世界…我对两位无名客现状的担忧又增长了<unbreak>12</unbreak>％。
E: A sealed world reflected in the Garden's mirror... My concern for the state of the two Nameless has just increased by another <unbreak>12%</unbreak>.

C: 打的不错，海豹弹射很有趣吧！
E: That's not bad. Isn't it fun to bounce seals?

C: 没问题！所谓「豹豹碰碰大作战•究极进化版」，意味着每一关对战的小海豹都由大哥我亲自搭配，还有不同的难度等级，适合真正的强者。
E: No problem! The so-called Seal Slammers: Ultimate Evolution means that I've arranged the baby seal lineup for each stage by hand, complete with an array of difficulties. A challenge for true masters.

C: 好酷的一只小海豹，独到的造型，冷峻的气场…抢走了我的主角气场，你究竟是谁！
E: What a cool seal! Its unique appearance and cool entrance... You upstaged me! Who the heck are you!

C: 唔…没关系，和小灰的这轮比赛，暂时延后吧！
E: Hmm... no worries. Let's put the match with Little Gray on hold for now!

C: 这一轮双方之中的胜者将晋级至淘汰赛。
E: The winner of this round will advance to the knockout stage.

C: 泡泡，你需要抱抱吗？
E: Bubbles, do you need a hug?

C: 啊这…我们尊重悬锋城传统…待「十敌」选手饮完鲜血蜜酿，比赛将立刻开始。
E: Well... Out of respect for the customs of Castrum Kremnos... We'll start once Yourdei has finished his sanguine honey brew.

C: o((◔ω◔¯ )o「你什么时候产生了能战胜豹的错觉」)∋
E: o((◔ω◔¯ )o "Aww, someone's got delusions of winning against me~")∋

C: 要是你赢下了所有比赛，你可得和我来几场指导赛啊！
E: If you do win this whole thing, you owe me a few coaching sessions!

C: o((҂◔∀◐҂ )o「我要让你知道『死』的痛苦~~」)∋
E: o((҂◔∀◐҂ )o "You will know the pain of death~~")∋

C: 我先休息一下。
E: I need a break first.

C: 我聆听到了一点泡泡的心事，想替傲娇的小家伙说两句……
E: I've sensed some of Bubbles' feelings, and I'd like to speak for our proud friend...

C: 重头戏还没开场，欢宴就这样匆匆忙忙地落幕了，多可惜呀！
E: The main event hasn't even started, and yet the celebration is already wrapping up — such a shame!

C: 嗝~我想为这次欢宴留下，珍藏的纪念！希望我们的冠军{NICKNAME}捧上奖杯，与来客们一起合影，嗝——
E: Burp~ I want to leave a lasting memory of this celebration! I hope our champion {NICKNAME} will hold up the trophy and take a photo with our guests. Burp—

C: ——不过，我只是输了比赛，可没承认自己真的败了。
E: — But I've only lost the competition. I didn't admit that I had been truly defeated.

C: 阿格莱雅大人发动了钞能力！
E: Lady Aglaea uses her kaching superpower again!

C: 你若失败，你会变成小海豹，而我无法保证你会变成怎样的小海豹——

C: 然后我就试了下…不得不说你真人就算发火也好可爱啊呜呜，你的脸比屏幕上小很多真的可爱死了。
E: And so I tried, but... I have to say, you're so cute in-person even when you're angry~ Your face is much smaller than on the screen. Just too cute.

C: 最近有些许骚乱——三位天才齐聚空间站，小姐忙着接待，但部分科员却发现有几只小怪物在空间站里乱窜。
E: There's been quite a bit of mayhem recently — three of the geniuses were meeting up at the space station, and while Asta hosted them, some of the researchers discovered several little critters running amok throughout the station.

C: 它们长得挺可爱的，有点像佩佩，但身上又有些糕点形状的外壳，浑身香喷喷的，看上去没什么危害。
E: They're pretty cute — kinda like Peppy? But they have these cake-shaped shells, smell delicious, and look completely harmless.

C: 我感觉它们无毒无公害啊…
E: I feel like they're totally harmless...

C: …呜哇，你的心比这地板还冷！
E: ...Waah! Your heart is even colder than this floor!

C: 阮•梅把笑与泪～
E: Tears of joy for Ruan Mei~

C: 他发现星神并不存在…
E: He discovers that Aeons do not in fact exist...

C: 「防守薄弱处」实际上是他们仅存的有生力量，而看起来防守最严密的地方，则是无数残兵败将在硬撑门面，妄想能骗过联盟军。
E: The "weakest link" was actually their only remaining strength, while what seemed to be the most heavily defended part was actually where all the scattered remnants of the officers lurked in a vain attempt to deceive the alliance.

C: 老爷！老爷！——大事不好了！
E: Master...! Terrible news, Master!

C: 才不是呢！哼，人家要选那边的大块头！
E: Hey, not at all! Hmph! I'll go with the big guy over there!

C: ——叫你们的负责人过来！
E: ...I wanna speak to your administrator!

C: 汪！因为还没有顾客哇！要是坐满了光临的客人，就会更像了！
E: Woof! It's because there are no customers yet! It would feel more like a lounge if it were filled with customers!

C: 家族的地位，还有那些鲜花和欢呼对我有什么用？艾米绮，是你陷得太深了。
E: The status within The Family, the superficial flowers and applauses — What can I do with any of that? You're the one who's gotten too caught up in it, Amiky.

C: （舒翁还是打算留在这里，继续搜寻梦境酒店深处被遗弃的「美梦剧团」。）
E: (Siobhan still plans to stay here and continue searching for the abandoned Sweet Dreams Troupe deeper in the hotel in the Dreamscape.)

C: 什么叫暂时不对外开放，这就是你们接待客人的态度？…对我有没有那么点尊重？基本的礼仪素养都没有吗？！
E: What do you mean it's temporarily closed to the public? Is that how you treat your customers? ...Do you even have a smidgen of respect for your customers? Basic etiquette?

C: 不吉利，呸呸呸！
E: Don't say that! Those words won't bring any luck!

C: （不过从聊天里知道了不少铁皮人的事，它应该愿意跟我说说心里话了吧？）
E: (But I learnt a lot about Tin Man through our chat. It should be willing to be honest with me now.)

C: 在这里遇见外面的客人可是稀罕事，所以人家就多跟了段时间。然后呀，就听见那个女孩子嘴里念念有词，好像是说——
E: It's rare to come across an outsider in this place, so I followed her for a while. Then, I overheard her murmuring something like...

C: 为了报答您的恩情，我做了件极为大胆的事。
E: To repay your kindness, I did something incredibly daring.

C: 没想到你还怪好的嘛。
E: I didn't realize you were so nice.

C: …不太行，让舒翁多教你几手再来吧，你现在调出来的东西只会让客人生气。
E: ...Not good enough. Learn some more tricks from Siobhan and come back again. What you're mixing now will only irritate your guests.

C: 我守在这，希望能帮到它们…变得正常点，能重新得到人们的认可，过上开心的生活。
E: So, I decided to stay here, hoping that I could help them... get a bit normal again. That they can regain recognition from the people and have happy lives.

C: 要是离开这些特制的饮料，它们就会失去理性，胡乱攻击周围的对象，直至…彻底无法恢复。
E: Without these special drinks, those monsters will lose their sanity and start attacking everything around them until... until they're beyond recovery.

C: 对不起…
E: Sorry...

C: 嘻嘻，有空的话，来和人家聊聊天怎么样？先来杯饮料吧，想要<color=#dbc291ff>有怀旧感觉，口感超级浓厚的饮品，这次得少加点冰</color>，人家最近身体有点虚。
E: Hee-hee, if you're free, how about having a chat with me? Let's have a drink first. I want <color=#dbc291ff>a drink with a nostalgic feeling and a super thick texture. Do add less ice this time</color>. I've been feeling a bit under the weather lately.

C: 听好了——我想要杯<color=#dbc291ff>清爽的饮料</color>，拜托你了汪！拜托你了谢谢汪！
E: Listen up — I want <color=#dbc291ff>a refreshing drink</color> please, woof! Pretty please, woof!

C: <color=#eb4d3dff>(• 8 •)</color>
E: <color=#eb4d3dff>(• 8 •)</color>

C: 保持节奏
E: Keep with the tempo

C: 谢谢
E: Thank you

C: 汪汪汪
E: WoofWoofWoof

C: 汪
E: Woof

C: 汪      汪
E: Woof      Woof

C: 准备开始正式躲避吧！
E: Now prepare to start evasion proper!

C: …就这？就算是作为Demo，这流程也太简单了吧？
E: ...That's it? Isn't this a bit too simple even for a demo?

C: 还得继续跑流程…
E: I have to continue the test...

C: 绕来绕去的我要晕3D了，就不能给个自动寻路吗——
E: We've been going around in circles for so long. The 3D graphics are gonna make me sick if this goes on! Why isn't there an auto-navigation feature...

C: 梦里就是这点好，无论外貌还是嗓音，乔装起来都非常方便。
E: This is why dreams are such wonderful things — it's so convenient to disguise myself, from my appearance to my voice.

C: 所以当这些小鸟出现在眼前时，我不由产生了一种非常奇妙的感觉……
E: Therefore, when these birds appeared before my eyes, an intense feeling of marvel welled up inside me...

C: 战略投资部一直对贝洛伯格贼心不死，卢卡，你也打算趁机捞一笔吧？
E: The Strategic Investment Department has always coveted Belobog. Luka, were you planning to take advantage of this opportunity as well?

C: 我是堂堂正正打赢的，哪里有什么黑幕？
E: I fought fairly and won! This isn't rigged!

C: 当然，我并不是为了代言的事来的。以网络上的流言蜚语来看…他和公司现在不应该、也不适合缔结商业合作，这会让双方都无利可图的。
E: I know. I'm not here about the endorsement. Given the online rumors... he and IPC shouldn't, and couldn't enter into a business partnership now, as it would be unprofitable for both sides.

C: 你找到波尔卡了？
E: You found Polka?

C: 唉～越想越可惜，她那操弄概率的能力，和模拟宇宙简直是天生的一对。
E: Ahhh... it's a terrible pity, the more I think about it. Her proficiency in manipulating probability is absolutely tailored to the Simulated Universe.

C: {NICKNAME}乘客，准备好接受成为无名客的仪式了吗？
E: Are you ready for your initiation into the Nameless, {NICKNAME}?

C: 我就说这是最大的房间吧，都能关进一头末日兽了！
E: See? I wasn't kidding when I said this is the largest room on the Express! You could fit even a Doomsday Beast in here!

C: 帕姆准备了一笔启动款项。先试试用它建设卧室吧！
E: Pom-Pom has prepared a starter fund to help you kick-start the renovation. You can use it to set up your bedroom!

C: 还有事，稍等一下。
E: Give me a minute. I've got something else I need to do.

C: （虽然规模上还是略逊于「黑塔」空间站的奇物收藏室……）
E: Although it's still somewhat smaller in scale compared to the Curio Collection Room of the Herta Space Station...

C: 为了恭喜浴室落成，送给你这个「巴门尼德入浴剂」！
E: To celebrate the completion of the bathroom, I'm giving you this Parmenides Bath Soak!

C: 哼哼，从泡澡爱好者的专业角度来看，还缺少一个最重要的东西。
E: Hmph, from the perspective of a bath enthusiast, it's still missing the most important thing.

C: 先说具体内容。
E: Give me more details first.

C: 虽然这些旧城基本都被毁得差不多了，不过总有些犄角旮旯还能保持完好——比如藏在地下的部分。
E: The ancient cities may be in utter ruin by now, but I'm sure some parts of them managed to remain as they were... Say, places that have been buried underground.

C: 真有那么值钱吗？
E: Are they really worth that much?

C: 记得做足准备，我等你回来。
E: Of course, it's best to be well-prepared. I'll be waiting for you.

C: 门开了，但这次你们没有义无反顾地前进…因为门的背后是更多、更多扇门。
E: Although the door's open, you don't proceed onward without hesitation like you did before... Because there are more and more doors behind this door.

C: 你不会是想偷懒吧？
E: You're not planning to slack off, right?

C: 我就知道你会答应的，灰宝！
E: I knew you'd come around, Grayie!

C: 呼呼，哼哼哈哈哈哈哈哈——
E: Hehe, hehehe... Hahahahaha —

C: 呜嗡。（有枪的老师，说什么都是对的。）
E: Grumph. (Teachers with guns are always right.)

C: 呜…（大家都把我当成最特别的，我想回应这些期待，但我其实一直都很害怕。）
E: *sniff* (Everyone sees me as someone special. I want to meet their expectations, but deep down, I've always been afraid.)

C: 放心吧，就算再特别，也没人能要求你必须完美无缺，毕竟就连泰坦神明也做不到。
E: Relax. No matter how special you are, nobody gets to demand perfection from anyone. After all, not even the divine Titans could manage that.

C: 嗯，确实令人刮目相看。
E: Hmm, I must say, I'm impressed.

C: 数百年前有人造了一批它的仿品，也算得上有价值的宝物，我便未起疑心。没想到…这递到我手上的正是原品。哈，这种珍宝怎么会在市场上流通呢！
E: Centuries ago, someone produced a series of replicas that were treasures in their own right, which is why I was unsuspecting. Yet, what ended up in my hands was the original. It's hard to believe such a treasure could ever make its way onto the market!

C: 有没有我推的款？
E: Any recommendations?

C: 点心糕饼，向前冲——
E: Time to make a dash for snacks!

C: 嘶嘶。每个人都值得第二次机会。
E: Zztzzt. Everyone deserves a second chance.

C: 偷偷告诉你，阮•梅女士在我这里留下了个大大的宝箱。
E: Just between us, Miss Ruan Mei left a huge chest in my care.

C: 好哦，什么时候来都可以。我会一直在这呆着的。
E: Sure thing, come whenever you like. I'll be hanging around here anyway.

C: 黑塔女士的确希望您来当测试员。
E: Madam Herta really wants you to be the tester.

C: 无名之人、无命之人，终有一日，你会意识到自己的本质。届时，你将面临真正的取舍……
E: Nameless one, fateless one, one day you shall realize your true nature. And when that time comes, you'll be faced with a real choice...

C: 所以，你刚才是在…
E: So, you were...

C: 还有点事要处理…
E: Still got a couple of things to wrap up...

C: 哈哈，那还真是幸运。能贡献更多，我求之不得。
E: Haha, wouldn't that be lucky! I'd love to help out in any way I can.

C: <size=32>美食五大天王！</size>
E: <size=32>The Five Gourmet Overlords!</size>

C: 现在，敌方已经攻到阵前，要向它们妥协吗？要向它们屈服吗？迷！
E: The enemy's drawing near! Should we back down? Should we surrender, mem?

C: 菜单里有这道菜吗？
E: Wait, was that even on the menu?

C: 好啊，我最喜欢吃席了！
E: Sounds great! I love a good banquet!

C: 一定准时到。
E: We'll definitely be there.

C: 迷！开吃——
E: Mem! Let's eat!

C: 就像飘落在湖面的思绪，荡起阵阵涟漪，回过神来，只留下一张现实的脸庞。
E: It's just like a drifting thought landing on a calm lake, stirring up gentle ripples... and when you snap out of your daze, there's only reality, staring back at you.

C: 仅有的忧虑，便是她们与此处的妖精过从甚密，难以严厉管控手下员工。不过，这或许也是优势。
E: My only concern is their overly close relationship with the local fairies, which makes it difficult for them to impose strict discipline on the delivery crew. Still, that might not be a flaw but rather an asset.

C: 我不习惯做饭的时候有人看着。什么事？
E: I'm not used to cooking with someone watching. What is it?

C: 下次再聊吧！
E: Let's catch up another time!

C: 迷！可是，我觉得这样的说话方式好威风，好有气势，好多妖精都会听我的。
E: Mem! But I think this way of talking makes me sound so cool and powerful. All the other fairies will totally listen to me.

C: 瓦尔特分享了收藏已久的「超燃台词一百句」，队员们表示心灵受到极大触动！
E: Welt has shared his long-treasured collection of the "<unbreak>100</unbreak> Ultraquotables," and the team was deeply moved!

C: 宿敌
E: Nemesis

C: 诗篇
E: Poems

C: ███//Penacony::Entity
E: ███//Penacony::Entity

C: 「这是石榴汁。」\n男人嗤之以鼻。
E: "This is pomegranate juice."\nThe man scoffs.

C: 不死的身躯万折不摧，\n却难奈苦泪在心间流淌。
E: A body immortal may never fall,\nBut tears of pain in his heart still flow.

C:
遗骸逐层堆积，
垒作深渊，砌成山巅。
他以这尖峰划分时光，
用战火丈量流年。
E:
The corpses pile up,
Filling ravines, forming mountains strong.
He carved time with peaks' edge,
And counted the fleeting years by fires of war.

C: 旧旅已尽，新程才启。\n漫长岁月中，\n孩子总能怀抱本心。
E: A new journey only begins when the previous one comes to an end.\nDespite time marching forward endlessly,\nthe children always manage to stay true to their hearts.

C: 孩童们飞入街区， 想温热居民的信仰。 「请你们不要害怕…」 「*我们*一定带你们去到新家！」
E: The children fly into the streets, Wishing to encourage the resident's faith. "Please, be not afraid..." "We will definitely bring you to a new home!"

C: 那当然是夸大其词，在战争的遗迹中， 人们只寻得了古老的狮首。 「此言非虚。」 它也已然濒临毁灭， 「纵使死战得胜， 战士们却已无力回天。」 「是那栖居死亡的怀间， 提早结束了他们的苦痛。」
E: It is an exaggeration, that is certain. People only found an ancient lion's head in battle's ruined armaments. "Those words are true." The head itself was nearly dead. "Though they won in fierce battle, the warriors were powerless to turn the tide." "It was the embrace where death dwelled that gave early release from their pain."

C:
受人爱戴的金织闻得少女惘然，
试图向她传授纺织的技艺。

据称，她曾有作品留于圣城。
然而，织者的言语为此作结——
E:
The beloved Goldweaver hears this in distress,
Then tries to teach her the art of weaving and threads.

It has been said that the maiden has works that the holy city possesses.
But this is the judgment the Goldweaver expresses —

C: 似乎，少女也曾热衷于凭空想象，\n不少野史出于她手。\n是一场误会，使她就此罢手。
E: It seems the girl once also loved to imagine with effort,\nAnd many wild tales were written on her part.\nA misunderstanding was what made her cease this art.

C:
然而，这些诗篇也曾为她招致埋怨——

经她之手写下的词句，
全数缺少结局，
而死亡的侍女从无再续的意愿。
E:
However, those poems have brought her many complaints —

The poems that her hands composed,
All lack an ending of any kind,
And the maid of death has no desire to continue them.

C: 「不许你独自迈过黄昏， 走进那片黑夜里。」 姐姐啜泣不止， 少女只好紧紧偎抱、小心安抚。
E: "I won't allow you to walk through the dusk alone, Or enter the night of no reprieve." Her sister sobs without end, And the girl has to gently hug her, and softly relieve.

C: 然而空中的钱币总是簌地消失，\n仿佛诡计泰坦给予的回应。
E: Yet the coin in the air always suddenly disappears,\nAs if in reply from the Trickery Titan.

C:
记忆的<color=#9e5738>冰窟</color>中，
唯有故事拥有温度。
它们逐渐从符号与数字，
变成你知晓却从未见过的事物。
E:
In the <color=#9e5738>ice cave</color> of memory,
only stories hold warmth.
They slowly transform from symbols and numbers
into things you are familiar with, yet have never seen.

C:
一天，一颗流星坠落在了小镇中。这场灾难让鳄鱼们手足无措，也给镇民们创造了反抗的机会。面对向自己宣战的镇民，石头老板选择了用暴力镇压镇民！
但带领镇民们的哈努兄弟英勇无双，远道而来的「罗盘号」船员也成了他的帮手，船上的钟表小子、镜子公主与左轮队长让石头老板头疼不已。
石头老板最后失败了，镇民们把他赶出了小镇，噩梦小镇也变成了美梦小镇。
E:
One day, a meteor crashed into the town. The crocodiles were at a loss for what to do, creating a chance for the townsfolk to launch a counterattack. Faced with townsfolk openly hostile against him, Boss Stone decided to suppress them with violence!
However, the leader of the townsfolk — Brother Hanu — was valiant, and he even managed to enlist the help of the Compass crew who came from afar. Clockie, Mirror Princess, and Captain Revolver from the ship gave Boss Stone a lot of trouble.
At last, Boss Stone was vanquished and ousted from the town, and Nightmareville was transformed into Dreamville.

C:
一天，一颗流星坠落在了小镇中。这场灾难让鳄鱼们手足无措，也给镇民们创造了反抗的机会。面对向自己宣战的镇民，石头老板选择了推行民主制度！
虽然这是一个好法子，但石头老板过去的恶行已经让镇民们伤透了心，没有人愿意信任他。在哈努兄弟的带领下，外来的「罗盘号」船员和镇民们团结一致，让石头老板头痛不已。
石头老板最后失败了，镇民们把他赶出了小镇，噩梦小镇也变成了美梦小镇。
E:
One day, a meteor crashed into the town. The disaster left the crocodiles bewildered and gave the townsfolk a chance to rebel. In the face of the townsfolk's declaration of war, Boss Stone decided to introduce a democratic system!
Although it was a commendable move, but Boss Stone's past evil deeds were beyond redemption. None of the townsfolk believed in him. Under Brother Hanu's leadership, the crew of the Compass and the townsfolk worked together, giving Boss Stone a lot of trouble.
At last, Boss Stone was vanquished and ousted from the town, and Nightmareville was transformed into Dreamville.

C: 好伙伴，能收到你的来信，我真的很高兴。很抱歉，因为不得已的理由，我先踏上了旅程。\n时间流逝，过去恍惚得就像迷境草丘上的一场小憩，揭开这封信，就好像在和过去的自己对话。\n无论如何，感谢你的来信。
E: Dear friend, I was ecstatic to receive your letter. I'm sorry I had to set out on my journey without saying goodbye — some things just couldn't wait.\nAs time flies, the past feels like a hazy trance, a brief nap on a heap of grass in a maze. It's as if I'm speaking to my past self, as I open this letter.\nRegardless, thank you for writing to me.
