C:
在钟表小子的动画中，有许多可爱的折纸小鸟，是它们建造了华丽的美梦小镇。这次，就让我们来讲讲折纸小鸟们的故事……
首先，他们真的只是普通的小鸟。

在噩梦小镇赶走石头老板，成为美梦小镇之后，钟表小子和哈努兄弟就开始思考，如何让小镇成为美梦一般的地方。

幸运的是，钟表小子曾经在旅途中结识的筑巢天才——猫头鹰老师意外来到了小镇。在猫头鹰老师的号召下，世界各地的小鸟们都来到了美梦小镇。
但他们其实并没派上大用处，只能为镇民叼来木头和石块，毕竟他们真的只是普通的小鸟。

在猫头鹰老师的指导下，镇民们很快就在美梦小镇中建起了各种漂亮的房子……
但镇民们们很快就遇到了一个大难题——美梦小镇的领土不够大！为了扩张美梦小镇的领土，钟表小子喊来了远方的牛仔们开辟荒原，但放荡不羁的牛仔们不愿将开辟的土地归还给美梦小镇，这让木头老爷犯了愁。

聪明的猫头鹰老师让折纸小鸟们飞入牛仔的领地，主动帮他们修筑住所与酒馆…但小鸟根本不会建筑，他们把石头和木头从天上丢下来，把牛仔们砸的眼冒金星。
木头老爷趁机进攻了牛仔们的领地，一举剿灭了这群霸占小镇土地的家伙。

现在，小镇拥有了广阔的土地，但还需要更美丽的建筑与之相称。在猫头鹰老师的指挥下，大家建立了宏伟的小镇宾馆、肃穆的朝露小屋、有趣的汽水赛场……
虽然折纸小鸟们没派上多大用处，但大家还是很喜欢这群搬运建筑材料的小家伙，于是把他们也当成了建造小镇的一份子。

未来，猫头鹰老师会带领着更多的小镇，建设更美丽的美梦小镇……
折纸小鸟也会参与其中，但他们真的只是普通的小鸟。

（注：本篇内容与正传不处于同一世界线，相关故事请以《钟表小子》与《美梦往事》正传为准）
E: The Clockie's animation features a lot of lovely Origami Birds that built the magnificent Dreamville. Now, let us delve into their story... Firstly, they were really just ordinary birds. After ousting Boss Stone from Nightmareville and renaming the place Dreamville, Clockie and Brother Hanu racked their brains trying to transform the town into a truly dreamlike place. Luckily, Professor Owl, a nest-building genius whom Clockie met during his journey, made a surprise visit to the town. At Professor Owl's call, birds from all over the world flocked to Dreamville. Yet, they couldn't do much except carry logs and rocks for the townsfolk. After all, they were just regular birds. Under Professor Owl's guidance, it didn't take long for the townsfolk to erect beautiful houses in Dreamville... But the townsfolk soon found themselves in a dilemma — Dreamville was too small! To expand Dreamville's territory, Clockie enlisted the help of the cowboys from afar to explore the wilderness. Being unruly, the cowboys refused to return the cleared land to Dreamville, much to Old Man Wood's distress. The clever Professor Owl instructed the Origami Birds to fly to the cowboys' territory and help them build houses and taverns... but the birds didn't know how to build at all. They dropped logs and rocks from the sky, hitting the cowboys until they saw stars. Old Man Wood then seized the opportunity to charge into the cowboys' territory, defeating those baddies that occupied the land unconscionably. Now, Dreamville has a vast territory, and it needs beautiful buildings to complement it. Under Professor Owl's guidance, the magnificent Town Hotel, the solemn Dawndew Hut, and the fun Soda Racetrack have been built through joint efforts... Although the Origami Birds aren't very useful, everyone is still fond of these little carriers of building materials and have accepted them as part of the construction project. In the future, Professor Owl will lead more towns in constructing an even more beautiful Dreamville... The Origami Birds will be involved in the construction too, but they are really just regular birds. (Note: The content of this passage does not exist in the same timeline as the canonical events. For canon, please refer to Clockie and Dreamjoy Memoir.)

C: W
E: W

C:
「海洋」的火种已被归还。

法吉娜是司掌大海与风暴的泰坦，也是蜜酿与宴会的主人。它能随意将水体移动到翁法罗斯的任意角落。在神话中，它是善变无常、沉醉享乐的神明，它将大海视作寻欢作乐的酒池，与大地泰坦吉奥里亚永远对抗，从无讲和的可能。

话虽如此，法吉娜也负有洗刷世界污秽的职能。受泰坦赐福的浴池不仅能洁净身体的污垢，也能清洗灵魂的伤痛，时至今日，沐浴已经成为翁法罗斯人不可割舍的生活情趣。同时，法吉娜也是欢宴和狂饮的神明，它将酿造的技艺传授给人类，并以海风和浪花教会他们最初的歌唱与舞蹈，在翁法罗斯的浴场和宴会厅中，人们会唱歌豪饮，作为奉献给大海之母的祭祀。

法吉娜喜欢在人世中漂流，出现在海上的波涛、河上的湍流、宴上的酒杯中，带来歌舞与欢笑。据说，法吉娜有时会显形在远航船的周围，令眷属和水手们共赴欢宴。只是，每当宴会过后，狂醉的泰坦总会掀起巨浪，晃得水手们彻夜难眠。
E:
The Coreflame of "Ocean" has already been returned.

Phagousa is the Titan that controls oceans and storms, as well as the master of honey brew and banquets. They are capable of freely moving bodies of water across any part of Amphoreus as they please. According to mythology, they are a capricious and pleasure-obsessed god that sees the oceans as their place of alcoholic revelry. They have an eternal rivalry with the Earth Titan Georios, with no hope of making peace.

That being said, Phagousa also bears the duty of washing clean the filth of the world. Baths that have received the benediction of the Titan are able to not only clean the body of impurities, but can also cleanse the wounds of the soul. They have become an irreplaceable joy in the lives of Amphoreus' people. At the same time, Phagousa is also the god of banquets and drunkenness. They passed on the art of brewing to humanity and taught them the first songs and dances with the ocean breeze and waves. In the baths and banquet halls of Amphoreus, people often sing and imbibe as a ritual dedicated to the mother of the oceans.

Phagousa enjoys roaming the mortal world. They appear in the waves of the ocean, the deluge of the rivers, and the goblets of banquets to bring song, dance, and laughter. It is said that Phagousa will occasionally appear around long-distance sailing ships and invite their Titankin to feast alongside the sailors. The only problem is, after every banquet, the intoxicated Titan will whip up huge waves and keep the sailors awake through the night.

C:
「天空」的火种已被归还。

艾格勒是司掌天空、天体以及昼夜循环的泰坦神明，同时也曾是疆域最广阔的泰坦神明，它高居翁法罗斯的天穹之上，笼罩并注视着整个世界。在大多数传说中，艾格勒的傲慢没有遮蔽它的友善，它向世人投下目光，温暖大地，降下甘霖。但它也可化作最为可怕的天灾，任何试图僭越天空的狂徒，都会被它施以严酷的惩戒。

在翁法罗斯人的传说中，艾格勒被形容为一位长有百眼的天空巨鸟。它注视大地的眼睛睁开时，世界迎来光明；它的眼皮垂下时，世界陷入黑暗。在与灾厄泰坦的战争中，艾格勒的许多双眼睛都被「刺盲」——这也是为何在如今，翁法罗斯的诸多城邦都陷入了永夜。

艾格勒也是创造、发明之神，遍布大地的智械奇兽便是它的创作，工程师和数学家们时常祭拜这位百眼的神明，希冀从它的赐福中获得些许灵光与启迪。
E:
The Sky Coreflame has been returned.

Aquila, the Titan of the sky, celestial bodies, and the cycle of day and night, was also the Titan that once had the largest realm. They reside above the heavens of Amphoreus, encompassing and watching over the entire world. In most legends, Aquila's pride does not obscure their kindness. They gaze upon humanity, warming the earth and bringing down life-giving rain. However, they can also transform into the most fearsome calamity, harshly punishing any who dare to overcome the sky.

In the tales of Amphoreus, Aquila is depicted as a colossal sky-bird with a hundred eyes. When their eyes open, light fills the world, and when their eyelids fall, darkness envelops the land. In the war against the Calamity Titans, many of Aquila's eyes were "blinded." This is why many city-states in Amphoreus are now shrouded in eternal night.

Aquila is also the god of creation and invention, credited with creating the mechanical beasts scattered across the land. Engineers and mathematicians frequently pay homage to this hundred-eyed deity, hoping to receive inspiration and enlightenment from their blessings.

E: If the Origami Birds' hiding and seeking is a bit <color=#f29e38ff>too obscure</color> for you, you can gift any extra <color=#f29e38ff>Aideen coins</color> you have to the head bird at the gathering place "Great Tree," and they will <color=#f29e38ff>try their best to describe to you where the bird is hiding</color>.

C: 《钟表小子》外传的体验拍摄活动开放了更多项目，欢迎游客们前来体验！
E: The Clockie's Extras filming experience event now has more available activities. Guests are welcome to try them out!

C: 在「扎格列斯之手」携带有可搬运物件时，可以看到标有放置符号的<color=#f29e38ff>放置点</color>。携带可搬运物件与<color=#f29e38ff>放置点</color>交互可以将其放置在对应位置上。
E: While the Hand of Zagreus is carrying a transportable object, <color=#f29e38ff>placement spots</color> with marks of placement can be seen. Interacting with the <color=#f29e38ff>placement spots</color> while carrying a transportable object will place it at the corresponding location.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>纠缠</color>会在敌方目标<color=#f29e38ff>回合开始</color>时对其造成量子属性附加伤害。若敌方目标在<color=#f29e38ff>纠缠状态下受到攻击</color>，则会使该<color=#f29e38ff>附加伤害提高</color>。
E: <color=#f29e38ff>Entanglement</color> will deal Additional Quantum DMG at the <color=#f29e38ff>start of the enemy target's turn</color>. If the target is <color=#f29e38ff>attacked while under Entanglement</color>, the <color=#f29e38ff>Additional DMG taken will increase</color>.

C: 具有<color=#f29e38ff>镇守能力</color>的敌人会根据周围尚未探索的区域数量，提高自己的攻击力。\n该敌人会直接出现，但<color=#f29e38ff>不会封锁周围的区域</color>。
E: Enemies with <color=#f29e38ff>Garrison Abilities</color> will strengthen themselves according to the number of unexplored areas surrounding them, increasing their own ATK. \nThese enemies will immediately appear, but <color=#f29e38ff>will not lock down the surrounding area</color>.

C: 经营效益受三个<color=#f29e38ff>指标</color>影响；评级越高，经营带来的收益越大
E: Management benefits are influenced by three <color=#f29e38ff>parameters</color>. The higher the museum is ranked, the more benefits it will bring in.

C: 尝试<color=#f29e38ff>避开敌人的视野</color>并利用<color=#f29e38ff>疾跑键</color>快速接近敌人后将敌人一网打尽吧
E: Try to <color=#f29e38ff>avoid the enemy's line of sight</color> and use <color=#f29e38ff>Sprint</color> to approach your enemies and take them all down at once

C: 使用<color=#f29e38ff>群体输出</color>技能攻击敌人。\n在消灭非首领敌人后，将根据本次攻击造成的<color=#f29e38ff>溢出伤害</color>，对敌方<color=#f29e38ff>首领</color>造成高额倍率伤害。
E: Use <color=#f29e38ff>AoE</color> abilities to attack enemies.\nAfter defeating a non-boss enemy, deals DMG with huge multipliers to the <color=#f29e38ff>boss</color> based on the <color=#f29e38ff>Overflow DMG</color> dealt in this attack.

C: 我方编队中<color=#f29e38ff>第二位角色</color>释放终结技后为第一位角色<color=#f29e38ff>充能</color>，并使其下次攻击伤害提高。
E: After <color=#f29e38ff>the ally positioned second</color> in the Team Lineup uses their Ultimate, <color=#f29e38ff>regenerates Energy</color> for the ally positioned first, and increases their next attack's DMG.

C: 本关初始武器：<color=#f29e38ff>雷电荆棘</color>\n对一个敌方目标施加【雷电荆棘】，在目标回合开始时发射造成<color=#f29e38ff>持续伤害</color>的雷击，并在目标死亡时转移给另一个敌方目标。\n优先提升初始<color=#f29e38ff>武器等级</color>，获得其<color=#f29e38ff>共鸣配饰</color>，进阶<color=#f29e38ff>传说武器</color>！
E: This Stage's Initial Weapon: <color=#f29e38ff>Thunderbolt Thorns</color>\nApplies Thunderbolt Thorns to an enemy target. When the target's turn starts, unleashes Thundershock that deals <color=#f29e38ff>DoT</color>. When the target gets defeated, transfers it to another enemy target.\nPrioritize the upgrade of initial <color=#f29e38ff>weapon level</color> and obtain their <color=#f29e38ff>resonant accessories</color> to ascend your weapon to a <color=#f29e38ff>legendary weapon</color>!

C: 本关初始武器：<color=#f29e38ff>寒冰飞剑</color>\n我方连续行动超过3次时，【寒冰飞剑】在敌方行动前对随机敌方目标施放多把飞剑，飞剑数量根据连续行动次数提高。\n优先提升初始<color=#f29e38ff>武器等级</color>，获得其<color=#f29e38ff>共鸣配饰</color>，进阶<color=#f29e38ff>传说武器</color>！
E: This Stage's Initial Weapon: <color=#f29e38ff>Frosty Flying Sword</color>\nWhen allies act over 3 times consecutively, Frosty Flying Sword will launch multiple flying swords at random enemy targets. The number of swords increases with more consecutive actions taken.\nPrioritize the upgrade of the initial <color=#f29e38ff>weapon level</color> and obtain their <color=#f29e38ff>resonant accessories</color> to ascend your weapon to a <color=#f29e38ff>legendary weapon</color>!

C: 作为「魔法师」的角色，其<color=#f29e38ff>战技</color>和<color=#f29e38ff>终结技</color>将获得<color=#f29e38ff>全新战斗效果</color>，指挥「小桶宝力」进行战斗。
E: Characters acting as the Magician will see their <color=#f29e38ff>Skill</color> and <color=#f29e38ff>Ultimate</color> gain <color=#f29e38ff>new combat effects</color>, letting them command Litter Pony in battle.

C: 敌人受到<color=#f29e38ff>击破伤害</color>时，获得1层<color=#f29e38ff>易伤</color>。\n集中攻击<color=#f29e38ff>易伤层数最高</color>的敌人，可造成更高击破伤害。
E: When enemies receive <color=#f29e38ff>Break DMG</color>, they are afflicted with 1 stack of <color=#f29e38ff>Vulnerability</color>.\nFocusing attacks on enemies with <color=#f29e38ff>the highest Vulnerability stacks</color> to deal higher Break DMG.

C: 当前<color=#f29e38ff>「认知值」</color>及<color=#f29e38ff>「认知值目标区间」</color>均会展示在<color=#f29e38ff>「认知条」</color>上。\n可在棋盘上方查阅。\n解锁「秘闻」所需「认知值」将会展示在「秘闻」上方。
E: Current <color=#f29e38ff>Cognition Value</color> and <color=#f29e38ff>Cognition Value Target Range</color> are both displayed in the <color=#f29e38ff>Cognition Bar</color>.\nCheck it at the top of the board.\nThe Cognition Value required to unlock each Secret is displayed above the Secret.

C: 在「差分宇宙」中，成功击败首领敌人后将进入<color=#f29e38ff>「过量转化」</color>挑战。
E: In Divergent Universe, after defeating the Boss Enemy, you will enter the <color=#f29e38ff>Excessive Conversion</color> challenge.

E: One of the functions of the Workbench of Creation, which can synthesize a new Curio using 2 Curios of the same quality.

E: {LAYOUT_MOBILE#Tap}{LAYOUT_CONTROLLER#Press}{LAYOUT_KEYBOARD#Click} here to <color=#f29e38ff>jump quickly</color> to the corresponding place in the song and start playing.

C: 碰撞<color=#f29e38ff>尖刺墙</color>的小海豹会受到<color=#f29e38ff>3</color>点伤害。
E: Colliding with a <color=#f29e38ff>Spiky Wall</color> deals <color=#f29e38ff>3</color> DMG to the baby seal.

C: 碰撞<color=#f29e38ff>泳圈柱</color>的小海豹会<color=#f29e38ff>加速</color>，并在本轮中增加<color=#f29e38ff>1</color>点攻击力。
E: A baby seal that collides with a <color=#f29e38ff>Floatie</color> increases <color=#f29e38ff>SPD</color>, and gains <color=#f29e38ff>1</color> ATK for the current round.

C: <color=#f29e38ff>尖刺墙</color>的小海豹会受到<color=#f29e38ff>6</color>点伤害。
E: The <color=#f29e38ff>Spiky Wall</color> deals <color=#f29e38ff>6</color> DMG to the baby seal.

C: 正确使用<color=#f29e38ff>战技</color>或<color=#f29e38ff>终结技</color>攻击该敌人将触发<color=#f29e38ff>【破谜离场】</color>。
E: Correctly use <color=#f29e38ff>Skill</color> or <color=#f29e38ff>Ultimate</color> to attack the enemy to trigger <color=#f29e38ff>"Solved Departure."</color>

C: 将<color=#f29e38ff>南瓜、刺刺果或绿球菜</color>种满<color=#f29e38ff>同一片农田</color>后，会获得<color=#f29e38ff>巨型作物</color>
E: Plant <color=#f29e38ff>Pumpkins, Quillorbs, or Greenie Cabbages</color> in <color=#f29e38ff>the same field</color> fully to get a <color=#f29e38ff>Giant Crop</color>

E: Just <color=#f29e38ff>clear adjacent fruits</color> to unlock them, tweet!

E: This is the die that represents <color=#f29e38ff>the duration of the snippet</color>. Drag it onto the plot content to start editing.

E: Tick-tock, the <color=#f29e38ff>different amounts</color> of time invested will bring about different <color=#f29e38ff>Emotion changes</color> and varied story content as well!

C: 除了进阶传说武器以外，发掘不同<color=#f29e38ff>武器间的组合</color>，也会发挥神奇的威力呢！快来看看吧~
E: Aside from ascending Legendary Weapons, discovering different <color=#f29e38ff>weapon combinations</color> will also allow you to unleash fantastical power! Come take a look~

C: 听起来就很厉害！那么…不如来直接看看哪些武器和配饰可以发生共鸣吧！

E: Based on reliable sources, the Ultimate Bat I'd been seeking is currently in the hands of the Black Cloak Demon King, who rules over the cosmos.

C: 继续选择<color=#f29e38ff>晦月环刃</color>吧。
E: Continue selecting the <color=#f29e38ff>Waning Selenic Chakram</color>.

C: 君王是否应以万民的幸福为最高志业？这个问题并不存在标准答案。但我想，唯有君王抱有为万民赴死的决意时，才称得上是万民的君王。
E: Should a king place the happiness of their people as their highest goal? There's no definitive answer to this question. But I believe that only when a king is prepared to give their life for their people can they truly be called a king.

E: Saber... Never backs down.

C: 没有什么特别的爱好…不，应该说是没什么取悦自己的小爱好。能够看着人们过上幸福的生活，我已经很开心了。
E: I don't have any particular interests... No, perhaps I should say I don't have any casual hobbies for myself. Just seeing people live happy lives is enough to make me content.

C: 她是我的旧识。既然能召唤她做你的从者，说明你也是个正直的人。不必迷茫，保持这样继续前进吧。
E: She's an old acquaintance of mine. The fact that you've summoned her as your Servant tells me you're a person of integrity. Don't doubt yourself, stay the course, and keep pushing ahead.

C: 在这儿，像他这样理解「电影」的人不多吧？否则我必须要指出，你们世界的品味还有待提高。
E: Not many in this world seem to appreciate "film" the way he does. If they did, I'd have to be blunt, your world's taste in movies leaves a lot to be desired.

C: 随蝴蝶一起消散吧，旧日的幻影。
E: Disappear among the sea of butterflies, illusions of the past!

C: 算不上烦恼，就…在诊所里存了几本小时候最喜欢的漫画，结果全被孩子们借走了…
E: I'm over it now, but... when I was young, I used to keep my favorite comic books in the clinic. Then the other kids started borrowing them... permanently.

C: 除了「摇滚」，还有什么是真正属于我的……
E: Rock 'n' roll might be my only true companion...

C: 跟上，我的节奏！
E: Keep up with my tempo!

C: 精彩的总在下一场！
E: The best is yet to come!

C: 做得好。
E: Well done.

C: 希儿早就是独当一面的大人了，我也不能把她当孩子看待了。
E: Seele's already become a capable adult — I can't treat her like a child anymore.

C: 来感受生命的冲击。
E: Savor the vigor of life.

C: 史瓦罗先生的资料库里，什么都有……
E: Mr. Svarog has everything in his database.

C: 刚到下层那会儿，主要帮大姐头搞点药品，熟了以后就顺路带点消息，你懂的。
E: Back when I first arrived in the Underworld, I used to bring Natasha the medicines she needed. I did that for a while, and before long it was medicines and intel. You know how these things work.

C: 要不然，来试试这个？
E: Try this on for size?

C: 哎哟，不错哦。
E: Hey now! Pretty good.

C: 听说一直烦恼的话，头会变得很重很重，那不就更长不高了吗…呜……
E: People say if you worry too much, your head gets super heavy. Wouldn't that make it harder for me to get taller? Waaaah...

C: 早知道就把折叠椅拿出来了…
E: I should've brought a chair with me...

C: 不管什么手段，通通拿出来吧！
E: For a tough case like yours, we're gonna try them all!

C: 知道冠军的含金量了吗？
E: Now that's a gold-winning victory!

C: 哼，给我记着。
E: Hmph, you'll pay for that.

C: 少有人能像她这般，看清自己终究不过是银海中的一粟…值得敬佩。
E: Unlike her, very few can realize that they are nothing but a tiny mustard seed in this vast galaxy... She is worthy of my respect.

C: 不打紧。
E: Was that it?

C: 这孩子胆子虽小，但听了不少人夸奖她…我要是能有如此助力，便能省去不少心力…罢了罢了。
E: That girl may be shy, but she's been lauded by many... If I had that kind of assistance, it would take a load off my mind...

C: 花开富贵！
E: Wealth and wisdom!

C: 热闹的地方客人才多呢。
E: Busier places mean fizzier business.

C: 将军找我看病，大都是什么「眼睛困得睁不开」之类的病症，然后就问问我近况，稍坐一会儿便走，有时连药都不拿……
E: The general comes to me with ailments such as "too tired to stay awake," and then he just asks how I've been and leaves after sitting around for a while. Sometimes he doesn't even take any medicine from me...

C: 哎哟你病得不轻啊！
E: Looks like somebody needs a doctor!

C: 不会吧不会吧这就要回到因果殿了吗我不行我不可以除非…姐姐在。
E: No, no, no — must I return to the Hall of Karma so soon? I can't — I can't do it unless... unless sister is with me.

C: 尾巴：给老子滚——\n藿藿：噫……
E: Tail: Flee—\nHuohuo: *gasp*...

C: 熟悉的安全感…从里到外都烧了起来。
E: A familiar sense of security... It burns from the inside out.

C: 凭你的身手，定能带我全身而退…吧～
E: With your skills, we'll get out of this in one piece... right?

C: 哟，这一个钱得当三个花呀。
E: Oh, this should be spent wisely.

C: 省点时间！
E: Let's save some time!

C: 过招远比语言真诚，我更喜欢「以剑交心」。那位潇洒的曜青将军也是如此。
E: I prefer to make friends by sparring — after all, combat is more sincere than words. That carefree general of the Yaoqing is the same as me in that regard.

C: 来试试自己的斤两？
E: Gonna show me what you're made of?

C: 龙女大人，我们互相保护，定能渡过难关。
E: Dragon Lady, let us safeguard one another. Together, we can overcome any adversity.

C: 解谜亦如制香，差之毫厘失之千里。
E: Solving a puzzle is like making incense: The smallest of differences can cause the largest changes.

C: 你负责吸引注意力就好，我来下死手。别逞能。
E: You focus on drawing attention, and I'll take care of the dirty work. Don't try to show off.

C: 就此向善吧。
E: Embrace virtue.

C: 动动脑子！
E: Think!

C: 只能等你十秒哦，<unbreak>10</unbreak>、9…1！
E: You have <unbreak>10</unbreak> seconds — <unbreak>10</unbreak>, 9...1!

C: 暴雨将至。
E: Storm's on the horizon.

C: 我将，点燃星海！
E: I shall... set the seas ablaze!

C: 苦惘，敬请离身。
E: Torment and doubt, I bid you farewell.

C: 「神秘」总是引人焦虑，破除才好。
E: The Path of Enigmata often leads to unease. It's better to unveil it.

C: 音乐是一种跨越群星的语言，独奏是另一种形式的演说，对此我也略知一二。
E: Music is a language that spans the stars, and a solo performance is like a speech, which I know a thing or two about.

C: 啊…这？拿去玩吧~
E: Ah... You want this? Fine, take it and amuse yourself~

C: 逐火的一路，我失去了许多珍贵的事物，对此我没有半分怨言。唯有赛法利娅，我们分别的那一天，那湖泊般透亮的蓝色眼眸盖不住她的失落，她一定有说不出口的理由……
E: I have lost much on the Flame-Chase Journey, and I have not a single complaint. And yet... With Cifera... Her eyes, blue as the clearest lakes, could not mask her disappointment on the day we bid each other goodbye. There must be a reason, one she could not tell me...

C: 予你盛装。
E: Adorned in splendor.

C: 唔，少说奇怪的话啦！
E: Stop saying weird things!

C: 臣服，或者倒下！
E: Submit, or die!

C: 遨游书海或许是她敞开心扉的方式之一，但她想找到的答案，唯有靠亲手触摸才能获得。
E: Browsing books might be one of her ways to open her heart, but the answer she seeks can only be obtained through physical touch.

C: 有点疼。
E: That hurts a bit.

C: 这段时间以来，我可是从你那学到了不少「开拓」的精神。遨游星海，联结世界…若不是有使命在身，我也想试试做无名客的滋味！
E: I've learned much from you about the essence of "Trailblazing." Exploring the Cosmos, bridging worlds... If it weren't for my duties, I'd gladly try my hand at being a Nameless!

C: …或许我们的生命构成从来不同，但那颗在胸膛中跳动的「心」，同样灼热。
E: ...The composition of our existences may be fundamentally different, but the "heart" that beats within us both burns with the same heat.

C: 以血，淬火！
E: Quench the flames, with blood!

C: 我不会…忘记……
E: I won't... forget...

C: 医术是有限的，哪怕尽到最大的努力，有时也避免不了遗憾。所以，我也研习了照护与心理疏导，在这摇摇欲坠的世界，呵护心中的希望，同治愈病躯一样重要。
E: Medicine has its limits. Even if healers try our best, we can't cure everything. That's why I also studied nursing and psychological therapy, because healing a heart is as important as healing a body in this doomed world.

C: 刻律德菈大人，放心排兵布阵，后方就交给我吧。
E: Leave the rear to me, Lady Cerydra. Just focus on deploying your troops.

C: 是不同的疗愈方法？我也想学。
E: A different healing technique? I wanna learn!

C: 生命本如泡沫，何不趁早在宴会上尽情举杯呢？
E: Life is as fleeting as a bubble. All the more reason to lift your cup and indulge before the feast ends.

C: 又是一次脱胎换骨。
E: Another rebirth.

C: 金石之志。
E: A will of metal and stone.

C: 逃不掉哦~
E: You can't get away~

C: 以爱为始的故事，也一定以爱为终♪
E: A story that begins with love must also end with love ♪

C: 气氛已经烘托到位。
E: The mood is set just right.

C: 那些我以为遗忘的，其实从未离我远去。它们是诗行的起始，而一站站开拓，会续写更浪漫的篇章。
E: Things that I thought I had forgotten, in fact, never left me. They are the opening lines of the poem, and with every stop on the Trailblazing journey, they will continue to write even more romantic chapters.

E: Ascension Match Rules

E: Bucktaker

C: 最正确的三只奇美拉！
E: Three most righteous chimeras!

C: 先来与我抗衡吧！
E: You have to get through me first!

C: 喜欢小三月嗷呜~
E: I like March, awoo~

C: 拜托啦，再坚持会吧~
E: Come on, hang in there a little longer~

C: 荡除凶灾，护佑众生！
E: Calamity undone, protect all lives!

C: 吾师，这回可不会让你了。
E: Teacher... I won't go easy on you this time.

E: Trailblazer: Decisive Battle against Sunday

C: 焚身
E: Immolation

E: Glacial Erosion

C: 乐园我已然成就
E: Paradise have I wrought,

C: 我等已得拯救！
E: We are delivered!

C: 有关星核的颂歌
E: Hymn of the Stellaron

E: Black Swan: Recollection

E: Firefly's memories are slowly emerging...

C: 推荐选择多名擅长护盾和治疗的角色，保障我方单位生命值。
E: It is recommended to select multiple characters who excel at shielding and healing to protect your ally units' HP.

C: 灼烧而成的心房——然而，心有它自己的生命。它惯于逃避，雄心勃勃而不忠诚。
E: A heart forged in fire, yet it has a life of its own: prone to flight, ambitious and unfaithful.

C: 末法余烬
E: Ruinous Embers

E: {NICKNAME}, we meet again

E: I wonder if you know

C: 它的标语是：「下有天堂，上有星湖，一口记住，再不吃醋」
E: Their slogan goes: "With the heavens above and the star lake below, just one bite and you'll never feel sour again."

C: 我能和她聊聊吗？
E: Can I talk to her?

C: 曾经是由「纷争」雕琢的泰坦眷属，流淌着尼卡多利的金血，能承载泰坦灵魂的强大造物，如今却堕落成只知道杀戮的机器。
E: Once a Titankin sculpted from "Strife." They are infused with Nikador's golden ichor. They are mighty constructs capable of housing a Titan's soul. Today, they have degraded into nothing more than machines that know only slaughter.

C: 在遥远的造物世，艾格勒打造黎明机器后，它又在刻法勒协助下创造了代表各种泰坦的奇兽。据信，流星铁鹰代表着光照万物的艾格勒偶尔掉落尘世的羽毛。
E: In the ancient Era Creatura, Aquila, after forging the Dawn Device, collaborated with Kephale to bring forth the legendary beasts embodying the Titans. It is whispered that the Meteoric Eagle is a symbol of Aquila's celestial feathers that occasionally fall to the mortal realm.

C: 黑潮朽弓
E: Black Tide's Decrepit Bow

C: 拥有一定层数的【战甲】，使自身受到的伤害降低。受到攻击后减少自身1层【战甲】，减少到0层时，【战甲】被破坏，对自身造成大量虚数属性伤害，并使自身行动延后，使破坏【战甲】的我方单位恢复能量。【战甲】被破坏后，自身受到攻击时额外再受到少量虚数属性伤害。【战甲】在自身回合结束时恢复到最大层数。
E: Possesses a number of "War Armor" stacks, which decreases DMG taken. Loses 1 stack of "War Armor" on this unit after being attacked. When at 0 stacks, "War Armor" will be destroyed, dealing massive Imaginary DMG to this unit and delaying their action. The target that destroyed "War Armor" will regenerate Energy. After "War Armor" is destroyed, this unit will also additionally take minor Imaginary DMG when attacked. "War Armor" will be restored to maximum stacks at the end of this unit's turn.

C: 当目标生命值低于0时，会解除其弱点击破状态并获得【弱点无效】效果。
E: When the target's HP is below 0, dispels their Weakness Break state and grants the "Weakness Protected" effect to them.

C: 对我方全体目标造成基于目标生命上限的真实伤害。
E: Deals True DMG to all targets based on the target's Max HP.

C: 连续对我方随机单体目标造成物理属性伤害，目标生命值越高造成的伤害越高。
E: Consecutively deals Physical DMG to one random target. The higher the target's HP, the higher the DMG dealt.

C: 力拔云石
E: Cast Marble

C: 冥河的孤独难耐
E: River of Souls' Intolerable Solitude

C: 你带流萤来到晖长石号的观景位置，流萤夸赞你的眼光。烟花表演还没开始，流萤提议先坐一会儿。
E: You took Firefly to the viewing spot on the Radiant Feldspar, and she complimented your choice of location. Since the fireworks hadn't started yet, Firefly suggested sitting for a while.

C: 追忆：「太一之梦」
E: Recollection: "Ena's Dream"

C: <color=#f29e38ff>「火」</color>属性我方目标受到攻击或消耗生命值后，获得护盾，拥有的护盾值越高，击破特攻越高。
E: When a <color=#f29e38ff>Fire</color> ally target is attacked or loses HP, gains a Shield. The higher the Shield Effect, the higher the Break Effect.

C: 造成的伤害提高<color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>。
E: DMG dealt increases by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color>.

C: 被添加的额外冰弱点。
E: Additionally implanted Ice Weakness.

C: 新生，鲜灵，爱怜
E: Fresh, Ethereal, and Beloved

C: 天谴决斗
E: Fury Duel

C: 攻心扼吭
E: Shatterstrike

C: 变身！！！
E: Transform!!!

C: 家族在美梦中无所不能的关键，正是「梦主」歌斐木本人——而他亲自掩埋的阴暗罪行，或许会是调查的突破口。
E: Gopher Wood, the Dreammaster, is the key to The Family's absolute power within the sweet dream. The dark crimes he personally buried might just be the breakthrough we're looking for.

C: 流梦礁，死后的世界…家族究竟在隐瞒些什么？
E: Dreamflux Reef, the afterlife... What secrets is the Family hiding?

C: 在黑天鹅的帮助下，你从星期日编织的幻觉中醒来，然而，要想终结眼前的长夜，一个人的力量远远不够。
E: With Black Swan's help, you woke up from the illusion woven by Sunday. However, one person's strength alone is far from enough to end the Evernight before you.

C: 人们都已奔赴最后的战场，与黄泉进行道别，然后，将尽头变作起点。
E: Everyone has rushed to the final battlefield. Bid farewell to Acheron, and then, turn the end into a new beginning.

C: 回忆中的律令
E: The Laws Within the Memory

C: 查看附近的玩偶
E: Check the dolls in the area

C: 与清醒的人们会面
E: Meet up with the people who are awake

C: 在想什么呢？
E: Thinking hard over there?

C: 什么人？
E: Who's there?

C: 别在意。反正没抢过咱们。
E: Forget it. It's not like they won.

C: 别忘了你的「第一次死亡」。
E: Don't forget about your "First Death."

C: 为何偏偏在这个时候，有人要图谋不轨？
E: Why would someone choose this moment, of all times, to plot something sinister?

C: 要看你做了些什么…
E: It depends on what you did...

C: 我感知不到，恐怕返回现实了吧？
E: I can't sense them anymore. I'm afraid they must have gone back to reality.

C: 这些乌鸫，正是<color=#dbc291ff>「梦主」歌斐木的化身，那位在美梦中无所不能的存在</color>。在他面前，「死亡」不该拥有反抗之力。
E: These ravens are <color=#dbc291ff>the incarnation of the Dreammaster Gopher Wood, that omnipotent being in the sweet dream</color>. In front of him, even "Death" has no strength to resist.

C: 看来动作越快越好。
E: We better act fast.

C: 那时我才明白——<color=#dbc291ff>失熵症是名为{RUBY_B#繁育}「活着」{RUBY_E#}的死亡。</color>
E: That's when I realized... <color=#dbc291ff>Entropy Loss Syndrome is a death called {RUBY_B#Propagation}living{RUBY_E#}.</color>

C: 但愿你不是被刚才的重逢刺激到了。
E: I just hope that reunion a moment ago didn't rattle you.

C: 没事的，没事的，能自己选择如何死去，已经很棒啦。
E: It's fine, it's fine! At least I get to choose how to die. That alone is great.

C: 久远的往事就此浮现……
E: A distant past resurfaced...

C: 只要做得到，我必须避免{NICKNAME}沾染「虚无」的力量，哪怕一分一毫。毕竟，{F#她}{M#他}背负着的一切，不但更沉重，也更珍贵。
E: If possible, I must prevent {NICKNAME} from being tainted by the power of Nihility, even the slightest trace of it. After all, everything {F#s}he carries is not only heavier, but also more precious.

C: 真的是你……
E: It really is you...

C: 你是…流萤小姐？
E: Are you... Miss Firefly?

C: 这里安葬着家族试图掩藏的秘密，和一段悠久而浪漫的故事。可惜，其中的大多与我们无关。
E: Here lies secrets that The Family tried to conceal, and a long, romantic tale. Sadly, most of it has nothing to do with us.

C: …的确，除非是极端情况，这足以让我产生信任。
E: ...Indeed, unless it's an extreme situation, this is enough to earn my trust.

C: 你最值得信任的一点，就是你「永远不该被信任」，亲爱的。这一点，你也从未改变呢。
E: The most trustworthy thing about you is that you're "never to be trusted," darling. And that's one thing that's never changed about you.

C: 不过，你就不能讲述些我不知情的往事吗？你背叛了永火官邸…这难道还值得意外？
E: But can't you tell me something I don't already know? You betrayed the Ever-Flame Mansion... Is that really supposed to be surprising?

C: 借助卓瑞娜-乌尔德星系的技术，她将生命献给忆域，赋予了匹诺康尼的梦境一个「独有特征」。
E: Using the technology from the Zorina-Urd system, she gave her life to the Memory Zone, giving Penacony's Dreamscape a "unique signature."

C: 哈——你还挺像个无名客的。别扭，但又别扭得让人佩服。
E: Hah. You're quite like the Nameless. Awkward, but admirably so.

C: 用石头砸向那有罪的
E: Cast stones at the guilty

C: 途中所见的一切，不是为你准备的，而是为我——为了还你公道。
E: Everything you saw along the way, none of that was meant for you. It was meant for me, so that I could bring you justice.

C: 死亦有时。
E: Death comes for us all eventually.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>赐予你另一桩罪行。其恶弥天，一旦知晓，歌斐木这名字便要失去意义，你将虽生犹死</color>。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>I shall bestow upon you another crime. Its evil reaches even the heavens, and once known, the name Gopher Wood will lose all meaning. You will be alive in body but dead in spirit.</color>

C: 乐园我已然成就
E: Paradise have I wrought,

C: 其他人呢？
E: What about the others?

C: 其三，是由家族建立的「十二时刻」，这里最先与现实开始融合，本身就是一个巨大的陷阱。
E: Third, there's the Twelve Hours established by the Family. This layer was the first to merge with reality and is itself an enormous trap.

C: 你应该知道，那是不可能实现的愿望。
E: You should know that's a wish that can never come true.

C: 难道你认为，和{NICKNAME}度过的时光，足以说明什么吗？
E: Do you really think that the time you spent with {NICKNAME} proved anything?

C: 《崩坏：星穹铁道》
E: Honkai: Star Rail

C: 黑天鹅
E: Black Swan

C: 何妨，本就并非我意，我等便以人之姿，辨明「终论」！
E: So be it! It wasn't my intention anyway. Let us discern in human form the "Final Conclusion"!

C: 「用漫天大火焚烧冬日的旷野，才能让那些毁不掉的事物重现。」
E: "Only by enkindling the winter wilderness with flames that cross the sky can we make the indestructible manifest once more."

C: <color=#dbc291ff>但那力量，必然将导致第三次——我的症状会不可抑制地加快，失熵而死。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>But that power would inevitably lead me to the third death... My symptoms would accelerate uncontrollably until I die of entropy loss.</color>

C: 对了，康士坦丝的秘密据点，是不是还能在匹诺康尼找到来着？
E: Oh right. Wasn't Constance's secret stronghold still somewhere in Penacony?

C: 嘀、答…*又*见面了，宾客。这是我与你的第几百次相遇了呢？
E: Tick... tock... We meet again, dear guest. How many times have we danced this dance? Hundreds?

C: 嘀、答…我知道，你是来处理残党的…呵，当初加入「业务组」的时候，我就想象过这个瞬间，却没想到它来得如此突兀。
E: Tick... tock... I know the drill. You're here for the clean-up, heh... I knew this day would come the moment I signed up to be a part of the "Business Team." I just didn't expect it to come so soon.

C: 从高处俯瞰，耳边只有呼呼风声，眼前一切都如此渺小…这是前所未见的景色。
E: Looking down from above, with only the whistling wind in my ears, everything before me seems so small... It's a view I've never seen before.

C: 我和缇宝老师也会参加，都是灰宝熟悉的伙伴，所以别紧张，就当是场和大家的游戏吧。
E: Lady Tribbie and I will be there too. We're all your friends, Grayie, so don't be nervous. Just think of it as a game with everyone.

C: 嗷呜。我还可以帮小风堇团结队伍成员，获得比赛胜利！
E: Awoo! I can also help Cinny unite the team members and secure victory in the match!

C: 引领者的回响
E: Resonance of the Pioneer

C: 敌方首领在<color=#f29e38ff>受到我方一定次数的攻击后</color>会使我方一名角色陷入【幻身】状态，该状态下【致幻人鱼】将代替该角色进行战斗。【致幻人鱼】会继承角色的部分属性。
E: After the boss enemy <color=#f29e38ff>receives a certain number of attacks from allies</color>, one ally character will enter the "Phantom Illusion" state. While in this state, the "Hallucinogenic Mermaid" will take the character's place in combat. "Hallucinogenic Mermaid" will inherit some of the character's stats.

C: 这里是<color=#f29e38ff>道具</color>的效果。
E: Here are the <color=#f29e38ff>items'</color> effects.

C: 火苗，愈发躁动了。
E: The flame flickers ever stronger.

C: 因厌烦一成不变的「毁灭」，我踏入流光忆庭，不久后，我受够了腐朽的「记忆」，以「焚化工」的身份行走至今…有人将背叛视作我的天性，倒不如说，我享受「背叛」的时刻。撕开命运束缚的时候，即便痛彻心扉，却也无比愉悦……
E: I joined the Garden of Recollection out of my dislike for the unchanging Destruction. Soon after that, I grew tired of the rotten Remembrance and have been walking this universe as a Cremator ever since. Some say that it is in my instincts to betray, but I say that I enjoy the moment of "betrayal." Even if my heart bleeds in pain when I tear apart the shackles of fate, I still feel such an unparalleled delight...
